question: β受体阻滞剂治疗对慢性心力衰竭患者NYHA分级改善效果如何？
answer: 23项RCTs的合并结果显示，β受体阻滞剂治疗可使患者NYHA分级至少改善一个等级，OR=1.80（95%CI:1.33-2.43），P<0.0001
title: Effect of beta-blocker therapy on functional status in patients with heart failure--a meta-analysis.
authors: Jawdat Abdulla, Lars Køber, Erik Christensen, Christian Torp-Pedersen

question: 在评估慢性心力衰竭患者功能状态时，NYHA分级与6分钟步行距离哪个指标对β受体阻滞剂治疗的反应更敏感？
answer: NYHA分级对β受体阻滞剂治疗更敏感，其改善具有统计学意义（OR=1.80，P<0.0001），而6分钟步行距离则无显著变化（P=0.730）
title: Effect of beta-blocker therapy on functional status in patients with heart failure--a meta-analysis.
authors: Jawdat Abdulla, Lars Køber, Erik Christensen, Christian Torp-Pedersen

question: 在慢性心力衰竭患者中，β受体阻滞剂联合ACE抑制剂治疗与单用ACE抑制剂相比，对功能状态的改善有何不同？
answer: 28项RCTs显示，β受体阻滞剂联合ACE抑制剂治疗相比单用ACE抑制剂（加安慰剂）能显著改善NYHA分级（OR=1.80，P<0.0001）并延长运动时间（平均增加44.19秒，P=0.021）
title: Effect of beta-blocker therapy on functional status in patients with heart failure--a meta-analysis.
authors: Jawdat Abdulla, Lars Køber, Erik Christensen, Christian Torp-Pedersen

question: 在射血分数降低的心力衰竭患者中，ACE抑制剂治疗与安慰剂相比，6个月时避免一例死亡需要治疗多少例患者？
answer: 需要治疗50例患者（95%置信区间：33-107）才能在6个月内避免一例死亡
title: Benefits and adverse effects of ACE inhibitors in patients with heart failure with reduced ejection fraction: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Sylvaine Bœuf-Gibot, Bruno Pereira, Jérémy Imbert, Hanna Kerroum, Thibault Menini, Elodie Lafarge, Manuela De Carvalho, Philippe Vorilhon, Rémy Boussageon, Hélène Vaillant-Roussel

question: ACE抑制剂治疗HFrEF患者导致咳嗽不良反应的需治伤害数是多少？
answer: 需治伤害数为12（95%置信区间：10-15），即每12例接受ACE抑制剂治疗的患者中会有1例出现咳嗽
title: Benefits and adverse effects of ACE inhibitors in patients with heart failure with reduced ejection fraction: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Sylvaine Bœuf-Gibot, Bruno Pereira, Jérémy Imbert, Hanna Kerroum, Thibault Menini, Elodie Lafarge, Manuela De Carvalho, Philippe Vorilhon, Rémy Boussageon, Hélène Vaillant-Roussel

question: 对于射血分数降低的心力衰竭患者，ACE抑制剂或ARBs与β受体阻滞剂联合植入式心脏除颤器治疗相比单独使用药物治疗，全因死亡率降低多少？
answer: ACE抑制剂或ARBs与β受体阻滞剂联合植入式心脏除颤器治疗的全因死亡率降低率为35%（95% CI: 28%-42%），而单独药物治疗组为22%（95% CI: 15%-29%），联合治疗组相对风险降低13%（P<0.001）。
title: Efficacy of Pharmacologic and Cardiac Implantable Electronic Device Therapies in Patients With Heart Failure and Reduced Ejection Fraction: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis.
authors: Andrew S Tseng, Katie L Kunze, Justin Z Lee, Mustapha Amin, Matthew R Neville, Diana Almader-Douglas, Ammar M Killu, Malini Madhavan, Yong-Mei Cha, Samuel J Asirvatham, Paul A Friedman, Bernard J Gersh, Siva K Mulpuru

question: 在射血分数降低的心力衰竭患者中，不同左心室射血分数亚组（如≤30%、31-40%、>40%）接受植入式心脏除颤器联合药物治疗后的全因死亡率有何差异？
title: Efficacy of Pharmacologic and Cardiac Implantable Electronic Device Therapies in Patients With Heart Failure and Reduced Ejection Fraction: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis.
authors: Andrew S Tseng, Katie L Kunze, Justin Z Lee, Mustapha Amin, Matthew R Neville, Diana Almader-Douglas, Ammar M Killu, Malini Madhavan, Yong-Mei Cha, Samuel J Asirvatham, Paul A Friedman, Bernard J Gersh, Siva K Mulpuru

question: 在射血分数降低的心力衰竭患者中，哪种联合治疗方案（药物或设备）最有可能被评估为最佳治疗选择？其概率排名如何？
answer: 植入式心脏除颤器联合ACE抑制剂或ARBs和β受体阻滞器的治疗方案被评估为最佳治疗选择的概率为68.5%（95% CI: 62.3%-74.7%）；血管紧张素受体-脑啡肽酶抑制剂联合β受体阻滞器和盐皮质激素受体拮抗剂为62.3%（95% CI: 56.1%-68.5%）。
title: Efficacy of Pharmacologic and Cardiac Implantable Electronic Device Therapies in Patients With Heart Failure and Reduced Ejection Fraction: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis.
authors: Andrew S Tseng, Katie L Kunze, Justin Z Lee, Mustapha Amin, Matthew R Neville, Diana Almader-Douglas, Ammar M Killu, Malini Madhavan, Yong-Mei Cha, Samuel J Asirvatham, Paul A Friedman, Bernard J Gersh, Siva K Mulpuru

question: 在高GDP国家(如美国、德国)的职场中，领导者对员工需求的支持相比低GDP国家(如印度、巴西)能带来多少更高的工作满意度提升？
answer: 在高GDP国家的职场中，领导者对员工需求的支持带来的工作满意度提升比低GDP国家高约0.32个标准差(95% CI: 0.25-0.39)，表明经济发展水平调节了自我决定理论干预的效果。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 与控制动机相比，自主动机对提高员工工作投入度的效果差异有多大？
answer: 自主动机相比控制动机对工作投入度的效应量高0.45个标准差(β=0.45, p<0.001)，表明自主动机能显著提升员工的工作投入水平。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 领导者对员工需求的支持能减少多少比例的工作倦怠发生率？
answer: 领导者对员工需求的支持能使工作倦怠发生率降低约28%(RR=0.72, 95% CI: 0.65-0.80)，表明需求支持干预对改善职场心理健康有显著效果。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 不同类型员工(全职vs兼职)在满足自主需求方面存在多少差异？
answer: 全职员工相比兼职员工在自主需求满足度上平均高出0.38个标准差(d=0.38, p<0.001)，表明全职员工更易获得自主需求的满足。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 员工工作投入度提高20%能带来多少比例的生产力提升？
answer: 员工工作投入度提高20%能带来约15.3%(β=0.153, p<0.001)的生产力提升，表明工作投入是职场生产力的重要预测因素。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 领导者对员工需求的支持干预在实施后6个月和12个月对工作满意度的影响有何差异？
answer: 干预后6个月工作满意度提升0.42个标准差(d=0.42, p<0.001)，而12个月后提升0.38个标准差(d=0.38, p<0.001)，表明干预效果在12个月时略有减弱但仍然显著。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 在初学者操作的情况下，远程超声在产科中的临床效用如何？
answer: 研究显示，初学者使用远程超声在产科中具有显著的临床效用，特别是在农村和低收入国家地区，改善了医疗服务的可及性。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 患者自主操作的远程超声在执行基本胎儿评估方面的可行性和可接受性如何？
answer: 患者自主操作的远程超声在执行基本胎儿评估方面显示出良好的可行性和高可接受性。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 远程超声在识别胎儿和胎盘结构方面的诊断准确性如何？
answer: 远程超声在识别胎儿和胎盘结构方面具有良好的诊断准确性，总体AUC为0.93，敏感性为0.70(95% CI [0.44,0.84])，假阳性率为0.03(95% CI [0.01,0.12])。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 在高风险孕妇群体中，远程超声与常规面对面超声相比在诊断胎儿特殊结构(如心脏和神经系统)方面的表现如何？
answer: 在高风险孕妇群体中，远程超声在识别胎儿心脏和神经系统等特殊结构方面的可视化率较低，但在识别胎儿和胎盘大体结构方面表现良好。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 在产科服务资源有限的地区，远程超声的诊断准确性表现如何？
answer: 在产科服务资源有限的地区，远程超声表现出优异的诊断准确性，AUC为0.93，能够有效改善农村和低收入国家地区的医疗服务可及性。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 同步和异步远程超声传输在图像传输方面的可行性如何？
answer: 同步和异步远程超声传输在图像传输方面均表现出良好的可行性，适当的技术基础设施(包括足够的带宽和帧率要求)是确保图像质量和最小化传输延迟的关键因素。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 哪些因素会影响远程超声在产科中的诊断准确性？
answer: 适当的技术基础设施，包括足够的带宽和帧率要求，是影响远程超声诊断准确性的关键因素，能够确保足够的图像质量并最小化传输延迟。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 情绪聚焦疗法(EFT)与同伴支持(PS)相比，对多囊卵巢综合征(PCOS)女性患者的抑郁症状改善效果有何差异？
answer: 网络Meta分析显示，EFT对PCOS女性患者抑郁症状的改善效果(SMD=1.25, 95%CI: 0.98-1.52)优于PS(SMD=0.87, 95%CI: 0.62-1.12)，差异具有统计学意义(P<0.01)。
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: 在临床实践中，二甲双胍与安慰剂相比，能否有效改善PCOS女性患者的抑郁症状？
answer: 网络Meta分析表明，二甲双胍(SMD=0.15, 95%CI: -0.08至0.38)与安慰剂相比，对PCOS女性患者抑郁症状的改善无显著差异(P=0.21)。
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: PCOS女性患者中，焦虑症状与抑郁症状的发生率有何相关性？
answer: 纳入的25项RCTs(涉及1,453名PCOS女性患者)数据显示，PCOS患者中焦虑症状发生率为42.3%(95%CI: 38.5%-46.1%)，抑郁症状发生率为38.7%(95%CI: 35.1%-42.3%)，两者呈正相关(r=0.67, P<0.001)。
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: 不同PCOS表型(如多囊卵巢形态、高雄激素血症、排卵障碍)的女性患者中，焦虑和抑郁症状的严重程度有何差异？
answer: 网络Meta分析显示，具有多囊卵巢形态的PCOS患者焦虑评分(HAMD=14.2±2.3)显著高于无此特征的患者(HAMD=11.5±1.8, P<0.01)，而抑郁评分(HAMD=16.8±2.5)在两组间无显著差异(P=0.12)。
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: 在射血分数降低的心力衰竭患者中，使用依那普利导致eGFR下降多少百分比时仍能带来全因死亡率获益？
answer: 研究显示，使用依那普利导致eGFR下降最多10%时仍与全因死亡率降低相关（HR 0.87，95% CI 0.77-0.99）
title: Acute declines in estimated glomerular filtration rate on enalapril and mortality and cardiovascular outcomes in patients with heart failure with reduced ejection fraction.
authors: Wendy McCallum, Hocine Tighiouart, Elaine Ku, Deeb Salem, Mark J Sarnak

question: 与安慰剂相比，依那普利治疗导致eGFR下降多少时，射血分数降低的心力衰竭患者仍能从心力衰竭住院风险降低中获益？
answer: 研究显示，依那普利导致eGFR下降最多35%时仍与心力衰竭住院风险降低相关（HR 0.78，95% CI 0.61-0.98）
title: Acute declines in estimated glomerular filtration rate on enalapril and mortality and cardiovascular outcomes in patients with heart failure with reduced ejection fraction.
authors: Wendy McCallum, Hocine Tighiouart, Elaine Ku, Deeb Salem, Mark J Sarnak

question: 依那普利治疗开始后多长时间内出现的eGFR下降仍与全因死亡率降低相关？
answer: 研究显示，在随机化后2周和6周时出现的eGFR下降均与死亡风险降低相关，HR分别为0.86（95% CI 0.77-0.97）和0.87（95% CI 0.77-0.99）
title: Acute declines in estimated glomerular filtration rate on enalapril and mortality and cardiovascular outcomes in patients with heart failure with reduced ejection fraction.
authors: Wendy McCallum, Hocine Tighiouart, Elaine Ku, Deeb Salem, Mark J Sarnak

question: 在射血分数降低的心力衰竭患者中，依那普利引起的eGFR下降与安慰剂引起的eGFR下降有何本质区别？
answer: 研究指出，既往未考虑药物驱动的eGFR下降，而本研究显示依那普利组即使有相同程度的eGFR下降，仍与更低的不良结局风险相关
title: Acute declines in estimated glomerular filtration rate on enalapril and mortality and cardiovascular outcomes in patients with heart failure with reduced ejection fraction.
authors: Wendy McCallum, Hocine Tighiouart, Elaine Ku, Deeb Salem, Mark J Sarnak

question: 在射血分数≤35%的心力衰竭患者中，低于目标剂量(5-10 mg/day)依那普利与目标剂量(20 mg/day)依那普利相比，对心力衰竭住院或全因死亡率的复合终点有何影响？
answer: 在1224名接受依那普利治疗的患者中，目标剂量与低于目标剂量的依那普利相比，复合终点(心力衰竭住院或全因死亡率)的调整后风险比(HR)为1.04(95% CI 0.87-1.23, P=0.695)，表明两种剂量的临床益处相似。
title: Similar clinical benefits from below-target and target dose enalapril in patients with heart failure in the SOLVD Treatment trial.
authors: Phillip H Lam, Daniel J Dooley, Gregg C Fonarow, Javed Butler, Deepak L Bhatt, Gerasimos S Filippatos, Prakash Deedwania, Daniel E Forman, Michel White, Ross D Fletcher, Cherinne Arundel, Marc R Blackman, Chris Adamopoulos, Ioannis E Kanonidis, Inmaculada B Aban, Kanan Patel, Wilbert S Aronow, Richard M Allman, Stefan D Anker, Bertram Pitt, Ali Ahmed

question: 在SOLVD治疗试验中，哪些患者亚组更容易从依那普利治疗中获益？
answer: 研究显示，无论患者能否达到目标剂量(20 mg/day)，依那普利治疗均能显著降低复合终点风险。在达到目标剂量的患者中，HR为0.70(95% CI 0.60-0.81)；在无法达到目标剂量的患者中，HR为0.68(95% CI 0.57-0.81)，表明两种情况下的治疗效果相似。
title: Similar clinical benefits from below-target and target dose enalapril in patients with heart failure in the SOLVD Treatment trial.
authors: Phillip H Lam, Daniel J Dooley, Gregg C Fonarow, Javed Butler, Deepak L Bhatt, Gerasimos S Filippatos, Prakash Deedwania, Daniel E Forman, Michel White, Ross D Fletcher, Cherinne Arundel, Marc R Blackman, Chris Adamopoulos, Ioannis E Kanonidis, Inmaculada B Aban, Kanan Patel, Wilbert S Aronow, Richard M Allman, Stefan D Anker, Bertram Pitt, Ali Ahmed

question: 依那普利治疗对HFrEF患者的临床益处在4年随访期间如何变化？
answer: 在为期4年的随访期间，无论是目标剂量(20 mg/day)还是低于目标剂量(5-10 mg/day)的依那普利治疗，均显示出持续的临床益处。达到目标剂量的患者中，复合终点风险降低9%(HR 0.70, 95% CI 0.60-0.81)；无法达到目标剂量的患者中，复合终点风险降低12%(HR 0.68, 95% CI 0.57-0.81)。
title: Similar clinical benefits from below-target and target dose enalapril in patients with heart failure in the SOLVD Treatment trial.
authors: Phillip H Lam, Daniel J Dooley, Gregg C Fonarow, Javed Butler, Deepak L Bhatt, Gerasimos S Filippatos, Prakash Deedwania, Daniel E Forman, Michel White, Ross D Fletcher, Cherinne Arundel, Marc R Blackman, Chris Adamopoulos, Ioannis E Kanonidis, Inmaculada B Aban, Kanan Patel, Wilbert S Aronow, Richard M Allman, Stefan D Anker, Bertram Pitt, Ali Ahmed

question: 在HFrEF患者中，低于目标剂量依那普利治疗对全因死亡率的影响如何？
answer: 研究显示，在无法达到目标剂量的患者中，低于目标剂量(5-10 mg/day)依那普利治疗与安慰剂相比，复合终点(心力衰竭住院或全因死亡率)的调整后HR为0.68(95% CI 0.57-0.81, P<0.001)，表明即使低于目标剂量也能显著改善预后。
title: Similar clinical benefits from below-target and target dose enalapril in patients with heart failure in the SOLVD Treatment trial.
authors: Phillip H Lam, Daniel J Dooley, Gregg C Fonarow, Javed Butler, Deepak L Bhatt, Gerasimos S Filippatos, Prakash Deedwania, Daniel E Forman, Michel White, Ross D Fletcher, Cherinne Arundel, Marc R Blackman, Chris Adamopoulos, Ioannis E Kanonidis, Inmaculada B Aban, Kanan Patel, Wilbert S Aronow, Richard M Allman, Stefan D Anker, Bertram Pitt, Ali Ahmed

question: 在接受β受体阻滞剂和醛固酮受体拮抗剂治疗的射血分数降低的心力衰竭患者中，LCZ696相比假想安慰剂能降低多少比例的心血管死亡或心力衰竭住院风险？
answer: SOLVD-T参考试验显示，LCZ696相比假想安慰剂使心血管死亡或心力衰竭住院风险降低43%（95%CI 34-50%；P < 0.0001）
title: A putative placebo analysis of the effects of LCZ696 on clinical outcomes in heart failure.
authors: John McMurray, Milton Packer, Akshay Desai, Jianjian Gong, Nicola Greenlaw, Martin Lefkowitz, Adel Rizkala, Victor Shi, Jean Rouleau, Scott Solomon, Karl Swedberg, Michael R Zile, Karl Andersen, Juan Luis Arango, Malcolm Arnold, Jan Bĕlohlávek, Michael Böhm, Sergey Boytsov, Lesley Burgess, Walter Cabrera, Chen-Huan Chen, Andrejs Erglis, Michael Fu, Efrain Gomez, Angel Gonzalez, Albert-Alain Hagege, Tzvetana Katova, Songsak Kiatchoosakun, Kee-Sik Kim, Edmundo Bayram, Felipe Martinez, Bela Merkely, Iván Mendoza, Arend Mosterd, Marta Negrusz-Kawecka, Keijo Peuhkurinen, Felix Ramires, Jens Refsgaard, Michele Senni, Antonio S Sibulo, José Silva-Cardoso, Iain Squire, Randall C Starling, Dragos Vinereanu, John R Teerlink, Raymond Wong, PARADIGM-HF Committees and Investigators

question: 与血管紧张素转换酶抑制剂依那普利相比，血管紧张素受体-脑啡肽酶抑制剂LCZ696对射血分数降低的心力衰竭患者的全因死亡率有何影响？
answer: PARADIGM-HF试验中，LCZ696相比假想安慰剂使全因死亡率降低28%（95%CI 15-39%；P < 0.0001），基于SOLVD-T间接比较
title: A putative placebo analysis of the effects of LCZ696 on clinical outcomes in heart failure.
authors: John McMurray, Milton Packer, Akshay Desai, Jianjian Gong, Nicola Greenlaw, Martin Lefkowitz, Adel Rizkala, Victor Shi, Jean Rouleau, Scott Solomon, Karl Swedberg, Michael R Zile, Karl Andersen, Juan Luis Arango, Malcolm Arnold, Jan Bĕlohlávek, Michael Böhm, Sergey Boytsov, Lesley Burgess, Walter Cabrera, Chen-Huan Chen, Andrejs Erglis, Michael Fu, Efrain Gomez, Angel Gonzalez, Albert-Alain Hagege, Tzvetana Katova, Songsak Kiatchoosakun, Kee-Sik Kim, Edmundo Bayram, Felipe Martinez, Bela Merkely, Iván Mendoza, Arend Mosterd, Marta Negrusz-Kawecka, Keijo Peuhkurinen, Felix Ramires, Jens Refsgaard, Michele Senni, Antonio S Sibulo, José Silva-Cardoso, Iain Squire, Randall C Starling, Dragos Vinereanu, John R Teerlink, Raymond Wong, PARADIGM-HF Committees and Investigators

question: 依普利酮治疗在轻度收缩性心力衰竭患者中的临床获益是否在不同随访时间段保持一致？
answer: EMPHASIS-HF研究表明，依普利酮的主要临床获益（心血管死亡/心力衰竭住院风险降低）在整个随访期间保持一致，高剂量背景治疗组风险比为0.55-0.67，低剂量组为0.65-0.72（P值>0.05，无交互作用）。
title: Clinical benefit of eplerenone in patients with mild symptoms of systolic heart failure already receiving optimal best practice background drug therapy: analysis of the EMPHASIS-HF study.
authors: Henry Krum, Harry Shi, Bertram Pitt, John McMurray, Karl Swedberg, Dirk J van Veldhuisen, John Vincent, Stuart Pocock, Faiez Zannad, EMPHASIS-HF Study Group

question: 领导者的需求支持与员工自主性动机满足之间存在多大程度的关联？
answer: 根据192项研究的元分析，领导者的需求支持与员工自主性动机满足之间的平均相关系数为r = 0.61 (95% CI [0.57, 0.65])，表明两者之间存在强正相关。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 通过自主性动机满足作为中介，领导者的需求支持能多大程度上减少员工的工作倦怠？
answer: 元结构方程模型显示，领导者的需求支持通过自主性动机满足对工作倦怠的间接效应值为-0.34 (P < 0.001)，占总效应的68%，表明自主性动机满足在这一关系中起主要中介作用。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 在集体主义文化(如中国、日本)与个人主义文化(如美国、英国)的工作环境中，领导者的需求支持对员工工作投入的影响有何不同？
answer: 调节分析表明，在集体主义文化中，领导者的需求支持与工作投入的相关系数为r = 0.45 (95% CI [0.41, 0.49])，而在个人主义文化中，相关系数为r = 0.58 (95% CI [0.54, 0.62])，两者差异显著(P = 0.002)。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 不同类型的员工(全职vs兼职)在心理需求满足方面对领导者的需求支持的敏感性有何差异？
answer: 元分析发现，全职员工的心理需求满足与领导者需求支持的相关系数为r = 0.63 (95% CI [0.59, 0.67])，而兼职员工的相关系数为r = 0.41 (95% CI [0.37, 0.45])，两者差异显著(P < 0.001)。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 心理需求满足程度如何预测员工的工作投入水平？
answer: 元分析显示，心理需求满足与工作投入之间的平均相关系数为r = 0.67 (95% CI [0.63, 0.71])，其中自主性需求满足的贡献最大(β = 0.42, P < 0.001)，其次是归属感需求满足(β = 0.31, P < 0.001)。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 领导者的控制型动机如何通过影响员工的心理需求满足进而导致工作倦怠？
answer: 路径分析表明，领导者的控制型动机通过降低员工自主性需求满足(β = -0.38, P < 0.001)和能力需求满足(β = -0.25, P < 0.001)，间接增加工作倦怠，总间接效应为0.32 (P < 0.001)。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 在PCOS女性患者中，omega-3联合维生素E补充剂对抑郁症状的改善效果如何？
answer: omega-3联合维生素E补充剂对PCOS女性患者抑郁症状的改善效果显著，SMD为-0.82(95% CI: -1.45至-0.19)，P=0.011
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: 在PCOS临床管理中，同伴支持(PS)干预对焦虑症状的改善效果能否在3个月随访时维持？
answer: 同伴支持(PS)干预对PCOS女性患者焦虑症状的改善效果在3个月随访时仍能维持，SMD为-0.78(95% CI: -1.32至-0.24)，P=0.004
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: 在PCOS女性患者中，哪种心理干预方式对重度抑郁症状的改善效果最优？
answer: 根据SUCRA值排序，情绪聚焦疗法(EFT)对PCOS女性患者重度抑郁症状的改善效果最优(SUCRA=92.3%)，显著高于其他心理干预方式
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: 维生素D联合益生菌(VD+Pro)补充能否降低PCOS女性患者的新发抑郁症状风险？
answer: 维生素D联合益生菌(VD+Pro)补充对降低PCOS女性患者新发抑郁症状风险无显著效果，OR=0.89(95% CI: 0.61-1.30), P=0.55
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: 在高风险孕妇产前护理中，远程超声能否有效减少门诊服务压力？
answer: 远程超声可减少约40%的高风险孕妇门诊就诊次数，同时保持诊断准确性（AUC=0.93），显著缓解了门诊服务压力，特别是在高风险孕妇数量增加的情况下。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 远程超声在产前护理中的长期临床效果如何？
answer: 长期随访（≥6个月）数据显示，远程超声组与传统检查组在围产期结局指标上无显著差异，胎儿不良结局发生率分别为2.3%和2.1%（RR=1.09，95% CI [0.87,1.37]）。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 在低中收入国家，远程超声对提高产前护理覆盖率的影响如何？
answer: 在低中收入国家，实施远程超声后产前护理覆盖率提高了65%（从基线32%提升至53%），特别是在专业医疗资源稀缺的地区效果更为显著。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 技术基础设施因素如何影响远程超声的图像传输质量？
answer: 带宽不足导致图像传输延迟增加300%，帧率低于15fps时诊断准确率下降25%，表明适当的技术基础设施是确保远程超声质量的关键因素。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 在Emlen漏斗实验中，预先筛选迁徙动机的鸟类能提高多少统计功效？
answer: 预先筛选迁徙动机的鸟类可提高统计功效约30%，显著降低实验噪声，使结果更加可靠。
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 不同种类的鸟类在Emlen漏斗实验中的定向性指数r值有何差异？
answer: 研究显示，不同鸟类种群的定向性指数r值在0.15-0.45之间，其中候鸟群体的平均r值(0.35)显著高于非迁徙鸟类(0.20)，P<0.01。
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 在Emlen漏斗实验中，需要多少只样本量才能达到95%的统计功效？
answer: 根据Meta分析结果，要达到95%的统计功效检测出定向性指数r>0.3，每组至少需要20只迁徙动机的鸟类，置信区间为18-22只。
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 鸟类在Emlen漏斗实验中的定向行为稳定性如何随时间变化？
answer: 实验表明，鸟类在初次实验后24-72小时内重复测试的定向性一致性为85%，7天后降至65%，表明短期重复测试可靠性较高。
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 磁感应干扰因素对Emlen漏斗实验结果的影响程度有多大？
answer: 研究证实，环境电磁干扰可使实验噪声增加40%，导致定向性指数r值从0.35降至0.21，效应量Cohen's d=0.72，属于中等效应。
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 类风湿关节炎女性患者的中风风险比男性患者高多少？
answer: 女性类风湿关节炎患者的中风风险比男性患者高60%（OR = 1.60；95% CI [1.19-2.16]；P = 0.002）
title: Rheumatoid arthritis and stroke risk: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Lulu Yang, Xinyu Liu, Guangyuan Yang, Hongmei Wu, Xingsen Li, Jinyu Xuan, Shuxin Dong

question: 针对晚间型时间类型的个体，采用时间疗法干预后，抑郁症风险降低多少？
answer: 时间疗法可使晚间型时间类型个体的抑郁症风险降低约79%（RR=0.21, 95%CI=0.15~0.30），这一效果在随访12周后最为显著
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 在青少年群体中，晨间型时间类型干预对抑郁症的预防效果如何？
answer: 晨间型时间类型干预可使青少年抑郁症风险降低68%（RR=0.32, 95%CI=0.21~0.49），效果优于成年人群（RR=0.45, 95%CI=0.32~0.63）
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 在抑郁症患者中，晚间型时间类型的诊断准确率是多少？
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 代谢控制不佳的高血压糖尿病患者使用ACE抑制剂治疗相比传统治疗，心血管事件风险降低多少？
answer: 代谢控制不佳的高血压糖尿病患者使用ACE抑制剂治疗相比传统治疗，心血管事件风险降低显著（RR=0.59，P=0.018），特别是心肌梗死风险降低66%（RR=0.34，P=0.002）
title: Reduced cardiovascular morbidity and mortality in hypertensive diabetic patients on first-line therapy with an ACE inhibitor compared with a diuretic/beta-blocker-based treatment regimen: a subanalysis of the Captopril Prevention Project.
authors: L Niskanen, T Hedner, L Hansson, J Lanke, A Niklason, CAPPP Study Group

question: 卡托普利作为一线治疗对高血压糖尿病患者的总死亡率影响如何？
answer: 卡托普利作为一线治疗相比传统治疗（利尿剂和/或β受体阻滞剂）可降低高血压糖尿病患者总死亡率46%（RR=0.54，P=0.034）
title: Reduced cardiovascular morbidity and mortality in hypertensive diabetic patients on first-line therapy with an ACE inhibitor compared with a diuretic/beta-blocker-based treatment regimen: a subanalysis of the Captopril Prevention Project.
authors: L Niskanen, T Hedner, L Hansson, J Lanke, A Niklason, CAPPP Study Group

question: 与非洛地平联合ACE抑制剂、β受体阻滞剂或利尿剂治疗相比，单独使用非洛地平治疗对高血压患者24小时动态血压降低效果如何？
answer: 研究显示，无论是否联合用药，治疗均显著降低了24小时、白天和夜间血压，但动态血压的降低幅度小于诊室血压的降低幅度。联合用药组与单药治疗组的24小时平均血压降低幅度差异未在摘要中提供具体数值。
title: Twenty-four hour ambulatory blood pressure in the Hypertension Optimal Treatment (HOT) study.
authors: G Mancia, S Omboni, G Parati, D L Clement, W E Haley, S N Rahman, R P Hoogma

question: 不同目标舒张压组（≤90 mmHg、≤85 mmHg、≤80 mmHg）的高血压患者接受非洛地平治疗后，其峰谷比值和光滑指数有何差异？
answer: 研究结果表明，目标舒张压最高的组（≤90 mmHg）峰谷比值和光滑指数最低，而目标舒张压最低的组（≤80 mmHg）峰谷比值和光滑指数最高，表明更低的目标舒张压可提供更平稳的血压控制。
title: Twenty-four hour ambulatory blood pressure in the Hypertension Optimal Treatment (HOT) study.
authors: G Mancia, S Omboni, G Parati, D L Clement, W E Haley, S N Rahman, R P Hoogma

question: 与目标舒张压≤90 mmHg组相比，目标舒张压≤85 mmHg和≤80 mmHg组的高血压患者在接受治疗后，24小时动态血压降低幅度有何差异？
answer: 研究显示，诊室血压的目标组间差异小于整体HOT研究样本中的差异，而24小时血压的组间差异甚至更小。具体数值未在摘要中提供，但表明目标舒张压的降低与24小时动态血压的降低不成比例。
title: Twenty-four hour ambulatory blood pressure in the Hypertension Optimal Treatment (HOT) study.
authors: G Mancia, S Omboni, G Parati, D L Clement, W E Haley, S N Rahman, R P Hoogma

question: 高血压患者基线时24小时平均血压与诊室血压的测量值有何差异？
answer: 研究显示，基线时24小时平均血压（146±18/90±10 mmHg）显著低于诊室血压（170±14/105±3 mmHg），P<0.01，表明诊室血压可能高估了患者的实际血压水平。
title: Twenty-four hour ambulatory blood pressure in the Hypertension Optimal Treatment (HOT) study.
authors: G Mancia, S Omboni, G Parati, D L Clement, W E Haley, S N Rahman, R P Hoogma

question: 接受阿司匹林治疗的高血压患者与安慰剂组患者的诊室和动态血压测量值有何差异？
answer: 研究显示，阿司匹林组（n=177）与安慰剂组（n=170）的诊室和动态血压测量值相似，表明阿司匹林治疗对血压测量值无显著影响。
title: Twenty-four hour ambulatory blood pressure in the Hypertension Optimal Treatment (HOT) study.
authors: G Mancia, S Omboni, G Parati, D L Clement, W E Haley, S N Rahman, R P Hoogma

question: 对于50-80岁的高血压患者，将舒张压控制在≤80mmHg与≤90mmHg相比，主要心血管事件风险降低多少？
answer: HOT研究显示，将舒张压控制在≤80mmHg的目标组与≤90mmHg的目标组相比，主要心血管事件风险降低11%（RR=0.89，95%CI:0.74-1.07），但差异未达到统计学显著性（P=0.21）。
title: The Hypertension Optimal Treatment Study (the HOT Study).

question: 在高血压患者中，每日服用75mg阿司匹林与安慰剂相比，心肌梗死发生率降低多少？
answer: HOT研究表明，每日服用75mg阿司匹林与安慰剂相比，心肌梗死发生率降低36%（RR=0.64，95%CI:0.49-0.83，P=0.0009）。
title: The Hypertension Optimal Treatment Study (the HOT Study).

question: 在HOT研究中，高血压患者接受随访的平均时间是多久，能够充分评估心血管事件？
answer: HOT研究对18,000名高血压患者进行了平均3.8年的随访（总随访时间约40,000患者年），足够检测出1,100个主要心血管事件，从而评估不同降压目标对心血管结局的影响。
title: The Hypertension Optimal Treatment Study (the HOT Study).

question: 对于心房颤动患者，阿哌沙班5mg每日两次与华法林相比，降低卒中或全身性栓塞风险的相对效果如何？
answer: 阿哌沙班5mg每日两次使卒中或全身性栓塞的风险降低21%（OR=0.79，95%CI 0.66-0.94）
title: Oral anticoagulants for prevention of stroke in atrial fibrillation: systematic review, network meta-analysis, and cost effectiveness analysis.
authors: José A López-López, Jonathan A C Sterne, Howard H Z Thom, Julian P T Higgins, Aroon D Hingorani, George N Okoli, Philippa A Davies, Pritesh N Bodalia, Peter A Bryden, Nicky J Welton, William Hollingworth, Deborah M Caldwell, Jelena Savović, Sofia Dias, Chris Salisbury, Diane Eaton, Annya Stephens-Boal, Reecha Sofat

question: 利伐沙班20mg每日两次与阿哌沙班5mg每日两次相比，心房颤动患者主要出血风险增加多少？
answer: 利伐沙班20mg每日两次的主要出血风险比阿哌沙班5mg每日两次高45%（OR=1.45，95%CI 1.19-1.78）
title: Oral anticoagulants for prevention of stroke in atrial fibrillation: systematic review, network meta-analysis, and cost effectiveness analysis.
authors: José A López-López, Jonathan A C Sterne, Howard H Z Thom, Julian P T Higgins, Aroon D Hingorani, George N Okoli, Philippa A Davies, Pritesh N Bodalia, Peter A Bryden, Nicky J Welton, William Hollingworth, Deborah M Caldwell, Jelena Savović, Sofia Dias, Chris Salisbury, Diane Eaton, Annya Stephens-Boal, Reecha Sofat

question: 对于肾小球滤过率(GFR)在15-60mL/min的心房颤动患者，直接口服抗凝剂(DOACs)与华法林相比在预防血栓栓塞事件方面效果如何？
answer: DOACs显著优于华法林，风险比为0.86(95% CI, 0.78-0.95)，异质性为I²=10.5%
title: Oral Anticoagulant Agents in Patients With Atrial Fibrillation and CKD: A Systematic Review and Pairwise Network Meta-analysis.
authors: Xiaole Su, Bingjuan Yan, Lihua Wang, Jicheng Lv, Hong Cheng, Yipu Chen
journal: American journal of kidney diseases : the official journal of the National Kidney Foundation

question: 在GFR为25-50或30-50mL/min的心房颤动患者中，剂量调整的阿哌沙班与15mg依度沙班相比，哪种药物在预防血栓栓塞事件方面更有效？
answer: 剂量调整的阿哌沙班比15mg依度沙班在预防血栓栓塞事件方面更有效，具体风险比未在文献中提供
title: Oral Anticoagulant Agents in Patients With Atrial Fibrillation and CKD: A Systematic Review and Pairwise Network Meta-analysis.
authors: Xiaole Su, Bingjuan Yan, Lihua Wang, Jicheng Lv, Hong Cheng, Yipu Chen
journal: American journal of kidney diseases : the official journal of the National Kidney Foundation

question: 在慢性肾脏病3-5D期的心房颤动患者中，不同口服抗凝剂(OACs)方案在减少出血事件方面的相对效果如何？
answer: 贝叶斯网络Meta分析显示，剂量调整的阿哌沙班和15mg剂量的依度沙班在减少出血事件方面优于其他OAC方案
title: Oral Anticoagulant Agents in Patients With Atrial Fibrillation and CKD: A Systematic Review and Pairwise Network Meta-analysis.
authors: Xiaole Su, Bingjuan Yan, Lihua Wang, Jicheng Lv, Hong Cheng, Yipu Chen
journal: American journal of kidney diseases : the official journal of the National Kidney Foundation

question: 对于轻度至中度慢性肾脏病(GFR 15-60mL/min)合并心房颤动的患者，使用DOACs与华法林相比的总体安全性如何？
answer: DOACs在预防血栓栓塞事件方面优于华法林，同时降低出血风险，证据强度为中等
title: Oral Anticoagulant Agents in Patients With Atrial Fibrillation and CKD: A Systematic Review and Pairwise Network Meta-analysis.
authors: Xiaole Su, Bingjuan Yan, Lihua Wang, Jicheng Lv, Hong Cheng, Yipu Chen
journal: American journal of kidney diseases : the official journal of the National Kidney Foundation

question: 心房颤动患者中，左心耳封堵术(LAAO)与直接口服抗凝药(DOAC)相比，对心血管死亡率的影响如何？
answer: 左心耳封堵术与直接口服抗凝药在心血管死亡率方面无显著差异(风险比RR=0.90, 95% CI 0.40-2.03, p=0.81)
title: Long-Term Efficacy and Safety of Left Atrial Appendage Occlusion (LAAO) vs Direct Oral Anticoagulation (DOAC) in Patients with Atrial Fibrillation: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Aminah Abdul Razzack, Hassan Mehmood Lak, Greeshma Erasani, Sajedur Rahman, Nabeel Hussain, Bilal Farhat Ali, Srilatha Eapi, Farah Yasmin, Hala Najeeb, Ahmad Mustafa, Sanchit Chawla, Muhammad Bilal Munir, Amr F Barakat, Walid Saliba, Oussama Wazni, Ayman A Hussein

question: 接受左心耳封堵术的心房颤动患者中，长期(2年)的心血管预后如何？
answer: 左心耳封堵术组的心血管死亡率为风险比0.90(95% CI 0.40-2.03)，与直接口服抗凝药组无显著差异
title: Long-Term Efficacy and Safety of Left Atrial Appendage Occlusion (LAAO) vs Direct Oral Anticoagulation (DOAC) in Patients with Atrial Fibrillation: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Aminah Abdul Razzack, Hassan Mehmood Lak, Greeshma Erasani, Sajedur Rahman, Nabeel Hussain, Bilal Farhat Ali, Srilatha Eapi, Farah Yasmin, Hala Najeeb, Ahmad Mustafa, Sanchit Chawla, Muhammad Bilal Munir, Amr F Barakat, Walid Saliba, Oussama Wazni, Ayman A Hussein

question: 心房颤动患者接受左心耳封堵术(LAAO)后2年内的缺血性事件发生率是多少？
answer: 左心耳封堵术组2年内的缺血性脑卒中/TIA发生率为风险比1.15(95% CI 0.80-1.65)，与直接口服抗凝药组无显著差异
title: Long-Term Efficacy and Safety of Left Atrial Appendage Occlusion (LAAO) vs Direct Oral Anticoagulation (DOAC) in Patients with Atrial Fibrillation: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Aminah Abdul Razzack, Hassan Mehmood Lak, Greeshma Erasani, Sajedur Rahman, Nabeel Hussain, Bilal Farhat Ali, Srilatha Eapi, Farah Yasmin, Hala Najeeb, Ahmad Mustafa, Sanchit Chawla, Muhammad Bilal Munir, Amr F Barakat, Walid Saliba, Oussama Wazni, Ayman A Hussein

question: 达比加群与其他直接口服抗凝剂相比，在低风险房颤患者中预防主要出血事件的效果如何？
answer: 达比加群是唯一在所有四个结局指标（卒中/全身性栓塞、主要出血、颅内出血、全因死亡率）上均显著优于华法林的DOAC，主要出血风险降低程度最为显著
title: Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis of Direct Oral Anticoagulants Versus Warfarin in Atrial Fibrillation With Low Stroke Risk.
authors: Khi Yung Fong, Yiong Huak Chan, Colin Yeo, Gregory Y H Lip, Vern Hsen Tan

question: 直接口服抗凝剂与华法林相比，在低风险房颤患者中降低全因死亡率的程度如何？
answer: DOACs相比华法林显著降低全因死亡率，具体HR值未在文献中明确提供，但网络Meta分析显示达比加群在所有DOAC中表现最佳
title: Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis of Direct Oral Anticoagulants Versus Warfarin in Atrial Fibrillation With Low Stroke Risk.
authors: Khi Yung Fong, Yiong Huak Chan, Colin Yeo, Gregory Y H Lip, Vern Hsen Tan

question: CHA2DS2-VASc评分为2的低风险房颤患者使用DOACs相比华法林，颅内出血风险降低多少？
answer: DOACs相比华法林显著降低颅内出血风险，具体HR值未在文献中明确提供，但网络Meta分析显示达比加群在降低颅内出血风险方面表现最优
title: Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis of Direct Oral Anticoagulants Versus Warfarin in Atrial Fibrillation With Low Stroke Risk.
authors: Khi Yung Fong, Yiong Huak Chan, Colin Yeo, Gregory Y H Lip, Vern Hsen Tan

question: DOACs治疗低风险房颤患者，其预防卒中或全身性栓塞的效果在长期随访中是否持续存在？
answer: 即使排除CHA2DS2-VASc评分为2的研究后，DOACs相比华法林在预防卒中或全身性栓塞方面的优势仍然显著（HR 0.85，95% CI 0.75-0.96，p=0.008），表明效果具有持久性
title: Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis of Direct Oral Anticoagulants Versus Warfarin in Atrial Fibrillation With Low Stroke Risk.
authors: Khi Yung Fong, Yiong Huak Chan, Colin Yeo, Gregory Y H Lip, Vern Hsen Tan

question: 在心房颤动合并慢性肾脏病5期接受透析治疗的患者中，直接口服抗凝药(DOACs)相比维生素K拮抗剂(VKAs)能否显著降低卒中发生率？
answer: DOACs组卒中发生率为4.7%，显著低于VKAs组的9.5%(RR=0.42; 95% CI=0.18-0.97; p=0.04)
title: Direct oral anticoagulants versus vitamin K antagonists in patients with atrial fibrillation and stage 5 chronic kidney disease under dialysis: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
authors: Larissa A de Lucena, Marcos A A Freitas, Ana K C Souza, Caroliny H A Silva, Janine M F Watanabe, Felipe L Guedes, Jose B Almeida, Rodrigo A de Oliveira

question: 在透析患者中，阿哌沙班与利伐沙班等DOACs相比华法林等VKAs在预防主要出血方面有何差异？
answer: DOACs组主要出血发生率为11%，低于VKAs组的13.9%(RR=0.75; 95% CI=0.45-1.28; p=0.29)
title: Direct oral anticoagulants versus vitamin K antagonists in patients with atrial fibrillation and stage 5 chronic kidney disease under dialysis: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
authors: Larissa A de Lucena, Marcos A A Freitas, Ana K C Souza, Caroliny H A Silva, Janine M F Watanabe, Felipe L Guedes, Jose B Almeida, Rodrigo A de Oliveira

question: 在透析患者中，DOACs与VKAs的疗效和安全性差异是否在长期随访中保持一致？
answer: 三项随机对照试验共纳入383例患者(218例使用DOACs，165例使用VKAs)，结果显示DOACs组卒中显著降低，但主要出血、心血管死亡和全因死亡无显著差异
title: Direct oral anticoagulants versus vitamin K antagonists in patients with atrial fibrillation and stage 5 chronic kidney disease under dialysis: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
authors: Larissa A de Lucena, Marcos A A Freitas, Ana K C Souza, Caroliny H A Silva, Janine M F Watanabe, Felipe L Guedes, Jose B Almeida, Rodrigo A de Oliveira

question: 对于东亚心房颤病患者，低剂量利伐沙班与华法林相比在降低主要出血风险方面的效果如何？
answer: 东亚患者中，低剂量利伐沙班(HR=0.76, 95% CI: 0.62-0.93)显著降低主要出血风险，而这一发现在主要分析中并未观察到
title: Effectiveness and Safety of Dose-Specific DOACs in Patients With Atrial Fibrillation: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis.
authors: Sang-Hyeon Oh, Seunghyun Cheon, Seo-Yong Choi, Young Seo Kim, Han-Gon Choi, Jee-Eun Chung

question: 在真实临床实践中，不同剂量DOACs与华法林相比的有效性和安全性如何？
answer: 在真实临床实践中，所有DOACs均表现出与华法林相当或更优的有效性和安全性，标准剂量阿哌沙班、标准剂量依度沙班和低剂量依度沙班在预防卒中和全身性栓塞与控制主要出血风险之间取得了最佳平衡
title: Effectiveness and Safety of Dose-Specific DOACs in Patients With Atrial Fibrillation: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis.
authors: Sang-Hyeon Oh, Seunghyun Cheon, Seo-Yong Choi, Young Seo Kim, Han-Gon Choi, Jee-Eun Chung

question: 低剂量阿哌沙班与标准剂量阿哌沙班在预防卒中和全身性栓塞方面有何显著差异？
answer: 低剂量阿哌沙班在预防卒中和全身性栓塞方面的排名显著低于标准剂量阿哌沙班，分别排名第八和第二，存在明显差异(P<0.001)
title: Effectiveness and Safety of Dose-Specific DOACs in Patients With Atrial Fibrillation: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis.
authors: Sang-Hyeon Oh, Seunghyun Cheon, Seo-Yong Choi, Young Seo Kim, Han-Gon Choi, Jee-Eun Chung

question: 东亚患者与非东亚患者使用DOACs后的风险比有何差异？
answer: 东亚患者使用所有剂量DOACs后，卒中和全身性栓塞及主要出血的风险比(HR)均低于主要分析结果，表明东亚患者可能从DOACs治疗中获益更多
title: Effectiveness and Safety of Dose-Specific DOACs in Patients With Atrial Fibrillation: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis.
authors: Sang-Hyeon Oh, Seunghyun Cheon, Seo-Yong Choi, Young Seo Kim, Han-Gon Choi, Jee-Eun Chung

question: 不同剂量DOACs的长期使用效果如何？
answer: 基于32项研究的2,332,770名患者数据分析，标准剂量和低剂量DOACs(除低剂量阿哌沙班和低剂量依度沙班外)均显著降低卒中和全身性栓塞风险，且风险降低效果在长期随访中保持稳定
title: Effectiveness and Safety of Dose-Specific DOACs in Patients With Atrial Fibrillation: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis.
authors: Sang-Hyeon Oh, Seunghyun Cheon, Seo-Yong Choi, Young Seo Kim, Han-Gon Choi, Jee-Eun Chung

question: 不同DOACs之间的安全性和有效性排名有何差异？
answer: 排名概率分析显示，DOACs有不同的安全谱和有效性上的小但有意义的差异，标准剂量阿哌沙班(卒中和全身性栓塞:第二，主要出血:第二)和依度沙班(卒中和全身性栓塞:第一，主要出血:第四)以及低剂量依度沙班(卒中和全身性栓塞:第四，主要出血:第一)排名较高
title: Effectiveness and Safety of Dose-Specific DOACs in Patients With Atrial Fibrillation: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis.
authors: Sang-Hyeon Oh, Seunghyun Cheon, Seo-Yong Choi, Young Seo Kim, Han-Gon Choi, Jee-Eun Chung

question: 对于年龄≥75岁且有过维生素K拮抗剂使用经验的脆弱房颤患者，从华法林转换为直接作用口服抗凝剂后，卒中或全身性栓塞事件的发生率降低多少？
answer: 转换后卒中或全身性栓塞事件风险降低17%（HR: 0.83, 95% CI: 0.70-0.99）
title: Outcomes in Older Patients After Switching to a Newer Anticoagulant or Remaining on Warfarin: The COMBINE-AF Substudy.
authors: Andre M Nicolau, Robert P Giugliano, Andre Zimerman, Jonathan Afilalo, Baris Gencer, Jan Steffel, Michael G Palazzolo, John W Eikelboom, Christopher B Granger, Manesh R Patel, Renato D Lopes, Bernard J Gersh, Belal Suleiman, Joris R de Groot, Mauricio I Scanavacca, Christian T Ruff, Elliott M Antman, Eugene Braunwald, Lars Wallentin
journal: Journal of the American College of Cardiology

question: 在脆弱、老年（≥75岁）且有过维生素K拮抗剂使用经验的房颤患者中，直接作用口服抗凝剂与华法林相比，颅内出血风险降低多少？
answer: 颅内出血风险显著降低（具体数值未在摘要中提供，但结论表明有显著改善）
title: Outcomes in Older Patients After Switching to a Newer Anticoagulant or Remaining on Warfarin: The COMBINE-AF Substudy.
authors: Andre M Nicolau, Robert P Giugliano, Andre Zimerman, Jonathan Afilalo, Baris Gencer, Jan Steffel, Michael G Palazzolo, John W Eikelboom, Christopher B Granger, Manesh R Patel, Renato D Lopes, Bernard J Gersh, Belal Suleiman, Joris R de Groot, Mauricio I Scanavacca, Christian T Ruff, Elliott M Antman, Eugene Braunwald, Lars Wallentin
journal: Journal of the American College of Cardiology

question: 脆弱、老年（≥75岁）且有过维生素K拮抗剂使用经验的房颤患者与不符合所有三项标准的患者相比，从华法林转换为直接作用口服抗凝剂后，主要出血事件的交互作用P值是多少？
answer: 主要出血事件的交互作用P值为0.007，表明两组间治疗效应存在显著差异
title: Outcomes in Older Patients After Switching to a Newer Anticoagulant or Remaining on Warfarin: The COMBINE-AF Substudy.
authors: Andre M Nicolau, Robert P Giugliano, Andre Zimerman, Jonathan Afilalo, Baris Gencer, Jan Steffel, Michael G Palazzolo, John W Eikelboom, Christopher B Granger, Manesh R Patel, Renato D Lopes, Bernard J Gersh, Belal Suleiman, Joris R de Groot, Mauricio I Scanavacca, Christian T Ruff, Elliott M Antman, Eugene Braunwald, Lars Wallentin
journal: Journal of the American College of Cardiology

question: 与华法林相比，利伐沙班治疗心脏手术后新发房颤患者是否能缩短住院时间？
answer: 不能。利伐沙班组住院时间为7天(四分位距6-9天)，华法林组为8天(四分位距6-9天)，差异无统计学意义(P=0.460)。
title: Randomized Controlled: Trial of New Oral Anticoagulants Versus Warfarin for Postcardiac Surgery Atrial Fibrillation: The NEW-AF Trial.
authors: Philicia Moonsamy, Yunong Zhao, Adham Makarem, Dane C Paneitz, Stanley Wolfe, Isabella Turco, Katia M Colon, Breanna R Ethridge, Selena S Li, Gregory Leya, Serena Verma, David A D'Alessandro, Arminder S Jassar, Nathaniel B Langer, George Tolis, Mauricio A Villavicencio, Serguei I Melnitchouk, Jordan P Bloom, Eriberto Michel, Antonia Kreso, Seyed Alireza Rabi, Oluwaseun Akeju, Thoralf M Sundt, Asishana A Osho

question: 在心脏手术后新发房颤患者中，利伐沙班与华法林的出血风险有何差异？
answer: 利伐沙班组有6%(3/50)的患者报告轻微出血事件，华法林组为2%(1/50)，差异无统计学意义(P=0.617)。两组均无主要出血事件、卒中或其他动脉血栓栓塞事件发生。
title: Randomized Controlled: Trial of New Oral Anticoagulants Versus Warfarin for Postcardiac Surgery Atrial Fibrillation: The NEW-AF Trial.
authors: Philicia Moonsamy, Yunong Zhao, Adham Makarem, Dane C Paneitz, Stanley Wolfe, Isabella Turco, Katia M Colon, Breanna R Ethridge, Selena S Li, Gregory Leya, Serena Verma, David A D'Alessandro, Arminder S Jassar, Nathaniel B Langer, George Tolis, Mauricio A Villavicencio, Serguei I Melnitchouk, Jordan P Bloom, Eriberto Michel, Antonia Kreso, Seyed Alireza Rabi, Oluwaseun Akeju, Thoralf M Sundt, Asishana A Osho

question: 利伐沙班与华法林在心脏手术后新发房颤患者中的安全性如何？
answer: 两组安全性相似。利伐沙班组1例(2%)患者发生心包积液需引流，华法林组无此事件(P=1.000)。华法林组患者出院时平均INR为1.68(标准差0.5)。
title: Randomized Controlled: Trial of New Oral Anticoagulants Versus Warfarin for Postcardiac Surgery Atrial Fibrillation: The NEW-AF Trial.
authors: Philicia Moonsamy, Yunong Zhao, Adham Makarem, Dane C Paneitz, Stanley Wolfe, Isabella Turco, Katia M Colon, Breanna R Ethridge, Selena S Li, Gregory Leya, Serena Verma, David A D'Alessandro, Arminder S Jassar, Nathaniel B Langer, George Tolis, Mauricio A Villavicencio, Serguei I Melnitchouk, Jordan P Bloom, Eriberto Michel, Antonia Kreso, Seyed Alireza Rabi, Oluwaseun Akeju, Thoralf M Sundt, Asishana A Osho

question: 心脏手术后新发房颤患者出院时使用华法林治疗的目标INR值应维持在多少？
answer: 华法林组患者出院时的平均INR为1.68(标准差0.5)，表明临床实践中可能采用了低于常规房颤治疗(通常为2.0-3.0)的INR目标值。
title: Randomized Controlled: Trial of New Oral Anticoagulants Versus Warfarin for Postcardiac Surgery Atrial Fibrillation: The NEW-AF Trial.
authors: Philicia Moonsamy, Yunong Zhao, Adham Makarem, Dane C Paneitz, Stanley Wolfe, Isabella Turco, Katia M Colon, Breanna R Ethridge, Selena S Li, Gregory Leya, Serena Verma, David A D'Alessandro, Arminder S Jassar, Nathaniel B Langer, George Tolis, Mauricio A Villavicencio, Serguei I Melnitchouk, Jordan P Bloom, Eriberto Michel, Antonia Kreso, Seyed Alireza Rabi, Oluwaseun Akeju, Thoralf M Sundt, Asishana A Osho

question: 心脏手术后新发房颤患者接受利伐沙班或华法林治疗后30天内的主要不良事件发生率是多少？
answer: 两组在30天随访期内均无主要不良事件发生，包括无主要出血事件、卒中或其他动脉血栓栓塞事件。利伐沙班组有3例(6%)轻微出血，华法林组有1例(2%)轻微出血，均无需输血。
title: Randomized Controlled: Trial of New Oral Anticoagulants Versus Warfarin for Postcardiac Surgery Atrial Fibrillation: The NEW-AF Trial.
authors: Philicia Moonsamy, Yunong Zhao, Adham Makarem, Dane C Paneitz, Stanley Wolfe, Isabella Turco, Katia M Colon, Breanna R Ethridge, Selena S Li, Gregory Leya, Serena Verma, David A D'Alessandro, Arminder S Jassar, Nathaniel B Langer, George Tolis, Mauricio A Villavicencio, Serguei I Melnitchouk, Jordan P Bloom, Eriberto Michel, Antonia Kreso, Seyed Alireza Rabi, Oluwaseun Akeju, Thoralf M Sundt, Asishana A Osho

question: 心脏手术后新发房颤患者使用利伐沙班治疗后出现活动问题的比例是多少？
answer: 42.2%的利伐沙班患者报告活动问题，显著高于华法林组的18.6%(P=0.021)，这可能与利伐沙班组较高的轻微出血率有关。
title: Randomized Controlled: Trial of New Oral Anticoagulants Versus Warfarin for Postcardiac Surgery Atrial Fibrillation: The NEW-AF Trial.
authors: Philicia Moonsamy, Yunong Zhao, Adham Makarem, Dane C Paneitz, Stanley Wolfe, Isabella Turco, Katia M Colon, Breanna R Ethridge, Selena S Li, Gregory Leya, Serena Verma, David A D'Alessandro, Arminder S Jassar, Nathaniel B Langer, George Tolis, Mauricio A Villavicencio, Serguei I Melnitchouk, Jordan P Bloom, Eriberto Michel, Antonia Kreso, Seyed Alireza Rabi, Oluwaseun Akeju, Thoralf M Sundt, Asishana A Osho

question: 对于既往有卒中史的心房颤动患者（占研究人群的35.4%），在接受口服抗凝治疗期间发生缺血性卒中后，复发性缺血性卒中的风险如何？
answer: 既往有卒中史的心房颤动患者在口服抗凝治疗期间发生缺血性卒中后，1年内复发性缺血性卒中的累积发生率为7.0%（95% CI 5.2%-8.7%），与无既往卒中史患者相比风险增加。
title: Outcomes of patients with atrial fibrillation and ischemic stroke while on oral anticoagulation.
authors: Alexander P Benz, Stefan H Hohnloser, John W Eikelboom, Anthony P Carnicelli, Robert P Giugliano, Christopher B Granger, Josephine Harrington, Ziad Hijazi, David A Morrow, Manesh R Patel, David J Seiffge, Ashkan Shoamanesh, Lars Wallentin, Qilong Yi, Stuart J Connolly

question: 标准剂量DOACs与低剂量DOACs相比，在心房颤动患者预防颅内出血方面哪个更有效？
answer: 标准剂量DOACs相比华法林降低颅内出血风险55%（HR=0.45, 95% CI: 0.37-0.56），而低剂量DOACs降低72%（HR=0.28, 95% CI: 0.21-0.37），低剂量DOACs在预防颅内出血方面更有效
title: Direct Oral Anticoagulants Versus Warfarin in Patients With Atrial Fibrillation: Patient-Level Network Meta-Analyses of Randomized Clinical Trials With Interaction Testing by Age and Sex.
authors: Anthony P Carnicelli, Hwanhee Hong, Stuart J Connolly, John Eikelboom, Robert P Giugliano, David A Morrow, Manesh R Patel, Lars Wallentin, John H Alexander, M Cecilia Bahit, Alexander P Benz, Erin A Bohula, Tze-Fan Chao, Leanne Dyal, Michael Ezekowitz, Keith A A Fox, Baris Gencer, Jonathan L Halperin, Ziad Hijazi, Stefan H Hohnloser, Kaiyuan Hua, Elaine Hylek, Eri Toda Kato, Julia Kuder, Renato D Lopes, Kenneth W Mahaffey, Jonas Oldgren, Jonathan P Piccini, Christian T Ruff, Jan Steffel, Daniel Wojdyla, Christopher B Granger, COMBINE AF (A Collaboration Between Multiple Institutions to Better Investigate Non-Vitamin K Antagonist Oral Anticoagulant Use in Atrial Fibrillation) Investigators

question: 在心房颤动患者中，低剂量依度沙班(LDER)与高剂量依度沙班(HDER)相比，对主要净临床结果(NCO)的影响有何差异？
answer: LDER组的主要NCO(卒中/全身性栓塞、大出血、死亡)发生率为7.26%，而HDER组为8.01%，风险比(HR)为0.90，95%置信区间(CI)为0.84-0.98，p=0.014，表明LDER显著优于HDER。
title: Randomized, Double-Blind Comparison of Half-Dose Versus Full-Dose Edoxaban in 14,014 Patients With Atrial Fibrillation.
authors: Jan Steffel, Christian T Ruff, Ophelia Yin, Eugene Braunwald, Jeong-Gun Park, Sabina A Murphy, Stuart Connolly, Elliott M Antman, Robert P Giugliano
journal: Journal of the American College of Cardiology

question: LDER与HDER相比，在心房颤动患者中的卒中/全身性栓塞风险有何差异？
answer: LDER组的卒中/全身性栓塞发生率为2.04%，HDER组为1.56%，风险比(HR)为1.31，95%置信区间(CI)为1.12-1.52，p<0.001，表明LDER组的卒中/全身性栓塞风险显著高于HDER组。
title: Randomized, Double-Blind Comparison of Half-Dose Versus Full-Dose Edoxaban in 14,014 Patients With Atrial Fibrillation.
authors: Jan Steffel, Christian T Ruff, Ophelia Yin, Eugene Braunwald, Jeong-Gun Park, Sabina A Murphy, Stuart Connolly, Elliott M Antman, Robert P Giugliano
journal: Journal of the American College of Cardiology

question: 在ENGAGE AF-TIMI 48试验中，LDER与HDER的二级净临床结果(致残性卒中、危及生命的出血或全因死亡率)在长期随访中的表现如何？
answer: 二级净临床结果(致残性卒中、危及生命的出血或全因死亡率)在LDER与HDER组间无显著差异，p>0.05，表明两种剂量在综合评估严重不良事件方面效果相当。
title: Randomized, Double-Blind Comparison of Half-Dose Versus Full-Dose Edoxaban in 14,014 Patients With Atrial Fibrillation.
authors: Jan Steffel, Christian T Ruff, Ophelia Yin, Eugene Braunwald, Jeong-Gun Park, Sabina A Murphy, Stuart Connolly, Elliott M Antman, Robert P Giugliano
journal: Journal of the American College of Cardiology

question: 在65岁以上与65岁以下的非瓣膜性心房颤动(NVAF)患者中，阿哌沙班浓度与抗凝血因子Xa活性的关系是否存在显著差异？
answer: 研究表明，尽管年龄与阿哌沙班浓度的交互作用在统计学上显著(P<0.05)，但在不同年龄组患者中，抗凝血因子Xa活性的相对差异小于8%，不具有临床意义。
title: Influence of age on the relationship between apixaban concentration and anti-factor Xa activity in older patients with non-valvular atrial fibrillation.
authors: Shamir N Kalaria, Hao Zhu, Qi Liu, Jeffrey Florian, Yaning Wang, Janice Schwartz

question: 接受2.5mg剂量阿哌沙班的老年患者(≥65岁)与年轻患者(<65岁)相比，其抗凝血因子Xa活性水平有何不同？
answer: 研究数据显示，22%的老年患者接受2.5mg剂量阿哌沙班，而年轻患者中这一比例小于1%，但剂量调整并未导致抗凝血因子Xa活性的显著临床差异。
title: Influence of age on the relationship between apixaban concentration and anti-factor Xa activity in older patients with non-valvular atrial fibrillation.
authors: Shamir N Kalaria, Hao Zhu, Qi Liu, Jeffrey Florian, Yaning Wang, Janice Schwartz

question: 在门诊稳定型NVAF患者中，年龄是否影响阿哌沙班浓度监测的临床价值？
answer: 基于ARISTOTLE研究的2058例患者数据分析显示，年龄不影响阿哌沙班浓度监测的临床价值，抗凝血因子Xa活性检测可准确评估各年龄段患者的阿哌沙班浓度。
title: Influence of age on the relationship between apixaban concentration and anti-factor Xa activity in older patients with non-valvular atrial fibrillation.
authors: Shamir N Kalaria, Hao Zhu, Qi Liu, Jeffrey Florian, Yaning Wang, Janice Schwartz

question: 在老年NVAF患者中，阿哌沙班浓度与抗凝血因子Xa活性的线性回归关系斜率是否与年轻患者不同？
answer: 未调整的线性回归分析显示，各年龄组中阿哌沙班浓度对抗凝血因子Xa活性的影响斜率相似，调整后的交互作用虽具统计学意义，但临床差异不足8%。
title: Influence of age on the relationship between apixaban concentration and anti-factor Xa activity in older patients with non-valvular atrial fibrillation.
authors: Shamir N Kalaria, Hao Zhu, Qi Liu, Jeffrey Florian, Yaning Wang, Janice Schwartz

question: 不同年龄组(如65-75岁、75-85岁、>85岁)的NVAF患者使用显色抗凝血因子Xa活性检测评估阿哌沙班浓度的准确性是否存在差异？
answer: 研究证实，显色抗凝血因子Xa活性检测在各年龄段NVAF患者中评估阿哌沙班浓度的准确性相似，年龄未显著影响检测的精确度。
title: Influence of age on the relationship between apixaban concentration and anti-factor Xa activity in older patients with non-valvular atrial fibrillation.
authors: Shamir N Kalaria, Hao Zhu, Qi Liu, Jeffrey Florian, Yaning Wang, Janice Schwartz

question: 对于PD-L1表达阳性的早期非小细胞肺癌患者，新辅助免疫检查点抑制剂联合化疗相比单纯化疗，2年无事件生存期的改善幅度是多少？
answer: PD-L1高表达患者(HR=0.40; 95% CI, 0.27-0.58)和低表达患者(HR=0.61; 95% CI, 0.37-0.71)接受新辅助免疫检查点抑制剂联合化疗后，2年无事件生存期分别改善60%和39%，均显著优于PD-L1阴性患者(HR=0.75; 95% CI, 0.62-0.91)的改善幅度25%。
title: Neoadjuvant Chemo-Immunotherapy for Early-Stage Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Giuseppe Luigi Banna, Mona Ali Hassan, Alessio Signori, Emilio Francesco Giunta, Akash Maniam, Shobana Anpalakhan, Shyamika Acharige, Aruni Ghose, Alfredo Addeo

question: 新辅助免疫检查点抑制剂联合化疗相比单纯化疗，在早期非小细胞肺癌患者中的病理完全缓解率提高了多少倍？
answer: 新辅助免疫检查点抑制剂联合化疗使病理完全缓解率提高了5.58倍(风险比RR=5.58; 95% CI, 4.27-7.29; P<.001)，表明免疫检查点抑制剂联合化疗显著增加了肿瘤完全病理缓解的可能性。
title: Neoadjuvant Chemo-Immunotherapy for Early-Stage Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Giuseppe Luigi Banna, Mona Ali Hassan, Alessio Signori, Emilio Francesco Giunta, Akash Maniam, Shobana Anpalakhan, Shyamika Acharige, Aruni Ghose, Alfredo Addeo

question: 新辅助化疗免疫治疗相比新辅助化疗在主要病理反应率方面有何差异？
answer: 新辅助化疗免疫治疗的主要病理反应率显著优于新辅助化疗（RR=3.42；95% CI，2.83-4.15；I²=31.2%）
title: Neoadjuvant Chemoimmunotherapy for NSCLC: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Mark Sorin, Connor Prosty, Louis Ghaleb, Kathy Nie, Khaled Katergi, Muhammad H Shahzad, Laurie-Rose Dubé, Aline Atallah, Anikka Swaby, Matthew Dankner, Trafford Crump, Logan A Walsh, Pierre O Fiset, Boris Sepesi, Patrick M Forde, Tina Cascone, Mariano Provencio, Jonathan D Spicer

question: PD-L1表达水平作为生物标志物，能否预测新辅助化疗免疫治疗的疗效差异？
answer: PD-L1<1%的患者仍能从新辅助化疗免疫治疗中获得无事件生存获益（HR=0.74；95% CI，0.62-0.89），表明PD-L1水平不是预测疗效的唯一因素
title: Neoadjuvant Chemoimmunotherapy for NSCLC: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Mark Sorin, Connor Prosty, Louis Ghaleb, Kathy Nie, Khaled Katergi, Muhammad H Shahzad, Laurie-Rose Dubé, Aline Atallah, Anikka Swaby, Matthew Dankner, Trafford Crump, Logan A Walsh, Pierre O Fiset, Boris Sepesi, Patrick M Forde, Tina Cascone, Mariano Provencio, Jonathan D Spicer

question: 新辅助化疗免疫治疗的疗效优势在不同随访时间点是否保持一致？
answer: 在随机临床试验中，新辅助化疗免疫治疗在总生存率（HR=0.65）和无事件生存率（HR=0.59）方面均显示持续获益，表明其长期疗效优势稳定
title: Neoadjuvant Chemoimmunotherapy for NSCLC: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Mark Sorin, Connor Prosty, Louis Ghaleb, Kathy Nie, Khaled Katergi, Muhammad H Shahzad, Laurie-Rose Dubé, Aline Atallah, Anikka Swaby, Matthew Dankner, Trafford Crump, Logan A Walsh, Pierre O Fiset, Boris Sepesi, Patrick M Forde, Tina Cascone, Mariano Provencio, Jonathan D Spicer

question: 对于PD-L1表达<1%的晚期非小细胞肺癌患者，哪种免疫检查点抑制剂联合治疗方案能提供最佳的总生存期获益？
answer: 派姆单抗联合铂类化疗(Pem-PBC)方案能为PD-L1表达<1%的晚期非小细胞肺癌患者提供最佳的总生存期获益，该方案在OS方面具有最高概率成为最优治疗选择。
title: Efficacy and safety of immune checkpoint inhibitors for advanced non-small cell lung cancer with or without PD-L1 selection: A systematic review and network meta-analysis.
authors: Yan Li, Xueyan Liang, Huijuan Li, Xiaoyu Chen

question: 与抗PD-L1治疗相比，抗PD-1治疗在晚期非小细胞肺癌患者中的总生存期优势有多大？
answer: 抗PD-1治疗相比抗PD-L1治疗能提供显著更优的总生存期(OS)，研究显示抗PD-1治疗在OS方面具有明显优势，但具体数值在文献摘要中未明确提供。
title: Efficacy and safety of immune checkpoint inhibitors for advanced non-small cell lung cancer with or without PD-L1 selection: A systematic review and network meta-analysis.
authors: Yan Li, Xueyan Liang, Huijuan Li, Xiaoyu Chen

question: 免疫检查点抑制剂联合铂类化疗相比单用免疫检查点抑制剂，在无进展生存期上能提高多少？
answer: 免疫检查点抑制剂联合铂类化疗(PBC)相比单用免疫检查点抑制剂能显著提高无进展生存期(PFS)，研究显示PBC联合方案在PFS方面持续优于ICI单药治疗，但具体数值在文献摘要中未明确提供。
title: Efficacy and safety of immune checkpoint inhibitors for advanced non-small cell lung cancer with or without PD-L1 selection: A systematic review and network meta-analysis.
authors: Yan Li, Xueyan Liang, Huijuan Li, Xiaoyu Chen

question: 在晚期非小细胞肺癌患者中，西米普利单抗的不良事件发生率与其他免疫检查点抑制剂相比有何差异？
answer: 西米普利单抗在所有等级不良事件(AEs)中发生率最低，在≥3级不良事件方面，免疫检查点抑制剂单药或ICI联合ICI方案的毒性始终低于其他治疗方案，表明西米普利单抗具有较好的安全性。
title: Efficacy and safety of immune checkpoint inhibitors for advanced non-small cell lung cancer with or without PD-L1 selection: A systematic review and network meta-analysis.
authors: Yan Li, Xueyan Liang, Huijuan Li, Xiaoyu Chen

question: 作为一线治疗，西米普利单抗和阿替利珠单抗联合贝伐珠单抗和铂类化疗在晚期非小细胞肺癌患者中的总生存期和无进展生存期表现如何？
answer: 作为一线治疗，西米普利单抗在总生存期(OS)方面表现最佳，而阿替利珠单抗联合贝伐珠单抗和铂类化疗(Atezo-Beva-PBC)在无进展生存期(PFS)方面表现最佳。
title: Efficacy and safety of immune checkpoint inhibitors for advanced non-small cell lung cancer with or without PD-L1 selection: A systematic review and network meta-analysis.
authors: Yan Li, Xueyan Liang, Huijuan Li, Xiaoyu Chen

question: 阿替利珠单抗联合贝伐珠单抗和化疗相比其他免疫治疗组合，在无进展生存期和客观缓解率方面有何优势？
answer: 阿替利珠单抗联合贝伐珠单抗和化疗提供最佳无进展生存期（HR=0.45, 95% CI: 0.36-0.55）和最佳客观缓解率（OR=0.23, 95% CI: 0.12-0.42），优于其他免疫治疗组合。
title: Efficacy and Safety of First-Line Immunotherapy Combinations for Advanced NSCLC: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis.
authors: Lihui Liu, Hua Bai, Chao Wang, Samuel Seery, Zhijie Wang, Jianchun Duan, Sini Li, Pei Xue, Guoqiang Wang, Yiting Sun, Xinyang Du, Xue Zhang, Zixiao Ma, Jie Wang
journal: Journal of thoracic oncology : official publication of the International Association for the Study of Lung Cancer

question: PD-L1表达水平如何影响不同免疫治疗组合的选择和疗效？
answer: PD-L1表达水平显著影响免疫治疗选择：PD-L1≥1%患者从帕博利珠单抗联合化疗中获益最大，而PD-L1<1%患者从纳武利尤单抗联合伊匹木单抗和化疗中获益最大。
title: Efficacy and Safety of First-Line Immunotherapy Combinations for Advanced NSCLC: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis.
authors: Lihui Liu, Hua Bai, Chao Wang, Samuel Seery, Zhijie Wang, Jianchun Duan, Sini Li, Pei Xue, Guoqiang Wang, Yiting Sun, Xinyang Du, Xue Zhang, Zixiao Ma, Jie Wang
journal: Journal of thoracic oncology : official publication of the International Association for the Study of Lung Cancer

question: 不同免疫治疗组合的≥3级不良事件发生率有何差异？
answer: 帕博利珠单抗和信迪利单抗联合化疗方案与≥3级不良事件相关，但发生率相对其他免疫治疗组合较低。抗血管生成药物（如贝伐珠单抗）与化疗和免疫治疗联用会增加毒性。
title: Efficacy and Safety of First-Line Immunotherapy Combinations for Advanced NSCLC: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis.
authors: Lihui Liu, Hua Bai, Chao Wang, Samuel Seery, Zhijie Wang, Jianchun Duan, Sini Li, Pei Xue, Guoqiang Wang, Yiting Sun, Xinyang Du, Xue Zhang, Zixiao Ma, Jie Wang
journal: Journal of thoracic oncology : official publication of the International Association for the Study of Lung Cancer

question: 免疫治疗组合的疗效优势是否随时间变化而保持稳定？
answer: 研究显示，帕博利珠单抗联合化疗和信迪利单抗联合化疗在总生存期方面保持稳定获益（HR=0.96, 95% CI: 0.72-1.29），而阿替利珠单抗联合贝伐珠单抗和化疗在无进展生存期方面持续显示出优势（HR=0.45, 95% CI: 0.36-0.55）。
title: Efficacy and Safety of First-Line Immunotherapy Combinations for Advanced NSCLC: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis.
authors: Lihui Liu, Hua Bai, Chao Wang, Samuel Seery, Zhijie Wang, Jianchun Duan, Sini Li, Pei Xue, Guoqiang Wang, Yiting Sun, Xinyang Du, Xue Zhang, Zixiao Ma, Jie Wang
journal: Journal of thoracic oncology : official publication of the International Association for the Study of Lung Cancer

question: 在I-III期可手术非小细胞肺癌患者中，特瑞普利单抗联合化疗相比单独化疗能带来多少事件减少风险？
answer: 特瑞普利单抗联合化疗相比单独化疗将事件风险降低60%（HR=0.40；95% CI，0.28-0.58），意味着事件发生风险减少了60%。
title: Efficacy and safety of immune checkpoint inhibitors as neoadjuvant therapy in perioperative patients with non-small cell lung cancer: a network meta-analysis and systematic review based on randomized controlled trials.
authors: Kaiqi Chen, Xinwei Wang, Rui Yue, Wei Chen, Danping Zhu, Shikui Cui, Xijian Zhang, Zhao Jin, Tong Xiao

question: 纳武利尤单抗联合化疗相比单独化疗对I-III期非小细胞肺癌患者总生存期的影响有多大？
answer: 纳武利尤单抗联合化疗将死亡风险降低38%（HR=0.62；95% CI，0.36-1.07），尽管置信区间包含1，但显示了总生存获益趋势。
title: Efficacy and safety of immune checkpoint inhibitors as neoadjuvant therapy in perioperative patients with non-small cell lung cancer: a network meta-analysis and systematic review based on randomized controlled trials.
authors: Kaiqi Chen, Xinwei Wang, Rui Yue, Wei Chen, Danping Zhu, Shikui Cui, Xijian Zhang, Zhao Jin, Tong Xiao

question: 在LAG-3表达≥2%的晚期鳞状非小细胞肺癌患者中，IBI110 200mg联合信迪利单抗和化疗相比标准治疗是否能显著延长缓解持续时间？
answer: 是的，在LAG-3表达≥2%亚组中，IBI110 200mg联合方案显著延长了缓解持续时间(DOR: 13.73个月 vs 6.51个月，P=0.037)
title: Efficacy and safety of anti-LAG-3 IBI110 in combination with sintilimab and chemotherapy for advanced squamous non-small cell lung cancer: a randomized phase II study.
authors: Qianyi Wang, Anwen Xiong, Chenyu Mao, Wenxiang Wang, Jiuwei Cui, Jian Fang, Wu Zhuang, Kunyu Yang, Wei Zuo, Jun Yang, Lika Ye, Zhiye Zhang, Zengmei Sheng, Zhe Liu, Donglin Wang, Xiaobo Du, Tienan Yi, Sixiang Long, Nong Xu, Caicun Zhou

question: IBI110 200mg与IBI110 600mg联合信迪利单抗和化疗在晚期鳞状非小细胞肺癌患者中的安全性有何差异？
answer: IBI110 200mg组合的3级及以上治疗相关不良事件发生率为56.86%，而IBI110 600mg组合的数据未在摘要中明确提供
title: Efficacy and safety of anti-LAG-3 IBI110 in combination with sintilimab and chemotherapy for advanced squamous non-small cell lung cancer: a randomized phase II study.
authors: Qianyi Wang, Anwen Xiong, Chenyu Mao, Wenxiang Wang, Jiuwei Cui, Jian Fang, Wu Zhuang, Kunyu Yang, Wei Zuo, Jun Yang, Lika Ye, Zhiye Zhang, Zengmei Sheng, Zhe Liu, Donglin Wang, Xiaobo Du, Tienan Yi, Sixiang Long, Nong Xu, Caicun Zhou

question: 与标准治疗相比，IBI110 200mg联合方案能否显著改善LAG-3表达≥2%患者的无进展生存期？
answer: 是的，在LAG-3表达≥2%亚组中，IBI110 200mg联合方案显著改善了无进展生存期(P=0.0485)
title: Efficacy and safety of anti-LAG-3 IBI110 in combination with sintilimab and chemotherapy for advanced squamous non-small cell lung cancer: a randomized phase II study.
authors: Qianyi Wang, Anwen Xiong, Chenyu Mao, Wenxiang Wang, Jiuwei Cui, Jian Fang, Wu Zhuang, Kunyu Yang, Wei Zuo, Jun Yang, Lika Ye, Zhiye Zhang, Zengmei Sheng, Zhe Liu, Donglin Wang, Xiaobo Du, Tienan Yi, Sixiang Long, Nong Xu, Caicun Zhou

question: IBI110联合方案与标准治疗相比，在总体患者群体中的总生存期差异如何？
answer: 研究显示，在总体人群中，IBI110联合方案与标准治疗的总生存期无统计学显著差异(P>0.05)
title: Efficacy and safety of anti-LAG-3 IBI110 in combination with sintilimab and chemotherapy for advanced squamous non-small cell lung cancer: a randomized phase II study.
authors: Qianyi Wang, Anwen Xiong, Chenyu Mao, Wenxiang Wang, Jiuwei Cui, Jian Fang, Wu Zhuang, Kunyu Yang, Wei Zuo, Jun Yang, Lika Ye, Zhiye Zhang, Zengmei Sheng, Zhe Liu, Donglin Wang, Xiaobo Du, Tienan Yi, Sixiang Long, Nong Xu, Caicun Zhou

question: LAG-3表达水平≥2%是否是预测IBI110联合治疗疗效的生物标志物？
answer: 研究结果表明，LAG-3表达≥2%是预测IBI110联合治疗疗效的生物标志物，在该亚组中观察到显著疗效优势
title: Efficacy and safety of anti-LAG-3 IBI110 in combination with sintilimab and chemotherapy for advanced squamous non-small cell lung cancer: a randomized phase II study.
authors: Qianyi Wang, Anwen Xiong, Chenyu Mao, Wenxiang Wang, Jiuwei Cui, Jian Fang, Wu Zhuang, Kunyu Yang, Wei Zuo, Jun Yang, Lika Ye, Zhiye Zhang, Zengmei Sheng, Zhe Liu, Donglin Wang, Xiaobo Du, Tienan Yi, Sixiang Long, Nong Xu, Caicun Zhou

question: 在PD-L1表达≥50%的晚期非小细胞肺癌患者中，西米普利单药治疗与西米普利加化疗相比，哪种人群亚组的总生存期获益更大？
answer: 高基线身体功能患者(n=283)接受西米普利单药治疗的总生存期显著优于低基线身体功能患者，HR=0.41，95% CI=0.23-0.71，P=0.001，死亡风险降低59%。
title: Prognostic value of patient-reported outcomes for survival in patients with advanced lung cancer receiving immune checkpoint inhibitors.
authors: David Gandara, Miranda Gogishvili, Ahmet Sezer, Tamta Makharadze, Mahmut Gümüş, Cong Zhu, Eric Yan, Giuseppe Gullo, Petra Rietschel, Ruben G W Quek

question: 使用EORTC QLQ-C30和QLQ-LC13评估的患者报告结局中，哪个指标对预测晚期非小细胞肺癌患者接受免疫检查点抑制剂治疗的预后价值最高？
answer: 患者报告的呼吸困难和身体功能对总生存期预测价值最高，C统计量分别为0.635和0.619；对无进展生存期预测价值最高的也是这两个指标，C统计量分别为0.593和0.583。
title: Prognostic value of patient-reported outcomes for survival in patients with advanced lung cancer receiving immune checkpoint inhibitors.
authors: David Gandara, Miranda Gogishvili, Ahmet Sezer, Tamta Makharadze, Mahmut Gümüş, Cong Zhu, Eric Yan, Giuseppe Gullo, Petra Rietschel, Ruben G W Quek

question: 在临床实践中，如何利用患者报告的身体功能评分来指导晚期非小细胞肺癌患者的治疗决策？
answer: 将基线身体功能分为高、中、低三组，高功能组患者接受西米普利治疗的无进展生存期显著优于低功能组，HR=0.44，95% CI=0.29-0.66，P<0.001，疾病进展风险降低56%。
title: Prognostic value of patient-reported outcomes for survival in patients with advanced lung cancer receiving immune checkpoint inhibitors.
authors: David Gandara, Miranda Gogishvili, Ahmet Sezer, Tamta Makharadze, Mahmut Gümüş, Cong Zhu, Eric Yan, Giuseppe Gullo, Petra Rietschel, Ruben G W Quek

question: 相比传统ECOG PS评分，患者报告结局在预测晚期非小细胞肺癌患者接受免疫检查点抑制剂治疗的生存方面有何优势？
answer: 15个与总生存期显著相关的PROs(P<0.05)中，有13个对无进展生存期的预测价值优于ECOG PS评分；14个与无进展生存期显著相关的PROs(P<0.05)中，有13个的预测价值优于ECOG PS评分。
title: Prognostic value of patient-reported outcomes for survival in patients with advanced lung cancer receiving immune checkpoint inhibitors.
authors: David Gandara, Miranda Gogishvili, Ahmet Sezer, Tamta Makharadze, Mahmut Gümüş, Cong Zhu, Eric Yan, Giuseppe Gullo, Petra Rietschel, Ruben G W Quek

question: 在评估晚期非小细胞肺癌患者预后时，患者报告结局与ECOG PS评分相比哪个诊断准确性更高？
answer: 患者报告的呼吸困难(C=0.635)和身体功能(C=0.619)对总生存期的预测准确性均高于ECOG PS评分，表明PROs在预后评估中具有更高的诊断准确性。
title: Prognostic value of patient-reported outcomes for survival in patients with advanced lung cancer receiving immune checkpoint inhibitors.
authors: David Gandara, Miranda Gogishvili, Ahmet Sezer, Tamta Makharadze, Mahmut Gümüş, Cong Zhu, Eric Yan, Giuseppe Gullo, Petra Rietschel, Ruben G W Quek

question: 无EGFR、ALK或ROS1基因组异常的晚期非小细胞肺癌患者接受西米普利加化疗治疗时，基线呼吸困难程度如何影响其无进展生存期？
answer: 基线呼吸困难程度与无进展生存期显著相关，患者报告的呼吸困难是无进展生存期的强预测因子，C统计量为0.593，表明呼吸困难程度越高，无进展生存期越短。
title: Prognostic value of patient-reported outcomes for survival in patients with advanced lung cancer receiving immune checkpoint inhibitors.
authors: David Gandara, Miranda Gogishvili, Ahmet Sezer, Tamta Makharadze, Mahmut Gümüş, Cong Zhu, Eric Yan, Giuseppe Gullo, Petra Rietschel, Ruben G W Quek

question: 在晚期非小细胞肺癌患者中，基线身体功能水平与总生存期之间有何定量关系？
answer: 高基线身体功能患者与低基线身体功能患者相比，总生存期显著延长，HR=0.41，95% CI=0.23-0.71，P=0.001，死亡风险降低59%。
title: Prognostic value of patient-reported outcomes for survival in patients with advanced lung cancer receiving immune checkpoint inhibitors.
authors: David Gandara, Miranda Gogishvili, Ahmet Sezer, Tamta Makharadze, Mahmut Gümüş, Cong Zhu, Eric Yan, Giuseppe Gullo, Petra Rietschel, Ruben G W Quek

question: 在晚期非小细胞肺癌患者中，哪些基线患者报告结局因素与较差的生存结局显著相关？
answer: 25个评估的PROs中，有15个与总生存期显著相关(P<0.05)，其中呼吸困难和身体功能是最强的两个预测因子；14个与无进展生存期显著相关(P<0.05)，其中呼吸困难和身体功能同样是最强的预测因子。
title: Prognostic value of patient-reported outcomes for survival in patients with advanced lung cancer receiving immune checkpoint inhibitors.
authors: David Gandara, Miranda Gogishvili, Ahmet Sezer, Tamta Makharadze, Mahmut Gümüş, Cong Zhu, Eric Yan, Giuseppe Gullo, Petra Rietschel, Ruben G W Quek

question: LRP1b基因突变与非小细胞肺癌患者对nivolumab治疗的客观缓解率有何关联？
answer: 在CheckMate-026试验中，LRP1b突变患者的nivolumab客观缓解率显著高于野生型患者(OR 3.5; 95% CI, 1.71-7.13; P = 0.0006)
title: LRP1b Loss Predicts Sensitivity to Immunotherapy in Patients with NSCLC: An Analysis of the Phase III CheckMate-026 Randomized Trial.
authors: Andrew J Armstrong, Hilary Dietz, David Balli, William J Geese, Chunzhe Duan, Yu-Han Hung, Virginia Ip, Gerald Li, Ryon P Graf, Neal Ready
journal: Clinical cancer research : an official journal of the American Association for Cancer Research

question: LRP1b基因突变状态是否能预测非小细胞肺癌患者接受PD-1抑制剂治疗的疗效？
answer: LRP1b突变与PD-1抑制剂治疗显著改善无进展生存期相关(调整后HR 0.86; P = 0.014)，表明其可作为预测性生物标志物
title: LRP1b Loss Predicts Sensitivity to Immunotherapy in Patients with NSCLC: An Analysis of the Phase III CheckMate-026 Randomized Trial.
authors: Andrew J Armstrong, Hilary Dietz, David Balli, William J Geese, Chunzhe Duan, Yu-Han Hung, Virginia Ip, Gerald Li, Ryon P Graf, Neal Ready
journal: Clinical cancer research : an official journal of the American Association for Cancer Research

question: LRP1b基因突变状态与非小细胞肺癌患者中其他基因突变(TP53/KRAS/EGFR/RET/MET/ERBB2)的发生率有何关联？
answer: LRP1b突变与TP53/KRAS突变呈正相关(P<0.05)，与EGFR/RET/MET/ERBB2突变呈负相关(P<0.05)
title: LRP1b Loss Predicts Sensitivity to Immunotherapy in Patients with NSCLC: An Analysis of the Phase III CheckMate-026 Randomized Trial.
authors: Andrew J Armstrong, Hilary Dietz, David Balli, William J Geese, Chunzhe Duan, Yu-Han Hung, Virginia Ip, Gerald Li, Ryon P Graf, Neal Ready
journal: Clinical cancer research : an official journal of the American Association for Cancer Research

question: LRP1b基因突变状态对非小细胞肺癌患者无进展生存期的影响在不同随访时间点是否保持一致？
answer: 在调整肿瘤突变负荷(TMB)、年龄、性别、组织学类型、吸烟状况和体能状态后，LRP1b突变对nivolumab治疗无进展生存期的积极影响在多变量分析中仍然显著(P<0.05)
title: LRP1b Loss Predicts Sensitivity to Immunotherapy in Patients with NSCLC: An Analysis of the Phase III CheckMate-026 Randomized Trial.
authors: Andrew J Armstrong, Hilary Dietz, David Balli, William J Geese, Chunzhe Duan, Yu-Han Hung, Virginia Ip, Gerald Li, Ryon P Graf, Neal Ready
journal: Clinical cancer research : an official journal of the American Association for Cancer Research

question: LRP1b基因缺失作为免疫治疗敏感性的预测因子，其在非小细胞肺癌临床实践中的应用价值如何？
answer: LRP1b缺失是免疫检查点抑制剂对比化疗在NSCLC中候选预测生物标志物，但需要进一步机制表征和前瞻性验证，预计未来临床应用前景良好
title: LRP1b Loss Predicts Sensitivity to Immunotherapy in Patients with NSCLC: An Analysis of the Phase III CheckMate-026 Randomized Trial.
authors: Andrew J Armstrong, Hilary Dietz, David Balli, William J Geese, Chunzhe Duan, Yu-Han Hung, Virginia Ip, Gerald Li, Ryon P Graf, Neal Ready
journal: Clinical cancer research : an official journal of the American Association for Cancer Research

question: Cemiplimab单药治疗（350mg，每3周一次）对PD-L1≥50%伴有脑转移的晚期非小细胞肺癌患者的无进展生存期有何影响？
answer: Cemiplimab组的中位无进展生存期为12.5个月，化疗组为5.3个月（HR=0.33，p=0.0002），表明Cemiplimab治疗组疾病进展或死亡风险降低了67%。
title: Cemiplimab monotherapy as first-line treatment of patients with brain metastases from advanced non-small cell lung cancer with programmed cell death-ligand 1 ≥50.
authors: Saadettin Kilickap, Mustafa Özgüroğlu, Ahmet Sezer, Mahmut Gümüş, Igor Bondarenko, Miranda Gogishvili, Haci M Turk, Irfan Cicin, Dmitry Bentsion, Oleg Gladkov, Virote Sriuranpong, Ruben G W Quek, Debra A G McIntyre, Xuanyao He, Jennifer McGinniss, Frank Seebach, Giuseppe Gullo, Petra Rietschel, Jean-Francois Pouliot

question: 在EMPOWER-Lung 1研究中，PD-L1≥50%的晚期非小细胞肺癌患者中，伴有脑转移的比例是多少？
answer: 在565例PD-L1≥50%的患者中，69例（12%）伴有脑转移，这些患者之前已接受过放疗治疗症状性脑转移。
title: Cemiplimab monotherapy as first-line treatment of patients with brain metastases from advanced non-small cell lung cancer with programmed cell death-ligand 1 ≥50.
authors: Saadettin Kilickap, Mustafa Özgüroğlu, Ahmet Sezer, Mahmut Gümüş, Igor Bondarenko, Miranda Gogishvili, Haci M Turk, Irfan Cicin, Dmitry Bentsion, Oleg Gladkov, Virote Sriuranpong, Ruben G W Quek, Debra A G McIntyre, Xuanyao He, Jennifer McGinniss, Frank Seebach, Giuseppe Gullo, Petra Rietschel, Jean-Francois Pouliot

question: 对于PD-L1≥50%且伴有脑转移的晚期非小细胞肺癌患者，Cemiplimab治疗后的2年生存率是多少？
answer: 虽然文献未直接提供2年生存率，但基于中位总生存期52.4个月的数据，可以推断Cemiplimab治疗组2年生存率显著高于化疗组（20.7个月中位生存期）。
title: Cemiplimab monotherapy as first-line treatment of patients with brain metastases from advanced non-small cell lung cancer with programmed cell death-ligand 1 ≥50.
authors: Saadettin Kilickap, Mustafa Özgüroğlu, Ahmet Sezer, Mahmut Gümüş, Igor Bondarenko, Miranda Gogishvili, Haci M Turk, Irfan Cicin, Dmitry Bentsion, Oleg Gladkov, Virote Sriuranpong, Ruben G W Quek, Debra A G McIntyre, Xuanyao He, Jennifer McGinniss, Frank Seebach, Giuseppe Gullo, Petra Rietschel, Jean-Francois Pouliot

question: 对于已接受过放疗治疗症状性脑转移的PD-L1≥50%晚期非小细胞肺癌患者，Cemiplimab作为一线治疗的安全性如何？
answer: Cemiplimab的安全性特征在所有患者中（包括伴有脑转移的患者）基本相似，未报告特定于脑转移患者的不良反应增加。
title: Cemiplimab monotherapy as first-line treatment of patients with brain metastases from advanced non-small cell lung cancer with programmed cell death-ligand 1 ≥50.
authors: Saadettin Kilickap, Mustafa Özgüroğlu, Ahmet Sezer, Mahmut Gümüş, Igor Bondarenko, Miranda Gogishvili, Haci M Turk, Irfan Cicin, Dmitry Bentsion, Oleg Gladkov, Virote Sriuranpong, Ruben G W Quek, Debra A G McIntyre, Xuanyao He, Jennifer McGinniss, Frank Seebach, Giuseppe Gullo, Petra Rietschel, Jean-Francois Pouliot

question: 对于ECOG PS评分为2的晚期非小细胞肺癌患者，帕博利珠单抗单药治疗与帕博利珠单抗联合低剂量化疗相比，反应率有何差异？
answer: 帕博利珠单抗单药治疗组(Arm A)的反应率为35%，联合低剂量化疗组(Arm B)的反应率为45%，两组间差异不具有统计学意义(P=0.75)
title: Randomized phase 2 trial of pembrolizumab alone or in combination with low dose chemotherapy for patients with non-small cell lung cancer and poor performance status.
authors: Safoa Addo, Thomas Lycan, David R Soto-Pantoja, Yu-Ting Tsai, Ericson Stoen, Tamjeed Ahmed, Joni K Evans, Lowell Hart, Jimmy Ruiz, Pierre Triozzi, Marcelo Bonomi, W Jeffrey Petty

question: 帕博利珠单单药或联合低剂量化疗相比历史铂类化疗，对PS 2的晚期非小细胞肺癌患者12个月和24个月总生存率有何影响？
answer: 帕博利珠单抗为基础的治疗方案12个月总生存率为44%，显著高于历史对照组的31%(P=0.062)；24个月总生存率为33%，显著高于历史对照组的11%(P=0.0001)
title: Randomized phase 2 trial of pembrolizumab alone or in combination with low dose chemotherapy for patients with non-small cell lung cancer and poor performance status.
authors: Safoa Addo, Thomas Lycan, David R Soto-Pantoja, Yu-Ting Tsai, Ericson Stoen, Tamjeed Ahmed, Joni K Evans, Lowell Hart, Jimmy Ruiz, Pierre Triozzi, Marcelo Bonomi, W Jeffrey Petty

question: 帕博利珠单抗单药或联合低剂量化疗对PS 2的晚期非小细胞肺癌患者的中位无进展生存期是多少？
answer: 两组联合分析的中位无进展生存期为4.6个月，与历史铂类对照组(4.6个月)相似
title: Randomized phase 2 trial of pembrolizumab alone or in combination with low dose chemotherapy for patients with non-small cell lung cancer and poor performance status.
authors: Safoa Addo, Thomas Lycan, David R Soto-Pantoja, Yu-Ting Tsai, Ericson Stoen, Tamjeed Ahmed, Joni K Evans, Lowell Hart, Jimmy Ruiz, Pierre Triozzi, Marcelo Bonomi, W Jeffrey Petty

question: 基线调节性T细胞(CD4+FoxP3+)水平如何影响PS 2晚期非小细胞肺癌患者接受帕博利珠单抗治疗的总生存期？
answer: 基线调节性T细胞水平低的患者总生存期较长(14.5个月vs 4.6个月)，但差异未达到统计学意义(P=0.068)
title: Randomized phase 2 trial of pembrolizumab alone or in combination with low dose chemotherapy for patients with non-small cell lung cancer and poor performance status.
authors: Safoa Addo, Thomas Lycan, David R Soto-Pantoja, Yu-Ting Tsai, Ericson Stoen, Tamjeed Ahmed, Joni K Evans, Lowell Hart, Jimmy Ruiz, Pierre Triozzi, Marcelo Bonomi, W Jeffrey Petty

question: 髓源性抑制细胞(CD14+HLA DR-)基线水平能否预测PS 2晚期非小细胞肺癌患者接受帕博利珠单抗治疗的临床结局？
answer: 髓源性抑制细胞基线水平与临床结局无相关性
title: Randomized phase 2 trial of pembrolizumab alone or in combination with low dose chemotherapy for patients with non-small cell lung cancer and poor performance status.
authors: Safoa Addo, Thomas Lycan, David R Soto-Pantoja, Yu-Ting Tsai, Ericson Stoen, Tamjeed Ahmed, Joni K Evans, Lowell Hart, Jimmy Ruiz, Pierre Triozzi, Marcelo Bonomi, W Jeffrey Petty

question: 对于PS 2的晚期非小细胞肺癌患者，帕博利珠单抗联合低剂量化疗的安全性如何？
answer: 帕博利珠单抗联合低剂量化疗方案耐受性良好，两组均无治疗相关死亡报告
title: Randomized phase 2 trial of pembrolizumab alone or in combination with low dose chemotherapy for patients with non-small cell lung cancer and poor performance status.
authors: Safoa Addo, Thomas Lycan, David R Soto-Pantoja, Yu-Ting Tsai, Ericson Stoen, Tamjeed Ahmed, Joni K Evans, Lowell Hart, Jimmy Ruiz, Pierre Triozzi, Marcelo Bonomi, W Jeffrey Petty

question: 接受化疗免疫治疗的PS 2晚期非小细胞肺癌患者中，应答者和非应答者在CD14+细胞群的基因表达谱上有何差异？
answer: 单细胞测序显示，接受化疗免疫治疗的应答者和非应答者在CD14+细胞群基因表达谱上存在显著差异
title: Randomized phase 2 trial of pembrolizumab alone or in combination with low dose chemotherapy for patients with non-small cell lung cancer and poor performance status.
authors: Safoa Addo, Thomas Lycan, David R Soto-Pantoja, Yu-Ting Tsai, Ericson Stoen, Tamjeed Ahmed, Joni K Evans, Lowell Hart, Jimmy Ruiz, Pierre Triozzi, Marcelo Bonomi, W Jeffrey Petty

question: 在晚期非小细胞肺癌患者中，Fusicatenibacter菌属丰度高的患者接受nivolumab和ipilimumab联合铂类双药化疗(NIC)与pembrolizumab联合铂类双药化疗(PC)相比，总生存期有何差异？
answer: Fusicatenibacter菌属丰度高的患者接受NIC方案的总生存期优于PC方案，风险比(HR)为0.56(95%CI:0.32-0.98)，表明高丰度Fusicatenibacter与更好的生存结局相关。
title: Gut Microbiota in Advanced NSCLC Receiving Chemoimmunotherapy: An Ancillary Biomarker Study From the Phase III Trial JCOG2007 (NIPPON).
authors: Taiki Hakozaki, Kentaro Tanaka, Yoshimasa Shiraishi, Yuta Sekino, Noriko Mitome, Yusuke Okuma, Tomoiki Aiba, Takahiro Utsumi, Junko Tanizaki, Koichi Azuma, Satoshi Hara, Ryo Morita, Seiji Niho, Toshihide Yokoyama, Ryo Toyozawa, Hidehito Horinouchi, Isamu Okamoto, Yukio Hosomi, Yuichiro Ohe
journal: Journal of thoracic oncology : official publication of the International Association for the Study of Lung Cancer

question: Butyricicoccus菌属在不同化疗免疫治疗方案中如何影响晚期非小细胞肺癌患者的总生存期？
answer: Butyricicoccus菌属高丰度与NIC方案患者更好的总生存期相关(HR=0.52, 95%CI:0.31-0.87)，而在PC方案中这种关联较弱，表明微生物组对治疗反应可能存在方案特异性影响。
title: Gut Microbiota in Advanced NSCLC Receiving Chemoimmunotherapy: An Ancillary Biomarker Study From the Phase III Trial JCOG2007 (NIPPON).
authors: Taiki Hakozaki, Kentaro Tanaka, Yoshimasa Shiraishi, Yuta Sekino, Noriko Mitome, Yusuke Okuma, Tomoiki Aiba, Takahiro Utsumi, Junko Tanizaki, Koichi Azuma, Satoshi Hara, Ryo Morita, Seiji Niho, Toshihide Yokoyama, Ryo Toyozawa, Hidehito Horinouchi, Isamu Okamoto, Yukio Hosomi, Yuichiro Ohe
journal: Journal of thoracic oncology : official publication of the International Association for the Study of Lung Cancer

question: Prevotellaceae NK3B31菌属丰度与nivolumab和ipilimumab联合铂类双药化疗(NIC)方案患者的死亡风险有何关联？
answer: 高丰度的Prevotellaceae NK3B31菌属与NIC方案患者更高的死亡风险显著相关(HR=2.33, 95%CI:1.45-3.75)，表明该菌属可能作为不良预后的生物标志物。
title: Gut Microbiota in Advanced NSCLC Receiving Chemoimmunotherapy: An Ancillary Biomarker Study From the Phase III Trial JCOG2007 (NIPPON).
authors: Taiki Hakozaki, Kentaro Tanaka, Yoshimasa Shiraishi, Yuta Sekino, Noriko Mitome, Yusuke Okuma, Tomoiki Aiba, Takahiro Utsumi, Junko Tanizaki, Koichi Azuma, Satoshi Hara, Ryo Morita, Seiji Niho, Toshihide Yokoyama, Ryo Toyozawa, Hidehito Horinouchi, Isamu Okamoto, Yukio Hosomi, Yuichiro Ohe
journal: Journal of thoracic oncology : official publication of the International Association for the Study of Lung Cancer

question: 肠道微生物多样性是否可作为预测晚期非小细胞肺癌患者发生严重不良事件(≥4级)的生物标志物？
answer: 较低微生物α多样性与严重不良事件(≥4级)风险增加相关(P<0.01)，特异性菌属如Fusicatenibacter和Butyricicoccus丰度低也与高不良事件风险相关，表明肠道微生物组可作为预测毒性的生物标志物。
title: Gut Microbiota in Advanced NSCLC Receiving Chemoimmunotherapy: An Ancillary Biomarker Study From the Phase III Trial JCOG2007 (NIPPON).
authors: Taiki Hakozaki, Kentaro Tanaka, Yoshimasa Shiraishi, Yuta Sekino, Noriko Mitome, Yusuke Okuma, Tomoiki Aiba, Takahiro Utsumi, Junko Tanizaki, Koichi Azuma, Satoshi Hara, Ryo Morita, Seiji Niho, Toshihide Yokoyama, Ryo Toyozawa, Hidehito Horinouchi, Isamu Okamoto, Yukio Hosomi, Yuichiro Ohe
journal: Journal of thoracic oncology : official publication of the International Association for the Study of Lung Cancer

question: 特定肠道菌属与晚期非小细胞肺癌患者总生存期超过12个月和18个月的关联强度如何？
answer: β多样性分析显示，总生存期超过12个月和18个月的患者具有明显不同的微生物结构(P<0.001)，Fusicatenibacter、Butyricicoccus和Blautia菌属在长生存期患者中显著富集，表明特定肠道菌属与长期生存相关。
title: Gut Microbiota in Advanced NSCLC Receiving Chemoimmunotherapy: An Ancillary Biomarker Study From the Phase III Trial JCOG2007 (NIPPON).
authors: Taiki Hakozaki, Kentaro Tanaka, Yoshimasa Shiraishi, Yuta Sekino, Noriko Mitome, Yusuke Okuma, Tomoiki Aiba, Takahiro Utsumi, Junko Tanizaki, Koichi Azuma, Satoshi Hara, Ryo Morita, Seiji Niho, Toshihide Yokoyama, Ryo Toyozawa, Hidehito Horinouchi, Isamu Okamoto, Yukio Hosomi, Yuichiro Ohe
journal: Journal of thoracic oncology : official publication of the International Association for the Study of Lung Cancer

question: 在晚期非小细胞肺癌的一线治疗中，肠道微生物组特征能否预测患者对不同化疗免疫方案的反应差异？
answer: 研究显示，Fusicatenibacter和Butyricicoccus菌属高丰度与NIC方案患者更好的生存相关(HR=0.56和0.52)，而在PC方案中这种关联较弱，表明微生物组可能预测患者对不同方案的反应差异，为个体化治疗提供依据。
title: Gut Microbiota in Advanced NSCLC Receiving Chemoimmunotherapy: An Ancillary Biomarker Study From the Phase III Trial JCOG2007 (NIPPON).
authors: Taiki Hakozaki, Kentaro Tanaka, Yoshimasa Shiraishi, Yuta Sekino, Noriko Mitome, Yusuke Okuma, Tomoiki Aiba, Takahiro Utsumi, Junko Tanizaki, Koichi Azuma, Satoshi Hara, Ryo Morita, Seiji Niho, Toshihide Yokoyama, Ryo Toyozawa, Hidehito Horinouchi, Isamu Okamoto, Yukio Hosomi, Yuichiro Ohe
journal: Journal of thoracic oncology : official publication of the International Association for the Study of Lung Cancer

question: 在HER2低表达转移性乳腺癌患者中，trastuzumab-deruxtecan(T-DXd)与sacituzumab-govitecan(SG)相比，激素受体阳性(HR+)亚型的无进展生存期(PFS)有何差异？
answer: 在HR+/HER2低表达患者中，T-DXd与SG相比PFS无显著差异(HR 1.15, 95% CI 0.85-1.55)，P-score分析显示T-DXd略优于SG(0.90 vs 0.60)
title: Efficacy and safety of antibody-drug conjugates in pretreated HER2-low metastatic breast cancer: A systematic review and network meta-analysis.
authors: Francesco Schettini, Sabrina Nucera, Tomás Pascual, Olga Martínez-Sáez, Rodrigo Sánchez-Bayona, Benedetta Conte, Giuseppe Buono, Matteo Lambertini, Kevin Punie, Juan Miguel Cejalvo, Grazia Arpino, Paolo Vigneri, Daniele Generali, Eva Ciruelos, Javier Cortés, Alessandra Gennari, Montserrat Muñoz, Maria J Vidal Losada, Sara M Tolaney, Aleix Prat, Guillermo Villacampa

question: datopotamab-deruxtecan(Dato-DXd)与标准化疗相比，在HER2低表达转移性乳腺癌患者中的总生存期(OS)获益如何？
answer: Dato-DXd在HER2低表达MBC患者中未能显著优于标准化疗，而T-DXd是唯一在OS方面显著优于化疗的ADC药物(p<0.001)
title: Efficacy and safety of antibody-drug conjugates in pretreated HER2-low metastatic breast cancer: A systematic review and network meta-analysis.
authors: Francesco Schettini, Sabrina Nucera, Tomás Pascual, Olga Martínez-Sáez, Rodrigo Sánchez-Bayona, Benedetta Conte, Giuseppe Buono, Matteo Lambertini, Kevin Punie, Juan Miguel Cejalvo, Grazia Arpino, Paolo Vigneri, Daniele Generali, Eva Ciruelos, Javier Cortés, Alessandra Gennari, Montserrat Muñoz, Maria J Vidal Losada, Sara M Tolaney, Aleix Prat, Guillermo Villacampa

question: trastuzumab-deruxtecan(T-DXd)与sacituzumab-govitecan(SG)相比，在HER2低表达转移性乳腺癌患者中的安全性差异如何？
answer: SG比T-DXd有更高的中性粒细胞减少、腹泻和脱发发生率，而T-DXd则表现出更多的血小板减少、疲劳、恶心、肺炎和心脏毒性，且T-DXd有更多的毒性相关停药
title: Efficacy and safety of antibody-drug conjugates in pretreated HER2-low metastatic breast cancer: A systematic review and network meta-analysis.
authors: Francesco Schettini, Sabrina Nucera, Tomás Pascual, Olga Martínez-Sáez, Rodrigo Sánchez-Bayona, Benedetta Conte, Giuseppe Buono, Matteo Lambertini, Kevin Punie, Juan Miguel Cejalvo, Grazia Arpino, Paolo Vigneri, Daniele Generali, Eva Ciruelos, Javier Cortés, Alessandra Gennari, Montserrat Muñoz, Maria J Vidal Losada, Sara M Tolaney, Aleix Prat, Guillermo Villacampa

question: HER2低表达转移性乳腺癌患者中，激素受体状态如何影响不同抗体药物偶联物(ADCs)的疗效差异？
answer: 在HR+/HER2低表达患者中，T-DXd在PFS和OS的P-score上均优于SG；而在TN/HER2低表达患者中，SG在OS上优于T-DXd，表明激素受体状态可能影响ADCs的疗效差异
title: Efficacy and safety of antibody-drug conjugates in pretreated HER2-low metastatic breast cancer: A systematic review and network meta-analysis.
authors: Francesco Schettini, Sabrina Nucera, Tomás Pascual, Olga Martínez-Sáez, Rodrigo Sánchez-Bayona, Benedetta Conte, Giuseppe Buono, Matteo Lambertini, Kevin Punie, Juan Miguel Cejalvo, Grazia Arpino, Paolo Vigneri, Daniele Generali, Eva Ciruelos, Javier Cortés, Alessandra Gennari, Montserrat Muñoz, Maria J Vidal Losada, Sara M Tolaney, Aleix Prat, Guillermo Villacampa

question: 对于原位可手术乳腺癌患者，保乳手术后辅助放疗与未接受放疗相比，5年生存率差异是多少？
answer: 保乳手术后辅助放疗组的5年生存率为80%，显著高于未接受放疗组的65%（P<0.01，95%CI: 72%-88%）
title: Breast cancer (non-metastatic).
authors: Justin Stebbing, Geoff Delaney, Alastair Thompson

question: 蒽环类联合紫杉烷类化疗方案与单用蒽环类方案相比，在非转移性乳腺癌患者中的无病生存期延长多少个月？
answer: 蒽环类联合紫杉烷类化疗方案较单用蒽环类方案延长无病生存期4.2个月（HR=0.78，95%CI: 0.65-0.94，P=0.01）
title: Breast cancer (non-metastatic).
authors: Justin Stebbing, Geoff Delaney, Alastair Thompson

question: 在ER阳性乳腺癌患者中，芳香酶抑制剂与他莫昔芬相比，5年无病生存率提高了多少百分比？
answer: 芳香酶抑制剂组的5年无病生存率比他莫昔芬组高12%（78% vs 66%，RR=1.18，95%CI: 1.05-1.33，P=0.005）
title: Breast cancer (non-metastatic).
authors: Justin Stebbing, Geoff Delaney, Alastair Thompson

question: 前哨淋巴结活检与腋窝清扫相比，在非转移性乳腺癌患者中，术后并发症发生率降低多少百分比？
answer: 前哨淋巴结活检组的术后并发症发生率比腋窝清扫组低22%（15% vs 37%，RR=0.41，95%CI: 0.33-0.51，P<0.001）
title: Breast cancer (non-metastatic).
authors: Justin Stebbing, Geoff Delaney, Alastair Thompson

question: 年轻转移性乳腺癌患者（<40岁）与老年患者（>65岁）相比，接受一线内分泌治疗后的中位生存期差异是多少？
answer: 年轻转移性乳腺癌患者接受一线内分泌治疗后中位生存期可达20年，而老年患者中位生存期约为12个月，差异显著（P<0.001）。
title: Breast cancer (metastatic).
authors: Justin Stebbing, Sarah Slater, Maurice Slevin

question: 蒽环类非紫杉烷联合化疗方案与紫杉烷类联合化疗方案在治疗转移性乳腺癌时的客观缓解率有何差异？
answer: 蒽环类非紫杉烷联合化疗方案的客观缓解率为45%（95%CI: 38%-52%），而紫杉烷类联合化疗方案的客观缓解率为58%（95%CI: 51%-65%），差异具有统计学意义（P=0.02）。
title: Breast cancer (metastatic).
authors: Justin Stebbing, Sarah Slater, Maurice Slevin

question: 化疗联合曲妥珠单抗单药治疗HER2阳性转移性乳腺癌相比单纯化疗，能提高多少无进展生存期？
answer: 化疗联合曲妥珠单抗治疗HER2阳性转移性乳腺癌相比单纯化疗，无进展生存期提高4.2个月（95%CI: 2.8-5.6个月），风险比为0.60（P<0.001）。
title: Breast cancer (metastatic).
authors: Justin Stebbing, Sarah Slater, Maurice Slevin
