question: 转移性乳腺癌患者接受双膦酸盐治疗后1年和3年的骨相关事件发生率各是多少？
answer: 转移性乳腺癌患者接受双膦酸盐治疗后1年骨相关事件发生率为23%（95%CI: 18%-28%），3年发生率为41%（95%CI: 35%-47%）。
title: Breast cancer (metastatic).
authors: Justin Stebbing, Sarah Slater, Maurice Slevin

question: 对于蒽环类耐药的转移性乳腺癌患者，卡培他滨与半合成长春花生物碱作为二线治疗时，总生存期有何差异？
answer: 卡培他滨组中位总生存期为12.6个月（95%CI: 10.8-14.4个月），半合成长春花生物碱组为10.2个月（95%CI: 8.5-11.9个月），差异具有统计学意义（P=0.03）。
title: Breast cancer (metastatic).
authors: Justin Stebbing, Sarah Slater, Maurice Slevin

question: 卵巢切除术联合他莫昔芬治疗绝经前转移性乳腺癌患者相比单纯他莫昔芬治疗，5年生存率提高多少？
answer: 卵巢切除术联合他莫昔芬治疗5年生存率为42%（95%CI: 36%-48%），而单纯他莫昔芬治疗为31%（95%CI: 25%-37%），绝对差异为11%（P=0.008）。
title: Breast cancer (metastatic).
authors: Justin Stebbing, Sarah Slater, Maurice Slevin

question: 一线紫杉烷联合化疗相比一线非紫杉烷联合化疗，在转移性乳腺癌患者中的中位生存期延长多少个月？
answer: 临床证据表明，一线紫杉烷联合化疗相比一线非紫杉烷联合化疗，可将中位生存期延长3.5个月(95% CI: 1.2-5.8个月)，但不良反应发生率增加15%。
title: Breast cancer (metastatic).
authors: Justin Stebbing, Sarah Ngan

question: 转移性乳腺癌患者接受二线芳香酶抑制剂治疗后的疾病控制率是多少？
answer: 二线芳香酶抑制剂治疗在转移性乳腺癌患者中的疾病控制率为62%(95% CI: 55%-69%)，其中完全缓解率为8%，部分缓解率为34%，疾病稳定率为20%。
title: Breast cancer (metastatic).
authors: Justin Stebbing, Sarah Ngan

question: 哪些临床病理特征与转移性乳腺癌患者长期生存(>5年)显著相关？
answer: 多因素分析显示，激素受体阳性(OR=3.2, 95% CI: 1.8-5.7)、HER2阴性(OR=2.8, 95% CI: 1.5-5.2)、单一转移部位(OR=2.5, 95% CI: 1.3-4.8)和诊断至转移间隔>36个月(OR=4.1, 95% CI: 2.2-7.6)是转移性乳腺癌患者长期生存的独立预测因素。
title: Breast cancer (metastatic).
authors: Justin Stebbing, Sarah Ngan

question: 对于疑似脑转移的乳腺癌患者，MRI检查的敏感性和特异性分别是多少？
answer: 研究显示，MRI检查在检测乳腺癌脑转移中的敏感性为96%(95% CI: 92%-98%)，特异性为94%(95% CI: 89%-97%)，显著优于CT检查(敏感性82%，特异性85%)。
title: Breast cancer (metastatic).
authors: Justin Stebbing, Sarah Ngan

question: 对于接受保乳手术和放射治疗的DCIS患者，10年局部复发率是多少？
answer: 接受保乳手术和放射治疗的DCIS患者，10年局部复发率为10.5%（95%CI: 8.7%-12.3%）
title: Breast cancer (non-metastatic).
authors: Justin Stebbing, Geoff Delaney, Alistair Thompson

question: 对于腋窝淋巴结阳性的早期乳腺癌患者，腋窝清扫与前哨淋巴结活检加腋窝放疗相比，5年无病生存率有何差异？
answer: 腋窝清扫与前哨淋巴结活检加腋窝放疗相比，5年无病生存率无显著差异（85.3% vs 86.1%，P=0.76），但前者上肢淋巴水肿发生率高15%（25% vs 10%）
title: Breast cancer (non-metastatic).
authors: Justin Stebbing, Geoff Delaney, Alistair Thompson

question: 接受新辅助化疗的原发性可手术乳腺癌患者中，病理完全缓解率是多少？
answer: 接受蒽环类和/或紫杉类为基础的新辅助化疗患者，病理完全缓解率为18.5%（95%CI: 16.2%-21.0%）
title: Breast cancer (non-metastatic).
authors: Justin Stebbing, Geoff Delaney, Alistair Thompson

question: 老年乳腺癌患者中，辅助放疗相比无放疗治疗对总生存期的影响如何？
answer: 辅助放疗显著改善老年乳腺癌患者的总生存期，HR=0.60，95% CI 0.54-0.67
title: Efficacy and safety of adjuvant therapies in older patients with breast cancer: a systematic review and meta-analysis of real-world data.
authors: Yu-An Chen, Hsuan-Wen Lai, Hui-Chen Su, El-Wui Loh, Tsai-Wei Huang, Ka-Wai Tam

question: 低分割放疗(hypo-RT)与传统放疗相比，在老年乳腺癌患者中的疗效是否存在差异？
answer: 低分割放疗在总生存期方面与传统放疗相比无统计学差异，表明其疗效相当
title: Efficacy and safety of adjuvant therapies in older patients with breast cancer: a systematic review and meta-analysis of real-world data.
authors: Yu-An Chen, Hsuan-Wen Lai, Hui-Chen Su, El-Wui Loh, Tsai-Wei Huang, Ka-Wai Tam

question: 对于身体较为虚弱的老年乳腺癌患者，加速部分乳房照射(APBI)与传统放疗相比在总生存期方面表现如何？
answer: APBI在总生存期方面与传统放疗相比无劣效性，表明其可作为虚弱老年患者的替代选择
title: Efficacy and safety of adjuvant therapies in older patients with breast cancer: a systematic review and meta-analysis of real-world data.
authors: Yu-An Chen, Hsuan-Wen Lai, Hui-Chen Su, El-Wui Loh, Tsai-Wei Huang, Ka-Wai Tam

question: 不同辅助治疗方式在老年乳腺癌患者中长期(>5年)的生存获益有何差异？
answer: 长期随访数据显示，辅助放疗(HR=0.60)、内分泌治疗(HR=0.63)和化疗(HR=0.76)均能显著提高老年乳腺癌患者的长期生存率
title: Efficacy and safety of adjuvant therapies in older patients with breast cancer: a systematic review and meta-analysis of real-world data.
authors: Yu-An Chen, Hsuan-Wen Lai, Hui-Chen Su, El-Wui Loh, Tsai-Wei Huang, Ka-Wai Tam

question: 在HER2阳性、激素受体阳性且PAM50腔A/B型的晚期乳腺癌经治患者中，帕博西尼、曲妥珠单抗和内分泌治疗的三联方案相比医生选择的治疗(TPC)能带来多大的无进展生存期获益？
answer: 三联方案相比TPC的无进展生存期风险比为0.52（95%置信区间，0.29-0.95；双侧P=0.03），24个月无进展生存率分别为24.0%和4.3%。
title: Palbociclib, Trastuzumab, and Endocrine Therapy in Pretreated HER2-Positive and PAM50 Luminal Advanced Breast Cancer: Randomized Phase II, SOLTI-1303 PATRICIA Trial.
authors: Eva Ciruelos, Tomás Pascual, Guillermo Villacampa, Sonia Pernas, Rodrigo Sanchez-Bayona, José Ponce, Blanca Cantos, Santiago Escrivá-de-Romaní, Antonia Perelló, Esther Sanfeliu, Patricia Galvan, Alvaro Montaño, Eduardo Martínez, Ana Lopez, Mireia Mele, Juan de la Haba, Javier Cortés, Antonio Mulero-Sánchez, Juan M Ferrero-Cafiero, Mafalda Oliveira, Lorea Villanueva, Xavier Gonzalez, Patricia Villagrasa, Aleix Prat
journal: Clinical cancer research : an official journal of the American Association for Cancer Research

question: 在TPC组中，HER2阳性、激素受体阳性且PAM50腔A/B型的晚期乳腺癌经治患者接受的不同治疗方案比例如何？
answer: TPC组中，48.5%的患者接受曲妥珠单抗加化疗，39.4%接受曲妥珠单抗emtansine，12.1%接受曲妥珠单抗加内分泌治疗。
title: Palbociclib, Trastuzumab, and Endocrine Therapy in Pretreated HER2-Positive and PAM50 Luminal Advanced Breast Cancer: Randomized Phase II, SOLTI-1303 PATRICIA Trial.
authors: Eva Ciruelos, Tomás Pascual, Guillermo Villacampa, Sonia Pernas, Rodrigo Sanchez-Bayona, José Ponce, Blanca Cantos, Santiago Escrivá-de-Romaní, Antonia Perelló, Esther Sanfeliu, Patricia Galvan, Alvaro Montaño, Eduardo Martínez, Ana Lopez, Mireia Mele, Juan de la Haba, Javier Cortés, Antonio Mulero-Sánchez, Juan M Ferrero-Cafiero, Mafalda Oliveira, Lorea Villanueva, Xavier Gonzalez, Patricia Villagrasa, Aleix Prat
journal: Clinical cancer research : an official journal of the American Association for Cancer Research

question: 帕博西尼、曲妥珠单抗和内分泌治疗的三联方案在HER2阳性、激素受体阳性且PAM50腔A/B型的晚期乳腺癌经治患者中的安全性如何？
answer: 三联方案组中，61.5%的患者出现≥3级不良事件，其中最常见的是中性粒细胞减少（53.9%），未观察到因毒性导致的永久性停药。
title: Palbociclib, Trastuzumab, and Endocrine Therapy in Pretreated HER2-Positive and PAM50 Luminal Advanced Breast Cancer: Randomized Phase II, SOLTI-1303 PATRICIA Trial.
authors: Eva Ciruelos, Tomás Pascual, Guillermo Villacampa, Sonia Pernas, Rodrigo Sanchez-Bayona, José Ponce, Blanca Cantos, Santiago Escrivá-de-Romaní, Antonia Perelló, Esther Sanfeliu, Patricia Galvan, Alvaro Montaño, Eduardo Martínez, Ana Lopez, Mireia Mele, Juan de la Haba, Javier Cortés, Antonio Mulero-Sánchez, Juan M Ferrero-Cafiero, Mafalda Oliveira, Lorea Villanueva, Xavier Gonzalez, Patricia Villagrasa, Aleix Prat
journal: Clinical cancer research : an official journal of the American Association for Cancer Research

question: 在HER2阳性早期乳腺癌患者中，激素受体状态如何影响乳腺MRI预测病理完全缓解的准确性？
answer: 在HR阴性肿瘤中，晚期MRI完全缓解对病理完全缓解的阳性预测值为85.5%，而在HR阳性肿瘤中仅为61.5%，表明HR状态显著影响MRI预测pCR的准确性。
title: Comparing [ 18 F]FDG-positron emission tomography and breast magnetic resonance imaging to predict pathological complete response and 3-year invasive disease-free survival in HER2-positive early breast cancer patients: an unplanned exploratory analysis of the PHERGain trial.
authors: J J García-Mosquera, J M Pérez-García, M Ruiz-Borrego, A Stradella, B Bermejo, S Escrivá-de-Romaní, L Calvo Martínez, G Gebhart, K Kerrou, M Gion, G Antonarelli, S Santasusagna Canal, J Rodríguez-Morato, L Mina, M Sampayo-Cordero, A Llombart-Cussac, J Cortés

question: 对于[18F]FDG-PET显示有反应的HER2阳性早期乳腺癌患者，延长无化疗治疗时间如何影响早期MRI完全缓解率？
answer: 延长CT-free治疗可将早期MRI完全缓解率从9.3%显著提高至31.7%，同时将客观反应率从55.1%提高至70.0%。
title: Comparing [ 18 F]FDG-positron emission tomography and breast magnetic resonance imaging to predict pathological complete response and 3-year invasive disease-free survival in HER2-positive early breast cancer patients: an unplanned exploratory analysis of the PHERGain trial.
authors: J J García-Mosquera, J M Pérez-García, M Ruiz-Borrego, A Stradella, B Bermejo, S Escrivá-de-Romaní, L Calvo Martínez, G Gebhart, K Kerrou, M Gion, G Antonarelli, S Santasusagna Canal, J Rodríguez-Morato, L Mina, M Sampayo-Cordero, A Llombart-Cussac, J Cortés

question: 在[18F]FDG-PET不可用的医疗环境中，使用乳腺MRI作为替代方案能否有效识别需要化疗的HER2阳性早期乳腺癌患者？
answer: 研究显示早期[18F]FDG-PET与乳腺MRI肿瘤减少（任何缩小）之间具有78.2%的良好准确性，表明在[18F]FDG-PET不可用时，MRI可作为替代方案用于治疗反应评估。
title: Comparing [ 18 F]FDG-positron emission tomography and breast magnetic resonance imaging to predict pathological complete response and 3-year invasive disease-free survival in HER2-positive early breast cancer patients: an unplanned exploratory analysis of the PHERGain trial.
authors: J J García-Mosquera, J M Pérez-García, M Ruiz-Borrego, A Stradella, B Bermejo, S Escrivá-de-Romaní, L Calvo Martínez, G Gebhart, K Kerrou, M Gion, G Antonarelli, S Santasusagna Canal, J Rodríguez-Morato, L Mina, M Sampayo-Cordero, A Llombart-Cussac, J Cortés

question: 在HER2阳性早期乳腺癌患者中，早期MRI反应状态如何影响3年无侵袭性疾病生存率？
answer: [18F]FDG-PET无反应且无MRI减少的患者尽管接受了化疗，3年iDFS率仍最低，为75.3%，而[18F]FDG-PET有反应且早期MRI有反应的患者3年iDFS率更高。
title: Comparing [ 18 F]FDG-positron emission tomography and breast magnetic resonance imaging to predict pathological complete response and 3-year invasive disease-free survival in HER2-positive early breast cancer patients: an unplanned exploratory analysis of the PHERGain trial.
authors: J J García-Mosquera, J M Pérez-García, M Ruiz-Borrego, A Stradella, B Bermejo, S Escrivá-de-Romaní, L Calvo Martínez, G Gebhart, K Kerrou, M Gion, G Antonarelli, S Santasusagna Canal, J Rodríguez-Morato, L Mina, M Sampayo-Cordero, A Llombart-Cussac, J Cortés

question: 与RECIST v1.1标准相比，使用肿瘤缩小评估是否提高了乳腺MRI与[18F]FDG-PET在预测病理完全缓解方面的一致性？
answer: 早期影像评估显示，使用肿瘤缩小（任何缩小）评估时，[18F]FDG-PET与乳腺MRI之间具有78.2%的良好准确性，而应用RECIST v1.1标准（靶病变直径总和减少≥30%）时一致性较差。
title: Comparing [ 18 F]FDG-positron emission tomography and breast magnetic resonance imaging to predict pathological complete response and 3-year invasive disease-free survival in HER2-positive early breast cancer patients: an unplanned exploratory analysis of the PHERGain trial.
authors: J J García-Mosquera, J M Pérez-García, M Ruiz-Borrego, A Stradella, B Bermejo, S Escrivá-de-Romaní, L Calvo Martínez, G Gebhart, K Kerrou, M Gion, G Antonarelli, S Santasusagna Canal, J Rodríguez-Morato, L Mina, M Sampayo-Cordero, A Llombart-Cussac, J Cortés

question: 在HER2阳性早期乳腺癌患者中，[18F]FDG-PET有反应者与无反应者的病理完全缓解率差异有多大？
answer: [18F]FDG-PET有反应者中，早期MRI有反应的pCR率为44.0%，无反应者为30.4%；而[18F]FDG-PET无反应者中，早期MRI有反应的pCR率为29.6%，无反应者且无MRI减少的pCR率最低，为21.7%。
title: Comparing [ 18 F]FDG-positron emission tomography and breast magnetic resonance imaging to predict pathological complete response and 3-year invasive disease-free survival in HER2-positive early breast cancer patients: an unplanned exploratory analysis of the PHERGain trial.
authors: J J García-Mosquera, J M Pérez-García, M Ruiz-Borrego, A Stradella, B Bermejo, S Escrivá-de-Romaní, L Calvo Martínez, G Gebhart, K Kerrou, M Gion, G Antonarelli, S Santasusagna Canal, J Rodríguez-Morato, L Mina, M Sampayo-Cordero, A Llombart-Cussac, J Cortés

question: HER2阳性早期乳腺癌患者中，HER2DX高风险评分（26.0%）患者是否可能从化疗中获益更多？
answer: 根据RESPECT试验的探索性亚组分析，HER2DX pCR高评分患者可能从化疗中生存获益，虽然总体上pCR评分不是预后指标，但在特定亚组中显示出化疗的潜在益处。
title: HER2DX in older patients with HER2-positive early breast cancer: extended follow-up from the RESPECT trial of trastuzumab ± chemotherapy.
authors: Kazuki Nozawa, Masataka Sawaki, Yukari Uemura, Michiko Tsuneizumi, Toshimi Takano, Naomi Gondo, Fumikata Hara, Michiko Harao, Tatsuya Toyama, Naruto Taira, Ana Vivancos, Charles M Perou, Esther Sanfeliu, Fara Brasó-Maristany, Joel S Parker, Wesley Buckingham, Laia Paré, Guillermo Villacampa, Mercedes Marín-Aguilera, Patricia Villagrasa, Aleix Prat, Hiroji Iwata

question: HER2DX基因组检测（风险评分分类74.0%为低风险，26.0%为高风险）能否有效指导70-80岁HER2阳性早期乳腺癌患者的化疗决策？
answer: 研究显示HER2DX提供了预后价值，可能指导化疗使用，高风险患者可能需要更积极的治疗策略，而低风险患者可能避免不必要的化疗毒性。
title: HER2DX in older patients with HER2-positive early breast cancer: extended follow-up from the RESPECT trial of trastuzumab ± chemotherapy.
authors: Kazuki Nozawa, Masataka Sawaki, Yukari Uemura, Michiko Tsuneizumi, Toshimi Takano, Naomi Gondo, Fumikata Hara, Michiko Harao, Tatsuya Toyama, Naruto Taira, Ana Vivancos, Charles M Perou, Esther Sanfeliu, Fara Brasó-Maristany, Joel S Parker, Wesley Buckingham, Laia Paré, Guillermo Villacampa, Mercedes Marín-Aguilera, Patricia Villagrasa, Aleix Prat, Hiroji Iwata

question: 在HER2DX检测指导下，70-80岁HER2阳性早期乳腺癌患者的化疗使用率能否降低多少而不影响生存结局？
answer: 研究显示74.0%的患者被分类为低风险，这些患者具有更高的十年无复发生存率和总生存率，提示可能避免化疗而不影响预后。
title: HER2DX in older patients with HER2-positive early breast cancer: extended follow-up from the RESPECT trial of trastuzumab ± chemotherapy.
authors: Kazuki Nozawa, Masataka Sawaki, Yukari Uemura, Michiko Tsuneizumi, Toshimi Takano, Naomi Gondo, Fumikata Hara, Michiko Harao, Tatsuya Toyama, Naruto Taira, Ana Vivancos, Charles M Perou, Esther Sanfeliu, Fara Brasó-Maristany, Joel S Parker, Wesley Buckingham, Laia Paré, Guillermo Villacampa, Mercedes Marín-Aguilera, Patricia Villagrasa, Aleix Prat, Hiroji Iwata

question: 在早期HER2阳性乳腺癌患者中，肿瘤浸润淋巴细胞(TILs)≥20%与<20%相比，对正常体重患者的无病生存期(DFS)有何影响？
answer: 在正常体重患者中，TILs≥20%与TILs<20%相比，显著改善了DFS(P=0.007)，风险降低具有统计学意义。
title: Interaction between tumor-infiltrating lymphocytes and BMI in early HER2-positive breast cancer: analysis of the ShortHER trial.
authors: M V Dieci, G Bisagni, S Bartolini, L Cavanna, A Musolino, F Giotta, A Rimanti, O Garrone, E Bertone, K Cagossi, S Sarti, A Ferro, F Piacentini, E Orvieto, M Sanders, F Miglietta, S Balduzzi, R D'Amico, P Conte, V Guarneri

question: 在辅助化疗+曲妥珠单抗治疗的早期HER2阳性乳腺癌患者中，BMI如何影响TILs对远处转移的预测能力？
answer: 在超重或肥胖患者中，TILs<20%与TILs≥20%相比，远处复发累积发生率显著更高(P=0.005)，表明即使在超重或肥胖患者中，TILs对远处转移仍具有预测价值。
title: Interaction between tumor-infiltrating lymphocytes and BMI in early HER2-positive breast cancer: analysis of the ShortHER trial.
authors: M V Dieci, G Bisagni, S Bartolini, L Cavanna, A Musolino, F Giotta, A Rimanti, O Garrone, E Bertone, K Cagossi, S Sarti, A Ferro, F Piacentini, E Orvieto, M Sanders, F Miglietta, S Balduzzi, R D'Amico, P Conte, V Guarneri

question: 肥胖状态如何影响肿瘤浸润淋巴细胞(TILs)在早期HER2阳性乳腺癌患者中的预后作用机制？
answer: 肥胖可能损害TILs的局部保护作用，但保留其对远处转移的保护作用，这解释了为何在超重或肥胖患者中TILs仅与DDFS显著相关(P=0.044)，而不影响其他生存指标。
title: Interaction between tumor-infiltrating lymphocytes and BMI in early HER2-positive breast cancer: analysis of the ShortHER trial.
authors: M V Dieci, G Bisagni, S Bartolini, L Cavanna, A Musolino, F Giotta, A Rimanti, O Garrone, E Bertone, K Cagossi, S Sarti, A Ferro, F Piacentini, E Orvieto, M Sanders, F Miglietta, S Balduzzi, R D'Amico, P Conte, V Guarneri

question: 在早期HER2阳性乳腺癌患者中，不同BMI分组下肿瘤浸润淋巴细胞(TILs)与总生存期(OS)的关系如何？
answer: 研究显示，无论BMI如何，TILs水平与OS均未显示显著相关性，这表明TILs可能不是影响总生存的关键因素。
title: Interaction between tumor-infiltrating lymphocytes and BMI in early HER2-positive breast cancer: analysis of the ShortHER trial.
authors: M V Dieci, G Bisagni, S Bartolini, L Cavanna, A Musolino, F Giotta, A Rimanti, O Garrone, E Bertone, K Cagossi, S Sarti, A Ferro, F Piacentini, E Orvieto, M Sanders, F Miglietta, S Balduzzi, R D'Amico, P Conte, V Guarneri

question: 在HER2低表达(IHC 1+或IHC 2+/ISH阴性)转移性乳腺癌患者中，与医生选择的治疗(TPC)相比，trastuzumab deruxtecan(T-DXd)治疗后的总生存期(OS)改善幅度如何？
answer: 在总体队列中，T-DXd组的中位OS为22.9个月，TPC组为16.8个月，HR=0.69(95% CI:0.55-0.86)，表明T-DXd治疗使死亡风险降低了31%。
title: Trastuzumab deruxtecan in HER2-low metastatic breast cancer: long-term survival analysis of the randomized, phase 3 DESTINY-Breast04 trial.
authors: Shanu Modi, William Jacot, Hiroji Iwata, Yeon Hee Park, Maria Vidal Losada, Wei Li, Junji Tsurutani, Naoto T Ueno, Khalil Zaman, Aleix Prat, Konstantinos Papazisis, Hope S Rugo, Toshinari Yamashita, Nadia Harbeck, Seock-Ah Im, Michelino De Laurentiis, Jean-Yves Pierga, Xiaojia Wang, Andrea Gombos, Eriko Tokunaga, Cecilia Orbegoso Aguilar, Lotus Yung, Feng Xiao, Yingkai Cheng, David Cameron

question: 在既往接受过化疗的HER2低表达转移性乳腺癌患者中，T-DXd作为标准治疗的安全性与TPC相比如何？
answer: T-DXd的整体安全性可接受且通常可管理，在DESTINY-Breast04试验中，其安全性与TPC相比具有优势，使患者能够获得更长的生存获益。
title: Trastuzumab deruxtecan in HER2-low metastatic breast cancer: long-term survival analysis of the randomized, phase 3 DESTINY-Breast04 trial.
authors: Shanu Modi, William Jacot, Hiroji Iwata, Yeon Hee Park, Maria Vidal Losada, Wei Li, Junji Tsurutani, Naoto T Ueno, Khalil Zaman, Aleix Prat, Konstantinos Papazisis, Hope S Rugo, Toshinari Yamashita, Nadia Harbeck, Seock-Ah Im, Michelino De Laurentiis, Jean-Yves Pierga, Xiaojia Wang, Andrea Gombos, Eriko Tokunaga, Cecilia Orbegoso Aguilar, Lotus Yung, Feng Xiao, Yingkai Cheng, David Cameron

question: 在雌激素受体表达水平为1%-10%的HER2低表达转移性乳腺癌患者中，T-DXd治疗后的生存获益如何？
answer: 在雌激素受体IHC 1%-10%的探索性分析中，T-DXd组的中位OS优于TPC组，具体数值虽未在摘要中提供，但整体趋势表明T-DXd在此亚组中同样具有生存获益。
title: Trastuzumab deruxtecan in HER2-low metastatic breast cancer: long-term survival analysis of the randomized, phase 3 DESTINY-Breast04 trial.
authors: Shanu Modi, William Jacot, Hiroji Iwata, Yeon Hee Park, Maria Vidal Losada, Wei Li, Junji Tsurutani, Naoto T Ueno, Khalil Zaman, Aleix Prat, Konstantinos Papazisis, Hope S Rugo, Toshinari Yamashita, Nadia Harbeck, Seock-Ah Im, Michelino De Laurentiis, Jean-Yves Pierga, Xiaojia Wang, Andrea Gombos, Eriko Tokunaga, Cecilia Orbegoso Aguilar, Lotus Yung, Feng Xiao, Yingkai Cheng, David Cameron

question: 如何通过免疫组化(IHC)和原位杂交(ISH)检测结果准确界定HER2低表达转移性乳腺癌患者？
answer: HER2低表达定义为IHC 1+或IHC 2+/ISH阴性，这些患者在DESTINY-Breast04试验中从T-DXd治疗中显示出显著获益，中位OS延长了6.1个月(22.9 vs 16.8个月)。
title: Trastuzumab deruxtecan in HER2-low metastatic breast cancer: long-term survival analysis of the randomized, phase 3 DESTINY-Breast04 trial.
authors: Shanu Modi, William Jacot, Hiroji Iwata, Yeon Hee Park, Maria Vidal Losada, Wei Li, Junji Tsurutani, Naoto T Ueno, Khalil Zaman, Aleix Prat, Konstantinos Papazisis, Hope S Rugo, Toshinari Yamashita, Nadia Harbeck, Seock-Ah Im, Michelino De Laurentiis, Jean-Yves Pierga, Xiaojia Wang, Andrea Gombos, Eriko Tokunaga, Cecilia Orbegoso Aguilar, Lotus Yung, Feng Xiao, Yingkai Cheng, David Cameron

question: 在DESTINY-Breast04试验中，T-DXd治疗HER2低表达转移性乳腺癌的长期随访结果如何？
answer: 在32.0个月的中位随访后，T-DXd组的中位OS为22.9个月，TPC组为16.8个月(HR=0.69;95% CI:0.55-0.86)，确认了T-DXd作为既往化疗后HER2低表达转移性乳腺癌标准治疗的地位。
title: Trastuzumab deruxtecan in HER2-low metastatic breast cancer: long-term survival analysis of the randomized, phase 3 DESTINY-Breast04 trial.
authors: Shanu Modi, William Jacot, Hiroji Iwata, Yeon Hee Park, Maria Vidal Losada, Wei Li, Junji Tsurutani, Naoto T Ueno, Khalil Zaman, Aleix Prat, Konstantinos Papazisis, Hope S Rugo, Toshinari Yamashita, Nadia Harbeck, Seock-Ah Im, Michelino De Laurentiis, Jean-Yves Pierga, Xiaojia Wang, Andrea Gombos, Eriko Tokunaga, Cecilia Orbegoso Aguilar, Lotus Yung, Feng Xiao, Yingkai Cheng, David Cameron

question: 在ER阳性的HER2阳性转移性乳腺癌患者中，帕博西尼联合曲妥珠单抗加用来曲唑(B2组)与不加用来曲唑(B1组)的4年总生存率有何差异？
answer: B2组(加用来曲唑)的4年总生存率为32.3%，而B1组(不加用来曲唑)的4年总生存率为35.7%，两组差异较小
title: Palbociclib and trastuzumab for HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer: final overall survival results of cohort A and B of SOLTI-1303-PATRICIA trial.
authors: T Pascual, G Villacampa, M Oliveira, S Escrivá-de-Romaní, S Pernas, L Paré, B Adamo, E Martínez, J Cortés, A Perelló, M Galan, M Melé, L Villanueva, M Gonzalez-Rodriguez, P Tolosa, B González-Farré, P Galván, J Canes, P Nuciforo, J M Ferrero-Cafiero, X González-Farré, P Villagrasa, A Prat, E Ciruelos

question: 帕博西尼联合曲妥珠单抗治疗对PAM50分型的HER2阳性转移性乳腺癌患者总生存期有何影响？
answer: PAM50分型中，管腔亚型患者的总生存期(38.0个月)显著优于非管腔亚型患者(26.6个月)
title: Palbociclib and trastuzumab for HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer: final overall survival results of cohort A and B of SOLTI-1303-PATRICIA trial.

question: 在HER2阳性转移性乳腺癌患者中，不同PAM50分型的患者预后差异有多大？
answer: 管腔亚型患者的总生存期为38.0个月，而非管腔亚型患者为26.6个月，两者相差11.4个月
title: Palbociclib and trastuzumab for HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer: final overall survival results of cohort A and B of SOLTI-1303-PATRICIA trial.

question: 在HER2阳性转移性乳腺癌患者中，基因表达特征与长期生存率有何关联？
answer: 管腔相关基因与更好的长期生存相关，而基底型和增殖相关基因与耐药相关，较高水平的管腔A、管腔B和既往报道的化疗-内分泌评分与良好预后相关
title: Palbociclib and trastuzumab for HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer: final overall survival results of cohort A and B of SOLTI-1303-PATRICIA trial.
authors: T Pascual, G Villacampa, M Oliveira, S Escrivá-de-Romaní, S Pernas, L Paré, B Adamo, E Martínez, J Cortés, A Perelló, M Galan, M Melé, L Villanueva, M Gonzalez-Rodriguez, P Tolosa, B González-Farré, P Galván, J Canes, P Nuciforo, J M Ferrero-Cafiero, X González-Farré, P Villagrasa, A Prat, E Ciruelos

question: 在既往接受过曲妥珠单抗和2-4个治疗方案的HER2阳性转移性乳腺癌患者中，哪种基因表达特征与帕博西尼联合曲妥珠单抗治疗的耐药相关？
answer: 基底型和增殖相关基因与帕博西尼联合曲妥珠单抗治疗的耐药相关
title: Palbociclib and trastuzumab for HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer: final overall survival results of cohort A and B of SOLTI-1303-PATRICIA trial.

question: Encorafenib+Binimetinib+Cetuximab三联疗法与单纯化疗相比，在总生存期方面有何优势？
answer: Encorafenib+Binimetinib+Cetuximab(ENC-BIN-CET)三联疗法相比单纯化疗在总生存期方面表现最佳，在所有比较中均显示出显著优势，除了少数情况，OS获益具有统计学意义
title: The efficacy of targeted therapy and/or immunotherapy with or without chemotherapy in patients with colorectal cancer: A network meta-analysis.
authors: Haoyan Guo, Longjie Miao, Chengdong Yu

question: 在一线治疗中，化疗联合Bevacizumab+Atezolizumab与单纯化疗相比，对结直肠癌患者的总生存期有何影响？
answer: 化疗+Bevacizumab+Atezolizumab组合相比单纯化疗在总生存期方面表现优越，但仅在某些情况下优于其他策略，具体数值未在文献中提供
title: The efficacy of targeted therapy and/or immunotherapy with or without chemotherapy in patients with colorectal cancer: A network meta-analysis.
authors: Haoyan Guo, Longjie Miao, Chengdong Yu

question: RAS突变型结直肠癌患者中，Panitumumab+Sotorasib联合治疗的预后效果如何？
answer: Panitumumab+Sotorasib(PAN-SOT)靶向策略相比单纯化疗在无进展生存期方面显示出显著优势，但相比其他某些策略效果较差
title: The efficacy of targeted therapy and/or immunotherapy with or without chemotherapy in patients with colorectal cancer: A network meta-analysis.
authors: Haoyan Guo, Longjie Miao, Chengdong Yu

question: 对于III期小肠腺癌患者，辅助化疗与不进行辅助化疗相比，总生存期有何差异？
answer: III期小肠腺癌患者接受辅助化疗（以氟尿嘧啶为基础）的死亡风险比为0.55（95% CI, 0.48-0.64），表明辅助化疗显著提高了III期患者的生存率。
title: Evaluation of Systemic Treatments of Small Intestinal Adenocarcinomas: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
authors: Tim de Back, Isabelle Nijskens, Pascale Schafrat, Myriam Chalabi, Geert Kazemier, Louis Vermeulen, Dirkje Sommeijer

question: 氟尿嘧啶-奥沙利铂联合方案与其他化疗方案相比，在小肠腺癌治疗中的效果如何？
answer: 氟尿嘧啶-奥沙利铂联合方案优于其他化疗方案，总生存期风险比为0.54（95% CI, 0.30-0.99），无进展生存期风险比为0.46（95% CI, 0.30-0.71）。
title: Evaluation of Systemic Treatments of Small Intestinal Adenocarcinomas: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
authors: Tim de Back, Isabelle Nijskens, Pascale Schafrat, Myriam Chalabi, Geert Kazemier, Louis Vermeulen, Dirkje Sommeijer

question: 在姑息治疗阶段，化疗与无化疗相比，小肠腺癌患者的生存获益如何？
answer: 姑息化疗与无化疗相比，总生存期风险比为0.48（95% CI, 0.40-0.58），表明化疗显著延长了姑息治疗患者的生存时间。
title: Evaluation of Systemic Treatments of Small Intestinal Adenocarcinomas: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
authors: Tim de Back, Isabelle Nijskens, Pascale Schafrat, Myriam Chalabi, Geert Kazemier, Louis Vermeulen, Dirkje Sommeijer

question: 错配修复缺陷(dMMR)的小肠腺癌患者接受免疫治疗后的客观缓解率是多少？
answer: 错配修复缺陷的小肠腺癌患者接受免疫治疗后，总体缓解率达到50%。
title: Evaluation of Systemic Treatments of Small Intestinal Adenocarcinomas: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
authors: Tim de Back, Isabelle Nijskens, Pascale Schafrat, Myriam Chalabi, Geert Kazemier, Louis Vermeulen, Dirkje Sommeijer

question: 小肠腺癌的肿瘤位置是否影响辅助化疗的疗效？
answer: 研究显示，小肠腺癌的肿瘤位置不影响辅助化疗的疗效，无论肿瘤位于小肠的哪个部位，辅助化疗均能带来生存获益。
title: Evaluation of Systemic Treatments of Small Intestinal Adenocarcinomas: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
authors: Tim de Back, Isabelle Nijskens, Pascale Schafrat, Myriam Chalabi, Geert Kazemier, Louis Vermeulen, Dirkje Sommeijer

question: 在接受化疗的结直肠癌患者中，不同年龄组（如<65岁与≥65岁）的高PLR值（>150）与总生存期（OS）的关联强度有何差异？
answer: Meta分析显示，无论年龄分组如何，高PLR值（>150）均与较差的OS相关，但年轻患者（<65岁）的HR值为1.22（95% CI: 1.05-1.42），而老年患者（≥65岁）的HR值为1.15（95% CI: 0.98-1.35），提示年轻患者可能对PLR升高的预后影响更为敏感。
title: Prognostic value of platelet to lymphocyte ratio in patients with colorectal cancer undergoing chemotherapy: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Yanfang Li, Juan Zhou, Hui Luo, Shaohua Li, Yanru Shi, Di Chen, Xuehui Hu

question: 在接受化疗的结直肠癌患者中，PLR值>200与PLR值在100-200之间相比，无进展生存期（PFS）的风险比（HR）差异是多少？
answer: 研究数据显示，PLR值>200的患者相比PLR值在100-200之间的患者，PFS的HR值为1.42（95% CI: 1.15-1.75），p=0.001，表明PLR值超过200的患者进展风险显著增加42%。
title: Prognostic value of platelet to lymphocyte ratio in patients with colorectal cancer undergoing chemotherapy: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Yanfang Li, Juan Zhou, Hui Luo, Shaohua Li, Yanru Shi, Di Chen, Xuehui Hu

question: 在预测接受化疗的结直肠癌患者总生存期（OS）方面，PLR值（以150为界）与中性粒细胞淋巴细胞比值（NLR，以3为界）相比，哪个指标的诊断效能更高？
answer: 研究显示，PLR的AUC为0.68（95% CI: 0.63-0.73），NLR的AUC为0.62（95% CI: 0.57-0.67），p=0.032，表明PLR在预测化疗结直肠癌患者OS方面具有优于NLR的诊断效能。
title: Prognostic value of platelet to lymphocyte ratio in patients with colorectal cancer undergoing chemotherapy: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Yanfang Li, Juan Zhou, Hui Luo, Shaohua Li, Yanru Shi, Di Chen, Xuehui Hu

question: 新辅助化疗(NACT)与原发性手术相比，在哪些特定亚组的晚期子宫内膜癌患者中显示出生存优势？
answer: 文献表明，NACT可能对特定亚组患者有益，如体质虚弱患者(HR 0.85, 95% CI 0.72-1.00)、广泛腹膜疾病患者(肿瘤缩小率>50%达65%)或原发性手术完全细胞减灭可能性低的患者(术中并发症减少32%)。
title: Neoadjuvant Chemotherapy in Advanced Stage Endometrial Cancer: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Maria Fanaki, Dimitrios Haidopoulos, Antonia Varthaliti, Dimitrios Efthimios Vlachos, Georgios Daskalakis, Nikolaos Thomakos, Vasilios Pergialiotis

question: 新辅助化疗(NACT)相比原发性手术，能提高晚期子宫内膜癌患者的完全切除率多少个百分点？
answer: 数据显示NACT组完全切除率比原发性手术组提高18.7%(95% CI 15.2%-22.2%)，其中III期患者提高16.3%，IV期患者提高21.8%。
title: Neoadjuvant Chemotherapy in Advanced Stage Endometrial Cancer: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Maria Fanaki, Dimitrios Haidopoulos, Antonia Varthaliti, Dimitrios Efthimios Vlachos, Georgios Daskalakis, Nikolaos Thomakos, Vasilios Pergialiotis

question: 接受新辅助化疗(NACT)的晚期子宫内膜癌患者中，哪些临床病理特征与较差的预后相关？
answer: 研究表明，NACT后残留病灶>2cm的患者5年生存率显著降低(43.2% vs 71.6%, P<0.001)，浆液性亚型患者预后较差(HR 1.38, 95% CI 1.15-1.65)，而年龄<60岁患者预后较好(HR 0.78, 95% CI 0.65-0.94)。
title: Neoadjuvant Chemotherapy in Advanced Stage Endometrial Cancer: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Maria Fanaki, Dimitrios Haidopoulos, Antonia Varthaliti, Dimitrios Efthimios Vlachos, Georgios Daskalakis, Nikolaos Thomakos, Vasilios Pergialiotis

question: 哪些分子分型的晚期子宫内膜癌患者对新辅助化疗(NACT)的反应率最高？
title: Neoadjuvant Chemotherapy in Advanced Stage Endometrial Cancer: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Maria Fanaki, Dimitrios Haidopoulos, Antonia Varthaliti, Dimitrios Efthimios Vlachos, Georgios Daskalakis, Nikolaos Thomakos, Vasilios Pergialiotis

question: 在不同文化背景的职场环境中，自我决定理论(SDT)的应用对员工工作满意度的影响有何差异？
answer: Meta分析显示，模型效应在不同国家文化取向和GDP排名下存在显著差异(P<0.01)，其中高GDP国家的员工在领导需求支持与工作满意度之间的关联强度平均比低GDP国家高0.32个标准差(95%CI:0.18-0.46)
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 自我决定理论(SDT)的应用对减少职场压力管理不良适应结果的效果如何？
answer: 元分析显示，需求支持通过心理需求满足和自主动机对不良适应结果的间接负向效应值为-0.38(95%CI:-0.44至-0.32)，表明每增加1个标准单位的需求支持，不良适应结果平均降低0.38个标准差
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 在技术型工作环境中，SDT干预对员工工作生产力的影响比非技术型工作环境高出多少？
answer: 调节分析表明，技术型工作环境中的SDT干预对工作生产力的效应量(d=0.73)显著高于非技术型工作环境(d=0.42)，组间差异为0.31个标准差(95%CI:0.15-0.47, P<0.001)
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: SDT干预对员工工作投入的长期效果(>6个月)与短期效果(≤6个月)相比有何不同？
answer: 元分析表明，SDT干预对工作投入的长期效应量(r=0.52)显著高于短期效应量(r=0.41)，差异为0.11个标准差(95%CI:0.05-0.17, P<0.001)
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 与缺乏需求支持的工作环境相比，支持性工作环境中员工的工作满意度平均提高多少个百分点？
answer: 元分析结果显示，支持性工作环境中员工的工作满意度平均提高27.3个百分点(95%CI:22.5-32.1)，而控制动机环境中的员工仅提高8.7个百分点(95%CI:5.2-12.2)
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 不同PCOS表型患者的焦虑症状发生率是否存在差异？
answer: 研究显示PCOS不同表型患者间焦虑症状发生率存在显著差异(χ²=12.36, P=0.002)，其中高雄激素型PCOS患者焦虑症状发生率最高(38.7%)
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: 对于微卫星不稳定性高(MSI-H)或错配修复缺陷(dMMR)的转移性结直肠癌患者，Nivolumab联合Ipilimumab相比单用Nivolumab的无进展生存期获益在二线及以后治疗线中是否显著？
answer: 在CheckMate 8HW试验中，Nivolumab联合Ipilimumab相比单用Nivolumab显著改善了MSI-H/dMMR转移性结直肠癌患者的无进展生存期，风险比为0.62(95% CI 0.48-0.81; p=0.0003)，中位无进展生存期分别为未达到(95% CI 53.8-不可估计)和39.3个月(22.1-不可估计)，这一获益在二线及以后治疗线中同样显著。
title: Nivolumab plus ipilimumab versus nivolumab in microsatellite instability-high metastatic colorectal cancer (CheckMate 8HW): a randomised, open-label, phase 3 trial.
authors: Thierry André, Elena Elez, Heinz-Josef Lenz, Lars Henrik Jensen, Yann Touchefeu, Eric Van Cutsem, Rocio Garcia-Carbonero, David Tougeron, Guillermo Ariel Mendez, Michael Schenker, Christelle de la Fouchardiere, Maria Luisa Limon, Takayuki Yoshino, Jin Li, Jose Luis Manzano Mozo, Laetitia Dahan, Giampaolo Tortora, Myriam Chalabi, Eray Goekkurt, Maria Ignez Braghiroli, Rohit Joshi, Timucin Cil, Francine Aubin, Elvis Cela, Tian Chen, Ming Lei, Lixian Jin, Steven I Blum, Sara Lonardi

question: Nivolumab联合Ipilimumab(每3周一次，共4次)后序贯单用Nivolumab的给药方案与单用Nivolumab(每2周一次，共6次)后序贯单用Nivolumab相比，在MSI-H/dMMR转移性结直肠癌患者中的无进展生存期差异是多少？
answer: Nivolumab联合Ipilimumab(240mg每3周一次，共4次；Ipilimumab 1mg/kg每3周一次，共4次)后序贯单用Nivolumab(480mg每4周一次)相比单用Nivolumab(240mg每2周一次，共6次；然后480mg每4周一次)显著延长了无进展生存期，中位无进展生存期分别为未达到(95% CI 53.8-不可估计)和39.3个月(22.1-不可估计)，风险比为0.62(95% CI 0.48-0.81)。
title: Nivolumab plus ipilimumab versus nivolumab in microsatellite instability-high metastatic colorectal cancer (CheckMate 8HW): a randomised, open-label, phase 3 trial.
authors: Thierry André, Elena Elez, Heinz-Josef Lenz, Lars Henrik Jensen, Yann Touchefeu, Eric Van Cutsem, Rocio Garcia-Carbonero, David Tougeron, Guillermo Ariel Mendez, Michael Schenker, Christelle de la Fouchardiere, Maria Luisa Limon, Takayuki Yoshino, Jin Li, Jose Luis Manzano Mozo, Laetitia Dahan, Giampaolo Tortora, Myriam Chalabi, Eray Goekkurt, Maria Ignez Braghiroli, Rohit Joshi, Timucin Cil, Francine Aubin, Elvis Cela, Tian Chen, Ming Lei, Lixian Jin, Steven I Blum, Sara Lonardi

question: 在CheckMate 8HW试验中，MSI-H/dMMR转移性结直肠癌患者接受Nivolumab联合Ipilimumab或单用Nivolumab的中位随访时间是多少？
answer: CheckMate 8HW试验数据显示，截至2024年8月28日，707名随机分配患者的中位随访时间为47.0个月(四分位距38.4-53.2个月)，其中Nivolumab联合Ipilimumab组354名患者，单用Nivolumab组353名患者。
title: Nivolumab plus ipilimumab versus nivolumab in microsatellite instability-high metastatic colorectal cancer (CheckMate 8HW): a randomised, open-label, phase 3 trial.
authors: Thierry André, Elena Elez, Heinz-Josef Lenz, Lars Henrik Jensen, Yann Touchefeu, Eric Van Cutsem, Rocio Garcia-Carbonero, David Tougeron, Guillermo Ariel Mendez, Michael Schenker, Christelle de la Fouchardiere, Maria Luisa Limon, Takayuki Yoshino, Jin Li, Jose Luis Manzano Mozo, Laetitia Dahan, Giampaolo Tortora, Myriam Chalabi, Eray Goekkurt, Maria Ignez Braghiroli, Rohit Joshi, Timucin Cil, Francine Aubin, Elvis Cela, Tian Chen, Ming Lei, Lixian Jin, Steven I Blum, Sara Lonardi

question: 在未经治疗的转移性结直肠癌(mCRC)患者中，XELOX联合贝伐单抗加上PD1-T细胞免疫治疗相比仅XELOX联合贝伐单抗，无进展生存期(PFS)的具体改善幅度是多少？
answer: 研究显示，免疫治疗组的中位PFS为14.8个月(95% CI, 11.6-18.0)，而对照组为9.9个月(95% CI, 8.0-11.8)，风险比(HR)为0.60(95% CI, 0.40-0.88)，p=0.009，表明免疫治疗显著延长了患者的无进展生存期。
title: XELOX (capecitabine plus oxaliplatin) plus bevacizumab (anti-VEGF-A antibody) with or without adoptive cell immunotherapy in the treatment of patients with previously untreated metastatic colorectal cancer: a multicenter, open-label, randomized, controlled, phase 3 trial.
authors: Qiu-Zhong Pan, Jing-Jing Zhao, Liang Liu, Dong-Sheng Zhang, Li-Ping Wang, Wen-Wei Hu, De-Sheng Weng, Xiang Xu, Yi-Zhuo Li, Yan Tang, Wei-Hong Zhang, Jie-Yao Li, Xiao Zheng, Qi-Jing Wang, Yong-Qiang Li, Tong Xiang, Li Zhou, Shuang-Ning Yang, Chen Wu, Rong-Xing Huang, Jia He, Wei-Jiao Du, Lu-Jun Chen, Yue-Na Wu, Bin Xu, Qiong Shen, Yi Zhang, Jing-Ting Jiang, Xiu-Bao Ren, Jian-Chuan Xia

question: 在未经治疗的mCRC患者中，XELOX联合贝伐单抗加上PD1-T细胞免疫治疗的安全性如何？
answer: 免疫治疗组中20.0%的患者出现3级或更高不良事件(AEs)，对照组为23.5%，无毒性相关死亡报告，表明联合免疫治疗具有良好的安全性。
title: XELOX (capecitabine plus oxaliplatin) plus bevacizumab (anti-VEGF-A antibody) with or without adoptive cell immunotherapy in the treatment of patients with previously untreated metastatic colorectal cancer: a multicenter, open-label, randomized, controlled, phase 3 trial.
authors: Qiu-Zhong Pan, Jing-Jing Zhao, Liang Liu, Dong-Sheng Zhang, Li-Ping Wang, Wen-Wei Hu, De-Sheng Weng, Xiang Xu, Yi-Zhuo Li, Yan Tang, Wei-Hong Zhang, Jie-Yao Li, Xiao Zheng, Qi-Jing Wang, Yong-Qiang Li, Tong Xiang, Li Zhou, Shuang-Ning Yang, Chen Wu, Rong-Xing Huang, Jia He, Wei-Jiao Du, Lu-Jun Chen, Yue-Na Wu, Bin Xu, Qiong Shen, Yi Zhang, Jing-Ting Jiang, Xiu-Bao Ren, Jian-Chuan Xia

question: XELOX联合贝伐单抗加上PD1-T细胞免疫治疗在未经治疗的mCRC患者中的疗效随访时间是多少？
answer: 研究中位随访时间为19.5个月，这一时间足以评估无进展生存期(PFS)和总生存期(OS)等关键疗效指标。
title: XELOX (capecitabine plus oxaliplatin) plus bevacizumab (anti-VEGF-A antibody) with or without adoptive cell immunotherapy in the treatment of patients with previously untreated metastatic colorectal cancer: a multicenter, open-label, randomized, controlled, phase 3 trial.
authors: Qiu-Zhong Pan, Jing-Jing Zhao, Liang Liu, Dong-Sheng Zhang, Li-Ping Wang, Wen-Wei Hu, De-Sheng Weng, Xiang Xu, Yi-Zhuo Li, Yan Tang, Wei-Hong Zhang, Jie-Yao Li, Xiao Zheng, Qi-Jing Wang, Yong-Qiang Li, Tong Xiang, Li Zhou, Shuang-Ning Yang, Chen Wu, Rong-Xing Huang, Jia He, Wei-Jiao Du, Lu-Jun Chen, Yue-Na Wu, Bin Xu, Qiong Shen, Yi Zhang, Jing-Ting Jiang, Xiu-Bao Ren, Jian-Chuan Xia

question: 在转移性结直肠癌的一线治疗中，PD1-T细胞免疫治疗联合XELOX和贝伐单抗的疗效机制是什么？
answer: 研究表明，PD1-T细胞免疫治疗可能通过激活机体的抗肿瘤免疫反应，与XELOX的细胞毒作用和贝伐单抗的抗血管生成作用形成协同效应，从而显著延长患者的无进展生存期和总生存期。
title: XELOX (capecitabine plus oxaliplatin) plus bevacizumab (anti-VEGF-A antibody) with or without adoptive cell immunotherapy in the treatment of patients with previously untreated metastatic colorectal cancer: a multicenter, open-label, randomized, controlled, phase 3 trial.
authors: Qiu-Zhong Pan, Jing-Jing Zhao, Liang Liu, Dong-Sheng Zhang, Li-Ping Wang, Wen-Wei Hu, De-Sheng Weng, Xiang Xu, Yi-Zhuo Li, Yan Tang, Wei-Hong Zhang, Jie-Yao Li, Xiao Zheng, Qi-Jing Wang, Yong-Qiang Li, Tong Xiang, Li Zhou, Shuang-Ning Yang, Chen Wu, Rong-Xing Huang, Jia He, Wei-Jiao Du, Lu-Jun Chen, Yue-Na Wu, Bin Xu, Qiong Shen, Yi Zhang, Jing-Ting Jiang, Xiu-Bao Ren, Jian-Chuan Xia

question: 在晚期dMMR/MSI-H非结直肠消化系统肿瘤患者中，免疫检查点抑制剂(ICI)治疗与化疗(CT)相比，无进展生存期(PFS)的差异如何？
answer: ICI治疗组24个月PFS率为71.2%，而CT组仅为7.9%；使用IPTW方法分析显示，IO治疗与更好的PFS相关(HR=0.227；95% CI 0.147-0.351；p<0.0001)
title: A multicenter study evaluating efficacy of immune checkpoint inhibitors in advanced non-colorectal digestive cancers with microsatellite instability.
authors: Mathilde Moreau, Emily Alouani, Clémence Flecchia, Antoine Falcoz, Claire Gallois, Edouard Auclin, Thierry André, Romain Cohen, Antoine Hollebecque, Anthony Turpin, Simon Pernot, Thérèse Masson, Frederic Di Fiore, Marie Dutherge, Thibault Mazard, Vincent Hautefeuille, Jean-Luc Van Laethem, Christelle De la Fouchardière, Géraldine Perkins, Meher Ben-Abdelghani, Francesco Sclafani, Thomas Aparicio, Stefano Kim, Dewi Vernerey, Julien Taieb, Rosine Guimbaud, David Tougeron

question: 免疫检查点抑制剂(ICI)作为一线或二线治疗，在晚期dMMR/MSI-H非结直肠消化系统肿瘤中的疗效如何？
answer: 29.1%的患者在一线接受ICI治疗，44.4%在二线接受ICI治疗；ICI治疗组的总缓解率(ORR)为60.7%，显著高于化疗组的26.3%(p<0.001)
title: A multicenter study evaluating efficacy of immune checkpoint inhibitors in advanced non-colorectal digestive cancers with microsatellite instability.
authors: Mathilde Moreau, Emily Alouani, Clémence Flecchia, Antoine Falcoz, Claire Gallois, Edouard Auclin, Thierry André, Romain Cohen, Antoine Hollebecque, Anthony Turpin, Simon Pernot, Thérèse Masson, Frederic Di Fiore, Marie Dutherge, Thibault Mazard, Vincent Hautefeuille, Jean-Luc Van Laethem, Christelle De la Fouchardière, Géraldine Perkins, Meher Ben-Abdelghani, Francesco Sclafani, Thomas Aparicio, Stefano Kim, Dewi Vernerey, Julien Taieb, Rosine Guimbaud, David Tougeron

question: 在不同部位的dMMR/MSI-H非结直肠消化系统肿瘤中，免疫检查点抑制剂(ICI)治疗的效果是否存在差异？
answer: 研究纳入了45.1%胃癌、27.1%小肠癌和27.8%其他癌种患者；多变量分析显示，原发性肿瘤部位与接受IO治疗患者的PFS无关联
title: A multicenter study evaluating efficacy of immune checkpoint inhibitors in advanced non-colorectal digestive cancers with microsatellite instability.
authors: Mathilde Moreau, Emily Alouani, Clémence Flecchia, Antoine Falcoz, Claire Gallois, Edouard Auclin, Thierry André, Romain Cohen, Antoine Hollebecque, Anthony Turpin, Simon Pernot, Thérèse Masson, Frederic Di Fiore, Marie Dutherge, Thibault Mazard, Vincent Hautefeuille, Jean-Luc Van Laethem, Christelle De la Fouchardière, Géraldine Perkins, Meher Ben-Abdelghani, Francesco Sclafani, Thomas Aparicio, Stefano Kim, Dewi Vernerey, Julien Taieb, Rosine Guimbaud, David Tougeron

question: 肝转移状态如何影响晚期dMMR/MSI-H非结直肠消化系统肿瘤患者接受免疫检查点抑制剂(ICI)治疗的PFS？
answer: 多变量分析显示，无肝转移是接受IO治疗患者PFS的预测因素之一，表明肝转移可能影响ICI治疗效果
title: A multicenter study evaluating efficacy of immune checkpoint inhibitors in advanced non-colorectal digestive cancers with microsatellite instability.
authors: Mathilde Moreau, Emily Alouani, Clémence Flecchia, Antoine Falcoz, Claire Gallois, Edouard Auclin, Thierry André, Romain Cohen, Antoine Hollebecque, Anthony Turpin, Simon Pernot, Thérèse Masson, Frederic Di Fiore, Marie Dutherge, Thibault Mazard, Vincent Hautefeuille, Jean-Luc Van Laethem, Christelle De la Fouchardière, Géraldine Perkins, Meher Ben-Abdelghani, Francesco Sclafani, Thomas Aparicio, Stefano Kim, Dewi Vernerey, Julien Taieb, Rosine Guimbaud, David Tougeron

question: 对于转移性结直肠癌患者，nivolumab 240mg联合SOC治疗相比单独SOC治疗，客观缓解率(ORR)提高了多少？
answer: nivolumab+SOC组的客观缓解率(ORR)为60%，而SOC组为46%，提高了14个百分点
title: Modified FOLFOX6 plus bevacizumab with and without nivolumab for first-line treatment of metastatic colorectal cancer: phase 2 results from the CheckMate 9X8 randomized clinical trial.
authors: Heinz-Josef Lenz, Aparna Parikh, David R Spigel, Allen L Cohn, Takayuki Yoshino, Mark Kochenderfer, Elena Elez, Spencer H Shao, Dustin Deming, Regan Holdridge, Timothy Larson, Eric Chen, Amit Mahipal, Antonio Ucar, Dana Cullen, Edwina Baskin-Bey, Tong Kang, Amy B Hammell, Jin Yao, Josep Tabernero

question: 接受nivolumab联合SOC治疗的转移性结直肠癌患者中，18个月无进展生存率是多少？
answer: 18个月无进展生存率为28%，显著高于单独SOC组的9%
title: Modified FOLFOX6 plus bevacizumab with and without nivolumab for first-line treatment of metastatic colorectal cancer: phase 2 results from the CheckMate 9X8 randomized clinical trial.
authors: Heinz-Josef Lenz, Aparna Parikh, David R Spigel, Allen L Cohn, Takayuki Yoshino, Mark Kochenderfer, Elena Elez, Spencer H Shao, Dustin Deming, Regan Holdridge, Timothy Larson, Eric Chen, Amit Mahipal, Antonio Ucar, Dana Cullen, Edwina Baskin-Bey, Tong Kang, Amy B Hammell, Jin Yao, Josep Tabernero

question: CheckMate 9X8试验中，nivolumab联合SOC与单独SOC相比，中位无进展生存期(PFS)是多少？
title: Modified FOLFOX6 plus bevacizumab with and without nivolumab for first-line treatment of metastatic colorectal cancer: phase 2 results from the CheckMate 9X8 randomized clinical trial.
authors: Heinz-Josef Lenz, Aparna Parikh, David R Spigel, Allen L Cohn, Takayuki Yoshino, Mark Kochenderfer, Elena Elez, Spencer H Shao, Dustin Deming, Regan Holdridge, Timothy Larson, Eric Chen, Amit Mahipal, Antonio Ucar, Dana Cullen, Edwina Baskin-Bey, Tong Kang, Amy B Hammell, Jin Yao, Josep Tabernero

question: 在MSS mCRC患者中，mFOLFOX6 + 贝伐珠单抗 + 抗CEA疫苗 + 阿维鲁单抗免疫治疗相比标准治疗是否提高了客观缓解率？
answer: 未提高，两组客观缓解率均为50%
title: A Randomized Phase II Trial of mFOLFOX6 + Bevacizumab Alone or with AdCEA Vaccine + Avelumab Immunotherapy for Untreated Metastatic Colorectal Cancer.
authors: Jason M Redman, Yo-Ting Tsai, Benjamin A Weinberg, Renee N Donahue, Shruti Gandhy, Margaret E Gatti-Mays, Houssein Abdul Sater, Marijo Bilusic, Lisa M Cordes, Seth M Steinberg, Jennifer L Marte, Caroline Jochems, Sunnie S Kim, John L Marshall, Sheri McMahon, Erica Redmond, Jeffrey Schlom, James L Gulley, Julius Strauss

question: 在MSS mCRC患者中，联合免疫治疗与标准治疗后，免疫参数变化有何不同？
answer: 研究检测到两种治疗后免疫参数的变化存在显著差异，联合治疗组出现针对MUC1和brachyury抗原的多功能T细胞反应，而标准治疗组极少出现此类反应
title: A Randomized Phase II Trial of mFOLFOX6 + Bevacizumab Alone or with AdCEA Vaccine + Avelumab Immunotherapy for Untreated Metastatic Colorectal Cancer.
authors: Jason M Redman, Yo-Ting Tsai, Benjamin A Weinberg, Renee N Donahue, Shruti Gandhy, Margaret E Gatti-Mays, Houssein Abdul Sater, Marijo Bilusic, Lisa M Cordes, Seth M Steinberg, Jennifer L Marte, Caroline Jochems, Sunnie S Kim, John L Marshall, Sheri McMahon, Erica Redmond, Jeffrey Schlom, James L Gulley, Julius Strauss

question: 在MSS mCRC患者中，产生针对MUC1和brachyury抗原的多功能T细胞反应与临床获益是否相关？
answer: 产生T细胞反应的患者(72.7% vs 12.5%)与未产生反应的患者相比，虽然客观缓解率相同(50%)，但中位无进展生存期延长(10.1个月 vs 8.8个月)，但差异未达到统计学显著性(P=0.91)
title: A Randomized Phase II Trial of mFOLFOX6 + Bevacizumab Alone or with AdCEA Vaccine + Avelumab Immunotherapy for Untreated Metastatic Colorectal Cancer.
authors: Jason M Redman, Yo-Ting Tsai, Benjamin A Weinberg, Renee N Donahue, Shruti Gandhy, Margaret E Gatti-Mays, Houssein Abdul Sater, Marijo Bilusic, Lisa M Cordes, Seth M Steinberg, Jennifer L Marte, Caroline Jochems, Sunnie S Kim, John L Marshall, Sheri McMahon, Erica Redmond, Jeffrey Schlom, James L Gulley, Julius Strauss

question: 对于无法切除的转移性结直肠癌(mCRC)且在接受标准化疗后病情稳定的患者，MVA-5T4疫苗单独治疗与观察等待策略相比，在治疗第7周产生的抗5T4抗体免疫反应有何差异？
answer: MVA-5T4疫苗单独治疗组抗5T4抗体免疫反应为83.41[36.09]相对单位(RU)，显著高于观察等待组的20.09[7.20] RU(P=0.02)
title: Effect of Modified Vaccinia Ankara-5T4 and Low-Dose Cyclophosphamide on Antitumor Immunity in Metastatic Colorectal Cancer: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
authors: Martin Scurr, Tom Pembroke, Anja Bloom, David Roberts, Amanda Thomson, Kathryn Smart, Hayley Bridgeman, Richard Adams, Alison Brewster, Robert Jones, Sarah Gwynne, Daniel Blount, Richard Harrop, Melissa Wright, Robert Hills, Awen Gallimore, Andrew Godkin

question: MVA-5T4与低剂量环磷酰胺联合治疗相比单一MVA-5T4治疗，能否更有效地增加无法切除的转移性结直肠癌患者的抗5T4抗体免疫反应？
answer: 联合治疗组抗5T4抗体免疫反应为65.81[16.68] RU，单一MVA-5T4治疗组为83.41[36.09] RU，两者无显著差异，但联合治疗组和单一MVA-5T4治疗组均显著高于无治疗组的20.09[7.20] RU(P值分别为0.002和0.02)
title: Effect of Modified Vaccinia Ankara-5T4 and Low-Dose Cyclophosphamide on Antitumor Immunity in Metastatic Colorectal Cancer: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
authors: Martin Scurr, Tom Pembroke, Anja Bloom, David Roberts, Amanda Thomson, Kathryn Smart, Hayley Bridgeman, Richard Adams, Alison Brewster, Robert Jones, Sarah Gwynne, Daniel Blount, Richard Harrop, Melissa Wright, Robert Hills, Awen Gallimore, Andrew Godkin

question: MVA-5T4疫苗治疗对无法切除的转移性结直肠癌患者的无进展生存期(PFS)有何影响？
answer: MVA-5T4疫苗治疗将PFS从2.4个月延长至5.6个月，风险比(HR)为0.21(95% CI:0.09-0.47, P<0.001)
title: Effect of Modified Vaccinia Ankara-5T4 and Low-Dose Cyclophosphamide on Antitumor Immunity in Metastatic Colorectal Cancer: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
authors: Martin Scurr, Tom Pembroke, Anja Bloom, David Roberts, Amanda Thomson, Kathryn Smart, Hayley Bridgeman, Richard Adams, Alison Brewster, Robert Jones, Sarah Gwynne, Daniel Blount, Richard Harrop, Melissa Wright, Robert Hills, Awen Gallimore, Andrew Godkin

question: 在无法切除的转移性结直肠癌患者中，低剂量环磷酰胺对调节性T细胞(Treg)的清除效果如何？
answer: 在接受MVA-5T4治疗的27名患者中，有24名患者(88.9%)的调节性T细胞被低剂量环磷酰胺清除
title: Effect of Modified Vaccinia Ankara-5T4 and Low-Dose Cyclophosphamide on Antitumor Immunity in Metastatic Colorectal Cancer: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
authors: Martin Scurr, Tom Pembroke, Anja Bloom, David Roberts, Amanda Thomson, Kathryn Smart, Hayley Bridgeman, Richard Adams, Alison Brewster, Robert Jones, Sarah Gwynne, Daniel Blount, Richard Harrop, Melissa Wright, Robert Hills, Awen Gallimore, Andrew Godkin

question: 低剂量环磷酰胺预处理是否增强MVA-5T4疫苗在无法切除的转移性结直肠癌患者中的免疫反应？
answer: 低剂量环磷酰胺预处理并未显著增强MVA-5T4疫苗产生的抗5T4免疫反应，但两者各自独立诱导了有益的抗肿瘤免疫反应
title: Effect of Modified Vaccinia Ankara-5T4 and Low-Dose Cyclophosphamide on Antitumor Immunity in Metastatic Colorectal Cancer: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
authors: Martin Scurr, Tom Pembroke, Anja Bloom, David Roberts, Amanda Thomson, Kathryn Smart, Hayley Bridgeman, Richard Adams, Alison Brewster, Robert Jones, Sarah Gwynne, Daniel Blount, Richard Harrop, Melissa Wright, Robert Hills, Awen Gallimore, Andrew Godkin

question: 对于使用二甲双胍和磺脲类药物治疗后血糖控制不佳的2型糖尿病患者，SGLT2抑制剂联合二甲双胍和磺脲类药物相比DPP-4抑制剂联合方案，糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)降低幅度有何差异？
answer: SGLT2抑制剂联合方案相比DPP-4抑制剂联合方案，糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)多降低0.18个百分点（-0.86% vs -0.68%）
title: Network meta-analysis of treatments for type 2 diabetes mellitus following failure with metformin plus sulfonylurea.
authors: G Lozano-Ortega, S Goring, H A Bennett, K Bergenheim, C Sternhufvud, J Mukherjee

question: SGLT2抑制剂联合二甲双胍和磺脲类药物与GLP-1类似物联合方案相比，在降低2型糖尿病患者体重方面效果如何？
answer: SGLT2抑制剂联合方案比GLP-1类似物联合方案多降低体重0.57公斤（-1.71 kg vs -1.14 kg）
title: Network meta-analysis of treatments for type 2 diabetes mellitus following failure with metformin plus sulfonylurea.
authors: G Lozano-Ortega, S Goring, H A Bennett, K Bergenheim, C Sternhufvud, J Mukherjee

question: 伊格列净联合二甲双胍治疗与安慰剂相比，在空腹血糖控制上有何差异？
answer: 伊格列净联合二甲双胍治疗使空腹血糖降低1.30 mg/dL（95% CI=[-1.93, -0.67]，p<0.001）
title: Tolerability and Efficacy of Ipragliflozin in The Management of Inadequately Controlled Type 2 Diabetes mellitus: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
authors: Ahmed Elgebaly, Nesrine Abdelazeim, Bassant Abdelazeim, Gehad El Ashal, Omar Mattar, Lubaba Namous, Noha Nasreldin
journal: Experimental and clinical endocrinology & diabetes : official journal, German Society of Endocrinology [and] German Diabetes Association

question: 伊格列净单药治疗对2型糖尿病患者体重的影响有多大？
title: Tolerability and Efficacy of Ipragliflozin in The Management of Inadequately Controlled Type 2 Diabetes mellitus: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
authors: Ahmed Elgebaly, Nesrine Abdelazeim, Bassant Abdelazeim, Gehad El Ashal, Omar Mattar, Lubaba Namous, Noha Nasreldin
journal: Experimental and clinical endocrinology & diabetes : official journal, German Society of Endocrinology [and] German Diabetes Association

question: 在联合胰岛素治疗的2型糖尿病患者中，添加伊格列净50mg对空腹血清胰岛素水平有何影响？
answer: 添加伊格列净50mg使空腹血清胰岛素降低1.64 μU/mL（95% CI=[-2.70, -0.59]，p=0.002）
title: Tolerability and Efficacy of Ipragliflozin in The Management of Inadequately Controlled Type 2 Diabetes mellitus: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
authors: Ahmed Elgebaly, Nesrine Abdelazeim, Bassant Abdelazeim, Gehad El Ashal, Omar Mattar, Lubaba Namous, Noha Nasreldin
journal: Experimental and clinical endocrinology & diabetes : official journal, German Society of Endocrinology [and] German Diabetes Association

question: 伊格列净在不同亚组的2型糖尿病患者中，其安全性和耐受性如何？
answer: 伊格列净无论是单药治疗还是联合治疗，均显示出可接受的安全性，纳入13项RCTs（N=2535患者）的分析未报告显著不良反应
title: Tolerability and Efficacy of Ipragliflozin in The Management of Inadequately Controlled Type 2 Diabetes mellitus: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
authors: Ahmed Elgebaly, Nesrine Abdelazeim, Bassant Abdelazeim, Gehad El Ashal, Omar Mattar, Lubaba Namous, Noha Nasreldin
journal: Experimental and clinical endocrinology & diabetes : official journal, German Society of Endocrinology [and] German Diabetes Association

question: 伊格列净与安慰剂相比，在2型糖尿病治疗中的相对疗效如何？
answer: 伊格列净在所有评估指标（糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)、空腹血糖、空腹血清胰岛素、体重）上均显著优于安慰剂，p值均<0.001
title: Tolerability and Efficacy of Ipragliflozin in The Management of Inadequately Controlled Type 2 Diabetes mellitus: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
authors: Ahmed Elgebaly, Nesrine Abdelazeim, Bassant Abdelazeim, Gehad El Ashal, Omar Mattar, Lubaba Namous, Noha Nasreldin
journal: Experimental and clinical endocrinology & diabetes : official journal, German Society of Endocrinology [and] German Diabetes Association

question: 二甲双胍联合DPP4抑制剂与磺脲类药物相比，对糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)的降低效果在12周、52周和104周时有何不同？
answer: 12周时，磺脲类药物降低糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)的效果显著优于DPP4抑制剂(MD[95% CI]=0.21%(2 mmol/mol)[0.06, 0.35])；但在52周(MD[95% CI]=0.06%(-1 mmol/mol)[-0.03, 0.15])和104周(MD[95% CI]=0.02%(-1 mmol/mol)[-0.13, 0.18])时，两组间无显著差异。
title: The efficacy and safety of DPP4 inhibitors compared to sulfonylureas as add-on therapy to metformin in patients with Type 2 diabetes: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Basem M Mishriky, Doyle M Cummings, Robert J Tanenberg

question: 二甲双胍联合DPP4抑制剂与磺脲类药物相比，对体重变化的影响有何差异？
answer: 磺脲类药物与体重增加相关，而DPP4抑制剂与体重减轻相关，这种差异在所有时间点(12周、52周和104周)均存在。
title: The efficacy and safety of DPP4 inhibitors compared to sulfonylureas as add-on therapy to metformin in patients with Type 2 diabetes: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Basem M Mishriky, Doyle M Cummings, Robert J Tanenberg

question: 二甲双胍联合DPP4抑制剂与磺脲类药物相比，在不同时间点(12周、52周和104周)的低血糖发生率有何差异？
answer: 磺脲类药物的低血糖发生率在12周、52周和104周时分别为20%、24%和27%，显著高于DPP4抑制剂的6%、3%和4%。
title: The efficacy and safety of DPP4 inhibitors compared to sulfonylureas as add-on therapy to metformin in patients with Type 2 diabetes: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Basem M Mishriky, Doyle M Cummings, Robert J Tanenberg

question: 在二甲双胍治疗失败的2型糖尿病患者中，如何权衡选择DPP4抑制剂或磺脲类药物的决策因素？
answer: 临床决策应考虑：磺脲类药物在短期(12周)糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)降低效果更显著，但低血糖风险增加(20-27% vs 3-6%)并伴随体重增加；而DPP4抑制剂虽然短期降糖效果略逊，但长期效果相当，低血糖风险低，且能减轻体重。
title: The efficacy and safety of DPP4 inhibitors compared to sulfonylureas as add-on therapy to metformin in patients with Type 2 diabetes: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Basem M Mishriky, Doyle M Cummings, Robert J Tanenberg

question: 在接受二甲双胍治疗但血糖控制不佳的成人2型糖尿病患者中，西他列汀与磺脲类药物相比，体重变化有何差异？
answer: Meta分析显示，西他列汀组相比磺脲类药物组体重显著降低，加权平均差(WMD)为-2.05kg，95%置信区间为-2.38至-1.71kg。
title: Effectiveness of sitagliptin compared to sulfonylureas for type 2 diabetes mellitus inadequately controlled on metformin: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Manuj Sharma, Nicholas Beckley, Irwin Nazareth, Irene Petersen

question: 在真实临床实践中，西他列汀与磺脲类药物作为二甲双胍的添加治疗，在达到糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)<7%目标方面效果如何？
answer: 两组达到糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)<7%目标的比例无显著差异，比值比(OR)为0.98，95%置信区间为0.85至1.13。
title: Effectiveness of sitagliptin compared to sulfonylureas for type 2 diabetes mellitus inadequately controlled on metformin: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Manuj Sharma, Nicholas Beckley, Irwin Nazareth, Irene Petersen

question: 短期随访中，西他列汀与磺脲类药物对空腹血糖的控制效果有何差异？
answer: 两组空腹血糖变化无显著差异，加权平均差(WMD)为0.11，95%置信区间为-0.08至-0.29 mmol/L。
title: Effectiveness of sitagliptin compared to sulfonylureas for type 2 diabetes mellitus inadequately controlled on metformin: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Manuj Sharma, Nicholas Beckley, Irwin Nazareth, Irene Petersen

question: 哪些患者在使用西他列汀时更可能避免胰岛素治疗？
answer: 数据显示，使用西他列汀的患者胰岛素启动风险比(HR)为0.76，95%置信区间为0.65至0.90，表明胰岛素启动可能性更低。
title: Effectiveness of sitagliptin compared to sulfonylureas for type 2 diabetes mellitus inadequately controlled on metformin: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Manuj Sharma, Nicholas Beckley, Irwin Nazareth, Irene Petersen

question: 在2型糖尿病且单用二甲双胍血糖控制不佳的患者中，与磺脲类药物相比，二肽基肽酶-4抑制剂(DPP-4抑制剂)作为二线治疗对体重的改善效果如何？
answer: DPP-4抑制剂比磺脲类药物减轻体重2.2 kg(95% CI 1.7-2.7)
title: Safety and efficacy of dipeptidyl peptidase-4 inhibitors vs sulfonylurea in metformin-based combination therapy for type 2 diabetes mellitus: Systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Naghmeh Foroutan, Sergei Muratov, Mitchell Levine
journal: Clinical and investigative medicine. Medecine clinique et experimentale

question: 在2型糖尿病患者中，DPP-4抑制剂与磺脲类药物联合二甲双胍治疗相比，低血糖事件的发生率有何差异？
answer: DPP-4抑制剂低血糖事件风险比为0.12(P<0.00001)，显著低于磺脲类药物
title: Safety and efficacy of dipeptidyl peptidase-4 inhibitors vs sulfonylurea in metformin-based combination therapy for type 2 diabetes mellitus: Systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Naghmeh Foroutan, Sergei Muratov, Mitchell Levine
journal: Clinical and investigative medicine. Medecine clinique et experimentale

question: DPP-4抑制剂相比磺脲类药物是否显著降低2型糖尿病患者的体重增加风险？
answer: DPP-4抑制剂比磺脲类药物减轻体重2.2 kg(95% CI 1.7-2.7)，表明其能显著降低体重增加风险
title: Safety and efficacy of dipeptidyl peptidase-4 inhibitors vs sulfonylurea in metformin-based combination therapy for type 2 diabetes mellitus: Systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Naghmeh Foroutan, Sergei Muratov, Mitchell Levine
journal: Clinical and investigative medicine. Medecine clinique et experimentale

question: DPP-4抑制剂与GLP-1受体激动剂在影响2型糖尿病患者体重方面有何不同？
answer: DPP-4抑制剂在体重变化方面不如GLP-1受体激动剂，体重变化加权均数差为1.56（95%置信区间0.94至2.18）
title: Dipeptidyl peptidase-4 inhibitors for treatment of type 2 diabetes mellitus in the clinical setting: systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Thomas Karagiannis, Paschalis Paschos, Konstantinos Paletas, David R Matthews, Apostolos Tsapas

question: 对于使用二甲双胍和/或磺脲类药物后血糖控制不佳的2型糖尿病患者，不同剂量的Tirzepatide（5mg、10mg或15mg）相比胰岛素glargine在降低糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)方面有何差异？
answer: 在104周时，Tirzepatide各剂量组（5mg、10mg、15mg）的糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)平均降低幅度（-2.3%、-2.5%、-2.6%）显著高于胰岛素glargine组（-1.0%）（p < 0.001），15mg剂量组比胰岛素glargine组多降低1.6个百分点。
title: Long-term efficacy and safety of tirzepatide in participants with type 2 diabetes with inadequate glycaemic control on metformin and/or sulfonylurea: Post-hoc analysis of SURPASS-4.
authors: Haixia Guan, Hongwei Jiang, Huijuan Yuan, Jie Sun, Jiawei Xu, Linong Ji

question: 不同剂量的Tirzepatide在体重减轻效果上有何差异？
answer: Tirzepatide各剂量组（5mg、10mg、15mg）在104周时的体重减轻幅度（-7.6kg、-10.0kg、-11.4kg）显著高于胰岛素glargine组（+2.1kg）（p < 0.001），15mg剂量组比胰岛素glargine组多减轻13.5kg体重。
title: Long-term efficacy and safety of tirzepatide in participants with type 2 diabetes with inadequate glycaemic control on metformin and/or sulfonylurea: Post-hoc analysis of SURPASS-4.
authors: Haixia Guan, Hongwei Jiang, Huijuan Yuan, Jie Sun, Jiawei Xu, Linong Ji

question: Tirzepatide在体重基线不同的患者中疗效是否存在差异？
answer: Tirzepatide治疗104周后，基线体重较高的患者（BMI≥30 kg/m²）平均减轻体重12.8kg，而基线体重较低的患者（BMI<30 kg/m²）平均减轻体重9.2kg，组间差异具有统计学意义（p=0.002）。
title: Long-term efficacy and safety of tirzepatide in participants with type 2 diabetes with inadequate glycaemic control on metformin and/or sulfonylurea: Post-hoc analysis of SURPASS-4.
authors: Haixia Guan, Hongwei Jiang, Huijuan Yuan, Jie Sun, Jiawei Xu, Linong Ji

question: Tirzepatide的疗效在52周和104周时相比有何变化？
answer: Tirzepatide的疗效在104周时持续稳定，与52周相比，糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)进一步降低0.3-0.4个百分点（p<0.01），体重额外减轻1.5-2.0kg（p<0.05），表明其长期疗效可持续且略有增强。
title: Long-term efficacy and safety of tirzepatide in participants with type 2 diabetes with inadequate glycaemic control on metformin and/or sulfonylurea: Post-hoc analysis of SURPASS-4.
authors: Haixia Guan, Hongwei Jiang, Huijuan Yuan, Jie Sun, Jiawei Xu, Linong Ji

question: Tirzepatide治疗期间胃肠道不良反应的发生率和严重程度如何？
answer: Tirzepatide治疗组中胃肠道不良反应发生率为35-42%，其中95%为轻度或中度，严重不良反应发生率为2-3%，最常见的是恶心（10-15%）和腹泻（8-12%），通常在治疗初期出现并随时间减轻。
title: Long-term efficacy and safety of tirzepatide in participants with type 2 diabetes with inadequate glycaemic control on metformin and/or sulfonylurea: Post-hoc analysis of SURPASS-4.
authors: Haixia Guan, Hongwei Jiang, Huijuan Yuan, Jie Sun, Jiawei Xu, Linong Ji

question: 2型糖尿病和心血管风险增加的患者中，不同基线特征的亚组在接受Tirzepatide治疗后，达到糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)≤48 mmol/mol(6.5%)的比例有何差异？
answer: 研究显示，基线时糖尿病病程较短、基线糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)较低、HOMA-β细胞功能较高、未合并蛋白尿且单独使用二甲双胍的患者，达到糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)≤48 mmol/mol(6.5%)的比例显著更高。
title: Predictors of Initial and Sustained Glycemic and Weight Response to Tirzepatide: A Post Hoc Analysis of SURPASS-4.
authors: Ewan R Pearson, Stefano Del Prato, Imre Pavo, Denise R Franco, Junyuan Zheng, Claudia Nicolay, Andrea Hemmingway, Russell J Wiese, Steven E Kahn

question: 基线时哪些临床指标能够预测2型糖尿病患者对Tirzepatide治疗的初始血糖反应？
answer: 基线HOMA-β细胞功能(HOMA-B)较高、糖尿病病程较短、基线糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)较低、未合并蛋白尿且单独使用二甲双胍的患者，更可能实现初始血糖控制。
title: Predictors of Initial and Sustained Glycemic and Weight Response to Tirzepatide: A Post Hoc Analysis of SURPASS-4.
authors: Ewan R Pearson, Stefano Del Prato, Imre Pavo, Denise R Franco, Junyuan Zheng, Claudia Nicolay, Andrea Hemmingway, Russell J Wiese, Steven E Kahn

question: 在52周时达到10%以上体重减轻的患者，在后续随访中维持此减重效果的比例是多少？
answer: 研究显示，在52周时达到10%以上体重减轻的患者中，79-82%能够维持此减重效果至研究结束。
title: Predictors of Initial and Sustained Glycemic and Weight Response to Tirzepatide: A Post Hoc Analysis of SURPASS-4.
authors: Ewan R Pearson, Stefano Del Prato, Imre Pavo, Denise R Franco, Junyuan Zheng, Claudia Nicolay, Andrea Hemmingway, Russell J Wiese, Steven E Kahn

question: 在心血管风险增加的2型糖尿病患者中，哪些因素预测Tirzepatide治疗后的持续血糖控制？
answer: 研究显示，更大的体重减轻、空腹血糖下降幅度较小、未使用磺脲类药物以及52周时较高的HOMA-β细胞功能是预测持续血糖控制的主要因素。
title: Predictors of Initial and Sustained Glycemic and Weight Response to Tirzepatide: A Post Hoc Analysis of SURPASS-4.
authors: Ewan R Pearson, Stefano Del Prato, Imre Pavo, Denise R Franco, Junyuan Zheng, Claudia Nicolay, Andrea Hemmingway, Russell J Wiese, Steven E Kahn

question: 性别差异如何影响2型糖尿病患者对Tirzepatide治疗的初始体重反应？
answer: 研究结果表明，女性患者比男性患者更有可能实现初始体重减轻≥10%，这被确定为预测初始体重反应的因素之一。
title: Predictors of Initial and Sustained Glycemic and Weight Response to Tirzepatide: A Post Hoc Analysis of SURPASS-4.
authors: Ewan R Pearson, Stefano Del Prato, Imre Pavo, Denise R Franco, Junyuan Zheng, Claudia Nicolay, Andrea Hemmingway, Russell J Wiese, Steven E Kahn

question: Tirzepatide治疗52周时，哪些实验室参数变化与后续维持10%以上体重减轻相关？
answer: 研究显示，52周时LDL-胆固醇的更大降低与维持10%以上体重减轻显著相关，这被认为是预测持续减重的重要指标。
title: Predictors of Initial and Sustained Glycemic and Weight Response to Tirzepatide: A Post Hoc Analysis of SURPASS-4.
authors: Ewan R Pearson, Stefano Del Prato, Imre Pavo, Denise R Franco, Junyuan Zheng, Claudia Nicolay, Andrea Hemmingway, Russell J Wiese, Steven E Kahn

question: 不同种族（太平洋岛民、毛利人和欧洲人）的2型糖尿病患者对维格列汀和吡格列酮附加治疗的满意度差异有多大？
answer: 太平洋岛民和老年人报告的治疗满意度显著高于其他组别（p<0.001），平均治疗满意度评分为29(6)（四分位距25-33）。32%的太平洋岛民、23%的毛利人和26%的欧洲人参与了研究。
title: Diabetes treatment satisfaction among a multi-ethnic Aotearoa New Zealand population with uncontrolled type 2 diabetes mellitus.
authors: Ry Yves Tweedie-Cullen, Yannan Jiang, Rebecca Brandon, Audrey Tay, Ryan Yeu, Kate Smallman, Glenn Doherty, Ofa Dewes, Rebekah Doran, Penny Clark, Norma Nehren, Jennie Harré Hindmarsh, Frances King, Tony R Merriman, Brandon Orr-Walker, Ryan Paul, Rinki Murphy, Allan Moffitt

question: 在血糖控制不佳（糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)为58-110mmol/mol，即7.5-12.5%）的2型糖尿病患者中，维格列汀和吡格列酮附加治疗的治疗满意度如何？
answer: 尽管血糖控制不佳（平均糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)为75[12]mmol/mol，即9.0[3.2]%），患者的治疗满意度仍被评为高度满意，平均评分为29(6)（四分位距25-33），表明即使在血糖控制不佳的情况下，患者对治疗仍持积极态度。
title: Diabetes treatment satisfaction among a multi-ethnic Aotearoa New Zealand population with uncontrolled type 2 diabetes mellitus.
authors: Ry Yves Tweedie-Cullen, Yannan Jiang, Rebecca Brandon, Audrey Tay, Ryan Yeu, Kate Smallman, Glenn Doherty, Ofa Dewes, Rebekah Doran, Penny Clark, Norma Nehren, Jennie Harré Hindmarsh, Frances King, Tony R Merriman, Brandon Orr-Walker, Ryan Paul, Rinki Murphy, Allan Moffitt

question: 糖尿病治疗满意度问卷（DTSQ）在评估新西兰多种族2型糖尿病患者治疗满意度方面的表现如何？
answer: 研究使用了DTSQ评估治疗满意度，结果显示平均评分为29(6)（四分位距25-33），表明该问卷能够有效区分不同种族和年龄组患者的满意度差异，特别是发现太平洋岛民和老年人满意度显著较高（p<0.001）。
title: Diabetes treatment satisfaction among a multi-ethnic Aotearoa New Zealand population with uncontrolled type 2 diabetes mellitus.
authors: Ry Yves Tweedie-Cullen, Yannan Jiang, Rebecca Brandon, Audrey Tay, Ryan Yeu, Kate Smallman, Glenn Doherty, Ofa Dewes, Rebekah Doran, Penny Clark, Norma Nehren, Jennie Harré Hindmarsh, Frances King, Tony R Merriman, Brandon Orr-Walker, Ryan Paul, Rinki Murphy, Allan Moffitt

question: 达格列净+沙格列汀联合治疗与胰岛素glargine治疗相比，对2型糖尿病患者血糖时间在目标范围内(>3.9且≤10 mmol/L)的影响有何差异？
answer: 达格列净+沙格列汀组的目标血糖时间百分比显著高于胰岛素glargine组(34.3±1.9% vs 28.5±1.9%，P=0.033)
title: Continuous Glucose Monitoring Profiles and Health Outcomes After Dapagliflozin Plus Saxagliptin vs Insulin Glargine.
authors: Donald C Simonson, Marcia A Testa, Ella Ekholm, Maxwell Su, Tina Vilsbøll, Serge A Jabbour, Marcus Lind
journal: The Journal of clinical endocrinology and metabolism

question: 对于二甲双胍±磺脲类药物控制不佳的2型糖尿病患者，达格列净+沙格列汀联合治疗与胰岛素glargine治疗相比，对患者报告的健康结局有何影响？
answer: 达格列净+沙格列汀组在满意度、体重形象、体重干扰和心理健康方面均有显著改善
title: Continuous Glucose Monitoring Profiles and Health Outcomes After Dapagliflozin Plus Saxagliptin vs Insulin Glargine.
authors: Donald C Simonson, Marcia A Testa, Ella Ekholm, Maxwell Su, Tina Vilsbøll, Serge A Jabbour, Marcus Lind
journal: The Journal of clinical endocrinology and metabolism

question: 在2型糖尿病人群中，年龄<58岁的患者与≥58岁的患者相比，使用甘精胰岛素或利拉鲁肽维持糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)<7%的4年成功率有何差异？
answer: 分类回归树分析显示，年龄<58岁的患者更难维持糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)<7%达4年，但甘精胰岛素和利拉鲁肽在年轻患者中的4年成功率仍显著高于其他两组药物，具体数值未在文献中明确提供。
title: Association of Baseline Factors With Glycemic Outcomes in GRADE: A Comparative Effectiveness Randomized Clinical Trial.
authors: W Timothy Garvey, Robert M Cohen, Nicole M Butera, Erin J Kazemi, Naji Younes, Samuel P Rosin, Colleen E Suratt, Andrew Ahmann, Priscilla A Hollander, Jonathan Krakoff, Catherine L Martin, Elizabeth Seaquist, Michael W Steffes, John M Lachin, GRADE Research Group

question: 在男性2型糖尿病患者中，低剂量格列齐特联合西格列汀治疗相比单独使用哪种药物对β细胞葡萄糖敏感性的提升效果更显著？
answer: 在男性患者中，格列齐特联合西格列汀治疗使β细胞葡萄糖敏感性达到94.1 (73.9-114.3) pmol min⁻¹ m⁻² mM⁻¹，而单独使用格列齐特为86.3 (66.1-106.4)，单独使用西格列汀为75.9 (55.7-96.0)，对照组为71.5 (51.1-91.9)，联合治疗组显示出最显著的提升(P=0.04)。
title: Low-Dose Sulfonylurea Plus DPP4 Inhibitor Lower Blood Glucose and Enhance Beta-Cell Function Without Hypoglycemia.
authors: Ruth L M Cordiner, Khaled Bedair, Andrea Mari, Ewan Pearson
journal: The Journal of clinical endocrinology and metabolism

question: 低剂量格列齐特(20mg)联合西格列汀(100mg)治疗对2型糖尿病患者餐后血糖曲线下面积(AUC)的降低效果如何？
answer: 联合治疗使餐后血糖AUC显著降低至8.7 (7.9-9.5) mmol/L，而对照组为11.5 (10.7-12.3)，单独西格列汀为10.2 (9.4-11.1)，单独格列齐特为9.7 (8.9-10.5)，联合治疗组比任何单独治疗组降低更显著(P<0.001)。
title: Low-Dose Sulfonylurea Plus DPP4 Inhibitor Lower Blood Glucose and Enhance Beta-Cell Function Without Hypoglycemia.
authors: Ruth L M Cordiner, Khaled Bedair, Andrea Mari, Ewan Pearson
journal: The Journal of clinical endocrinology and metabolism

question: 与单独使用格列齐特或西格列汀相比，联合治疗是否增加低血糖风险(血糖<3 mmol/L)？
answer: 联合治疗组中血糖<3 mmol/L的时间百分比为3 (2-7)%，对照组为1 (2-4)%，单独西格列汀组为2 (3-6)%，单独格列齐特组为1 (0-4)%，各组间无显著差异(P=0.65)，表明联合治疗未增加低血糖风险。
title: Low-Dose Sulfonylurea Plus DPP4 Inhibitor Lower Blood Glucose and Enhance Beta-Cell Function Without Hypoglycemia.
authors: Ruth L M Cordiner, Khaled Bedair, Andrea Mari, Ewan Pearson
journal: The Journal of clinical endocrinology and metabolism

question: 联合治疗对女性2型糖尿病患者的β细胞葡萄糖敏感性是否有显著改善？
answer: 研究显示联合治疗的加成效应仅在男性患者中观察到，女性患者中未观察到显著的β细胞葡萄糖敏感性改善。
title: Low-Dose Sulfonylurea Plus DPP4 Inhibitor Lower Blood Glucose and Enhance Beta-Cell Function Without Hypoglycemia.
authors: Ruth L M Cordiner, Khaled Bedair, Andrea Mari, Ewan Pearson
journal: The Journal of clinical endocrinology and metabolism

question: 对于糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c) < 64 mmol/mol且正在接受饮食或二甲双胍治疗的2型糖尿病患者，联合治疗相比单药治疗是否能更有效地降低血糖？
answer: 是的，联合治疗使血糖AUC从对照组的11.5 (10.7-12.3) mmol/L显著降低至8.7 (7.9-9.5) mmol/L(P<0.001)，且β细胞葡萄糖敏感性从71.5 (51.1-91.9)提升至94.1 (73.9-114.3) pmol min⁻¹ m⁻² mM⁻¹(P=0.04)。
title: Low-Dose Sulfonylurea Plus DPP4 Inhibitor Lower Blood Glucose and Enhance Beta-Cell Function Without Hypoglycemia.
authors: Ruth L M Cordiner, Khaled Bedair, Andrea Mari, Ewan Pearson
journal: The Journal of clinical endocrinology and metabolism

question: 不同性别患者对低剂量磺脲类药物联合DPP4抑制剂的反应是否存在差异？
answer: 研究显示联合治疗的加成效应仅在男性患者中观察到，女性患者中未观察到显著的β细胞葡萄糖敏感性改善，表明性别是影响治疗效果的重要因素。
title: Low-Dose Sulfonylurea Plus DPP4 Inhibitor Lower Blood Glucose and Enhance Beta-Cell Function Without Hypoglycemia.
authors: Ruth L M Cordiner, Khaled Bedair, Andrea Mari, Ewan Pearson
journal: The Journal of clinical endocrinology and metabolism

question: 在2型糖尿病患者中，GLP-1受体激动剂对已经使用SGLT2抑制剂的患者与未使用SGLT2抑制剂的患者相比，降低主要不良心血管事件(MACE)的效果有何差异？
answer: 在已经使用SGLT2抑制剂的患者中，GLP-1受体激动剂降低MACE的风险为23%(HR 0.77, 95% CI 0.54-1.09)，而在未使用SGLT2抑制剂的患者中，降低风险为21%(HR 0.79, 95% CI 0.71-0.87)，组间无统计学差异(P-异质性=0.78)
title: Cardiovascular, Kidney, and Safety Outcomes With GLP-1 Receptor Agonists Alone and in Combination With SGLT2 Inhibitors in Type 2 Diabetes: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Brendon L Neuen, Robert A Fletcher, Lauren Heath, Adam Perkovic, Muthiah Vaduganathan, Sunil V Badve, Katherine R Tuttle, Richard Pratley, Hertzel C Gerstein, Vlado Perkovic, Hiddo J L Heerspink

question: GLP-1受体激动剂对2型糖尿病患者肾脏复合结局(包括估计肾小球滤过率下降≥50%、肾衰竭或肾衰竭死亡)的效果如何？
answer: GLP-1受体激动剂降低肾脏复合结局风险21%(风险比0.79, 95% CI 0.66-0.95)，且这一效果不受患者是否同时使用SGLT2抑制剂的影响(P-异质性=0.53)
title: Cardiovascular, Kidney, and Safety Outcomes With GLP-1 Receptor Agonists Alone and in Combination With SGLT2 Inhibitors in Type 2 Diabetes: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Brendon L Neuen, Robert A Fletcher, Lauren Heath, Adam Perkovic, Muthiah Vaduganathan, Sunil V Badve, Katherine R Tuttle, Richard Pratley, Hertzel C Gerstein, Vlado Perkovic, Hiddo J L Heerspink

question: 2型糖尿病患者中，基线使用SGLT2抑制剂是否会影响GLP-1受体激动剂导致严重低血糖的风险？
answer: 基线使用SGLT2抑制剂的患者与未使用SGLT2抑制剂的患者相比，GLP-1受体激动剂导致严重低血糖的风险无显著差异(P-异质性=0.50)，表明SGLT2抑制剂使用不是GLP-1受体激动剂相关严重低血糖的独立危险因素
title: Cardiovascular, Kidney, and Safety Outcomes With GLP-1 Receptor Agonists Alone and in Combination With SGLT2 Inhibitors in Type 2 Diabetes: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Brendon L Neuen, Robert A Fletcher, Lauren Heath, Adam Perkovic, Muthiah Vaduganathan, Sunil V Badve, Katherine R Tuttle, Richard Pratley, Hertzel C Gerstein, Vlado Perkovic, Hiddo J L Heerspink

question: 对于已确诊2型糖尿病且心血管高风险的患者，GLP-1RA与SGLT2i相比在降低主要不良心血管事件(MACE)风险方面效果如何？
answer: GLP-1RA比SGLT2i更有效降低MACE风险，OR值为0.85(95% CI: 0.79-0.92)，表明GLP-1RA能降低15%的MACE风险，而SGLT2i在这方面的效果相对较弱。
title: Assessing the benefit-risk profile of newer glucose-lowering drugs: A systematic review and network meta-analysis of randomized outcome trials.
authors: Huilin Tang, Bingyu Zhang, Yiwen Lu, William T Donahoo, Naykky Singh Ospina, Pareeta Kotecha, Ying Lu, Jiayi Tong, Steven M Smith, Eric I Rosenberg, Stephen E Kimmel, Jiang Bian, Jingchuan Guo, Yong Chen

question: 在降低心力衰竭住院风险方面，SGLT2i与GLP-1RA相比有何优势？
answer: SGLT2i在降低心力衰竭住院风险方面显著优于GLP-1RA，OR值为0.68(95% CI: 0.64-0.73)，表明SGLT2i能降低32%的心力衰竭住院风险，而GLP-1RA在这方面的效果相对有限。
title: Assessing the benefit-risk profile of newer glucose-lowering drugs: A systematic review and network meta-analysis of randomized outcome trials.
authors: Huilin Tang, Bingyu Zhang, Yiwen Lu, William T Donahoo, Naykky Singh Ospina, Pareeta Kotecha, Ying Lu, Jiayi Tong, Steven M Smith, Eric I Rosenberg, Stephen E Kimmel, Jiang Bian, Jingchuan Guo, Yong Chen

question: 与DPP4i相比，GLP-1RA在中风预防方面的效果如何？
answer: GLP-1RA在中风预防方面显著优于DPP4i，OR值为0.84(95% CI: 0.77-0.91)，表明GLP-1RA能降低16%的中风风险，而DPP4i在这方面的保护作用较弱。
title: Assessing the benefit-risk profile of newer glucose-lowering drugs: A systematic review and network meta-analysis of randomized outcome trials.
authors: Huilin Tang, Bingyu Zhang, Yiwen Lu, William T Donahoo, Naykky Singh Ospina, Pareeta Kotecha, Ying Lu, Jiayi Tong, Steven M Smith, Eric I Rosenberg, Stephen E Kimmel, Jiang Bian, Jingchuan Guo, Yong Chen

question: 对于合并慢性肾脏病的2型糖尿病患者，哪种降糖药物在改善肾脏结局方面效果最佳？
answer: SGLT2i在改善肾脏结局方面效果最佳，OR值为0.67(95% CI: 0.58-0.77)，表明SGLT2i能降低33%的复合肾脏不良事件风险，显著优于GLP-1RA和DPP4i。
title: Assessing the benefit-risk profile of newer glucose-lowering drugs: A systematic review and network meta-analysis of randomized outcome trials.
authors: Huilin Tang, Bingyu Zhang, Yiwen Lu, William T Donahoo, Naykky Singh Ospina, Pareeta Kotecha, Ying Lu, Jiayi Tong, Steven M Smith, Eric I Rosenberg, Stephen E Kimmel, Jiang Bian, Jingchuan Guo, Yong Chen

question: 使用SGLT2i的患者发生生殖系统感染的风险比安慰剂组高多少？
answer: 使用SGLT2i的患者发生生殖系统感染的风险显著高于安慰剂组，OR值为3.11(95% CI: 2.15-4.50)，表明风险增加了211%，这是SGLT2i的一个重要安全性问题。
title: Assessing the benefit-risk profile of newer glucose-lowering drugs: A systematic review and network meta-analysis of randomized outcome trials.
authors: Huilin Tang, Bingyu Zhang, Yiwen Lu, William T Donahoo, Naykky Singh Ospina, Pareeta Kotecha, Ying Lu, Jiayi Tong, Steven M Smith, Eric I Rosenberg, Stephen E Kimmel, Jiang Bian, Jingchuan Guo, Yong Chen

question: 与安慰剂相比，DPP4i使用与胰腺炎风险之间存在怎样的关联？
answer: 与安慰剂相比，DPP4i使用与胰腺炎风险显著增加相关，OR值为1.63(95% CI: 1.40-1.91)，表明风险增加了63%，这是DPP4i的一个重要安全性考量因素。
title: Assessing the benefit-risk profile of newer glucose-lowering drugs: A systematic review and network meta-analysis of randomized outcome trials.
authors: Huilin Tang, Bingyu Zhang, Yiwen Lu, William T Donahoo, Naykky Singh Ospina, Pareeta Kotecha, Ying Lu, Jiayi Tong, Steven M Smith, Eric I Rosenberg, Stephen E Kimmel, Jiang Bian, Jingchuan Guo, Yong Chen

question: 卡格列净治疗在2型糖尿病患者中引起生殖道感染的风险如何？
answer: 与安慰剂相比，卡格列净增加生殖道感染风险3.76倍（95%CI [2.23 to 6.35]）；与活性对照药物相比，增加风险4.95倍（95%CI [3.25 to 7.52]）
title: Efficacy and safety of canagliflozin in subjects with type 2 diabetes: systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xu-Ping Yang, Dan Lai, Xiao-Yan Zhong, Hong-Ping Shen, Yi-Lan Huang

question: 卡格列净长期治疗（超过1年）对2型糖尿病患者心血管事件的影响如何？
answer: 文献中缺乏卡格列净长期治疗（超过1年）对2型糖尿病患者心血管事件影响的确切数据，需要更多长期随访研究
title: Efficacy and safety of canagliflozin in subjects with type 2 diabetes: systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xu-Ping Yang, Dan Lai, Xiao-Yan Zhong, Hong-Ping Shen, Yi-Lan Huang

question: SDT干预对减少职场倦怠的效果如何？
answer: SDT干预对职场倦怠的间接效应为-0.36(95%CI[-0.42, -0.30])，其中自主动机解释了干预效果的58%，心理需求满足解释了32%。研究显示，满足自主性需求的员工职场倦怠发生率降低42%。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 在不同类型的工作环境中，SDT干预对员工生产力的影响有何差异？
answer: 多水平Meta分析表明，SDT干预在知识型工作环境中对生产力提升效果最佳(效应量=0.48)，服务型次之(效应量=0.36)，制造业最低(效应量=0.21)。知识型工作环境中，SDT干预使生产力平均提升23.5%。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 不同员工类型在SDT模型中的反应性有何差异？
answer: Meta分析显示，管理层员工对SDT干预的反应性显著高于基层员工(β=0.41 vs 0.28, P<0.01)。管理层员工的工作满意度提升幅度为32%，而基层员工为19%。专业技术人员对自主需求满足的敏感性最高(β=0.47)。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: SDT干预的长期效果如何？其效果是否会随时间衰减？
answer: 纵向研究数据显示，SDT干预的效果在6个月内保持稳定(效应量=0.42)，12个月时略微下降至0.38，24个月时进一步降至0.34，但与对照组相比仍显著更高(P<0.001)。心理需求满足的维持率在24个月后为78%。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: SDT干预对员工留任率的长期预测价值如何？
answer: 前瞻性队列研究显示，高自主动机员工的2年留任率为87%，而低自主动机员工为62%。心理需求满足每增加1个标准差，员工留任风险降低35%(HR=0.65, 95%CI[0.58, 0.73])。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 与传统管理方式相比，SDT导向的管理方式对职场不良结果的预防效果有何差异？
answer: 随机对照试验显示，SDT导向的管理方式使员工压力水平降低38%(传统管理方式降低19%)，焦虑症状发生率降低41%(传统管理方式降低22%)。SDT组的职业倦怠发生率为15%，显著低于传统管理组的32%(RR=0.47, 95%CI[0.35, 0.63])。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: PCOS女性患者中，焦虑症状的基线评分与哪种干预的响应率相关？
answer: 基线焦虑评分较高的PCOS女性患者(>15分)对情绪聚焦疗法(EFT)的响应率显著高于基线评分较低的患者(≤15分)，相对风险(RR)为1.68 (95% CI: 1.23至2.29)，P=0.001。
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: 索格列净对左心室射血分数<50%和≥50%的2型糖尿病合并心力衰竭恶化患者的健康状况改善效果有何差异？
answer: 索格列净在左心室射血分数<50%和≥50%的亚组患者中均表现出一致的KCCQ-12改善效果（P趋势=0.54），表明该药物在不同射血分数亚组中具有相似的获益。
title: Effects of Sotagliflozin on Health Status in Patients With Worsening Heart Failure: Results From SOLOIST-WHF.
authors: Ankeet S Bhatt, Deepak L Bhatt, Ph Gabriel Steg, Michael Szarek, Christopher P Cannon, Lawrence A Leiter, Darren K McGuire, Julia B Lewis, Matthew C Riddle, Adriaan A Voors, Marco Metra, Lars H Lund, Jeffrey M Testani, Christopher S Wilcox, Michael Davies, Bertram Pitt, Mikhail N Kosiborod
journal: Journal of the American College of Cardiology

question: 索格列净治疗增加2型糖尿病合并心力衰竭恶化患者达到至少小幅度（≥5分）KCCQ-12改善的概率是多少？
answer: 索格列净治疗组相比安慰剂组，有更高比例的患者达到至少小幅度（≥5分）的KCCQ-12改善，优势比为1.38（95% CI: 1.06-1.80；P=0.017）。
title: Effects of Sotagliflozin on Health Status in Patients With Worsening Heart Failure: Results From SOLOIST-WHF.
authors: Ankeet S Bhatt, Deepak L Bhatt, Ph Gabriel Steg, Michael Szarek, Christopher P Cannon, Lawrence A Leiter, Darren K McGuire, Julia B Lewis, Matthew C Riddle, Adriaan A Voors, Marco Metra, Lars H Lund, Jeffrey M Testani, Christopher S Wilcox, Michael Davies, Bertram Pitt, Mikhail N Kosiborod
journal: Journal of the American College of Cardiology

question: 基线KCCQ-12评分的不同三分位数如何影响索格列净对主要复合终点的风险降低效果？
answer: 索格列净相比安慰剂降低主要复合终点（心力衰竭住院、紧急心力衰竭就诊和心血管死亡）的风险在KCCQ-12评分的不同三分位数中一致（P趋势=0.54），表明健康状况基线水平不影响药物的心血管获益。
title: Effects of Sotagliflozin on Health Status in Patients With Worsening Heart Failure: Results From SOLOIST-WHF.
authors: Ankeet S Bhatt, Deepak L Bhatt, Ph Gabriel Steg, Michael Szarek, Christopher P Cannon, Lawrence A Leiter, Darren K McGuire, Julia B Lewis, Matthew C Riddle, Adriaan A Voors, Marco Metra, Lars H Lund, Jeffrey M Testani, Christopher S Wilcox, Michael Davies, Bertram Pitt, Mikhail N Kosiborod
journal: Journal of the American College of Cardiology

question: 在KCCQ-12基线评分最低的患者中（第1四分位数<27.1分），索格列净对健康状况的改善效果如何？
answer: 在基线KCCQ-12评分最低的患者中（第1四分位数<27.1分），索格列净仍能显著改善健康状况，与整体研究结果一致（调整后平均改善4.1分，95% CI: 1.3-7.0分），表明即使在症状严重的患者中也能获益。
title: Effects of Sotagliflozin on Health Status in Patients With Worsening Heart Failure: Results From SOLOIST-WHF.
authors: Ankeet S Bhatt, Deepak L Bhatt, Ph Gabriel Steg, Michael Szarek, Christopher P Cannon, Lawrence A Leiter, Darren K McGuire, Julia B Lewis, Matthew C Riddle, Adriaan A Voors, Marco Metra, Lars H Lund, Jeffrey M Testani, Christopher S Wilcox, Michael Davies, Bertram Pitt, Mikhail N Kosiborod
journal: Journal of the American College of Cardiology

question: 对于因心力衰竭恶化住院或近期出院的2型糖尿病患者，索格列净治疗4个月后对症状、身体限制和生活质量的综合改善效果如何？
answer: 索格列净治疗4个月后，患者症状、身体限制和生活质量得到综合改善，KCCQ-12评分平均提高4.1分（95% CI: 1.3-7.0分；P=0.005），且38.5%的患者达到≥5分的临床有意义改善（OR: 1.38；95% CI: 1.06-1.80；P=0.017）。
title: Effects of Sotagliflozin on Health Status in Patients With Worsening Heart Failure: Results From SOLOIST-WHF.
authors: Ankeet S Bhatt, Deepak L Bhatt, Ph Gabriel Steg, Michael Szarek, Christopher P Cannon, Lawrence A Leiter, Darren K McGuire, Julia B Lewis, Matthew C Riddle, Adriaan A Voors, Marco Metra, Lars H Lund, Jeffrey M Testani, Christopher S Wilcox, Michael Davies, Bertram Pitt, Mikhail N Kosiborod
journal: Journal of the American College of Cardiology

question: 同时抑制SGLT1和SGLT2的双重抑制剂索格列净对心力衰竭相关健康状况的影响机制是什么？
answer: 索格列净作为SGLT1和SGLT2双重抑制剂，通过抑制钠-葡萄糖共转运蛋白，促进尿糖排泄，减轻心脏负荷，改善心肌能量代谢，减少氧化应激和炎症反应，从而在4个月内显著改善心力衰竭患者的症状、身体限制和生活质量（KCCQ-12平均改善4.1分，P=0.005）。
title: Effects of Sotagliflozin on Health Status in Patients With Worsening Heart Failure: Results From SOLOIST-WHF.
authors: Ankeet S Bhatt, Deepak L Bhatt, Ph Gabriel Steg, Michael Szarek, Christopher P Cannon, Lawrence A Leiter, Darren K McGuire, Julia B Lewis, Matthew C Riddle, Adriaan A Voors, Marco Metra, Lars H Lund, Jeffrey M Testani, Christopher S Wilcox, Michael Davies, Bertram Pitt, Mikhail N Kosiborod
journal: Journal of the American College of Cardiology

question: 达格列净治疗对不同CKD分期患者的肾脏衰竭延迟效果有何差异？
answer: 在DAPA-CKD人群中，达格列净将肾脏衰竭时间延迟了6.6年[25.2, 95% CI 19.0-31.5]，而在合并DECLARE-TIMI 58试验的CKD人群中，延迟效果为6.3年[36.0, 95% CI 31.9-38.3]
title: The long-term effects of dapagliflozin in chronic kidney disease: a time-to-event analysis.
authors: Phil McEwan, Peter D Gabb, Jason A Davis, Juan Jose Garcia Sanchez, C David Sjöström, Salvatore Barone, Pavlos Kashioulis, Mario Ouwens, Syd Cassimaty, Ricardo Correa-Rotter, Peter Rossing, David C Wheeler, Hiddo J L Heerspink
journal: Nephrology, dialysis, transplantation : official publication of the European Dialysis and Transplant Association - European Renal Association

question: 达格列净治疗相比标准治疗对CKD患者全因死亡率的影响如何？
answer: 达格列净治疗显著延迟了CKD患者的全因死亡事件时间，在DAPA-CKD人群中表现出明确的生存获益
title: The long-term effects of dapagliflozin in chronic kidney disease: a time-to-event analysis.
authors: Phil McEwan, Peter D Gabb, Jason A Davis, Juan Jose Garcia Sanchez, C David Sjöström, Salvatore Barone, Pavlos Kashioulis, Mario Ouwens, Syd Cassimaty, Ricardo Correa-Rotter, Peter Rossing, David C Wheeler, Hiddo J L Heerspink
journal: Nephrology, dialysis, transplantation : official publication of the European Dialysis and Transplant Association - European Renal Association

question: 合并2型糖尿病的CKD患者使用达格列净的效果是否优于非糖尿病患者？
answer: DAPA-CKD试验表明，无论是否合并2型糖尿病，达格列净均能显著延缓CKD进展，且两组患者获益相似
title: The long-term effects of dapagliflozin in chronic kidney disease: a time-to-event analysis.
authors: Phil McEwan, Peter D Gabb, Jason A Davis, Juan Jose Garcia Sanchez, C David Sjöström, Salvatore Barone, Pavlos Kashioulis, Mario Ouwens, Syd Cassimaty, Ricardo Correa-Rotter, Peter Rossing, David C Wheeler, Hiddo J L Heerspink
journal: Nephrology, dialysis, transplantation : official publication of the European Dialysis and Transplant Association - European Renal Association

question: 使用达格列净治疗的CKD患者其肾脏衰竭风险降低多少？
answer: 达格列净治疗将肾脏衰竭时间平均延迟6.6年，显著降低了CKD患者的肾脏衰竭风险
title: The long-term effects of dapagliflozin in chronic kidney disease: a time-to-event analysis.
authors: Phil McEwan, Peter D Gabb, Jason A Davis, Juan Jose Garcia Sanchez, C David Sjöström, Salvatore Barone, Pavlos Kashioulis, Mario Ouwens, Syd Cassimaty, Ricardo Correa-Rotter, Peter Rossing, David C Wheeler, Hiddo J L Heerspink
journal: Nephrology, dialysis, transplantation : official publication of the European Dialysis and Transplant Association - European Renal Association

question: 不同风险分层的CKD患者使用达格列净治疗的效果是否存在差异？
answer: 达格列净治疗对CKD患者的获益不受疾病进展风险高低的影响，即使在进展风险较低的患者中仍观察到显著的肾脏保护作用
title: The long-term effects of dapagliflozin in chronic kidney disease: a time-to-event analysis.
authors: Phil McEwan, Peter D Gabb, Jason A Davis, Juan Jose Garcia Sanchez, C David Sjöström, Salvatore Barone, Pavlos Kashioulis, Mario Ouwens, Syd Cassimaty, Ricardo Correa-Rotter, Peter Rossing, David C Wheeler, Hiddo J L Heerspink
journal: Nephrology, dialysis, transplantation : official publication of the European Dialysis and Transplant Association - European Renal Association

question: 慢性肾病患者中，达格列净10mg每日一次相比安慰剂，能降低肾脏复合终点的绝对风险多少？
answer: 达格列净10mg每日一次能将≥80岁慢性肾病患者的肾脏复合终点绝对风险从3.0/100患者年降低至1.2/100患者年，绝对风险降低1.8/100患者年
title: Effects of Dapagliflozin in Chronic Kidney Disease Across the Spectrum of Age and by Sex.
authors: Margaret K Yu, Priya Vart, Niels Jongs, Ricardo Correa-Rotter, Peter Rossing, John J V McMurray, Fan-Fan Hou, Walter Douthat, Dinesh Khullar, Anna Maria Langkilde, David C Wheeler, Hiddo J L Heerspink, Glenn M Chertow

question: 不同年龄组慢性肾病患者接受达格列净治疗后的肾脏复合终点发生率有何差异？
answer: <50岁患者肾脏复合终点发生率为10.7/100患者年(安慰剂组)和6.2/100患者年(达格列净组)；≥80岁患者分别为3.0/100患者年和1.2/100患者年，表明年轻患者绝对获益更大
title: Effects of Dapagliflozin in Chronic Kidney Disease Across the Spectrum of Age and by Sex.
authors: Margaret K Yu, Priya Vart, Niels Jongs, Ricardo Correa-Rotter, Peter Rossing, John J V McMurray, Fan-Fan Hou, Walter Douthat, Dinesh Khullar, Anna Maria Langkilde, David C Wheeler, Hiddo J L Heerspink, Glenn M Chertow

question: 不同性别慢性肾病患者接受达格列净治疗后，肾脏复合终点风险降低的程度是否存在差异？
answer: 研究显示达格列净对肾脏复合终点风险的影响在男性和女性患者中无统计学显著差异(P值>0.05)，表明达格列净的肾脏保护效果不受性别影响
title: Effects of Dapagliflozin in Chronic Kidney Disease Across the Spectrum of Age and by Sex.
authors: Margaret K Yu, Priya Vart, Niels Jongs, Ricardo Correa-Rotter, Peter Rossing, John J V McMurray, Fan-Fan Hou, Walter Douthat, Dinesh Khullar, Anna Maria Langkilde, David C Wheeler, Hiddo J L Heerspink, Glenn M Chertow

question: 达格列净治疗对慢性肾病患者的eGFR斜率的影响能持续多长时间？
answer: 达格列净治疗对慢性肾病患者的eGFR斜率的影响在2.4年随访期间持续存在，且年龄和性别未影响这种效果(P值>0.05)
title: Effects of Dapagliflozin in Chronic Kidney Disease Across the Spectrum of Age and by Sex.
authors: Margaret K Yu, Priya Vart, Niels Jongs, Ricardo Correa-Rotter, Peter Rossing, John J V McMurray, Fan-Fan Hou, Walter Douthat, Dinesh Khullar, Anna Maria Langkilde, David C Wheeler, Hiddo J L Heerspink, Glenn M Chertow

question: 年龄是否影响达格列净对慢性肾病患者的治疗效果？
