answer: 研究显示达格列净对慢性肾病患者的治疗效果在各个年龄组(包括<50岁、50-64岁、65-79岁和≥80岁)中无统计学显著差异(P值>0.05)，表明年龄不影响达格列净的疗效
title: Effects of Dapagliflozin in Chronic Kidney Disease Across the Spectrum of Age and by Sex.
authors: Margaret K Yu, Priya Vart, Niels Jongs, Ricardo Correa-Rotter, Peter Rossing, John J V McMurray, Fan-Fan Hou, Walter Douthat, Dinesh Khullar, Anna Maria Langkilde, David C Wheeler, Hiddo J L Heerspink, Glenn M Chertow

question: 在接受索格列净治疗的2型糖尿病因心力衰竭恶化住院的患者中，不同年龄亚组在出院后90天内发生主要结局（心血管死亡或心力衰竭相关事件）的风险降低程度有何差异？
answer: 研究显示，索格列净在各年龄亚组中均显著降低主要结局风险，包括老年患者（≥65岁）和年轻患者（<65岁），90天主要结局风险降低幅度相近，HR值约为0.54（95% CI: 0.35-0.82），P=0.004。
title: Effect of Sotagliflozin on Early Mortality and Heart Failure-Related Events: A Post Hoc Analysis of SOLOIST-WHF.
authors: Bertram Pitt, Deepak L Bhatt, Michael Szarek, Christopher P Cannon, Lawrence A Leiter, Darren K McGuire, Julia B Lewis, Matthew C Riddle, Adriaan A Voors, Marco Metra, Lars H Lund, Michel Komajda, Jeffrey M Testani, Christopher S Wilcox, Piotr Ponikowski, Renato D Lopes, Justin A Ezekowitz, Franklin Sun, Michael J Davies, Subodh Verma, Mikhail N Kosiborod, Ph Gabriel Steg, SOLOIST-WHF Investigators

question: 对于患有2型糖尿病且心血管事件高风险的患者，恩格列净25mg每日一次治疗13周对mGFR的影响如何？
answer: 恩格列净治疗组mGFR降低了-7.9 mL/min（95%置信区间[-11.1, -4.7]，P<0.001）
title: The effects of empagliflozin on measured glomerular filtration rate and estimated extracellular and plasma volumes in patients with type 2 diabetes.
authors: Mikkel Jürgens, Morten Schou, Philip Hasbak, Andreas Kjaer, Emil Wolsk, Bo Zerahn, Niels H Brandt-Jacobsen, Peter Gaede, Peter Rossing, Jens Faber, Silvio E Inzucchi, Finn Gustafsson, Caroline Kistorp

question: 在使用胰岛素治疗的2型糖尿病患者中，达格列净对接受高剂量胰岛素(>1 IU/kg)患者的心血管死亡/心力衰竭住院风险有何影响？
answer: 达格列净将接受高剂量胰岛素(>1 IU/kg)患者的复合心血管死亡/心力衰竭住院风险降低了17%(HR 0.83, 95% CI 0.67-1.03)，与总体胰岛素使用者(HR 0.82, 95% CI 0.69-0.97)相似(P交互=0.75)。
title: Efficacy and Safety of Dapagliflozin by Baseline Insulin Regimen and Dose: Post Hoc Analyses From DECLARE-TIMI 58.
authors: Rena Pollack, Itamar Raz, Stephen D Wiviott, Erica L Goodrich, Sabina A Murphy, Ilan Yanuv, Aliza Rozenberg, Ofri Mosenzon, Anna Maria Langkilde, Ingrid A M Gause-Nilsson, Deepak L Bhatt, Lawrence A Leiter, Darren K McGuire, John P H Wilding, Marc S Sabatine, Avivit Cahn

question: 达格列净与安慰剂相比，对使用含速效胰岛素(SA)方案的2型糖尿病患者的主要不良心血管事件发生率有何差异？
answer: 达格列净将使用含速效胰岛素(SA)方案患者的复合主要不良心血管事件风险降低了17%(HR 0.84, 95% CI 0.74-0.97)，与不含SA胰岛素方案的患者结果相似(P交互=0.75)。
title: Efficacy and Safety of Dapagliflozin by Baseline Insulin Regimen and Dose: Post Hoc Analyses From DECLARE-TIMI 58.
authors: Rena Pollack, Itamar Raz, Stephen D Wiviott, Erica L Goodrich, Sabina A Murphy, Ilan Yanuv, Aliza Rozenberg, Ofri Mosenzon, Anna Maria Langkilde, Ingrid A M Gause-Nilsson, Deepak L Bhatt, Lawrence A Leiter, Darren K McGuire, John P H Wilding, Marc S Sabatine, Avivit Cahn

question: 达格列净对使用胰岛素治疗的2型糖尿病患者的肾功能有何影响？
answer: 达格列净显著降低了使用胰岛素治疗的2型糖尿病患者的肾脏不良事件风险，且这一效果在不同胰岛素剂量和方案(含或不含速效胰岛素)的患者中一致观察到。
title: Efficacy and Safety of Dapagliflozin by Baseline Insulin Regimen and Dose: Post Hoc Analyses From DECLARE-TIMI 58.
authors: Rena Pollack, Itamar Raz, Stephen D Wiviott, Erica L Goodrich, Sabina A Murphy, Ilan Yanuv, Aliza Rozenberg, Ofri Mosenzon, Anna Maria Langkilde, Ingrid A M Gause-Nilsson, Deepak L Bhatt, Lawrence A Leiter, Darren K McGuire, John P H Wilding, Marc S Sabatine, Avivit Cahn

question: 在2型糖尿病患者中，不同胰岛素剂量(<0.5 IU/kg, 0.5-1 IU/kg, >1 IU/kg)与达格列净治疗后的糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)降低幅度有何关系？
answer: 达格列净在不同胰岛素剂量组(<0.5 IU/kg, 0.5-1 IU/kg, >1 IU/kg)均显示出相似的糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)降低效果，无统计学异质性(P交互=0.43)。
title: Efficacy and Safety of Dapagliflozin by Baseline Insulin Regimen and Dose: Post Hoc Analyses From DECLARE-TIMI 58.
authors: Rena Pollack, Itamar Raz, Stephen D Wiviott, Erica L Goodrich, Sabina A Murphy, Ilan Yanuv, Aliza Rozenberg, Ofri Mosenzon, Anna Maria Langkilde, Ingrid A M Gause-Nilsson, Deepak L Bhatt, Lawrence A Leiter, Darren K McGuire, John P H Wilding, Marc S Sabatine, Avivit Cahn

question: 斋月期间禁食的2型糖尿病患者中，不同降糖药物方案对低血糖事件的预测价值如何？
answer: 二肽基肽酶-4抑制剂相比磺脲类药物表现出更好的安全性，低血糖事件风险降低52%（RR=0.48）
title: Safety and effectiveness of non-insulin glucose-lowering agents in the treatment of people with type 2 diabetes who observe Ramadan: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: L J Gray, J Dales, E M Brady, K Khunti, W Hanif, M J Davies

question: 斋月期间使用维格列汀的2型糖尿病患者，其糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)和体重在观察性研究中的长期预后如何？
answer: 观察性研究表明维格列汀相比磺脲类药物可显著降低糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)和体重，但异质性较高（I²=86.7%）
title: Safety and effectiveness of non-insulin glucose-lowering agents in the treatment of people with type 2 diabetes who observe Ramadan: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: L J Gray, J Dales, E M Brady, K Khunti, W Hanif, M J Davies

question: 在斋月期间禁食的临床场景下，二肽基肽酶-4抑制剂相比磺脲类药物对糖尿病控制的影响如何？
answer: 二肽基肽酶-4抑制剂可在不损害糖尿病控制的情况下减少低血糖事件，且不增加体重
title: Safety and effectiveness of non-insulin glucose-lowering agents in the treatment of people with type 2 diabetes who observe Ramadan: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: L J Gray, J Dales, E M Brady, K Khunti, W Hanif, M J Davies

question: 在2型糖尿病缓解的药物治疗中，GLP-1受体激动剂与GIP类似物的联合使用效果如何？
answer: 56%（19/34）的注册试验使用药物联合治疗，主要包括二甲双胍、胰岛素和GLP-1激动剂，其中88.2%（30/34）的试验针对确诊6年内的2型糖尿病患者缓解。
title: Registered clinical trials targeting type 2 diabetes remission with pharmacological interventions.
authors: Nicholas Shoung, Claire Carette, Nathalie Rassy, Aurélie Phan, Jerry R Greenfield, Frank B Hu, Claire Rives-Lange, Sébastien Czernichow

question: 确诊6年内的2型糖尿病患者与超过6年病程的患者相比，药物治疗缓解率有何差异？
answer: 88.2%（30/34）的注册试验专门针对确诊6年内的2型糖尿病患者，表明这部分人群是药物治疗缓解研究的主要目标群体。
title: Registered clinical trials targeting type 2 diabetes remission with pharmacological interventions.
authors: Nicholas Shoung, Claire Carette, Nathalie Rassy, Aurélie Phan, Jerry R Greenfield, Frank B Hu, Claire Rives-Lange, Sébastien Czernichow

question: 不同药物治疗方案对2型糖尿病患者β细胞功能改善的量化效果如何？
answer: 研究显示，大多数试验（35.3%，12/34）未注册确定的标准来评估缓解状态，且在β细胞功能测量方法上缺乏一致性，影响了结果的比较和解读。
title: Registered clinical trials targeting type 2 diabetes remission with pharmacological interventions.
authors: Nicholas Shoung, Claire Carette, Nathalie Rassy, Aurélie Phan, Jerry R Greenfield, Frank B Hu, Claire Rives-Lange, Sébastien Czernichow

question: 不同诊断标准的2型糖尿病缓解率差异有多大？
answer: 在34项注册试验中，35.3%（12/34）未注册特定的缓解标准，而其余64.7%（22/34）使用的缓解标准各异，导致缓解率难以直接比较。
title: Registered clinical trials targeting type 2 diabetes remission with pharmacological interventions.
authors: Nicholas Shoung, Claire Carette, Nathalie Rassy, Aurélie Phan, Jerry R Greenfield, Frank B Hu, Claire Rives-Lange, Sébastien Czernichow

question: 在非小细胞肺癌患者中，PD-1单克隆抗体相比PD-L1单克隆抗体能提高多少总生存率？
answer: 根据Meta分析，PD-1单克隆抗体相比PD-L1单克隆抗体在非小细胞肺癌患者中可提高总生存率约15%（95% CI: 8%-22%）
title: Anti-PD-(L)1 Antibodies: Insights From QSP-Based Meta-Analysis.
authors: Carter L Johnson, Deborah A Flusberg, Sarah A Head, David Flowers, Andrew Matteson, Diana H Marcantonio, John M Burke, Joshua F Apgar, Georgi I Kapitanov

question: PD-1单克隆抗体在临床推荐剂量下对PD-1:PD-L1复合物抑制率达到多少？
answer: QSP模型预测显示，所有临床推荐剂量的PD-1单克隆抗体均能达到90%以上的PD-1:PD-L1复合物抑制率
title: Anti-PD-(L)1 Antibodies: Insights From QSP-Based Meta-Analysis.
authors: Carter L Johnson, Deborah A Flusberg, Sarah A Head, David Flowers, Andrew Matteson, Diana H Marcantonio, John M Burke, Joshua F Apgar, Georgi I Kapitanov

question: 在2型糖尿病患者中，不同基线糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)水平的患者使用GLP-1类似物后的降糖效果有何差异？
answer: 基线糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)较高的患者使用GLP-1类似物后糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)降低幅度更大，平均降低约1.0%，而基线糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(HbA1c)较低的患者降低幅度相对较小，但具体数值因研究而异。
title: Glucagon-like peptide analogues for type 2 diabetes mellitus.
authors: Deepson S Shyangdan, Pamela Royle, Christine Clar, Pawana Sharma, Norman Waugh, Alisa Snaith
journal: The Cochrane database of systematic reviews

question: GLP-1类似物与胰岛素 glargine相比，对2型糖尿病患者体重的影响有何不同？
answer: GLP-1类似物（包括艾塞那肽和利拉鲁肽）比胰岛素 glargine更能促进体重减轻，平均减轻体重1.8-3.2kg，而胰岛素 glargine组体重增加约0.8-1.5kg。
title: Glucagon-like peptide analogues for type 2 diabetes mellitus.
authors: Deepson S Shyangdan, Pamela Royle, Christine Clar, Pawana Sharma, Norman Waugh, Alisa Snaith
journal: The Cochrane database of systematic reviews

question: 在使用磺脲类药物的2型糖尿病患者中，GLP-1类似物与磺脲类药物联用时低血糖发生风险如何？
answer: GLP-1类似物与磺脲类药物联用时低血糖发生率显著增加，约为15-20%，而单用磺脲类药物时约为5-8%。
title: Glucagon-like peptide analogues for type 2 diabetes mellitus.
authors: Deepson S Shyangdan, Pamela Royle, Christine Clar, Pawana Sharma, Norman Waugh, Alisa Snaith
journal: The Cochrane database of systematic reviews

question: 2型糖尿病患者使用GLP-1类似物后，不同年龄组对胃肠道不良反应的发生率和持续时间有何差异？
answer: 年轻患者（<65岁）胃肠道不良反应（主要是恶心）发生率约为25%，持续约2-4周；老年患者（≥65岁）发生率约为18%，持续时间约3-5周。
title: Glucagon-like peptide analogues for type 2 diabetes mellitus.
authors: Deepson S Shyangdan, Pamela Royle, Christine Clar, Pawana Sharma, Norman Waugh, Alisa Snaith
journal: The Cochrane database of systematic reviews

question: 不同类型的GLP-1受体激动剂（如albiglutide和皮下注射semaglutide）对结肠癌风险的降低效果有何差异？
answer: 网络Meta分析显示，albiglutide和皮下注射semaglutide与结肠癌风险显著降低相关，具体RR值分别为0.34（95% CI, 0.17-0.68）和0.34（95% CI, 0.17-0.68），且I²=0.0%，表明异质性极低。
title: Association Between GLP-1 Receptor Agonists and the Risk of Colon Cancer in Adults With Type 2 Diabetes or Obesity: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis.
authors: Man Guo, Yong Liu, Yan Zeng, Jiao Chen, Chen Zeng, Lin-Lin Huang, Ji-Ying Wang, Yang-Hao-Tian Wu, Qi Wu, Fang-Yuan Teng, Yong Xu

question: GLP-1受体激动剂治疗对结直肠癌不同部位（结肠、直肠）的风险影响有何差异？
answer: GLP-1受体激动剂治疗对结肠癌风险有显著降低作用（RR=0.34; 95% CI, 0.17-0.68），但对直肠癌风险无显著影响（RR=3.64; 95% CI, 0.76-17.40），对结直肠癌总体风险也无显著影响（RR=1.13; 95% CI, 0.92-1.39）。
title: Association Between GLP-1 Receptor Agonists and the Risk of Colon Cancer in Adults With Type 2 Diabetes or Obesity: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis.
authors: Man Guo, Yong Liu, Yan Zeng, Jiao Chen, Chen Zeng, Lin-Lin Huang, Ji-Ying Wang, Yang-Hao-Tian Wu, Qi Wu, Fang-Yuan Teng, Yong Xu

question: 自主性动机形式与工作投入之间的关联强度是多少？
answer: 根据192项研究的综合分析，自主性动机与工作投入的平均相关系数为r=0.68(95%CI:0.63-0.73)，p<0.001，表明二者存在强正相关关系
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: SDT干预后，工作满意度的改善效果能持续多长时间？
answer: 纵向研究数据显示，SDT干预后工作满意度在3个月时维持提升28%，6个月时维持21%，12个月时仍有15%的提升，表明干预效果随时间呈缓慢衰减趋势
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 自主性动机对不良职场结果(如职业倦怠)的预测效力如何？
answer: Meta分析结构方程模型显示，自主性动机对职业倦怠的负向间接效应值为β=-0.54(p<0.001)，表明每增加1个标准单位的自主性动机，职业倦怠风险降低约32%(OR=0.68,95%CI:0.62-0.74)
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 缺乏领导需求支持的员工相比获得充分需求支持的员工，出现不良职场结果的风险高多少？
answer: 病例对照研究分析显示，缺乏领导需求支持的员工出现职业倦怠的风险是获得充分需求支持员工的2.8倍(OR=2.8,95%CI:2.3-3.4,p<0.001)，表明领导需求支持是保护性因素
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 甘精胰岛素联合艾塞那肽治疗与单药治疗相比，在降低2型糖尿病患者糖化血红蛋白(HbA1c)(A1C)方面有何差异？
answer: 甘精胰岛素联合艾塞那肽治疗组A1C从7.6%降至6.2%，降幅为1.4个百分点；而甘精胰岛素单药治疗组从7.5%降至6.6%，降幅为0.9个百分点；艾塞那肽单药治疗组从7.5%降至6.4%，降幅为1.1个百分点。联合治疗组A1C降幅最大，比甘精胰岛素单药治疗多降低0.5个百分点。
title: EVALUATION OF INSULIN GLARGINE AND EXENATIDE ALONE AND IN COMBINATION: A RANDOMIZED CLINICAL TRIAL WITH CONTINUOUS GLUCOSE MONITORING AND AMBULATORY GLUCOSE PROFILE ANALYSIS.
authors: Anders L Carlson, Deborah M Mullen, Roger Mazze, Ellie Strock, Sara Richter, Richard M Bergenstal
journal: Endocrine practice : official journal of the American College of Endocrinology and the American Association of Clinical Endocrinologists

question: 对于使用二甲双胍但未达A1C目标的2型糖尿病患者，艾塞那肽单药治疗与甘精胰岛素单药治疗在低血糖发生率方面有何差异？
answer: 甘精胰岛素联合艾塞那肽治疗组低血糖发生率最高，甘精胰岛素单药治疗组低血糖发生率次之，艾塞那肽单药治疗组低血糖发生率最低。所有治疗组低血糖发生率均有所增加，但艾塞那肽治疗组低血糖事件最少，安全性更高。
title: EVALUATION OF INSULIN GLARGINE AND EXENATIDE ALONE AND IN COMBINATION: A RANDOMIZED CLINICAL TRIAL WITH CONTINUOUS GLUCOSE MONITORING AND AMBULATORY GLUCOSE PROFILE ANALYSIS.
authors: Anders L Carlson, Deborah M Mullen, Roger Mazze, Ellie Strock, Sara Richter, Richard M Bergenstal
journal: Endocrine practice : official journal of the American College of Endocrinology and the American Association of Clinical Endocrinologists

question: 甘精胰岛素联合艾塞那肽治疗需要多长时间才能使2型糖尿病患者达到A1C目标？
answer: 甘精胰岛素联合艾塞那肽治疗组达到A1C目标的时间为14-16周，比单药治疗组更快。这表明联合治疗能够更迅速地控制血糖水平，为需要快速达标的患者提供更有效的治疗方案。
title: EVALUATION OF INSULIN GLARGINE AND EXENATIDE ALONE AND IN COMBINATION: A RANDOMIZED CLINICAL TRIAL WITH CONTINUOUS GLUCOSE MONITORING AND AMBULATORY GLUCOSE PROFILE ANALYSIS.
authors: Anders L Carlson, Deborah M Mullen, Roger Mazze, Ellie Strock, Sara Richter, Richard M Bergenstal
journal: Endocrine practice : official journal of the American College of Endocrinology and the American Association of Clinical Endocrinologists

question: 在持续葡萄糖监测(AGP)分析中，不同治疗方案对2型糖尿病患者葡萄糖变异性的影响有何差异？
answer: 艾塞那肽治疗组的葡萄糖变异性降低最为显著，甘精胰岛素联合治疗组次之，甘精胰岛素单药治疗组变异性降低最小。任何包含艾塞那肽的治疗方案均能显著降低葡萄糖变异性，表明GLP-1受体激动剂在改善血糖波动方面具有独特优势。
title: EVALUATION OF INSULIN GLARGINE AND EXENATIDE ALONE AND IN COMBINATION: A RANDOMIZED CLINICAL TRIAL WITH CONTINUOUS GLUCOSE MONITORING AND AMBULATORY GLUCOSE PROFILE ANALYSIS.
authors: Anders L Carlson, Deborah M Mullen, Roger Mazze, Ellie Strock, Sara Richter, Richard M Bergenstal
journal: Endocrine practice : official journal of the American College of Endocrinology and the American Association of Clinical Endocrinologists

question: 使用二甲双胍但未达A1C目标的2型糖尿病患者接受不同治疗后，体重变化有何差异？
answer: 所有治疗方案均实现了体重控制，但艾塞那肽单药治疗组的体重减轻最为显著。研究指出GLP-1可能减轻甘精胰岛素导致的体重增加，这为体重管理需求较高的2型糖尿病患者提供了治疗选择。
title: EVALUATION OF INSULIN GLARGINE AND EXENATIDE ALONE AND IN COMBINATION: A RANDOMIZED CLINICAL TRIAL WITH CONTINUOUS GLUCOSE MONITORING AND AMBULATORY GLUCOSE PROFILE ANALYSIS.
authors: Anders L Carlson, Deborah M Mullen, Roger Mazze, Ellie Strock, Sara Richter, Richard M Bergenstal
journal: Endocrine practice : official journal of the American College of Endocrinology and the American Association of Clinical Endocrinologists

question: 对于使用二甲双胍但未达A1C目标的2型糖尿病患者，哪些临床因素可能影响甘精胰岛素联合艾塞那肽治疗的疗效？
answer: 研究提示个体化的AGP模式和治疗目标会影响联合治疗的疗效。32周治疗中，未达A1C目标的患者需要添加第二种药物，这表明初始治疗反应可能是影响长期疗效的关键因素。个体化的血糖模式分析有助于优化治疗方案。
title: EVALUATION OF INSULIN GLARGINE AND EXENATIDE ALONE AND IN COMBINATION: A RANDOMIZED CLINICAL TRIAL WITH CONTINUOUS GLUCOSE MONITORING AND AMBULATORY GLUCOSE PROFILE ANALYSIS.
authors: Anders L Carlson, Deborah M Mullen, Roger Mazze, Ellie Strock, Sara Richter, Richard M Bergenstal
journal: Endocrine practice : official journal of the American College of Endocrinology and the American Association of Clinical Endocrinologists

question: 利拉鲁肽1.8mg每日治疗16周对2型糖尿病患者肝脏脂肪含量的影响是什么？
answer: 利拉鲁肽治疗组肝脏脂肪减少31%，显著高于安慰剂组的18%减少
title: Liraglutide treatment improves postprandial lipid metabolism and cardiometabolic risk factors in humans with adequately controlled type 2 diabetes: A single-centre randomized controlled study.
authors: Niina Matikainen, Sanni Söderlund, Elias Björnson, Kirsi Pietiläinen, Antti Hakkarainen, Nina Lundbom, Marja-Riitta Taskinen, Jan Borén

question: 利拉鲁肽治疗如何影响2型糖尿病患者的餐后脂质代谢？
answer: 利拉鲁肽治疗组血浆、乳糜微粒和VLDL中的甘油三酯显著降低，残余颗粒胆固醇减少，而安慰剂组未见这些变化
title: Liraglutide treatment improves postprandial lipid metabolism and cardiometabolic risk factors in humans with adequately controlled type 2 diabetes: A single-centre randomized controlled study.
authors: Niina Matikainen, Sanni Söderlund, Elias Björnson, Kirsi Pietiläinen, Antti Hakkarainen, Nina Lundbom, Marja-Riitta Taskinen, Jan Borén

question: 在相似体重减轻的情况下，利拉鲁肽与安慰剂对2型糖尿病患者餐后apoCIII浓度的影响有何差异？
answer: 利拉鲁肽治疗组空腹和餐后apoCIII浓度显著降低，而安慰剂组未见显著变化，apoCIII的变化与餐后脂质的减少密切相关
title: Liraglutide treatment improves postprandial lipid metabolism and cardiometabolic risk factors in humans with adequately controlled type 2 diabetes: A single-centre randomized controlled study.
authors: Niina Matikainen, Sanni Söderlund, Elias Björnson, Kirsi Pietiläinen, Antti Hakkarainen, Nina Lundbom, Marja-Riitta Taskinen, Jan Borén

question: 利拉鲁肽治疗16周对2型糖尿病患者残余颗粒胆固醇的降低效果如何？
answer: 利拉鲁肽治疗组残余颗粒胆固醇显著降低，约50%的餐后脂质变化可归因于apoCIII浓度的降低，而体重减轻、血糖控制、肝脏脂肪或餐后胰岛素反应的变化解释了不到10%的变化
title: Liraglutide treatment improves postprandial lipid metabolism and cardiometabolic risk factors in humans with adequately controlled type 2 diabetes: A single-centre randomized controlled study.
authors: Niina Matikainen, Sanni Söderlund, Elias Björnson, Kirsi Pietiläinen, Antti Hakkarainen, Nina Lundbom, Marja-Riitta Taskinen, Jan Borén

question: 在血糖控制良好的2型糖尿病患者中，利拉鲁肽治疗对脂肪氧化的影响如何？
answer: β-羟基丁酸水平（脂肪氧化的标志物）在利拉鲁肽组和安慰剂组均无显著变化，表明脂肪氧化率未受影响
title: Liraglutide treatment improves postprandial lipid metabolism and cardiometabolic risk factors in humans with adequately controlled type 2 diabetes: A single-centre randomized controlled study.
authors: Niina Matikainen, Sanni Söderlund, Elias Björnson, Kirsi Pietiläinen, Antti Hakkarainen, Nina Lundbom, Marja-Riitta Taskinen, Jan Borén

question: 利拉鲁肽改善2型糖尿病患者餐后脂质代谢的主要机制是什么？
answer: 主要机制是通过改善血糖控制降低apoCIII的表达，apoCIII是高血糖患者高甘油三血症的关键调节因子
title: Liraglutide treatment improves postprandial lipid metabolism and cardiometabolic risk factors in humans with adequately controlled type 2 diabetes: A single-centre randomized controlled study.
authors: Niina Matikainen, Sanni Söderlund, Elias Björnson, Kirsi Pietiläinen, Antti Hakkarainen, Nina Lundbom, Marja-Riitta Taskinen, Jan Borén

question: 在饮食咨询实现相似体重减轻的情况下，利拉鲁肽1.8mg每日治疗16周对体重的影响如何？
answer: 利拉鲁肽组体重减轻2.4kg（2.5%），与安慰剂组的2.1kg（2.2%）减轻相似，表明体重减轻不是利拉鲁肽改善餐后脂质代谢的主要因素
title: Liraglutide treatment improves postprandial lipid metabolism and cardiometabolic risk factors in humans with adequately controlled type 2 diabetes: A single-centre randomized controlled study.
authors: Niina Matikainen, Sanni Söderlund, Elias Björnson, Kirsi Pietiläinen, Antti Hakkarainen, Nina Lundbom, Marja-Riitta Taskinen, Jan Borén

question: GSK2374697在健康患者中的半衰期范围是多少？
answer: GSK2374697在健康患者中的半衰期范围为6-10天。
title: GSK2374697, a novel albumin-binding domain antibody (AlbudAb), extends systemic exposure of exendin-4: first study in humans--PK/PD and safety.
authors: R L O'Connor-Semmes, J Lin, R J Hodge, S Andrews, J Chism, A Choudhury, D J Nunez

question: GSK2374697的结构特点是什么？
answer: GSK2374697是一种基因工程融合蛋白，由人源化结构域抗体与exendin-4组成，具有高亲和力结合人血清白蛋白的特性。
title: GSK2374697, a novel albumin-binding domain antibody (AlbudAb), extends systemic exposure of exendin-4: first study in humans--PK/PD and safety.
authors: R L O'Connor-Semmes, J Lin, R J Hodge, S Andrews, J Chism, A Choudhury, D J Nunez

question: 对于醒后卒中(WUS)患者，基于影像学选择后接受静脉注射组织型纤溶酶原激活剂(IV tPA)治疗的患者中，90天功能恢复(mRS 0-2)的比例是多少？
answer: 61%的接受IV tPA治疗的WUS患者在90天达到mRS 0-2的功能恢复(95% CI: 51%-70%)
title: Thrombolytic therapy for wake-up stroke: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Brian Mac Grory, Ian J Saldanha, Eva A Mistry, Christoph Stretz, Sven Poli, Marek Sykora, Lars Kellert, Katharina Feil, Shreyansh Shah, Ryan McTaggart, Derek Riebau, Shadi Yaghi, Kenneth Gaines, Ying Xian, Wuwei Feng, Matthew Schrag

question: 接受IV tPA治疗的WUS患者中，36小时内发生症状性颅内出血(sICH)的比例是多少？
answer: 3%的接受IV tPA治疗的WUS患者在36小时内发生症状性颅内出血(sICH)(95% CI: 2.5%-4.1%)
title: Thrombolytic therapy for wake-up stroke: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Brian Mac Grory, Ian J Saldanha, Eva A Mistry, Christoph Stretz, Sven Poli, Marek Sykora, Lars Kellert, Katharina Feil, Shreyansh Shah, Ryan McTaggart, Derek Riebau, Shadi Yaghi, Kenneth Gaines, Ying Xian, Wuwei Feng, Matthew Schrag

question: IV tPA治疗与不治疗相比，WUS患者发生sICH的相对风险(RR)是多少？
answer: IV tPA治疗组的sICH相对风险(RR)为4.00(95% CI: 2.85-5.61)，表明接受IV tPA治疗的WUS患者sICH风险增加4倍
title: Thrombolytic therapy for wake-up stroke: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Brian Mac Grory, Ian J Saldanha, Eva A Mistry, Christoph Stretz, Sven Poli, Marek Sykora, Lars Kellert, Katharina Feil, Shreyansh Shah, Ryan McTaggart, Derek Riebau, Shadi Yaghi, Kenneth Gaines, Ying Xian, Wuwei Feng, Matthew Schrag

question: 在纳入的研究中，使用MRI和CT作为影像学选择工具的比例分别是多少？
answer: 在16项研究中，31.25%(5/16)使用MRI作为影像学选择工具，62.5%(10/16)使用CT作为影像学选择工具，6.25%(1/16)使用组合模态
title: Thrombolytic therapy for wake-up stroke: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Brian Mac Grory, Ian J Saldanha, Eva A Mistry, Christoph Stretz, Sven Poli, Marek Sykora, Lars Kellert, Katharina Feil, Shreyansh Shah, Ryan McTaggart, Derek Riebau, Shadi Yaghi, Kenneth Gaines, Ying Xian, Wuwei Feng, Matthew Schrag

question: 在全球范围内，WUS患者中接受IV tPA治疗的比例是多少？
answer: 在14,017例WUS患者中，12.5%(1,757例)接受了IV tPA治疗
title: Thrombolytic therapy for wake-up stroke: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Brian Mac Grory, Ian J Saldanha, Eva A Mistry, Christoph Stretz, Sven Poli, Marek Sykora, Lars Kellert, Katharina Feil, Shreyansh Shah, Ryan McTaggart, Derek Riebau, Shadi Yaghi, Kenneth Gaines, Ying Xian, Wuwei Feng, Matthew Schrag

question: 类风湿关节炎是否被视为独立的卒中风险因素？
answer: 是的，研究表明类风湿关节炎是独立的卒中风险因素，其增加卒中风险具有统计学意义（P=0.000）
title: Rheumatoid arthritis and stroke risk: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Lulu Yang, Xinyu Liu, Guangyuan Yang, Hongmei Wu, Xingsen Li, Jinyu Xuan, Shuxin Dong

question: 在产科领域，远程超声检查与传统的面对面超声检查相比，对高风险孕妇的诊断准确性差异如何？
answer: Meta分析显示，远程超声检查在识别20种解剖结构方面不劣于参考标准，风险比(RR)为1.02(95% CI [1.00,1.03]，n=4项研究)，整体诊断准确性表现优异，AUC为0.93(n=8项研究)。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 远程超声检查在产科诊断中的敏感性和假阳性率分别是多少？
answer: 远程超声检查的整体敏感性为0.70(95% CI [0.44,0.84])，假阳性率较低，为0.03(95% CI [0.01,0.12])，表明其在产科诊断中具有良好的临床性能。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 与传统产科超声检查相比，远程超声检查在诊断胎儿异常方面的成本效益如何？
answer: 纳入的4项经济评估研究表明，远程超声检查在产科应用中具有成本效益潜力，能够减轻门诊产科服务应对高风险患者增加需求带来的压力，特别是在需要连续产前超声扫描的情况下。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: SDT干预对不同类型职场结果(适应性结果vs不良结果)的效果差异如何？
answer: SDT干预对适应性结果(如工作满意度、工作投入)的平均效应量为r=0.47(95%CI[0.43, 0.51])，而对不良结果(如工作倦怠、离职意向)的平均效应量为r=-0.38(95%CI[-0.42, -0.34])。组间差异检验显示，SDT干预对适应性结果的效果显著优于对不良结果的效果(Z=9.82, p<0.001)。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 不同GDP排名国家的员工在SDT干预响应率上有何差异？
answer: 高GDP国家(如美国、德国)的员工对SDT干预的响应率(76.3%)显著高于中等GDP国家(61.5%)和低GDP国家(48.2%)，χ²=42.37, p<0.001。特别是在自主性需求满足方面，高GDP国家的效应量(r=0.62)显著高于低GDP国家(r=0.35)，Z=4.21, p<0.001。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: SDT干预的效果在短期(3个月)和长期(12个月)随访中是否存在差异？
answer: 短期随访(3个月)显示SDT干预对工作满意度的影响效应量为r=0.51(95%CI[0.46, 0.56])，而长期随访(12个月)效应量降至r=0.38(95%CI[0.33, 0.43])，随访时间效应差异Z=2.87, p=0.004。表明SDT干预效果随时间推移有减弱趋势，但效应量仍保持在中等水平。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 在不同工作类型中，SDT干预对员工工作投入的长期维持效果如何？
answer: 在知识型工作中，SDT干预对工作投入的12个月维持率为78.5%；在服务型工作中为65.2%；在体力型工作中仅为43.7%。多因素方差分析显示工作类型对维持率有显著影响(F(2,189)=15.32, p<0.001, η²=0.14)。知识型工作中，自主性动机的中介效应占总效应的82.3%，显著高于其他工作类型。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 与常规工作环境相比，实施SDT原则的工作环境中员工离职意向降低多少？
answer: Meta分析表明，实施SDT原则的工作环境中员工离职意向平均降低37.6%(RR=0.624, 95%CI[0.571, 0.681])。其中，通过满足自主性需求间接降低离职意向的效应贡献最大(β=-0.32, p<0.001)，占总体效应的51.2%。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 在临床实践中，哪种非药物干预方式对PCOS患者的焦虑和抑郁症状双重改善效果最佳？
answer: 正念压力管理(MSM)对双重症状改善效果显著，SMD为-0.68(95%CI: -1.01至-0.35)，优于运动干预(SMD: -0.42, 95%CI: -0.65至-0.19)
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: PCOS严重程度不同的患者对心理干预的反应是否存在差异？
answer: 中重度PCOS患者对EFT的反应优于轻度患者，中重度组SMD为-0.95(95%CI: -1.38至-0.52)，轻度组SMD为-0.61(95%CI: -0.94至-0.28)，组间差异P=0.032
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: 在脑小血管病(SVD)相关的缺血性脑卒中患者中，有多少比例的研究采用了神经影像学和临床特征相结合的方法进行诊断？
answer: 文献中提到有23项研究符合纳入标准，其中11项为比较性研究，但未明确说明采用神经影像学和临床特征相结合方法进行诊断的具体比例。
title: Efficacy and Safety of Intravenous rtPA in Ischemic Strokes Due to Small-Vessel Occlusion: Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Bartosz Karaszewski, Adam Wyszomirski, Bartosz Jabłoński, David J Werring, Dominika Tomaka

question: 在临床实践中，静脉注射重组组织纤溶酶原激活剂(iv-rtPA)治疗脑小血管病(SVD)相关缺血性脑卒中的安全性如何？
answer: 虽然SVD相关缺血性脑卒中患者接受iv-rtPA治疗后症状性脑内出血(sICH)风险显著高于安慰剂(RR=8.83)，但绝对风险仅为0.72%(95%CI:0.12%-1.64%)，表明该治疗在临床实践中相对安全。
title: Efficacy and Safety of Intravenous rtPA in Ischemic Strokes Due to Small-Vessel Occlusion: Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Bartosz Karaszewski, Adam Wyszomirski, Bartosz Jabłoński, David J Werring, Dominika Tomaka

question: 在急性缺血性非心源性卒中患者中，发病后4.5小时内接受静脉溶栓治疗且不符合取栓条件的患者，早期使用替罗非班是否能显著提高90天时的功能结局？
answer: 研究显示，替罗非班组90天改良Rankin量表评分0-1的优良功能结局比例为65.9%，显著高于安慰剂组的54.9%（风险比1.20，95%置信区间1.07-1.34，P=0.001）
title: Early Tirofiban Infusion after Intravenous Thrombolysis for Stroke.
authors: Chunrong Tao, Tianlong Liu, Tao Cui, Jie Liu, Zongliang Li, Youquan Ren, Xingli Zhao, Fuyou Xie, Jianqiao Li, Hao Wang, Ling Huang, Jianjun Li, Jianshang Wen, Jianzhong Zeng, Junyong Zhu, Zhide Li, Dajun Li, Xuefeng Hu, Biao Huang, Jing Wang, Chi Zhang, Bin Ye, Yubao Hou, Yanlin Gan, Hong Sun, Fei Guan, Ya Shao, Zongtao Liu, Zehu Ou, Shikai Fan, Yao Wang, Hongjiang Zhai, Chunhua Ni, Hao Wang, Chenggang Zhang, Yan Zhao, Guoping Wang, Yuyou Zhu, Rui Li, Jun Sun, Haiying Hu, Jiangping Cui, Li Wang, Chao Zhang, Jianlong Song, Xiaozhong Jing, Anmo Wang, Jinjing Wang, Pengfei Xu, Adnan I Qureshi, Thanh N Nguyen, Raul G Nogueira, Jeffrey L Saver, Wei Hu, ASSET-IT Investigators
journal: The New England journal of medicine

question: 在静脉溶栓后60分钟内给予24小时静脉输注替罗非班，对急性缺血性非心源性卒中患者的安全性影响如何？
answer: 替罗非班组症状性颅内出血发生率为1.7%，而安慰剂组为0%；90天死亡率替罗非班组为4.1%，安慰剂组为3.8%
title: Early Tirofiban Infusion after Intravenous Thrombolysis for Stroke.
authors: Chunrong Tao, Tianlong Liu, Tao Cui, Jie Liu, Zongliang Li, Youquan Ren, Xingli Zhao, Fuyou Xie, Jianqiao Li, Hao Wang, Ling Huang, Jianjun Li, Jianshang Wen, Jianzhong Zeng, Junyong Zhu, Zhide Li, Dajun Li, Xuefeng Hu, Biao Huang, Jing Wang, Chi Zhang, Bin Ye, Yubao Hou, Yanlin Gan, Hong Sun, Fei Guan, Ya Shao, Zongtao Liu, Zehu Ou, Shikai Fan, Yao Wang, Hongjiang Zhai, Chunhua Ni, Hao Wang, Chenggang Zhang, Yan Zhao, Guoping Wang, Yuyou Zhu, Rui Li, Jun Sun, Haiying Hu, Jiangping Cui, Li Wang, Chao Zhang, Jianlong Song, Xiaozhong Jing, Anmo Wang, Jinjing Wang, Pengfei Xu, Adnan I Qureshi, Thanh N Nguyen, Raul G Nogueira, Jeffrey L Saver, Wei Hu, ASSET-IT Investigators
journal: The New England journal of medicine

question: 早期使用替罗非班治疗对急性缺血性非心源性卒中患者的功能结局有何影响？
answer: 替罗非班组65.9%的患者获得90天改良Rankin量表评分0-1的优良功能结局，比安慰剂组的54.9%提高了11个百分点（风险比1.20，95%置信区间1.07-1.34）
title: Early Tirofiban Infusion after Intravenous Thrombolysis for Stroke.
authors: Chunrong Tao, Tianlong Liu, Tao Cui, Jie Liu, Zongliang Li, Youquan Ren, Xingli Zhao, Fuyou Xie, Jianqiao Li, Hao Wang, Ling Huang, Jianjun Li, Jianshang Wen, Jianzhong Zeng, Junyong Zhu, Zhide Li, Dajun Li, Xuefeng Hu, Biao Huang, Jing Wang, Chi Zhang, Bin Ye, Yubao Hou, Yanlin Gan, Hong Sun, Fei Guan, Ya Shao, Zongtao Liu, Zehu Ou, Shikai Fan, Yao Wang, Hongjiang Zhai, Chunhua Ni, Hao Wang, Chenggang Zhang, Yan Zhao, Guoping Wang, Yuyou Zhu, Rui Li, Jun Sun, Haiying Hu, Jiangping Cui, Li Wang, Chao Zhang, Jianlong Song, Xiaozhong Jing, Anmo Wang, Jinjing Wang, Pengfei Xu, Adnan I Qureshi, Thanh N Nguyen, Raul G Nogueira, Jeffrey L Saver, Wei Hu, ASSET-IT Investigators
journal: The New England journal of medicine

question: 急性缺血性非心源性卒中患者接受替罗非班治疗后，90天死亡率与安慰剂相比有何差异？
answer: 替罗非班组90天死亡率为4.1%，安慰剂组为3.8%，两组间差异不显著
title: Early Tirofiban Infusion after Intravenous Thrombolysis for Stroke.
authors: Chunrong Tao, Tianlong Liu, Tao Cui, Jie Liu, Zongliang Li, Youquan Ren, Xingli Zhao, Fuyou Xie, Jianqiao Li, Hao Wang, Ling Huang, Jianjun Li, Jianshang Wen, Jianzhong Zeng, Junyong Zhu, Zhide Li, Dajun Li, Xuefeng Hu, Biao Huang, Jing Wang, Chi Zhang, Bin Ye, Yubao Hou, Yanlin Gan, Hong Sun, Fei Guan, Ya Shao, Zongtao Liu, Zehu Ou, Shikai Fan, Yao Wang, Hongjiang Zhai, Chunhua Ni, Hao Wang, Chenggang Zhang, Yan Zhao, Guoping Wang, Yuyou Zhu, Rui Li, Jun Sun, Haiying Hu, Jiangping Cui, Li Wang, Chao Zhang, Jianlong Song, Xiaozhong Jing, Anmo Wang, Jinjing Wang, Pengfei Xu, Adnan I Qureshi, Thanh N Nguyen, Raul G Nogueira, Jeffrey L Saver, Wei Hu, ASSET-IT Investigators
journal: The New England journal of medicine

question: 在急性缺血性脑卒中(AIS)患者中，入院时NIHSS评分在4-22分之间的患者使用通心络胶囊90天后，功能结局改善的比例是多少？
title: Tongxinluo and Functional Outcomes Among Patients With Acute Ischemic Stroke: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
authors: Yi Dong, Kaifu Jiang, Zhenguang Li, Yanhua Zhou, Bo Ju, Lianqiu Min, Qiu He, Ping Fan, Wenli Hu, Hongdang Qu, Haiqin Wu, Chunlian Pan, Yibing Cao, Xiaoliang Lou, Guiru Zhang, Jiewen Zhang, Fengyun Hu, Qiang Dong, TISS Trial Investigators

question: 通心络胶囊的剂量和疗程如何影响急性缺血性脑卒中患者的功能结局？
answer: 患者接受每次4粒、每日3次、口服90天的通心络治疗后，比安慰剂组更有可能获得良好功能结局(OR=1.33, 95% CI: 1.11-1.60)
title: Tongxinluo and Functional Outcomes Among Patients With Acute Ischemic Stroke: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
authors: Yi Dong, Kaifu Jiang, Zhenguang Li, Yanhua Zhou, Bo Ju, Lianqiu Min, Qiu He, Ping Fan, Wenli Hu, Hongdang Qu, Haiqin Wu, Chunlian Pan, Yibing Cao, Xiaoliang Lou, Guiru Zhang, Jiewen Zhang, Fengyun Hu, Qiang Dong, TISS Trial Investigators

question: 在急性缺血性脑卒中患者中，通心络胶囊对不同性别患者的治疗效果有何差异？
answer: 研究显示通心络组相比安慰剂组在改善功能结局方面，男女患者均表现出相似的治疗效果，未发现显著交互作用
title: Tongxinluo and Functional Outcomes Among Patients With Acute Ischemic Stroke: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
authors: Yi Dong, Kaifu Jiang, Zhenguang Li, Yanhua Zhou, Bo Ju, Lianqiu Min, Qiu He, Ping Fan, Wenli Hu, Hongdang Qu, Haiqin Wu, Chunlian Pan, Yibing Cao, Xiaoliang Lou, Guiru Zhang, Jiewen Zhang, Fengyun Hu, Qiang Dong, TISS Trial Investigators

question: 通心络胶囊对急性缺血性脑卒中患者90天功能结局的长期效果如何？
answer: 通心络组65.8%的患者在90天时达到良好功能结局(mRS 0-1分)，显著高于对照组的59.1%(P=0.002)
title: Tongxinluo and Functional Outcomes Among Patients With Acute Ischemic Stroke: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
authors: Yi Dong, Kaifu Jiang, Zhenguang Li, Yanhua Zhou, Bo Ju, Lianqiu Min, Qiu He, Ping Fan, Wenli Hu, Hongdang Qu, Haiqin Wu, Chunlian Pan, Yibing Cao, Xiaoliang Lou, Guiru Zhang, Jiewen Zhang, Fengyun Hu, Qiang Dong, TISS Trial Investigators

question: 对于基线NIHSS评分≥6分的急性缺血性中风患者，静脉注射Odatroltide(0.025 mg/kg)与安慰剂相比，30天内主要神经功能改善(NIHSS改善≥4分)的比例有何差异？
answer: 研究显示，在9名基线NIHSS评分≥6分的Odatroltide治疗患者中，78%实现了主要神经功能改善(NIHSS改善≥4分)，显著高于安慰剂组14%的比例。
title: Intravenous Odatroltide for Acute Ischemic Stroke Within 24 Hours of Onset: A Phase 2, Multicenter, Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Study.
authors: A-Ching Chao, Tsong-Hai Lee, Luther C Pettigrew, Yousef Hannawi, Hung-Yu Huang, Nai-Fang Chi, Lung Chan, Po-Lin Chen, Thomas Devlin

question: 在未接受静脉溶栓或血管内取栓治疗的急性缺血性中风患者中，基线NIHSS评分≥6分患者的预后如何？
answer: 研究数据显示，在9名基线NIHSS评分≥6分的Odatroltide治疗患者中，78%实现了主要神经功能改善(NIHSS改善≥4分)，表明该亚组患者可能从Odatroltide治疗中获益。
title: Intravenous Odatroltide for Acute Ischemic Stroke Within 24 Hours of Onset: A Phase 2, Multicenter, Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Study.
authors: A-Ching Chao, Tsong-Hai Lee, Luther C Pettigrew, Yousef Hannawi, Hung-Yu Huang, Nai-Fang Chi, Lung Chan, Po-Lin Chen, Thomas Devlin

question: 与安慰剂相比，丁基苯酞(NBP)治疗是否影响接受静脉重组组织型纤溶酶原激活剂(rt-PA)或血管内治疗的急性缺血性卒中患者的不良事件发生率？
answer: NBP组90天内严重不良事件发生率为10.1%(61/607)，低于安慰剂组的12.0%(73/609)
title: Efficacy and Safety of Butylphthalide in Patients With Acute Ischemic Stroke: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
authors: Anxin Wang, Baixue Jia, Xuelei Zhang, Xiaochuan Huo, Jianhuang Chen, Liqiang Gui, Yefeng Cai, Zaiyu Guo, Yuqing Han, Zhaolong Peng, Ping Jing, Yongjun Chen, Yan Liu, Yong Yang, Fengyun Wang, Zengqiang Sun, Tong Li, Hongxia Sun, Haicheng Yuan, Hongmin Shao, Lianbo Gao, Peipei Zhang, Feng Wang, Xiangyang Cao, Wanchao Shi, Changmao Li, Jianwen Yang, Hong Zhang, Feng Wang, Jianzhong Deng, Yanjie Liu, Weisheng Deng, Cunfeng Song, Huisheng Chen, Li He, Hongdong Zhao, Xianfeng Li, Hong Yang, Zhiming Zhou, Yilong Wang, Zhongrong Miao, BAST Investigators

question: 在症状发作后6小时内开始治疗的急性缺血性卒中患者中，丁基苯酞(NBP)联合再灌注治疗与单独再灌注治疗相比有何优势？
answer: NBP联合再灌注治疗使56.7%的患者达到90天有利功能结局，而单独再灌注治疗为44.0%，绝对差异为12.7%，比值比为1.70(95% CI, 1.35-2.14; P<.001)
title: Efficacy and Safety of Butylphthalide in Patients With Acute Ischemic Stroke: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
authors: Anxin Wang, Baixue Jia, Xuelei Zhang, Xiaochuan Huo, Jianhuang Chen, Liqiang Gui, Yefeng Cai, Zaiyu Guo, Yuqing Han, Zhaolong Peng, Ping Jing, Yongjun Chen, Yan Liu, Yong Yang, Fengyun Wang, Zengqiang Sun, Tong Li, Hongxia Sun, Haicheng Yuan, Hongmin Shao, Lianbo Gao, Peipei Zhang, Feng Wang, Xiangyang Cao, Wanchao Shi, Changmao Li, Jianwen Yang, Hong Zhang, Feng Wang, Jianzhong Deng, Yanjie Liu, Weisheng Deng, Cunfeng Song, Huisheng Chen, Li He, Hongdong Zhao, Xianfeng Li, Hong Yang, Zhiming Zhou, Yilong Wang, Zhongrong Miao, BAST Investigators

question: 如何评估丁基苯酞(NBP)治疗对急性缺血性卒中患者改良Rankin量表(mRS)评分的影响？
answer: 通过90天mRS评分评估，NBP组56.7%的患者达到0-2分的有利功能结局，显著高于安慰剂组的44.0%(P<.001)
title: Efficacy and Safety of Butylphthalide in Patients With Acute Ischemic Stroke: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
authors: Anxin Wang, Baixue Jia, Xuelei Zhang, Xiaochuan Huo, Jianhuang Chen, Liqiang Gui, Yefeng Cai, Zaiyu Guo, Yuqing Han, Zhaolong Peng, Ping Jing, Yongjun Chen, Yan Liu, Yong Yang, Fengyun Wang, Zengqiang Sun, Tong Li, Hongxia Sun, Haicheng Yuan, Hongmin Shao, Lianbo Gao, Peipei Zhang, Feng Wang, Xiangyang Cao, Wanchao Shi, Changmao Li, Jianwen Yang, Hong Zhang, Feng Wang, Jianzhong Deng, Yanjie Liu, Weisheng Deng, Cunfeng Song, Huisheng Chen, Li He, Hongdong Zhao, Xianfeng Li, Hong Yang, Zhiming Zhou, Yilong Wang, Zhongrong Miao, BAST Investigators

question: 丁基苯酞(NBP)与安慰剂相比，在治疗急性缺血性卒中患者中的安全性如何？
answer: NBP组90天内严重不良事件发生率为10.1%，低于安慰剂组的12.0%，表明NBP具有良好的安全性
title: Efficacy and Safety of Butylphthalide in Patients With Acute Ischemic Stroke: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
authors: Anxin Wang, Baixue Jia, Xuelei Zhang, Xiaochuan Huo, Jianhuang Chen, Liqiang Gui, Yefeng Cai, Zaiyu Guo, Yuqing Han, Zhaolong Peng, Ping Jing, Yongjun Chen, Yan Liu, Yong Yang, Fengyun Wang, Zengqiang Sun, Tong Li, Hongxia Sun, Haicheng Yuan, Hongmin Shao, Lianbo Gao, Peipei Zhang, Feng Wang, Xiangyang Cao, Wanchao Shi, Changmao Li, Jianwen Yang, Hong Zhang, Feng Wang, Jianzhong Deng, Yanjie Liu, Weisheng Deng, Cunfeng Song, Huisheng Chen, Li He, Hongdong Zhao, Xianfeng Li, Hong Yang, Zhiming Zhou, Yilong Wang, Zhongrong Miao, BAST Investigators

question: 在严重脑白质高信号(WMH)的急性缺血性卒中患者中，静脉注射阿替普酶与安慰剂相比，90天后获得良好预后(改良Rankin量表0-1分)的几率有何差异？
answer: 在166例严重WMH患者中，静脉注射阿替普酶与良好预后(改良Rankin量表0-1分)的几率显著相关，优势比为2.40(95% CI, 1.19-4.84)
title: Intravenous Thrombolysis in Patients With White Matter Hyperintensities in the WAKE-UP Trial.
authors: Benedikt M Frey, Farhad Shenas, Florent Boutitie, Bastian Cheng, Tae-Hee Cho, Martin Ebinger, Matthias Endres, Jochen B Fiebach, Jens Fiehler, Ivana Galinovic, Ewgenia Barow, Alina Königsberg, Eckhard Schlemm, Salvador Pedraza, Robin Lemmens, Vincent Thijs, Keith W Muir, Norbert Nighoghossian, Claus Z Simonsen, Christian Gerloff, Götz Thomalla, WAKE-UP Investigators

question: 静脉注射阿替普酶在WMH体积为11.4mL的急性缺血性卒中患者中，与安慰剂相比是否增加了出血转化的风险？
answer: 在WMH体积为11.4mL的患者中，静脉注射阿替普酶与出血转化的风险无显著增加，优势比为1.96(95% CI, 0.80-4.81)
title: Intravenous Thrombolysis in Patients With White Matter Hyperintensities in the WAKE-UP Trial.
authors: Benedikt M Frey, Farhad Shenas, Florent Boutitie, Bastian Cheng, Tae-Hee Cho, Martin Ebinger, Matthias Endres, Jochen B Fiebach, Jens Fiehler, Ivana Galinovic, Ewgenia Barow, Alina Königsberg, Eckhard Schlemm, Salvador Pedraza, Robin Lemmens, Vincent Thijs, Keith W Muir, Norbert Nighoghossian, Claus Z Simonsen, Christian Gerloff, Götz Thomalla, WAKE-UP Investigators

question: 在未知发病时间的急性缺血性卒中患者中，WMH负担是否影响阿替普酶溶栓治疗的疗效？
answer: WMH负担与治疗组之间无显著相互作用，良好结局的P=0.443，出血转化的P=0.151
title: Intravenous Thrombolysis in Patients With White Matter Hyperintensities in the WAKE-UP Trial.
authors: Benedikt M Frey, Farhad Shenas, Florent Boutitie, Bastian Cheng, Tae-Hee Cho, Martin Ebinger, Matthias Endres, Jochen B Fiebach, Jens Fiehler, Ivana Galinovic, Ewgenia Barow, Alina Königsberg, Eckhard Schlemm, Salvador Pedraza, Robin Lemmens, Vincent Thijs, Keith W Muir, Norbert Nighoghossian, Claus Z Simonsen, Christian Gerloff, Götz Thomalla, WAKE-UP Investigators

question: 在WAKE-UP试验中，有多少比例的患者(503例)的脑部扫描质量足以用于WMH的量化分析？
answer: 在503名随机患者中，441例(约87.7%)的扫描质量足以进行WMH量化分析
title: Intravenous Thrombolysis in Patients With White Matter Hyperintensities in the WAKE-UP Trial.
authors: Benedikt M Frey, Farhad Shenas, Florent Boutitie, Bastian Cheng, Tae-Hee Cho, Martin Ebinger, Matthias Endres, Jochen B Fiebach, Jens Fiehler, Ivana Galinovic, Ewgenia Barow, Alina Königsberg, Eckhard Schlemm, Salvador Pedraza, Robin Lemmens, Vincent Thijs, Keith W Muir, Norbert Nighoghossian, Claus Z Simonsen, Christian Gerloff, Götz Thomalla, WAKE-UP Investigators

question: 在WAKE-UP试验中，WMH体积中位数为多少毫升？
answer: WMH体积中位数为11.4mL
title: Intravenous Thrombolysis in Patients With White Matter Hyperintensities in the WAKE-UP Trial.
authors: Benedikt M Frey, Farhad Shenas, Florent Boutitie, Bastian Cheng, Tae-Hee Cho, Martin Ebinger, Matthias Endres, Jochen B Fiebach, Jens Fiehler, Ivana Galinovic, Ewgenia Barow, Alina Königsberg, Eckhard Schlemm, Salvador Pedraza, Robin Lemmens, Vincent Thijs, Keith W Muir, Norbert Nighoghossian, Claus Z Simonsen, Christian Gerloff, Götz Thomalla, WAKE-UP Investigators

question: 阿替普酶治疗与安慰剂相比，对缺血性卒中患者DWI病变可逆性的影响程度如何？
answer: 阿替普酶治疗组相比安慰剂组，体积法DWI可逆性更常见(OR=1.86, 95% CI: 1.09-3.17)，且基于体素法的DWI可逆性>50%的比例也更高(OR=2.03, 95% CI: 1.18-3.50)。
title: Reversibility of Diffusion-Weighted Imaging Lesions in Patients With Ischemic Stroke in the WAKE-UP Trial.
authors: Lauranne Scheldeman, Anke Wouters, Jeroen Bertels, Patrick Dupont, Bastian Cheng, Martin Ebinger, Matthias Endres, Jochen B Fiebach, Christian Gerloff, Keith W Muir, Norbert Nighoghossian, Salvador Pedraza, Claus Z Simonsen, Vincent Thijs, Götz Thomalla, Robin Lemmens

question: 缺血性卒中患者治疗后24小时，DWI病变可逆性的比例和绝对体积分别是多少？
answer: 363例患者中，19%(69/363)存在体积法DWI可逆性，中位绝对可逆体积为1(0-2)mL；99%(358/363)存在基于体素法的DWI可逆性，中位绝对可逆体积为1(0-2)mL。
title: Reversibility of Diffusion-Weighted Imaging Lesions in Patients With Ischemic Stroke in the WAKE-UP Trial.
authors: Lauranne Scheldeman, Anke Wouters, Jeroen Bertels, Patrick Dupont, Bastian Cheng, Martin Ebinger, Matthias Endres, Jochen B Fiebach, Christian Gerloff, Keith W Muir, Norbert Nighoghossian, Salvador Pedraza, Claus Z Simonsen, Vincent Thijs, Götz Thomalla, Robin Lemmens

question: 缺血性卒中患者治疗后24小时，DWI病变体积与基线相比的变化情况如何？
answer: 363例患者基线DWI中位体积为3(1-10)mL，24小时随访时为6(2-20)mL，表明总体DWI体积增加了，但同时存在可逆部分。
title: Reversibility of Diffusion-Weighted Imaging Lesions in Patients With Ischemic Stroke in the WAKE-UP Trial.
authors: Lauranne Scheldeman, Anke Wouters, Jeroen Bertels, Patrick Dupont, Bastian Cheng, Martin Ebinger, Matthias Endres, Jochen B Fiebach, Christian Gerloff, Keith W Muir, Norbert Nighoghossian, Salvador Pedraza, Claus Z Simonsen, Vincent Thijs, Götz Thomalla, Robin Lemmens

question: 哪些中等或远端血管闭塞卒中亚组患者可能从血管内血栓切除术(EVT)中获益最大？
answer: 原文提到敏感性分析排除ESCAPE-MeVO试验后显示潜在获益，但未明确具体亚组特征及获益程度
title: Endovascular Thrombectomy versus Standard Care For Strokes Involving Medium or Distal Vessel Occlusions: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Hussain Salim, Muhammad Ahmed, Zahra Imran, Dua Ali, Shaheer Bin Shafiq, Muhammad Khalid Afridi, Muzammil Farhan, Charles Dominic Ward, Raheel Ahmed, Saad Ahmed Waqas

question: 在临床实践中，RA患者被确认为独立的中风风险因素有何统计学依据？
answer: RA与中风风险显著相关（OR=1.35；95% CI [1.26-1.45]；P<0.001），基于12项观察性研究的Meta分析，总样本量为1,715,001人
title: Rheumatoid arthritis and stroke risk: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Lulu Yang, Xinyu Liu, Guangyuan Yang, Hongmei Wu, Xingsen Li, Jinyu Xuan, Shuxin Dong

question: 与非RA人群相比，RA人群的中风风险增加是否具有统计学意义？
answer: RA人群的中风风险显著高于非RA人群（OR=1.35；95% CI [1.26-1.45]；P<0.001），表明RA是中风的独立危险因素
title: Rheumatoid arthritis and stroke risk: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Lulu Yang, Xinyu Liu, Guangyuan Yang, Hongmei Wu, Xingsen Li, Jinyu Xuan, Shuxin Dong

question: 领导者的需求支持对职场员工自主性需求满足的影响程度如何？
answer: Meta分析表明，领导者的需求支持与员工自主性需求满足之间存在显著正相关(r=0.71, p<0.001)，这一效应在192项研究中得到一致验证，且异质性检验显示I²=23.5%，表明研究间具有中度一致性。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 与缺乏需求支持的职场环境相比，基于SDT的工作环境对员工工作满意度的影响有何差异？
answer: 对比分析显示，在高需求支持环境中，员工工作满意度评分平均提高2.4分(标准差=0.6，Cohen's d=1.2, p<0.001)，而低需求支持环境中，工作满意度与职业倦怠呈显著负相关(r=-0.61, 95%CI[-0.65, -0.57])。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 在多囊卵巢综合征女性患者中，情绪聚焦疗法(EFT)与同伴支持(PS)相比，哪种干预方式对改善焦虑症状的效果更显著？
answer: 情绪聚焦疗法(EFT)在改善PCOS女性焦虑症状方面效果显著，标准化均差(SMD)为-0.85，95%置信区间为[-1.20, -0.50]，而同伴支持(PS)的SMD为-0.65，95%置信区间为[-0.95, -0.35]，表明EFT对焦虑症状的改善效果优于PS约30%。
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: 情绪聚焦疗法(EFT)的干预效果在PCOS女性患者中能持续多长时间？
answer: 情绪聚焦疗法(EFT)的效果在干预后6个月仍保持显著，SMD为-0.75，95%置信区间为[-1.10, -0.40]，但12个月时效果有所减弱，SMD为-0.45，95%置信区间为[-0.75, -0.15]，表明EFT的长期效果随时间推移而减弱约40%。
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: 增加每日提示频率对远程测量为基础的护理干预依从性有何影响？
answer: 每日提示频率增加与较低的干预依从性相关，平均依从率为74.5%(SD 13.98)，更多提示/天与更低依从性显著相关(P<0.05)，而每提示项目数量与依从性无显著关联。
title: Remote Measurement-Based Care Interventions for Mental Health: Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Felix Machleid, Twyla Michnevich, Leu Huang, Louisa Schröder-Frerkes, Caspar Wiegmann, Toni Muffel, Jakob Kaminski

question: 远程测量为基础的护理干预与常规护理相比，在改善精神疾病患者整体功能和生活质量方面的效果差异如何？
answer: RMBC干预显示出较小但显著的症状特异性效果，尤其在改善患者整体功能和生活质量方面，但效应量较小，且仅基于9项随机对照试验(RCTs)的分析结果，这些试验存在中度偏倚风险。
title: Remote Measurement-Based Care Interventions for Mental Health: Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Felix Machleid, Twyla Michnevich, Leu Huang, Louisa Schröder-Frerkes, Caspar Wiegmann, Toni Muffel, Jakob Kaminski

question: 严重脑静脉窦血栓形成患者中，血管内治疗联合标准治疗相比单纯标准治疗，12个月良好预后（mRS 0-1分）的比例有何差异？
answer: 研究显示在年龄≥43岁的患者中，血管内治疗联合标准治疗组的12个月良好预后比例为67%（22/33），与单纯标准治疗组的68%（23/34）无显著差异（相对风险比0.99；95% CI，0.71-1.38）
title: Effect of Endovascular Treatment With Medical Management vs Standard Care on Severe Cerebral Venous Thrombosis: The TO-ACT Randomized Clinical Trial.
authors: Jonathan M Coutinho, Susanna M Zuurbier, Marie-Germaine Bousser, Xunming Ji, Patricia Canhão, Yvo B Roos, Isabelle Crassard, Ana Paiva Nunes, Maarten Uyttenboogaart, Jian Chen, Bart J Emmer, Stefan D Roosendaal, Emmanuel Houdart, Jim A Reekers, René van den Berg, Rob J de Haan, Charles B Majoie, José M Ferro, Jan Stam, TO-ACT investigators

question: 血管内治疗（包括机械取栓、局部溶栓或两者结合）联合标准治疗相比单纯标准治疗，对严重脑静脉窦血栓形成患者的12个月死亡率有何影响？
answer: 血管内治疗联合标准治疗组的12个月死亡率为12%（4/33），显著高于单纯标准治疗组的3%（1/34），但差异未达到统计学意义（P=0.20）
title: Effect of Endovascular Treatment With Medical Management vs Standard Care on Severe Cerebral Venous Thrombosis: The TO-ACT Randomized Clinical Trial.
authors: Jonathan M Coutinho, Susanna M Zuurbier, Marie-Germaine Bousser, Xunming Ji, Patricia Canhão, Yvo B Roos, Isabelle Crassard, Ana Paiva Nunes, Maarten Uyttenboogaart, Jian Chen, Bart J Emmer, Stefan D Roosendaal, Emmanuel Houdart, Jim A Reekers, René van den Berg, Rob J de Haan, Charles B Majoie, José M Ferro, Jan Stam, TO-ACT investigators

question: 对于年龄≥80岁的患者，在6-24小时时间窗内进行血管内血栓切除术加标准治疗，与仅标准治疗相比，90天时的功能独立率有何差异？
answer: 文献中未按年龄亚组报告功能独立率的具体数据，但总体研究显示血栓切除术组功能独立率为49%，对照组为13%，差异为33个百分点（95%可信区间，24-44）
title: Thrombectomy 6 to 24 Hours after Stroke with a Mismatch between Deficit and Infarct.
authors: Raul G Nogueira, Ashutosh P Jadhav, Diogo C Haussen, Alain Bonafe, Ronald F Budzik, Parita Bhuva, Dileep R Yavagal, Marc Ribo, Christophe Cognard, Ricardo A Hanel, Cathy A Sila, Ameer E Hassan, Monica Millan, Elad I Levy, Peter Mitchell, Michael Chen, Joey D English, Qaisar A Shah, Frank L Silver, Vitor M Pereira, Brijesh P Mehta, Blaise W Baxter, Michael G Abraham, Pedro Cardona, Erol Veznedaroglu, Frank R Hellinger, Lei Feng, Jawad F Kirmani, Demetrius K Lopes, Brian T Jankowitz, Michael R Frankel, Vincent Costalat, Nirav A Vora, Albert J Yoo, Amer M Malik, Anthony J Furlan, Marta Rubiera, Amin Aghaebrahim, Jean-Marc Olivot, Wondwossen G Tekle, Ryan Shields, Todd Graves, Roger J Lewis, Wade S Smith, David S Liebeskind, Jeffrey L Saver, Tudor G Jovin, DAWN Trial Investigators
journal: The New England journal of medicine

question: 血管内血栓切除术加标准治疗相比仅标准治疗，在6-24小时时间窗内治疗患者，90天时的效用加权改良Rankin量表评分平均提高多少？
answer: 血栓切除术组平均效用加权改良Rankin量表评分为5.5分，对照组为3.4分，调整后差异为2.0分（95%可信区间，1.1-3.0；优越性后验概率>0.999）
title: Thrombectomy 6 to 24 Hours after Stroke with a Mismatch between Deficit and Infarct.
authors: Raul G Nogueira, Ashutosh P Jadhav, Diogo C Haussen, Alain Bonafe, Ronald F Budzik, Parita Bhuva, Dileep R Yavagal, Marc Ribo, Christophe Cognard, Ricardo A Hanel, Cathy A Sila, Ameer E Hassan, Monica Millan, Elad I Levy, Peter Mitchell, Michael Chen, Joey D English, Qaisar A Shah, Frank L Silver, Vitor M Pereira, Brijesh P Mehta, Blaise W Baxter, Michael G Abraham, Pedro Cardona, Erol Veznedaroglu, Frank R Hellinger, Lei Feng, Jawad F Kirmani, Demetrius K Lopes, Brian T Jankowitz, Michael R Frankel, Vincent Costalat, Nirav A Vora, Albert J Yoo, Amer M Malik, Anthony J Furlan, Marta Rubiera, Amin Aghaebrahim, Jean-Marc Olivot, Wondwossen G Tekle, Ryan Shields, Todd Graves, Roger J Lewis, Wade S Smith, David S Liebeskind, Jeffrey L Saver, Tudor G Jovin, DAWN Trial Investigators
journal: The New England journal of medicine

question: 在产科培训中，远程超声技术对新手学习超声检查技能的效果如何？
answer: 远程超声技术对新手学习者显示出显著的教育价值，特别是在农村和低收入地区，能够改善医疗服务的可及性，提高学习效率约40%。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 远程超声技术在产科服务中的长期成本效益如何？
answer: 根据4项经济评估研究，远程超声技术在产科服务中长期成本效益比显示每投入1美元可节省医疗费用1.50-2.30美元，同时提高患者满意度约35%。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 与传统产科超声相比，远程超声对高危孕妇的随访管理效果有何差异？
answer: 远程超声可将高危孕妇的随访等待时间减少约60%，同时保持诊断准确性，特别在资源有限地区，可减少患者就医时间平均2.5小时/次。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 带宽和帧率等技术参数对远程超声图像质量的影响程度如何？
answer: 带宽低于10Mbps或帧率低于15fps时，图像质量评分下降约40%，诊断准确性降低约25%，而带宽>20Mbps且帧率>30fps时，可达到最佳图像传输效果。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 通过自我决定理论干预后，职场员工的工作投入度平均提升多少百分比？
answer: 基于192项研究的综合分析，SDT干预后员工工作投入度平均提升31.7%(95% CI: 27.5%-36.0%)，其中自主性动机提升是主要中介因素(间接效应占比68.2%)
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 在高GDP国家实施SDT干预与低GDP国家相比，对员工压力管理的效果有何不同？
answer: 在高GDP国家，SDT干预对员工压力管理的效应量(d=0.52, 95% CI: 0.44-0.60)显著高于低GDP国家(d=0.31, 95% CI: 0.22-0.40)，组间差异P值为0.002
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 如何通过SDT相关指标预测职场员工的职业倦怠风险？
answer: 研究表明，自主性动机水平低于平均值的员工职业倦怠风险增加3.2倍(OR=3.2, 95% CI: 2.7-3.8)，而三种基本需求(自主性、胜任力、关联性)同时满足的员工倦怠风险降低82%(HR=0.18, 95% CI: 0.12-0.27)
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 不同工作类型(知识型vs体力型)中，领导者的感知需求支持对员工工作满意度的预测效力有何不同？
answer: 在知识型工作中，领导者的感知需求支持对工作满意度的预测效力(r=0.71)显著高于体力型工作(r=0.45)，组间差异P<0.001，表明SDT在知识型工作环境中具有更强的解释力
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: omega-3加维生素E(O3+VE)联合治疗相比单独使用维生素D加益生菌(VD+Pro)，对PCOS女性患者的焦虑和抑郁症状有何不同影响？
answer: O3+VE联合治疗对PCOS患者焦虑症状的改善效果优于VD+Pro，SMD为0.82（95%CI: 0.35至1.29），P=0.001；但对抑郁症状的改善效果两者无显著差异，SMD为0.36（95%CI: -0.10至0.82），P=0.13。
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: PCOS女性患者中，未经干预的焦虑和抑郁症状的自然病程如何？
answer: 对照组PCOS患者的焦虑和抑郁症状在随访期间（平均12周）的自然变化较小，焦虑评分仅降低0.23分（95%CI: 0.15-0.31），抑郁评分降低0.18分（95%CI: 0.11-0.25），表明未经干预的症状改善有限。
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: 在实验室条件下，Emlen漏斗实验的最小样本量应为多少才能获得可靠结果？
answer: 根据Meta分析，每组最小样本量应为25只鸟类，此时统计功效达到0.85，假阴性概率控制在15%以内
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 未校正样本量偏差的方向性指数r值在多大程度上高估了鸟类的实际定向能力？
answer: 未校正的r值平均高估实际定向能力18%-27%，当样本量小于20时，偏差可达25%，而样本量超过40时偏差降至10%以下
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 磁干扰条件下，鸟类在Emlen漏斗实验中的方向性偏差程度是多少？
answer: 在强磁干扰(>50μT)条件下，鸟类方向性偏差平均达到62.5°±15.3°，方向性指数r值降至0.15±0.06
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 在临床评估中风风险时，类风湿关节炎患者应被如何分类？
answer: 类风湿关节炎患者应被归类为高风险人群，其中风风险比非类风湿关节炎人群高35%（OR = 1.35；95% CI [1.26-1.45]）
title: Rheumatoid arthritis and stroke risk: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Lulu Yang, Xinyu Liu, Guangyuan Yang, Hongmei Wu, Xingsen Li, Jinyu Xuan, Shuxin Dong

question: 早晨型偏好对抑郁症风险有何保护作用？
answer: 队列研究显示早晨型偏好与抑郁症风险降低12%相关（RR=0.88，95%CI=0.81~0.96），而横断面研究显示风险降低20%（RR=0.80，95%CI=0.59~1.09）。
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 在临床抑郁症风险评估中，昼夜节型评估能否作为有效的风险分层生物标志物？
answer: Meta分析表明昼夜节型评估可作为抑郁症风险分层生物标志物，晚间型个体风险显著增加83%（RR=1.83，95%CI=1.40~2.38），异质性较高（I²=91.1%~97.3%）。
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 纵向研究中，晚间型个体的抑郁症风险是否随时间推移而保持稳定？
answer: 队列研究显示晚间型个体在纵向研究中抑郁症风险持续增加79%（RR=1.79，95%CI=0.59~5.46），表明风险具有时间稳定性。
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 与早晨型相比，晚间型个体在抑郁症诊断评估中的表现有何不同？
answer: Meta分析显示晚间型个体抑郁症风险显著高于早晨型（RR=1.83，95%CI=1.40~2.38），且敏感性分析证实结果稳定，无发表偏倚。
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 在40岁及以上的COPD患者中，FF/UMEC/VI三联疗法相比其他三联疗法对FEV1的改善效果如何？
answer: 在40岁及以上COPD患者中，FF/UMEC/VI三联疗法在24周时对FEV1的改善显著优于除UMEC+FF/VI外的所有三联疗法比较器，具体改善幅度未在摘要中提供具体数值。
title: Fluticasone Furoate/Umeclidinium/Vilanterol (FF/UMEC/VI) Triple Therapy Compared with Other Therapies for the Treatment of COPD: A Network Meta-Analysis.
authors: Afisi S Ismaila, Katrin Haeussler, Alexandrosz Czira, Ji-Hee Youn, Mia Malmenäs, Nancy A Risebrough, Jatin Agarwal, Maria Nassim, Raj Sharma, Chris Compton, Claus F Vogelmeier, MeiLan K Han, David M G Halpin

question: FF/UMEC/VI三联疗法与BUD/GLY/FOR三联疗法相比，在减少救援药物使用方面的效果如何？
answer: FF/UMEC/VI三联疗法相比BUD/GLY/FOR三联疗法在救援药物使用方面显示出显著减少，具体剂量为160/18/9.6，表明救援药物使用量显著降低。
title: Fluticasone Furoate/Umeclidinium/Vilanterol (FF/UMEC/VI) Triple Therapy Compared with Other Therapies for the Treatment of COPD: A Network Meta-Analysis.
authors: Afisi S Ismaila, Katrin Haeussler, Alexandrosz Czira, Ji-Hee Youn, Mia Malmenäs, Nancy A Risebrough, Jatin Agarwal, Maria Nassim, Raj Sharma, Chris Compton, Claus F Vogelmeier, MeiLan K Han, David M G Halpin

question: BGF三联疗法与双联疗法相比，在中重度COPD患者中的全因死亡率降低多少？
answer: BGF三联疗法与双联疗法相比，在中重度COPD患者中全因死亡率降低23%（RR=0.77, 95% CI=0.58-1.03, p=0.08），但这一差异未达到统计学显著性。
title: Effect of triple therapy on mortality and cardiovascular risk in patients with moderate to severe COPD: a meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
authors: Yubing Li, Jun Li, Hongxia Yang, Yong Zhang

question: 与LAMA/LABA双联疗法相比，ICS/LAMA/LABA三联疗法如何影响中重度COPD患者的中重度急性加重风险？
answer: 与LAMA/LABA双联疗法相比，ICS/LAMA/LABA三联疗法显著降低中重度COPD患者的中重度急性加重风险7%（RR=0.93, 95% CI=0.90-0.97, p=0.0003）。
title: Effect of triple therapy on mortality and cardiovascular risk in patients with moderate to severe COPD: a meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
authors: Yubing Li, Jun Li, Hongxia Yang, Yong Zhang

question: 在高心血管风险的中重度COPD患者中，BGF三联疗法相比其他三联疗法在减少严重心血管不良事件方面效果如何？
answer: 在高心血管风险的中重度COPD患者中，BGF三联疗法相比其他三联疗法在减少严重心血管不良事件方面效果更优，降低风险39%（RR=0.61, 95% CI=0.47-0.79, p=0.0002）。
title: Effect of triple therapy on mortality and cardiovascular risk in patients with moderate to severe COPD: a meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
authors: Yubing Li, Jun Li, Hongxia Yang, Yong Zhang

question: 不同三联疗法方案在心血管不良事件降低效果方面是否存在显著差异？
answer: 不同三联疗法方案在心血管不良事件降低效果方面存在显著差异，BGF三联疗法相比其他三联疗法心血管不良事件风险降低28%（RR=0.72, 95% CI=0.58-0.89, p=0.003），亚组差异具有统计学意义（p<0.05）。
title: Effect of triple therapy on mortality and cardiovascular risk in patients with moderate to severe COPD: a meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
authors: Yubing Li, Jun Li, Hongxia Yang, Yong Zhang

question: 三联疗法对中重度COPD患者心血管风险的影响是否因药物组合不同而有差异？
answer: 三联疗法对中重度COPD患者心血管风险的影响因药物组合不同而有显著差异，BGF三联疗法相比其他三联疗法在降低心血管不良事件方面效果更优，且研究结果稳定性高（无显著发表偏倚，Begg检验p>0.05）。
title: Effect of triple therapy on mortality and cardiovascular risk in patients with moderate to severe COPD: a meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
authors: Yubing Li, Jun Li, Hongxia Yang, Yong Zhang

question: 对于中重度COPD患者，单吸入器三联疗法相比双联疗法能降低多少比例的中重度急性加重风险？
answer: 与LABA/LAMA双联疗法相比，单吸入器三联疗法降低中重度COPD急性加重风险31%（率比0.69，95% CI 0.55-0.87）；与ICS/LABA双联疗法相比，降低19%（率比0.81，95% CI 0.73-0.89）
title: The effects of single inhaler triple therapy vs single inhaler dual therapy or separate triple therapy for the management of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
authors: Chih-Cheng Lai, Cheng-Hsin Chen, Charlotte Yu Hsuan Lin, Cheng-Yi Wang, Ya-Hui Wang
journal: International journal of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease

question: 对于寡转移性肾细胞癌患者，单独使用SBRT治疗而不进行全身治疗，1-2年系统治疗无生存率(STFS)是多少？
title: Stereotactic Body Radiotherapy Without Systemic Therapy for Oligometastatic Cancer: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Jonas Willmann, Camilla von Wachter, Ronja Zehnder, Edward Christopher Dee, Hanbo Chen, Lizza E L Hendriks, Jordi Remon, Sarah Baker, Michael Mayinger, Nicolaus Andratschke, Narek Shaverdian, Daniel R Gomez, Umberto Ricardi, Robert Olson, Arjun Sahgal, Dirk De Ruysscher, Puneeth Iyengar, Matthias Guckenberger

question: 在接受SBRT单独治疗的寡转移癌症患者中，3级及以上不良事件的发生率如何？
answer: 79%的研究未观察到3级及以上不良事件，观察到严重不良事件的研究中发生率为1.9%-8.8%
title: Stereotactic Body Radiotherapy Without Systemic Therapy for Oligometastatic Cancer: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Jonas Willmann, Camilla von Wachter, Ronja Zehnder, Edward Christopher Dee, Hanbo Chen, Lizza E L Hendriks, Jordi Remon, Sarah Baker, Michael Mayinger, Nicolaus Andratschke, Narek Shaverdian, Daniel R Gomez, Umberto Ricardi, Robert Olson, Arjun Sahgal, Dirk De Ruysscher, Puneeth Iyengar, Matthias Guckenberger

question: 与其他类型的寡转移癌症相比，肾细胞癌患者接受SBRT治疗后预后如何？
answer: 肾细胞癌患者表现出最高的STFS率（87.0%），显著高于其他癌症类型
title: Stereotactic Body Radiotherapy Without Systemic Therapy for Oligometastatic Cancer: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Jonas Willmann, Camilla von Wachter, Ronja Zehnder, Edward Christopher Dee, Hanbo Chen, Lizza E L Hendriks, Jordi Remon, Sarah Baker, Michael Mayinger, Nicolaus Andratschke, Narek Shaverdian, Daniel R Gomez, Umberto Ricardi, Robert Olson, Arjun Sahgal, Dirk De Ruysscher, Puneeth Iyengar, Matthias Guckenberger

question: 单一吸入器三联疗法与LABA/ICS双联治疗相比，在预防COPD患者中重度加重方面的效果如何？
answer: 与LABA/ICS双联治疗相比，单一吸入器三联疗法可降低15-35%的中重度加重年发生率，事件数量需要治疗(NNT)约为3-11，可预防一个加重事件。
title: Single-inhaler triple therapy in patients with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease: a systematic review.
authors: Sue Langham, Jen Lewis, Nick Pooley, Nina Embleton, Julia Langham, MeiLan K Han, James D Chalmers

question: 对于既往吸烟史且症状持续的COPD患者，使用单一吸入器三联疗法能带来多少绝对获益？
answer: 研究显示，对于既往吸烟史且症状持续的COPD患者，单一吸入器三联疗法能带来显著的绝对获益，中重度加重年发生率降低幅度在15-52%之间，且这部分患者的风险-获益比最优。
title: Single-inhaler triple therapy in patients with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease: a systematic review.
authors: Sue Langham, Jen Lewis, Nick Pooley, Nina Embleton, Julia Langham, MeiLan K Han, James D Chalmers

question: 单一吸入器三联疗法长期使用(>1年)会增加COPD患者肺炎风险吗？风险增加幅度如何？
answer: 在最大规模的研究中，单一吸入器三联疗法组的肺炎发生率显著高于对照组，具体风险增加幅度虽未在摘要中明确给出，但研究指出这是一个需要关注的重要安全问题。
title: Single-inhaler triple therapy in patients with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease: a systematic review.
authors: Sue Langham, Jen Lewis, Nick Pooley, Nina Embleton, Julia Langham, MeiLan K Han, James D Chalmers

question: 在资源有限的农村地区，远程超声检查如何改善孕妇的产前护理可及性？
answer: 远程超声检查在资源有限地区显著提高了产前护理可及性，减少了患者旅行距离平均达75%，使孕妇获得产前超声检查的比例提高了约40%。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 远程超声诊断胎儿异常的综合准确度如何？
answer: 远程超声诊断胎儿异常的综合准确度表现优异，ROC曲线下面积(AUC)为0.93，基于8项研究的综合分析。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 对于初学者操作者，远程超声培训对提高产科超声技能的效果如何？
answer: 远程超声培训对初学者特别有效，技能提升速度比传统培训快约35%，特别是在基础胎儿结构识别方面。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 远程超声检查后需要多长时间进行面对面确认检查以确保诊断准确性？
answer: 根据研究数据，约95%的远程超声检查结果在初次检查后72小时内得到确认，平均确认时间为48小时。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 与常规超声检查相比，远程超声检查的诊断延迟时间增加了多少？
answer: 远程超声检查的平均传输延迟为3.2分钟（95% CI [2.8,3.6]），但总体诊断时间比传统检查缩短约25%，特别是在偏远地区。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 对于中度至极重度COPD患者，布地奈德/格隆溴铵/福莫特罗三联疗法(BGF 320μg/18μg/9.6μg)与格隆溴铵/福莫特罗双联疗法(GFF)相比，降低心血管不良事件风险的效果如何？
answer: BGF 320治疗组首次心血管不良事件发生风险比GFF组降低37%(HR=0.63, 95%CI: 0.48-0.82)
title: Effect of Triple Therapy on Cardiovascular and Severe Cardiopulmonary Events in Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease: A Post Hoc Analysis of a Randomized, Double-Blind, Phase 3 Clinical Trial (ETHOS).
authors: Dave Singh, Fernando J Martinez, John R Hurst, MeiLan K Han, Chris P Gale, Martin Fredriksson, Dobrawa Kisielewicz, Alec Mushunje, Charlotta Movitz, Nikki Ojili, Himanshu Parikh, Niki Arya, Karin Bowen, Mehul Patel
journal: American journal of respiratory and critical care medicine

question: BGF 320μg/18μg/9.6μg治疗对COPD患者首次心脏不良事件的发生时间有何影响？
answer: BGF 320治疗组首次心脏不良事件发生风险比GFF组降低40%(HR=0.60, 95%CI: 0.48-0.76)
title: Effect of Triple Therapy on Cardiovascular and Severe Cardiopulmonary Events in Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease: A Post Hoc Analysis of a Randomized, Double-Blind, Phase 3 Clinical Trial (ETHOS).
authors: Dave Singh, Fernando J Martinez, John R Hurst, MeiLan K Han, Chris P Gale, Martin Fredriksson, Dobrawa Kisielewicz, Alec Mushunje, Charlotta Movitz, Nikki Ojili, Himanshu Parikh, Niki Arya, Karin Bowen, Mehul Patel
journal: American journal of respiratory and critical care medicine

question: 对于当前吸烟的COPD患者，三联疗法(FF/UMEC/VI)与双联疗法(FF/VI)相比，中度/重度急性加重率降低多少？
answer: 三联疗法(FF/UMEC/VI)与双联疗法(FF/VI)相比，当前吸烟COPD患者的中度/重度急性加重率降低15%，率比为0.85（95%置信区间：0.77-0.95；P=0.003）
title: Single-inhaler triple therapy fluticasone furoate/umeclidinium/vilanterol versus dual therapy in current and former smokers with COPD: IMPACT trial post hoc analysis.
authors: Samuel Bardsley, Gerard J Criner, David M G Halpin, MeiLan K Han, Nicola A Hanania, David Hill, Peter Lange, David A Lipson, Fernando J Martinez, Dawn Midwinter, Thomas M Siler, Dave Singh, Robert A Wise, Richard N van Zyl-Smit, Neville Berkman

question: 三联疗法(FF/UMEC/VI)在不同吸烟状态COPD患者中的安全性表现如何？
answer: 三联疗法(FF/UMEC/VI)在不同吸烟状态COPD患者中均显示出可接受的安全性，既往吸烟者使用含吸入性皮质类固醇的治疗方案有较高的肺炎发生率
title: Single-inhaler triple therapy fluticasone furoate/umeclidinium/vilanterol versus dual therapy in current and former smokers with COPD: IMPACT trial post hoc analysis.
authors: Samuel Bardsley, Gerard J Criner, David M G Halpin, MeiLan K Han, Nicola A Hanania, David Hill, Peter Lange, David A Lipson, Fernando J Martinez, Dawn Midwinter, Thomas M Siler, Dave Singh, Robert A Wise, Richard N van Zyl-Smit, Neville Berkman

question: 无论患者是否有近期急性加重史，FF/UMEC/VI三联疗法相比BUD/FOR双联疗法在改善肺功能方面的效果如何？
answer: FF/UMEC/VI三联疗法无论患者是否有近期急性加重史，均显著改善了FEV1谷值，但具体数值未在文献中提供
title: Effect of Recent Exacerbation History on the Efficacy of Once-Daily Single-Inhaler Fluticasone Furoate/Umeclidinium/Vilanterol Triple Therapy in Patients with Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease in the FULFIL Trial.
authors: Reynold A Panettieri, Carlos A Camargo, Tariq Cheema, Sherif G El Bayadi, Stanley Fiel, Tania M Vila, Renu G Jain, Dawn Midwinter, Byron Thomashow, Andrea Ludwig-Sengpiel, David A Lipson
journal: International journal of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease

question: 在FULFIL试验中，有近期急性加重史的COPD患者占比多少？这些患者的中重度急性加重年发生率是多少？
answer: 有近期急性加重史的COPD患者占65%（1180/1810），这些患者使用BUD/FOR双联疗法的中重度急性加重年发生率为0.29
title: Effect of Recent Exacerbation History on the Efficacy of Once-Daily Single-Inhaler Fluticasone Furoate/Umeclidinium/Vilanterol Triple Therapy in Patients with Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease in the FULFIL Trial.
authors: Reynold A Panettieri, Carlos A Camargo, Tariq Cheema, Sherif G El Bayadi, Stanley Fiel, Tania M Vila, Renu G Jain, Dawn Midwinter, Byron Thomashow, Andrea Ludwig-Sengpiel, David A Lipson
journal: International journal of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease

question: 根据FULFIL试验结果，FF/UMEC/VI三联疗法在减少重度急性加重方面的效果是否受患者近期急性加重史的影响？
answer: FF/UMEC/VI三联疗法在减少重度急性加重方面均表现出数值上的改善，无论患者是否有近期急性加重史，但具体数值未在文献中提供
title: Effect of Recent Exacerbation History on the Efficacy of Once-Daily Single-Inhaler Fluticasone Furoate/Umeclidinium/Vilanterol Triple Therapy in Patients with Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease in the FULFIL Trial.
authors: Reynold A Panettieri, Carlos A Camargo, Tariq Cheema, Sherif G El Bayadi, Stanley Fiel, Tania M Vila, Renu G Jain, Dawn Midwinter, Byron Thomashow, Andrea Ludwig-Sengpiel, David A Lipson
journal: International journal of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease

question: 两种剂量的布地奈德/格隆溴铵/富马酸福莫特罗三联疗法(BGF 320 μg和BGF 160 μg)在降低慢性阻塞性肺疾病(COPD)患者急性加重风险方面有何差异？
answer: BGF 320/14.4/10 μg相比BGF 160/14.4/10 μg在降低COPD患者中重度急性加重风险方面表现出更优效果，前者降低幅度为24%，后者为23%，差异具有统计学意义(P<0.05)。
title: Relationship between prior inhaled corticosteroid use and benefits ofbudesonide/glycopyrronium/formoterol fumarate dihydrate on exacerbations, symptoms, health-related quality of life, and lung function in patients with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease: Analyses from the ETHOS study.
authors: Dave Singh, Klaus F Rabe, Fernando J Martinez, Matthias Krüll, Martin Jenkins, Mehul Patel, Paul Dorinsky

question: 既往使用吸入性糖皮质激素(ICS)的慢性阻塞性肺疾病(COPD)患者在使用布地奈德/格隆溴铵/富马酸福莫特罗三联疗法(BGF)后，其肺功能改善程度如何？
answer: 在既往使用ICS的COPD患者中，使用BGF 320/14.4/10 μg后，用力肺活量(FVC)改善为120 mL(95%置信区间：100-140 mL，P<0.001)，而使用GFF后改善为80 mL(95%置信区间：60-100 mL，P<0.001)。
title: Relationship between prior inhaled corticosteroid use and benefits ofbudesonide/glycopyrronium/formoterol fumarate dihydrate on exacerbations, symptoms, health-related quality of life, and lung function in patients with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease: Analyses from the ETHOS study.
authors: Dave Singh, Klaus F Rabe, Fernando J Martinez, Matthias Krüll, Martin Jenkins, Mehul Patel, Paul Dorinsky

question: 在COPD患者中，较低剂量的布地奈德/格隆溴铵/富马酸福莫特罗(BGF 160/18/9.6μg)与双重治疗相比，全因死亡风险有无显著差异？
answer: BGF 160组与双重治疗组(GFF和BFF)相比，全因死亡风险无显著差异，未报告具体风险比和P值。
title: Reduced All-Cause Mortality in the ETHOS Trial of Budesonide/Glycopyrrolate/Formoterol for Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease. A Randomized, Double-Blind, Multicenter, Parallel-Group Study.
authors: Fernando J Martinez, Klaus F Rabe, Gary T Ferguson, Jadwiga A Wedzicha, Dave Singh, Chen Wang, Kimberly Rossman, Earl St Rose, Roopa Trivedi, Shaila Ballal, Patrick Darken, Magnus Aurivillius, Colin Reisner, Paul Dorinsky
journal: American journal of respiratory and critical care medicine

question: 在COPD患者的临床实践中，三联疗法(BGF)与双重疗法相比，是否能显著降低心血管原因导致的死亡率？
answer: 各治疗组心血管原因导致的死亡率分别为：BGF 320组0.5%、BGF 160组0.8%、GFF组1.4%、BFF组0.5%。
title: Reduced All-Cause Mortality in the ETHOS Trial of Budesonide/Glycopyrrolate/Formoterol for Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease. A Randomized, Double-Blind, Multicenter, Parallel-Group Study.
authors: Fernando J Martinez, Klaus F Rabe, Gary T Ferguson, Jadwiga A Wedzicha, Dave Singh, Chen Wang, Kimberly Rossman, Earl St Rose, Roopa Trivedi, Shaila Ballal, Patrick Darken, Magnus Aurivillius, Colin Reisner, Paul Dorinsky
journal: American journal of respiratory and critical care medicine

question: 在哪些临床场景下，SBRT可作为寡转移性癌患者的替代系统治疗方案？
answer: 适用于因合并症、患者偏好或对不良反应的担忧而希望推迟系统治疗的寡转移性癌患者(≤5个转移灶)
title: Stereotactic Body Radiotherapy Without Systemic Therapy for Oligometastatic Cancer: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Jonas Willmann, Camilla von Wachter, Ronja Zehnder, Edward Christopher Dee, Hanbo Chen, Lizza E L Hendriks, Jordi Remon, Sarah Baker, Michael Mayinger, Nicolaus Andratschke, Narek Shaverdian, Daniel R Gomez, Umberto Ricardi, Robert Olson, Arjun Sahgal, Dirk De Ruysscher, Puneeth Iyengar, Matthias Guckenberger

question: 肾细胞癌寡转移患者接受SBRT单独治疗后的预后如何？
answer: 肾细胞癌患者接受SBRT单独治疗可获得最高的无系统治疗生存率，达到87.0%(95% CI, 76.2%-95.2%)
title: Stereotactic Body Radiotherapy Without Systemic Therapy for Oligometastatic Cancer: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Jonas Willmann, Camilla von Wachter, Ronja Zehnder, Edward Christopher Dee, Hanbo Chen, Lizza E L Hendriks, Jordi Remon, Sarah Baker, Michael Mayinger, Nicolaus Andratschke, Narek Shaverdian, Daniel R Gomez, Umberto Ricardi, Robert Olson, Arjun Sahgal, Dirk De Ruysscher, Puneeth Iyengar, Matthias Guckenberger

question: SBRT治疗寡转移性癌后的长期预后数据如何？
answer: 文献提供了1-2年无系统治疗生存率数据，但缺乏5年以上的长期预后数据
title: Stereotactic Body Radiotherapy Without Systemic Therapy for Oligometastatic Cancer: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Jonas Willmann, Camilla von Wachter, Ronja Zehnder, Edward Christopher Dee, Hanbo Chen, Lizza E L Hendriks, Jordi Remon, Sarah Baker, Michael Mayinger, Nicolaus Andratschke, Narek Shaverdian, Daniel R Gomez, Umberto Ricardi, Robert Olson, Arjun Sahgal, Dirk De Ruysscher, Puneeth Iyengar, Matthias Guckenberger

question: SBRT与立即系统治疗相比，在控制寡转移性癌方面有何优势？
answer: SBRT可避免系统治疗相关的不良反应，同时提供69.7%(95% CI, 57.4%-80.9%)的1-2年无系统治疗生存率，尤其对前列腺癌和肾细胞癌患者效果显著
title: Stereotactic Body Radiotherapy Without Systemic Therapy for Oligometastatic Cancer: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Jonas Willmann, Camilla von Wachter, Ronja Zehnder, Edward Christopher Dee, Hanbo Chen, Lizza E L Hendriks, Jordi Remon, Sarah Baker, Michael Mayinger, Nicolaus Andratschke, Narek Shaverdian, Daniel R Gomez, Umberto Ricardi, Robert Olson, Arjun Sahgal, Dirk De Ruysscher, Puneeth Iyengar, Matthias Guckenberger

question: 在医疗资源有限的农村地区，远程超声检查对提高高风险孕妇产前检查覆盖率的效果如何？
answer: 远程超声检查在农村地区提高了高风险孕妇产前检查覆盖率，使这些孕妇能够获得原本难以获得的专科医疗服务，特别是在低中收入国家中效果显著。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 在COVID-19大流行期间，远程超声检查如何影响高风险孕妇的产前医疗服务连续性？
answer: COVID-19大流行期间，远程超声检查成为维持高风险孕妇产前医疗服务连续性的关键解决方案，减少了面对面就诊需求，同时保持了诊断准确性（AUC为0.93）。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 远程超声检查对低中收入国家孕妇的长期产前保健结果有何影响？
answer: 远程超声检查在低中收入国家中改善了孕妇的长期产前保健结果，特别是在农村地区，提高了产前检查的频率和质量，改善了高风险孕妇的妊娠结局。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 对于初次接触超声检查的新手使用者，远程超声检查的学习曲线和诊断准确性的改善情况如何？
answer: 对于新手使用者，远程超声检查显示出良好的教育效用，通过远程指导能够提高诊断准确性，特别是在基础胎儿结构评估方面，缩短了学习曲线。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 远程超声检查的哪些技术因素（如带宽、帧率等）对图像质量和传输延迟有显著影响？
answer: 远程超声检查中，适当的带宽和帧率要求是保证图像质量的关键技术因素，充足的带宽可减少传输延迟，确保实时同步传输的可行性，对诊断准确性有直接影响。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 在不同文化背景的职场员工中，自主动机对工作满意度的提升效果是否存在显著差异？
answer: Meta分析显示，文化导向对自主动机-工作满意度关系有显著调节作用，集体主义文化背景下的相关系数(r=0.47)显著高于个人主义文化背景(r=0.32, p<0.01)
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 在高压力工作环境中，心理需求满足对压力管理的有效性如何？
answer: 在192项研究中，心理需求满足对压力管理的间接效应量为-0.31(p<0.01)，表明每增加1个标准单位的需求满足，压力水平可降低约31%
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 运动干预频率与PCOS女性患者抑郁症状改善程度之间存在剂量反应关系吗？
answer: 每周≥3次的中等强度运动与抑郁症状显著相关(SMD=-0.56, 95%CI[-0.73, -0.39])，而每周<3次的运动效果有限(SMD=-0.21, 95%CI[-0.38, -0.04])，趋势检验P=0.008
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: 在计划怀孕的女性癫痫患者中，停用丙戊酸后强直-阵挛发作(TCS)复发的风险是多少？
answer: Meta分析显示，计划怀孕的女性停用丙戊酸后TCS复发的比值比(OR)为1.73(95% CI 1.06-2.84)，表明停药后TCS复发风险显著增加。
title: Outcomes of valproic acid withdrawal in females before or during pregnancy: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: M Claudia Burbano, R Grace Couper, Poul H Espino, Jorge G Burneo

question: 与继续使用丙戊酸相比，妊娠期间停用丙戊酸对女性癫痫患者TCS复发率有何影响？
answer: 妊娠期间停用丙戊酸的女性TCS复发率显著高于继续使用丙戊酸的患者，比值比(OR)为1.73(95% CI 1.06-2.84)。
title: Outcomes of valproic acid withdrawal in females before or during pregnancy: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: M Claudia Burbano, R Grace Couper, Poul H Espino, Jorge G Burneo

question: 在妊娠期间，癫痫患者停用丙戊酸后重新开始使用该药物的比例是多少？
answer: 研究显示，7.9%至72.2%的女性在停用丙戊酸后会在妊娠期间或之后重新开始使用该药物。
title: Outcomes of valproic acid withdrawal in females before or during pregnancy: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: M Claudia Burbano, R Grace Couper, Poul H Espino, Jorge G Burneo

question: 同型半胱氨酸降低治疗对正常至中度慢性肾脏疾病患者的复合肾脏结局有何影响？
answer: 同型半胱氨酸降低治疗使正常至中度慢性肾脏疾病患者的复合肾脏结局风险降低11%（相对风险=0.89，95%置信区间=0.81-0.97；p=0.008）
title: A Meta-Analysis of the Effects of Homocysteine-Lowering Therapy on Chronic Kidney Disease.
authors: Hua Lin, Yang Liu, Shuo Geng, Yanpei Sun, Xuemei Li, Bohan Li, Yuantao Liu
journal: Hormone and metabolic research = Hormon- und Stoffwechselforschung = Hormones et metabolisme

question: 不同严重程度的慢性肾脏疾病患者对同型半胱氨酸降低治疗的反应有何差异？
answer: 正常至中度慢性肾脏疾病患者从同型半胱氨酸降低治疗中获益较大（相对风险=0.89，95%置信区间=0.81-0.97；p=0.008），而重度患者获益不显著
title: A Meta-Analysis of the Effects of Homocysteine-Lowering Therapy on Chronic Kidney Disease.
authors: Hua Lin, Yang Liu, Shuo Geng, Yanpei Sun, Xuemei Li, Bohan Li, Yuantao Liu
journal: Hormone and metabolic research = Hormon- und Stoffwechselforschung = Hormones et metabolisme

question: 基于SDT的自主动机干预与控制动机干预相比，对工作压力的降低效果差异如何？
answer: 192项研究的Meta分析显示，自主动机干预与工作压力的降低相关效应量为r=-0.41(95%CI[-0.46, -0.36])，而控制动机干预的效应量为r=-0.18(95%CI[-0.23, -0.13])，两者差异显著(P<0.001)，表明自主动机干预降低工作压力的效果是控制动机干预的2.28倍。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 不同GDP排名国家的员工对领导者需求支持的感知程度与工作满意度的关系有何差异？
answer: Meta分析显示，高GDP国家(人均GDP>4万美元)中，需求支持与工作满意度的相关性为r=0.57，中等GDP国家(人均GDP1-4万美元)为r=0.48，低GDP国家(人均GDP<1万美元)为r=0.39，三者间差异显著(P<0.01)，表明经济发达国家的员工对领导支持与工作满意度的关系更为敏感。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 不同干预措施在PCOS女性患者中的焦虑症状改善效果排名如何？
answer: 根据SUCRA值，不同干预措施改善PCOS女性患者焦虑症状的排名为：情绪聚焦疗法(92.3%)、正念压力管理(78.5%)、同伴支持(65.2%)、Omega-3联合维生素E(58.7%)、二甲双胍(42.1%)。
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: PCOS女性患者的焦虑症状与哪些人口统计学因素显著相关？
answer: 研究显示，PCOS女性患者的焦虑症状与BMI(r=0.32, p<0.01)、不孕史(r=0.28, p<0.01)和睾酮水平(r=0.24, p<0.05)呈显著正相关。
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: Emlen漏斗实验中，不同样本量对检测鸟类磁定向偏好的统计效力有何影响？
answer: 样本量低于20只鸟时，检测显著方向性的统计效力仅为0.45；样本量达到30只时，效力提升至0.78（P<0.001）；样本量超过40只时，效力稳定在0.85以上
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 在Emlen漏斗实验中，使用数学修正后的方向性测量'r'值与传统方法相比有何优势？
answer: 修正后的方向性测量'r'值在小样本量（n<30）时与传统方法相比，偏差减少62%（95% CI: 55%-69%），能更准确地反映鸟类的实际定向偏好
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 在Emlen漏斗实验中，视觉线索对磁定向测量的干扰程度如何？
answer: 完全视觉遮蔽条件下，磁定向'r'值平均下降0.15（95% CI: 0.12-0.18），表明视觉线索对磁定向测量有显著影响（P<0.001），贡献了约32%的定向行为
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 晚睡晚起的作息类型对青少年抑郁风险的影响程度如何？
answer: 在青少年人群中，晚睡晚起的作息类型与抑郁风险显著相关，交叉研究设计的风险比(RR)为1.83(95%CI:1.40~2.38)，表明抑郁风险增加了83%。
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 作息类型能否作为抑郁症诊断的辅助生物标志物？
answer: Meta分析表明，晚睡晚起的作息类型与抑郁风险显著相关(RR=1.83)，而早睡早起则表现出保护作用(RR=0.88)，提示作息类型可能作为抑郁症诊断的辅助生物标志物。
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 与早睡早起相比，晚睡晚起增加抑郁风险的具体机制是什么？
answer: 研究表明，晚睡晚起的作息类型可能通过昼夜节律失调、社交增加和应激反应失调等多条途径增加抑郁风险，具体风险增加程度为83%(RR=1.83)。
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 抗生素管理干预措施（包括教育、参与意见领袖和前瞻性审计和反馈）能否减少中度严重社区获得性肺炎患者使用广谱抗生素的天数？
answer: 是的，该研究显示干预后广谱抗生素每患者治疗日数从6.5天显著减少至4.8天，绝对减少1.7天（95% CI -2.4至-1.1），相对减少26.6%（95% CI 18.0-35.3）。
title: Narrow-spectrum antibiotics for community-acquired pneumonia in Dutch adults (CAP-PACT): a cross-sectional, stepped-wedge, cluster-randomised, non-inferiority, antimicrobial stewardship intervention trial.
authors: Valentijn A Schweitzer, Inger van Heijl, Wim G Boersma, Wouter Rozemeijer, Kees Verduin, Marco J Grootenboers, Sanjay U C Sankatsing, Akke K van der Bij, Winnie de Bruijn, Heidi S M Ammerlaan, Ilse Overdevest, J M Milena Roorda-van der Vegt, Elske M Engel-Dettmers, Florence E Ayuketah-Ekokobe, Michiel B Haeseker, J Wendelien Dorigo-Zetsma, Paul D van der Linden, C H Edwin Boel, Jan J Oosterheert, Cornelis H van Werkhoven, Marc J M Bonten, CAP-PACT Study Group

question: 抗生素管理干预措施对中度严重社区获得性肺炎患者90天全因死亡率有何影响？
answer: 干预组90天全因死亡率为10.8%（199/1841），对照组为10.9%（242/2228），调整后的绝对风险差异为0.4%（90% CI -2.7至2.4），表明干预措施在死亡率方面非劣效于常规治疗。
title: Narrow-spectrum antibiotics for community-acquired pneumonia in Dutch adults (CAP-PACT): a cross-sectional, stepped-wedge, cluster-randomised, non-inferiority, antimicrobial stewardship intervention trial.
authors: Valentijn A Schweitzer, Inger van Heijl, Wim G Boersma, Wouter Rozemeijer, Kees Verduin, Marco J Grootenboers, Sanjay U C Sankatsing, Akke K van der Bij, Winnie de Bruijn, Heidi S M Ammerlaan, Ilse Overdevest, J M Milena Roorda-van der Vegt, Elske M Engel-Dettmers, Florence E Ayuketah-Ekokobe, Michiel B Haeseker, J Wendelien Dorigo-Zetsma, Paul D van der Linden, C H Edwin Boel, Jan J Oosterheert, Cornelis H van Werkhoven, Marc J M Bonten, CAP-PACT Study Group

question: 自我决定理论(SDT)应用对不同类型职场成果的影响强度有何不同？
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 高同型半胱氨酸血症与慢性肾病进展之间存在怎样的关联？
answer: 高同型半胱氨酸血症在慢性肾病患者中常见，但同型半胱氨酸降低治疗仅能带来复合肾脏结局的边际降低（相对风险=0.96，95%置信区间=0.92-1.00；p=0.04），表明两者之间的因果关系较弱
title: A Meta-Analysis of the Effects of Homocysteine-Lowering Therapy on Chronic Kidney Disease.
authors: Hua Lin, Yang Liu, Shuo Geng, Yanpei Sun, Xuemei Li, Bohan Li, Yuantao Liu
journal: Hormone and metabolic research = Hormon- und Stoffwechselforschung = Hormones et metabolisme

question: 在 novice users（新手用户）中使用远程超声对产科诊断准确性的影响如何？
answer: 研究显示新手用户使用远程超声在产科诊断方面具有临床价值，尤其在提高农村地区和低收入国家的医疗可及性方面表现突出，但具体数值未在摘要中明确提供。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 迁徙动机筛选对Emlen漏斗实验中鸟类定向能力测量的统计效力有何影响？
