answer: 迁徙动机预筛选可使实验统计效力提高约35%，将有效样本量需求从每实验组45只减少至29只
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 不同实验设计参数对Emlen漏斗实验结果可靠性的影响程度如何？
answer: 双盲设计可将实验误差降低42%，而标准化实验流程可将组内变异系数从28.7%降至15.3%
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: Emlen漏斗实验中鸟类的定向偏好(r值)在不同样本量下的统计显著性有何差异？
answer: 当样本量从20只增加到40只时，r值0.3的统计显著性从P=0.08提升至P=0.01，达到统计学意义
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 磁场强度变化对鸟类定向偏好的影响效应量是多少？
answer: 磁场强度从50μT降至25μT时，定向偏好下降0.28个标准差(β=-0.28, 95%CI: -0.41至-0.15)
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 在临床实践中，RA患者的中风风险评估应考虑哪些因素？
answer: 临床实践中应考虑性别因素，女性RA患者中风风险比男性高60%（OR=1.60，95% CI [1.19-2.16]，P=0.002）；同时应考虑年龄因素，65岁以上RA患者中风风险增加24%（OR=1.24，95% CI [1.02-1.50]，P=0.032）
title: Rheumatoid arthritis and stroke risk: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Lulu Yang, Xinyu Liu, Guangyuan Yang, Hongmei Wu, Xingsen Li, Jinyu Xuan, Shuxin Dong

question: 在HBeAg阳性、HBV DNA高水平(8.41 log10 IU/mL)且ALT正常的慢性乙肝患者中，女性患者接受TDF联合恩曲他滨治疗192周后，HBV DNA<69 IU/mL的比例是多少？
answer: 女性患者接受TDF联合恩曲他滨治疗192周后，HBV DNA<69 IU/mL的比例为76%，显著高于男性患者，女性性别与良好反应的比值比为7.05(P=0.002)。
title: Effects of tenofovir disoproxil fumarate in hepatitis B e antigen-positive patients with normal levels of alanine aminotransferase and high levels of hepatitis B virus DNA.
authors: Henry L Y Chan, Chi Kuen Chan, Aric Josun Hui, Sing Chan, Fred Poordad, Ting-Tsung Chang, Philippe Mathurin, John F Flaherty, Lanjia Lin, Amy Corsa, Anuj Gaggar, G Mani Subramanian, John G McHutchison, George Lau, Sam Lee, Edward J Gane

question: 在HBeAg阳性、HBV DNA高水平且ALT正常的患者中，TDF联合恩曲他滨治疗192周后，HBeAg血清转换率和乙肝表面抗原清除率分别是多少？
answer: TDF联合恩曲他滨治疗192周后，HBeAg血清转换率为0%，乙肝表面抗原清除率也为0%；而TDF单药治疗组HBeAg血清转换率为5%(3/64)，但同样无乙肝表面抗原清除。
title: Effects of tenofovir disoproxil fumarate in hepatitis B e antigen-positive patients with normal levels of alanine aminotransferase and high levels of hepatitis B virus DNA.
authors: Henry L Y Chan, Chi Kuen Chan, Aric Josun Hui, Sing Chan, Fred Poordad, Ting-Tsung Chang, Philippe Mathurin, John F Flaherty, Lanjia Lin, Amy Corsa, Anuj Gaggar, G Mani Subramanian, John G McHutchison, George Lau, Sam Lee, Edward J Gane

question: 在免疫耐受期的慢性乙肝患者中，TDF联合恩曲他滨治疗与TDF单药治疗相比，192周后的总体安全性如何？
answer: TDF联合恩曲他滨和TDF单药两种治疗方案在192周治疗期间均表现出良好的耐受性，未报告严重不良反应，安全性良好。
title: Effects of tenofovir disoproxil fumarate in hepatitis B e antigen-positive patients with normal levels of alanine aminotransferase and high levels of hepatitis B virus DNA.
authors: Henry L Y Chan, Chi Kuen Chan, Aric Josun Hui, Sing Chan, Fred Poordad, Ting-Tsung Chang, Philippe Mathurin, John F Flaherty, Lanjia Lin, Amy Corsa, Anuj Gaggar, G Mani Subramanian, John G McHutchison, George Lau, Sam Lee, Edward J Gane

question: 在慢性丙型肝炎患者中，与干扰素为基础的治疗相比，直接作用抗病毒药物(DAA)治疗达到持续病毒学应答(SVR)后，肝细胞癌(HCC)的发生率有何差异？
answer: DAA治疗达到SVR后的HCC发生率为1.17每100人年(95% CI 1.11, 1.22)，而IFN治疗达到SVR后的HCC发生率为1.60每100人年(95% CI 1.58, 1.63)，两种治疗方式间无显著差异。
title: Risk of hepatocellular carcinoma occurrence after antiviral therapy for patients with chronic hepatitis C Infection: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Gui-Ji Lv, Dong Ji, Lingxiang Yu, Hong-Yan Chen, Jing Chen, Mengwen He, Wen-Chang Wang, Hong-Bo Wang, Christopher Tsang, Jianjun Wang, Ming-Lung Yu, George Lau, APASL Viral Elimination Task force

question: 在慢性丙型肝炎患者中，肝细胞癌(HCC)的发生率能否作为评估抗病毒治疗效果的替代指标？
answer: 研究显示，HCC发生率可以作为评估抗病毒治疗效果的有效指标，SVR患者的HCC发生率(1.54/100人年)显著低于NR患者(7.80/100人年)，差异具有统计学意义。
title: Risk of hepatocellular carcinoma occurrence after antiviral therapy for patients with chronic hepatitis C Infection: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Gui-Ji Lv, Dong Ji, Lingxiang Yu, Hong-Yan Chen, Jing Chen, Mengwen He, Wen-Chang Wang, Hong-Bo Wang, Christopher Tsang, Jianjun Wang, Ming-Lung Yu, George Lau, APASL Viral Elimination Task force

question: 在显性HBV感染(HBsAg阳性)的CHC患者中，接受DAA治疗与IFN治疗相比，HBV再激活的发生率有何差异？
answer: 显性HBV感染的CHC患者中，接受DAA治疗的HBV再激活率为12.2%(P=0.03)，而IFN治疗的再激活率为14.5%(P<0.001)，两组间无显著统计学差异(P=0.91)。
title: Hepatitis B reactivation in hepatitis B and C coinfected patients treated with antiviral agents: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Guofeng Chen, Cheng Wang, Jing Chen, Dong Ji, Yudong Wang, Vanessa Wu, Johan Karlberg, George Lau

question: DAA治疗与IFN治疗相比，HBV再激活发生的时间有何差异？
answer: DAA治疗组中HBV再激活发生在治疗4-12周期间，而IFN治疗组大多发生在治疗结束时，部分发生在随访期间。
title: Hepatitis B reactivation in hepatitis B and C coinfected patients treated with antiviral agents: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Guofeng Chen, Cheng Wang, Jing Chen, Dong Ji, Yudong Wang, Vanessa Wu, Johan Karlberg, George Lau

question: CHC患者在接受DAA治疗前应如何筛查HBV感染状态？
answer: 所有CHC患者在接受DAA治疗前应进行HBsAg和HBV DNA检测，以识别显性HBV感染(HBsAg阳性)和隐匿性HBV感染(HBsAg阴性但HBV DNA阳性)。
title: Hepatitis B reactivation in hepatitis B and C coinfected patients treated with antiviral agents: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Guofeng Chen, Cheng Wang, Jing Chen, Dong Ji, Yudong Wang, Vanessa Wu, Johan Karlberg, George Lau

question: DAA治疗对CHC合并隐匿性HBV感染患者的SVR有何影响？
answer: HBV再激活不影响CHC患者的SVR(P=0.27)，表明DAA治疗对丙型肝炎的持续病毒学应答不受HBV再激活状态影响。
title: Hepatitis B reactivation in hepatitis B and C coinfected patients treated with antiviral agents: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Guofeng Chen, Cheng Wang, Jing Chen, Dong Ji, Yudong Wang, Vanessa Wu, Johan Karlberg, George Lau

question: 对于亚洲地区慢性丙型肝炎基因1型感染伴有基线肝硬化的患者，使用daclatasvir/asunaprevir(DCV/ASV)治疗的持续病毒学应答率(SVR)是多少？
answer: 研究显示，基线肝硬化显著降低了DCV/ASV治疗的SVR率，具体降低幅度未在文献中明确给出，但统计学差异显著(P < 0.001)，表明肝硬化是影响治疗效果的重要因素。
title: Systematic review with meta-analysis: effectiveness and tolerability of interferon-free direct-acting antiviral regimens for chronic hepatitis C genotype 1 in routine clinical practice in Asia.
authors: F Ji, B Wei, Y H Yeo, E Ogawa, B Zou, C D Stave, Z Li, S Dang, N Furusyo, R C Cheung, M H Nguyen

question: 在亚洲地区慢性丙型肝炎基因1型感染患者中，ledipasvir/sofosbuvir±ribavirin(LDV/SOF±RBV)治疗的总体持续病毒学应答率(SVR)是多少？
answer: LDV/SOF±RBV治疗方案在亚洲地区HCV GT1感染患者中取得了98.1%(95% CI 97.0-99.0, I² = 41.0%)的高SVR率，表明该方案在真实临床实践中具有显著疗效。
title: Systematic review with meta-analysis: effectiveness and tolerability of interferon-free direct-acting antiviral regimens for chronic hepatitis C genotype 1 in routine clinical practice in Asia.
authors: F Ji, B Wei, Y H Yeo, E Ogawa, B Zou, C D Stave, Z Li, S Dang, N Furusyo, R C Cheung, M H Nguyen

question: 基线耐药相关变异(RASs)对亚洲地区HCV GT1感染患者使用DCV/ASV治疗的SVR率有何影响？
answer: 基线RASs显著降低了DCV/ASV治疗的SVR率，从无RASs患者的94.3%降至有RASs患者的65.4%，差异具有统计学意义(P < 0.001)，表明RASs是预测DCV/ASV治疗疗效的重要生物标志物。
title: Systematic review with meta-analysis: effectiveness and tolerability of interferon-free direct-acting antiviral regimens for chronic hepatitis C genotype 1 in routine clinical practice in Asia.
authors: F Ji, B Wei, Y H Yeo, E Ogawa, B Zou, C D Stave, Z Li, S Dang, N Furusyo, R C Cheung, M H Nguyen

question: 在亚洲地区真实临床实践中，既往治疗史对HCV GT1感染患者使用IFN-free DAA治疗的SVR率有何影响？
answer: 研究显示，既往治疗史未显著影响IFN-free DAA治疗的SVR率(P > 0.05)，表明无论患者是初治还是经治，IFN-free DAA方案在亚洲地区真实临床实践中均能取得较高的治愈率。
title: Systematic review with meta-analysis: effectiveness and tolerability of interferon-free direct-acting antiviral regimens for chronic hepatitis C genotype 1 in routine clinical practice in Asia.
authors: F Ji, B Wei, Y H Yeo, E Ogawa, B Zou, C D Stave, Z Li, S Dang, N Furusyo, R C Cheung, M H Nguyen

question: 在接受治愈性治疗的丙型肝炎相关肝细胞癌(HCV-HCC)患者中，获得持续病毒学应答(SVR)与未获得SVR的患者相比，总生存期(OS)的差异有多大？
answer: SVR与未获得SVR的患者相比，总生存期显著改善(HR 0.18; 95% CI 0.11-0.29)，表明SVR患者死亡风险降低82%。
title: Impact of sustained viral response postcurative therapy of hepatitis C-related hepatocellular carcinoma: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Sashidhar Manthravadi, Swathi Paleti, Prashant Pandya

question: 直接作用抗病毒药物(DAA)治疗获得的持续病毒学应答(SVR)对接受治愈性治疗的丙型肝炎相关肝细胞癌患者的无复发生存期(RFS)有何影响？
answer: SVR与更好的无复发生存期相关(HR 0.50; 95% CI 0.40-0.63)，表明SVR患者复发风险降低50%。
title: Impact of sustained viral response postcurative therapy of hepatitis C-related hepatocellular carcinoma: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Sashidhar Manthravadi, Swathi Paleti, Prashant Pandya

question: 在接受肝切除术或局部区域治疗的丙型肝炎相关肝细胞癌患者中，获得持续病毒学应答(SVR)是否能改善预后？
answer: 是的，SVR与改善的总生存期(OS)和无复发生存期(RFS)显著相关，HR值分别为0.18和0.50。
title: Impact of sustained viral response postcurative therapy of hepatitis C-related hepatocellular carcinoma: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Sashidhar Manthravadi, Swathi Paleti, Prashant Pandya

question: 慢性丙型肝炎伴有活动性肝细胞癌的患者接受直接抗病毒药物(DAA)治疗后，持续病毒学应答(SVR)率是多少？
title: Sustained virologic response to direct-acting antiviral therapy in patients with chronic hepatitis C and hepatocellular carcinoma: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Fanpu Ji, Yee Hui Yeo, Mike Tzuhen Wei, Eiichi Ogawa, Masaru Enomoto, Dong Hyun Lee, Etsuko Iio, John Lubel, Wenjun Wang, Bin Wei, Tatsuya Ide, Carmen Monica Preda, Fabio Conti, Tatsuya Minami, Rob Bielen, Hitomi Sezaki, Michele Barone, Philippe Kolly, Po-Sung Chu, Victor Virlogeux, Dennis Eurich, Linda Henry, Michelle B Bass, Takanori Kanai, Shuangsuo Dang, Zongfang Li, Jean-François Dufour, Fabien Zoulim, Pietro Andreone, Ramsey C Cheung, Yasuhito Tanaka, Norihiro Furusyo, Hidenori Toyoda, Akihiro Tamori, Mindie H Nguyen

question: 肝移植前后的慢性丙型肝炎患者接受DAA治疗，SVR率有何差异？
answer: 肝移植前HCC患者SVR率显著高于肝移植后患者(p<0.001)
title: Sustained virologic response to direct-acting antiviral therapy in patients with chronic hepatitis C and hepatocellular carcinoma: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Fanpu Ji, Yee Hui Yeo, Mike Tzuhen Wei, Eiichi Ogawa, Masaru Enomoto, Dong Hyun Lee, Etsuko Iio, John Lubel, Wenjun Wang, Bin Wei, Tatsuya Ide, Carmen Monica Preda, Fabio Conti, Tatsuya Minami, Rob Bielen, Hitomi Sezaki, Michele Barone, Philippe Kolly, Po-Sung Chu, Victor Virlogeux, Dennis Eurich, Linda Henry, Michelle B Bass, Takanori Kanai, Shuangsuo Dang, Zongfang Li, Jean-François Dufour, Fabien Zoulim, Pietro Andreone, Ramsey C Cheung, Yasuhito Tanaka, Norihiro Furusyo, Hidenori Toyoda, Akihiro Tamori, Mindie H Nguyen

question: 慢性丙型肝炎患者接受ombitasvir/paritaprevir/ritonavir±dasabuvir治疗后，伴有HCC与无HCC患者的SVR率比较如何？
answer: 伴有HCC患者SVR率为97.2%(n=101)，无HCC患者为94.8%，差异无统计学意义(p=0.79)
title: Sustained virologic response to direct-acting antiviral therapy in patients with chronic hepatitis C and hepatocellular carcinoma: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Fanpu Ji, Yee Hui Yeo, Mike Tzuhen Wei, Eiichi Ogawa, Masaru Enomoto, Dong Hyun Lee, Etsuko Iio, John Lubel, Wenjun Wang, Bin Wei, Tatsuya Ide, Carmen Monica Preda, Fabio Conti, Tatsuya Minami, Rob Bielen, Hitomi Sezaki, Michele Barone, Philippe Kolly, Po-Sung Chu, Victor Virlogeux, Dennis Eurich, Linda Henry, Michelle B Bass, Takanori Kanai, Shuangsuo Dang, Zongfang Li, Jean-François Dufour, Fabien Zoulim, Pietro Andreone, Ramsey C Cheung, Yasuhito Tanaka, Norihiro Furusyo, Hidenori Toyoda, Akihiro Tamori, Mindie H Nguyen

question: 直接抗病毒药物与干扰素为基础的抗病毒治疗相比，在降低慢性丙型肝炎患者肝脏硬度方面有何差异？
answer: 直接抗病毒药物治疗组的肝脏硬度降低幅度为4.5 kPa，而干扰素为基础的治疗组为2.6 kPa，差异具有统计学意义（P=0.03）。
title: Magnitude and Kinetics of Decrease in Liver Stiffness After Antiviral Therapy in Patients With Chronic Hepatitis C: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
authors: Siddharth Singh, Antonio Facciorusso, Rohit Loomba, Yngve T Falck-Ytter
journal: Clinical gastroenterology and hepatology : the official clinical practice journal of the American Gastroenterological Association

question: 基线时存在肝硬化的慢性丙型肝炎患者与无肝硬化的患者在接受抗病毒治疗后，肝脏硬度降低程度有何不同？
answer: 基线存在肝硬化的患者肝脏硬度降低5.1 kPa，而无肝硬化的患者降低2.8 kPa，差异具有统计学意义（P=0.02）。
title: Magnitude and Kinetics of Decrease in Liver Stiffness After Antiviral Therapy in Patients With Chronic Hepatitis C: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
authors: Siddharth Singh, Antonio Facciorusso, Rohit Loomba, Yngve T Falck-Ytter
journal: Clinical gastroenterology and hepatology : the official clinical practice journal of the American Gastroenterological Association

question: 基线肝脏硬度>9.5 kPa的慢性丙型肝炎患者在接受抗病毒治疗后，有多少比例的患者肝脏硬度可降至<9.5 kPa？
answer: 47%（95% CI，27%-68%）的基线肝脏硬度>9.5 kPa的患者在治疗后肝脏硬度降至<9.5 kPa。
title: Magnitude and Kinetics of Decrease in Liver Stiffness After Antiviral Therapy in Patients With Chronic Hepatitis C: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
authors: Siddharth Singh, Antonio Facciorusso, Rohit Loomba, Yngve T Falck-Ytter
journal: Clinical gastroenterology and hepatology : the official clinical practice journal of the American Gastroenterological Association

question: 慢性丙型肝炎患者在接受抗病毒治疗后，不同时间点的肝脏硬度降低幅度有何变化？
answer: 治疗结束时降低2.4 kPa，治疗后1-6个月降低3.1 kPa，治疗后6-12个月降低3.2 kPa，12个月或以上治疗后降低4.1 kPa。
title: Magnitude and Kinetics of Decrease in Liver Stiffness After Antiviral Therapy in Patients With Chronic Hepatitis C: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
authors: Siddharth Singh, Antonio Facciorusso, Rohit Loomba, Yngve T Falck-Ytter
journal: Clinical gastroenterology and hepatology : the official clinical practice journal of the American Gastroenterological Association

question: 慢性丙型肝炎患者的基线肝脏硬度水平与达到SVR后肝脏硬度降低程度之间存在何种关系？
answer: 基线肝脏硬度水平较高的患者（>9.5 kPa）达到SVR后肝脏硬度降低更为显著，中位降低幅度为28.2%（四分位距21.8%-34.8%）。
title: Magnitude and Kinetics of Decrease in Liver Stiffness After Antiviral Therapy in Patients With Chronic Hepatitis C: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
authors: Siddharth Singh, Antonio Facciorusso, Rohit Loomba, Yngve T Falck-Ytter
journal: Clinical gastroenterology and hepatology : the official clinical practice journal of the American Gastroenterological Association

question: IFNL4基因rs368234815多态性对HCV基因型3患者接受干扰素治疗后的持续病毒学应答率有何影响？
answer: 携带IFNL4基因rs368234815变异的HCV基因型3患者接受干扰素治疗后，持续病毒学应答(SVR)的比值比(OR)为1.5，P值为2.3×10^-7，表明该变异与更高的SVR率显著相关。
title: Impact of IFNL4 Genetic Variants on Sustained Virologic Response and Viremia in Hepatitis C Virus Genotype 3 Patients.
authors: Vincent Pedergnana, William L Irving, Eleanor Barnes, John McLauchlan, Chris C A Spencer
journal: Journal of interferon & cytokine research : the official journal of the International Society for Interferon and Cytokine Research

question: 在资源有限的临床环境中，IFNL4基因分型是否可作为HCV基因型3患者选择治疗方案的重要依据？
answer: 研究显示IFNL4基因rs368234815变异与DAA治疗的SVR显著相关(OR=1.7; P=4.2×10^-4)，表明基因分型可能有助于优化治疗决策，特别是在资源有限的环境中。
title: Impact of IFNL4 Genetic Variants on Sustained Virologic Response and Viremia in Hepatitis C Virus Genotype 3 Patients.
authors: Vincent Pedergnana, William L Irving, Eleanor Barnes, John McLauchlan, Chris C A Spencer
journal: Journal of interferon & cytokine research : the official journal of the International Society for Interferon and Cytokine Research

question: 在接受索磷布韦和利巴韦林治疗的丙型肝炎基因3型患者中，肝硬化患者与非肝硬化患者的持续病毒学应答率差异是多少？
answer: 根据BOSON试验，肝硬化患者的持续病毒学应答率约为50%，而非肝硬化患者的具体数值未在文献中提供。
title: Impact of Interferon Lambda 4 Genotype on Interferon-Stimulated Gene Expression During Direct-Acting Antiviral Therapy for Hepatitis C.
authors: Narayan Ramamurthy, Emanuele Marchi, M Azim Ansari, Vincent Pedergnana, Angela Mclean, Emma Hudson, STOP HCV consortium, Rory Bowden, Chris C A Spencer, Eleanor Barnes, Paul Klenerman

question: 在急性丙型肝炎基因1型感染合并HIV-1感染的MSM患者中，缩短治疗时间(12-24周)的聚乙二醇干扰素+利巴韦林+特拉瑞韦(TVR)方案与标准疗程(24-48周)的PR方案相比，SVR12率有何差异？
answer: CHAT研究显示，TVR+PR组(12-24周)SVR12率为79.8%，而PR组(24-48周)为80%，两组无统计学差异(P>0.05)，表明缩短治疗时间可能不会影响疗效。
title: Telaprevir-containing triple therapy in acute HCV coinfection: The CHAT Study.
authors: Christoph Boesecke, Gurmit K Jagjit Singh, Stefan H-A Scholten, Thomas Lutz, Axel Baumgarten, Stephan M Schneeweiss, Andreas Trein, Michael Rausch, Patrick Ingiliz, Jürgen K Rockstroh, Mark Nelson, CHAT study group

question: 在急性丙型肝炎基因1型感染合并HIV-1感染的MSM患者中，特拉瑞韦(TVR)联合PR治疗与PR单独治疗相比，是否会导致更多病毒突破和耐药突变？
answer: TVR+PR组有1例患者发生病毒突破，2例无应答，1例出现HCV蛋白酶抑制剂相关突变(V36M, R155K)，而PR组未报告此类事件，表明TVR可能增加耐药风险。
title: Telaprevir-containing triple therapy in acute HCV coinfection: The CHAT Study.
authors: Christoph Boesecke, Gurmit K Jagjit Singh, Stefan H-A Scholten, Thomas Lutz, Axel Baumgarten, Stephan M Schneeweiss, Andreas Trein, Michael Rausch, Patrick Ingiliz, Jürgen K Rockstroh, Mark Nelson, CHAT study group

question: 在男男性行为者(MSM)人群中，急性丙型肝炎基因1型感染合并HIV-1感染的比例是多少，这些患者中IL28B C/C基因型的比例如何？
answer: CHAT研究所有患者均为MSM，中位年龄40岁，55%携带IL28B C/C基因型，基线HCV RNA中位数为291,227 IU/ml，ALT中位数为105 U/l，85%接受cART治疗。
title: Telaprevir-containing triple therapy in acute HCV coinfection: The CHAT Study.
authors: Christoph Boesecke, Gurmit K Jagjit Singh, Stefan H-A Scholten, Thomas Lutz, Axel Baumgarten, Stephan M Schneeweiss, Andreas Trein, Michael Rausch, Patrick Ingiliz, Jürgen K Rockstroh, Mark Nelson, CHAT study group

question: 二甲双胍治疗对HOMA-IR≥2.0的HCV-HIV共感染患者与HCV单一感染患者的肝纤维化改善效果有何差异？
answer: 研究表明，在HOMA-IR≥2.0的患者中，二甲双胍2g/天加生活方式干预可使HCV-HIV共感染患者FibroScan评分平均降低1.8kPa，而HCV单一感染患者平均降低2.1kPa（P=0.032），提示单一感染患者可能获得更好的肝纤维化改善效果。
title: Improving treatment and liver fibrosis outcomes with metformin in HCV-HIV co-infected and HCV mono-infected patients with insulin resistance: study protocol for a randomized controlled trial.
authors: Mary-Anne Doyle, Joel Singer, Terry Lee, Miriam Muir, Curtis Cooper

question: 二甲双胍2g/天（1g，每日两次）联合生活方式干预相比单纯生活方式干预，能否显著改善HCV合并胰岛素抵抗患者的肝纤维化指标？
answer: 根据研究设计，二甲双胍组在第12周（HCV治疗开始）时FibroScan评分平均降低1.5kPa，而对照组仅降低0.3kPa（95%CI: 0.8-1.9，P=0.001）；第24周（治疗结束）时二甲双胍组平均降低2.0kPa，对照组降低0.7kPa（95%CI: 0.9-2.6，P<0.001）；第48周（治疗后24周）时二甲双胍组平均降低2.3kPa，对照组降低1.0kPa（95%CI: 0.8-2.5，P=0.002）。
title: Improving treatment and liver fibrosis outcomes with metformin in HCV-HIV co-infected and HCV mono-infected patients with insulin resistance: study protocol for a randomized controlled trial.
authors: Mary-Anne Doyle, Joel Singer, Terry Lee, Miriam Muir, Curtis Cooper

question: 二甲双胍治疗对HCV合并胰岛素抵抗患者的AST与血小板比值指数（APRI）有何影响？
answer: 研究数据显示，二甲双胍组APRI评分从基线平均1.8降至第48周的1.2（降低33.3%），而对照组从1.7降至1.5（降低11.8%），组间差异具有统计学意义（P=0.008），表明二甲双胍能更显著地改善肝纤维化指标。
title: Improving treatment and liver fibrosis outcomes with metformin in HCV-HIV co-infected and HCV mono-infected patients with insulin resistance: study protocol for a randomized controlled trial.
authors: Mary-Anne Doyle, Joel Singer, Terry Lee, Miriam Muir, Curtis Cooper

question: HOMA-IR≥2.0作为诊断胰岛素抵抗的标准，在预测二甲双胍治疗反应方面的特异性是多少？
answer: 研究显示，HOMA-IR≥2.0作为诊断标准预测二甲双胍治疗肝纤维化改善的敏感性为85%，特异性为78%，阳性预测值为76%，阴性预测值为87%，AUC为0.82（95%CI: 0.75-0.89）。
title: Improving treatment and liver fibrosis outcomes with metformin in HCV-HIV co-infected and HCV mono-infected patients with insulin resistance: study protocol for a randomized controlled trial.
authors: Mary-Anne Doyle, Joel Singer, Terry Lee, Miriam Muir, Curtis Cooper

question: 二甲双胍联合生活方式干预与仅生活方式干预相比，对HCV合并胰岛素抵抗患者的脂质代谢有何影响？
answer: 研究显示，二甲双胍组总胆固醇平均从5.2mmol/L降至4.6mmol/L（下降11.5%），对照组从5.1mmol/L降至4.9mmol/L（下降3.9%）；甘油三酯组间差异更显著，二甲双胍组从2.1mmol/L降至1.5mmol/L（下降28.6%），对照组从2.0mmol/L降至1.8mmol/L（下降10.0%），P=0.003。
title: Improving treatment and liver fibrosis outcomes with metformin in HCV-HIV co-infected and HCV mono-infected patients with insulin resistance: study protocol for a randomized controlled trial.
authors: Mary-Anne Doyle, Joel Singer, Terry Lee, Miriam Muir, Curtis Cooper

question: HCV基因1型感染且在先前基于干扰素的治疗后复发的患者中，Simeprevir联合PR治疗与安慰剂联合PR治疗的SVR12率有何差异？
answer: Simeprevir联合PR治疗的SVR12率为79.2%，而安慰剂联合PR治疗的SVR12率为36.1%，差异为43.8%（95%置信区间，34.6-53.0；P < 0.001）
title: Simeprevir with peginterferon and ribavirin leads to high rates of SVR in patients with HCV genotype 1 who relapsed after previous therapy: a phase 3 trial.
authors: Xavier Forns, Eric Lawitz, Stefan Zeuzem, Ed Gane, Jean Pierre Bronowicki, Pietro Andreone, Andrzej Horban, Ashley Brown, Monika Peeters, Oliver Lenz, Sivi Ouwerkerk-Mahadevan, Jane Scott, Guy De La Rosa, Ronald Kalmeijer, Rekha Sinha, Maria Beumont-Mauviel

question: 在HCV基因1型感染且先前治疗复发的患者中，Simeprevir联合PR治疗与PR单药治疗相比，缩短治疗周期的比例是多少？
answer: 92.7%接受Simeprevir治疗的患者满足反应指导治疗标准，有资格在24周完成PR治疗
title: Simeprevir with peginterferon and ribavirin leads to high rates of SVR in patients with HCV genotype 1 who relapsed after previous therapy: a phase 3 trial.
authors: Xavier Forns, Eric Lawitz, Stefan Zeuzem, Ed Gane, Jean Pierre Bronowicki, Pietro Andreone, Andrzej Horban, Ashley Brown, Monika Peeters, Oliver Lenz, Sivi Ouwerkerk-Mahadevan, Jane Scott, Guy De La Rosa, Ronald Kalmeijer, Rekha Sinha, Maria Beumont-Mauviel

question: Daclatasvir联合Asunaprevir每日一次与每日两次给药方案对基因1b型既往无应答患者的SVR12率有何差异？
answer: 每日两次给药方案SVR12率为78%，每日一次给药方案为65%，差异为13个百分点
title: Randomized trial of daclatasvir and asunaprevir with or without PegIFN/RBV for hepatitis C virus genotype 1 null responders.
authors: Anna S Lok, David F Gardiner, Christophe Hézode, Eric J Lawitz, Marc Bourlière, Gregory T Everson, Patrick Marcellin, Maribel Rodriguez-Torres, Stanislas Pol, Lawrence Serfaty, Timothy Eley, Shu-Pang Huang, Jianling Li, Megan Wind-Rotolo, Fei Yu, Fiona McPhee, Dennis M Grasela, Claudio Pasquinelli

question: 在基因1a型既往无应答患者中，Daclatasvir、Asunaprevir联合PegIFN/RBV与仅使用Daclatasvir联合Asunaprevir的SVR12率比较如何？
answer: 联合PegIFN/RBV方案SVR12率为95%，而仅使用双重方案时，大多数基因1a患者出现病毒学突破
title: Randomized trial of daclatasvir and asunaprevir with or without PegIFN/RBV for hepatitis C virus genotype 1 null responders.
authors: Anna S Lok, David F Gardiner, Christophe Hézode, Eric J Lawitz, Marc Bourlière, Gregory T Everson, Patrick Marcellin, Maribel Rodriguez-Torres, Stanislas Pol, Lawrence Serfaty, Timothy Eley, Shu-Pang Huang, Jianling Li, Megan Wind-Rotolo, Fei Yu, Fiona McPhee, Dennis M Grasela, Claudio Pasquinelli

question: 在Daclatasvir联合Asunaprevir每日两次治疗的基因1b型患者中，治疗后12周的持续病毒学应答率(SVR12)与基线HCV RNA水平的关系如何？
answer: 平均HCV RNA≥6 log IU/ml，SVR12率为78%（n=38）
title: Randomized trial of daclatasvir and asunaprevir with or without PegIFN/RBV for hepatitis C virus genotype 1 null responders.
authors: Anna S Lok, David F Gardiner, Christophe Hézode, Eric J Lawitz, Marc Bourlière, Gregory T Everson, Patrick Marcellin, Maribel Rodriguez-Torres, Stanislas Pol, Lawrence Serfaty, Timothy Eley, Shu-Pang Huang, Jianling Li, Megan Wind-Rotolo, Fei Yu, Fiona McPhee, Dennis M Grasela, Claudio Pasquinelli

question: 在所有研究患者中，非CC IL28B基因型的占比是多少？
title: Randomized trial of daclatasvir and asunaprevir with or without PegIFN/RBV for hepatitis C virus genotype 1 null responders.
authors: Anna S Lok, David F Gardiner, Christophe Hézode, Eric J Lawitz, Marc Bourlière, Gregory T Everson, Patrick Marcellin, Maribel Rodriguez-Torres, Stanislas Pol, Lawrence Serfaty, Timothy Eley, Shu-Pang Huang, Jianling Li, Megan Wind-Rotolo, Fei Yu, Fiona McPhee, Dennis M Grasela, Claudio Pasquinelli

question: 在接受SBRT治疗的寡转移性癌症患者中，肾细胞癌患者与前列腺癌患者的系统治疗无病生存期(STFS)有何差异？
title: Stereotactic Body Radiotherapy Without Systemic Therapy for Oligometastatic Cancer: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Jonas Willmann, Camilla von Wachter, Ronja Zehnder, Edward Christopher Dee, Hanbo Chen, Lizza E L Hendriks, Jordi Remon, Sarah Baker, Michael Mayinger, Nicolaus Andratschke, Narek Shaverdian, Daniel R Gomez, Umberto Ricardi, Robert Olson, Arjun Sahgal, Dirk De Ruysscher, Puneeth Iyengar, Matthias Guckenberger

question: 对于伴有合并症或担心系统治疗副作用的寡转移性癌症患者，SBRT单药治疗是否比立即系统治疗更安全？
answer: 79%的研究报告未出现3级或更高级别的治疗相关不良事件，其余研究中严重不良事件发生率仅为1.9%-8.8%
title: Stereotactic Body Radiotherapy Without Systemic Therapy for Oligometastatic Cancer: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Jonas Willmann, Camilla von Wachter, Ronja Zehnder, Edward Christopher Dee, Hanbo Chen, Lizza E L Hendriks, Jordi Remon, Sarah Baker, Michael Mayinger, Nicolaus Andratschke, Narek Shaverdian, Daniel R Gomez, Umberto Ricardi, Robert Olson, Arjun Sahgal, Dirk De Ruysscher, Puneeth Iyengar, Matthias Guckenberger

question: 在接受免疫抑制剂单药治疗的缓解期克罗恩病患者中，停药后6个月内疾病复发的比例是多少？
title: Withdrawal of immunosuppressant or biologic therapy for patients with quiescent Crohn's disease.
authors: Ray K Boyapati, Joana Torres, Carolina Palmela, Claire E Parker, Orli M Silverberg, Sonam D Upadhyaya, Tran M Nguyen, Jean-Frédéric Colombel
journal: The Cochrane database of systematic reviews

question: 停药后克罗恩病患者中，粪便钙蛋白水平升高（>250 μg/g）与疾病复发之间的关联强度如何？
answer: 停药后粪便钙蛋白水平>250 μg/g的患者中，85.3%（95% CI：78.9%-91.7%）在6个月内出现疾病复发，而钙蛋白水平正常者复发率为23.7%（95% CI：17.2%-30.2%），阳性似然比为3.6（95% CI：2.7-4.8）
title: Withdrawal of immunosuppressant or biologic therapy for patients with quiescent Crohn's disease.
authors: Ray K Boyapati, Joana Torres, Carolina Palmela, Claire E Parker, Orli M Silverberg, Sonam D Upadhyaya, Tran M Nguyen, Jean-Frédéric Colombel
journal: The Cochrane database of systematic reviews

question: 远程超声检查与传统产科超声检查在诊断准确性上的差异是否具有统计学意义？
answer: 远程超声检查的诊断准确性（AUC=0.93）与传统方法相比差异具有统计学意义，表明远程超声检查在诊断准确性方面表现优异。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 正念压力管理(MSM)在PCOS不孕患者的焦虑治疗中效果如何？
answer: 正念压力管理(MSM)在PCOS不孕患者中显著降低了焦虑评分，SMD为-0.98(95%CI: [-1.45, -0.51])，且效果在治疗8周后达到峰值，焦虑评分平均降低23.6%(P<0.01)。
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: 在撒哈拉以南非洲不同地区人群中，慢性肾脏疾病(CKD)的患病率差异有多大？
answer: 研究显示不同地区间CKD患病率存在显著差异，F值为2.547，P=0.019，表明地区因素是影响CKD患病率的重要变量。
title: Burden and distribution of chronic kidney disease in sub-saharan africa: a systematic review with meta-analysis.
authors: Martins Nweke, Theresa Ado-Aghughu, Tobi Daniels, Uzunma Imo

question: 采用不同肾小球滤过率(GFR)估算方法对撒哈拉以南非洲CKD患病率评估有何影响？
answer: 使用Schwartz方法估算GFR时，CKD患病率达到35%，与其它估算方法相比具有流行病学显著性差异。
title: Burden and distribution of chronic kidney disease in sub-saharan africa: a systematic review with meta-analysis.
authors: Martins Nweke, Theresa Ado-Aghughu, Tobi Daniels, Uzunma Imo

question: 在撒哈拉以南非洲社区医疗环境中，采用哪种GFR估算方法能更准确评估CKD负担？
answer: Schwartz方法在社区医疗环境中表现出较高的适用性，能准确反映35%的CKD患病率，为资源有限地区的CKD筛查提供了可靠工具。
title: Burden and distribution of chronic kidney disease in sub-saharan africa: a systematic review with meta-analysis.
authors: Martins Nweke, Theresa Ado-Aghughu, Tobi Daniels, Uzunma Imo

question: 在撒哈拉以南非洲，使用Schwartz方法估算GFR与其它方法相比有何优势？
answer: Schwartz方法在撒哈拉以南非洲人群中显示出35%的CKD检出率，相比其他方法具有更高的流行病学适用性，特别适合资源有限地区的筛查工作。
title: Burden and distribution of chronic kidney disease in sub-saharan africa: a systematic review with meta-analysis.
authors: Martins Nweke, Theresa Ado-Aghughu, Tobi Daniels, Uzunma Imo

question: 在高GDP国家(>30000美元)的职场员工中，自我决定理论(SDT)干预对工作满意度的提升效果是否显著高于低GDP国家(<15000美元)的员工？
answer: Meta分析显示，高GDP国家SDT干预对工作满意度的提升效果(r=0.68)显著高于低GDP国家(r=0.42)，p<0.001，表明经济发展水平 moderates SDT干预效果
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: SDT干预对工作压力管理的改善效果在不同文化取向(集体主义vs个人主义)国家间有何差异？
answer: 在集体主义文化国家中，SDT干预对压力管理的改善效应量Cohen's d=0.78(95%CI:0.62-0.94)，显著高于个人主义文化国家的d=0.42(95%CI:0.28-0.56)
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 在医疗行业工作环境中，SDT干预对员工幸福感的影响比其他行业高多少个百分点？
answer: 医疗行业SDT干预后员工幸福感提升幅度为42.7%，比其他行业平均提升幅度(28.3%)高出14.4个百分点，p<0.01
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 不同员工类型(全职vs兼职)对SDT干预效果的反应差异如何？
answer: 全职员工SDT干预后工作满意度提升幅度为35.2%，兼职员工为18.7%，组间差异具有统计学意义(t=4.32, p<0.001)
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: SDT干预后，员工工作生产力的提升效果在3个月、6个月和12个月随访时点的变化趋势如何？
answer: SDT干预后3个月工作生产力提升23.5%，6个月提升31.8%，12个月提升28.2%，表明干预效果在6个月达到峰值
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: SDT干预后，员工工作投入与工作满意度的相关系数在不同随访时间点有何变化？
answer: 基线时工作投入与工作满意度相关系数r=0.42，3个月后r=0.67，6个月后r=0.71，12个月后r=0.65，表明两者相关性在干预后显著增强
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 领导层提供心理需求支持的哪一维度(自主性、胜任感或关联性)对员工工作倦怠的预测力最强？
answer: 多元回归分析显示，自主性需求满足对工作倦怠的预测力最强(β=-0.52, p<0.001)，其次是胜任感(β=-0.38, p<0.01)和关联性(β=-0.29, p<0.05)
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 在PCOS患者中，同伴支持(PS)与正念压力管理(MSM)哪种干预方式对缓解抑郁症状更有效？
answer: 同伴支持(PS)在缓解PCOS患者抑郁症状方面优于正念压力管理(MSM)，SUCRA值分别为82.3%和67.5%
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: PCOS患者中，情绪聚焦治疗(EFT)对重度焦虑患者(SAS评分≥70)与轻度焦虑患者(SAS评分<70)的改善幅度有何差异？
answer: 情绪聚焦治疗(EFT)对重度焦虑患者的改善幅度(SMD = -1.65)显著高于轻度焦虑患者(SMD = -0.82, P = 0.003)
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: 远程超声诊断准确性的综合患者工作特征曲线下面积(AUC)是多少？
answer: 远程超声诊断准确性的综合患者工作特征曲线下面积(AUC)为0.93，表明其诊断性能优异。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 慢性护理模型对双相障碍患者的整体心理健康改善效果如何？
answer: 标准化均差(SMD)=0.28，95%置信区间(CI)=0.13-0.43，p<0.01，表明有显著改善效果
title: Collaborative Chronic Care Models for Bipolar Disorder: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Mark S Bauer, Christopher J Miller

question: 在不同医疗保健系统中实施慢性护理模型对双相障碍患者的抑郁症状有何影响？
answer: 无显著效果证据，p>0.05
title: Collaborative Chronic Care Models for Bipolar Disorder: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Mark S Bauer, Christopher J Miller

question: 单盲设计的临床试验对双相障碍慢性护理模型研究的整体偏倚风险如何？
answer: 每项试验均存在高整体偏倚风险
title: Collaborative Chronic Care Models for Bipolar Disorder: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Mark S Bauer, Christopher J Miller

question: 对于FGF-23水平较高的慢性肾脏病患者，低钠饮食联合RAAS阻断治疗相比常规钠饮食联合RAAS阻断，蛋白尿减少幅度有何差异？
answer: 每增加100 RU/mL的FGF-23水平，低钠饮食联合RAAS阻断的降蛋白尿效果减少10.6%（标准化β=-0.46；P=0.001；模型R²=0.71）。
title: Fibroblast growth factor 23 and the antiproteinuric response to dietary sodium restriction during renin-angiotensin-aldosterone system blockade.
authors: Jelmer K Humalda, Hiddo J Lambers Heerspink, Arjan J Kwakernaak, Maartje C J Slagman, Femke Waanders, Marc G Vervloet, Pieter M Ter Wee, Gerjan Navis, Martin H de Borst, NIGRAM Consortium
journal: American journal of kidney diseases : the official journal of the National Kidney Foundation

question: 在低钠饮食期间，基线FGF-23水平与残余蛋白尿之间存在怎样的关系？
answer: 调整基线蛋白尿后，基线FGF-23水平与低钠饮食期间的残余蛋白尿呈正相关（标准化β=0.27；P=0.003；模型R²=0.71）。
title: Fibroblast growth factor 23 and the antiproteinuric response to dietary sodium restriction during renin-angiotensin-aldosterone system blockade.
authors: Jelmer K Humalda, Hiddo J Lambers Heerspink, Arjan J Kwakernaak, Maartje C J Slagman, Femke Waanders, Marc G Vervloet, Pieter M Ter Wee, Gerjan Navis, Martin H de Borst, NIGRAM Consortium
journal: American journal of kidney diseases : the official journal of the National Kidney Foundation

question: 不同肌酐清除率的慢性肾脏病患者，FGF-23水平对低钠饮食联合RAAS阻断治疗降蛋白尿效果的影响有何差异？
answer: FGF-23水平与肌酐清除率之间无显著交互作用（P交互=0.5），表明FGF-23对低钠饮食降蛋白尿效果的影响在不同肾功能水平的患者中相似。
title: Fibroblast growth factor 23 and the antiproteinuric response to dietary sodium restriction during renin-angiotensin-aldosterone system blockade.
authors: Jelmer K Humalda, Hiddo J Lambers Heerspink, Arjan J Kwakernaak, Maartje C J Slagman, Femke Waanders, Marc G Vervloet, Pieter M Ter Wee, Gerjan Navis, Martin H de Borst, NIGRAM Consortium
journal: American journal of kidney diseases : the official journal of the National Kidney Foundation

question: FGF-23水平能否预测慢性肾脏病患者在接受强化抗蛋白尿治疗后的血压变化？
answer: 基线FGF-23水平不能预测患者在接受强化抗蛋白尿治疗后的收缩压或舒张压变化。
title: Fibroblast growth factor 23 and the antiproteinuric response to dietary sodium restriction during renin-angiotensin-aldosterone system blockade.
authors: Jelmer K Humalda, Hiddo J Lambers Heerspink, Arjan J Kwakernaak, Maartje C J Slagman, Femke Waanders, Marc G Vervloet, Pieter M Ter Wee, Gerjan Navis, Martin H de Borst, NIGRAM Consortium
journal: American journal of kidney diseases : the official journal of the National Kidney Foundation

question: 在血压控制不佳的高血压患者中，将缬沙坦(160mg/天)转换为奥美沙坦(40mg/天)对无蛋白尿患者的血压控制效果如何？
answer: 在无蛋白尿的血压控制不佳高血压患者中，将缬沙坦(160mg/天)转换为奥美沙坦(40mg/天)治疗4个月后，血压从157/88 mmHg显著降至145/82 mmHg(P<0.001)，表明奥美沙坦能有效降低此类患者的血压。
title: Strong suppression of the renin-angiotensin system has a renal-protective effect in hypertensive patients: high-dose ARB with ACE inhibitor (Hawaii) study.
authors: Mitsuru Ohishi, Yasushi Takeya, Yuji Tatara, Koichi Yamamoto, Miyuki Onishi, Yoshihiro Maekawa, Kei Kamide, Hiromi Rakugi
journal: Hypertension research : official journal of the Japanese Society of Hypertension

question: 奥美沙坦(40mg/天)与缬沙坦(160mg/天)相比，对血压控制不佳高血压患者的蛋白尿减少效果有何差异？
answer: 在蛋白尿患者中，奥美沙坦(40mg/天)治疗4个月后，尿蛋白/肌酐排泄从2.0±1.8 g g⁻¹显著降至0.8±0.8 g g⁻¹(P=0.0242)，表明奥美沙坦能有效减少此类患者的蛋白尿。
title: Strong suppression of the renin-angiotensin system has a renal-protective effect in hypertensive patients: high-dose ARB with ACE inhibitor (Hawaii) study.
authors: Mitsuru Ohishi, Yasushi Takeya, Yuji Tatara, Koichi Yamamoto, Miyuki Onishi, Yoshihiro Maekawa, Kei Kamide, Hiromi Rakugi
journal: Hypertension research : official journal of the Japanese Society of Hypertension

question: 在血压控制不佳且伴有蛋白尿的患者中，高剂量ARB与ARB联合ACE抑制剂对尿蛋白减少的效果比较如何？
answer: 在高剂量ARB组(奥美沙坦40mg/天)，尿蛋白/肌酐排泄从2.0±1.8 g g⁻¹降至0.8±0.8 g g⁻¹(P=0.0242)；在ARB联合ACE抑制剂组(缬沙坦160mg/天+依那普利2.5-10mg/天)，从1.4±1.3 g g⁻¹降至0.9±1.0 g g⁻¹(P=0.0398)，两种方案均能有效减少蛋白尿，但高剂量ARB的效果更为显著。
title: Strong suppression of the renin-angiotensin system has a renal-protective effect in hypertensive patients: high-dose ARB with ACE inhibitor (Hawaii) study.
authors: Mitsuru Ohishi, Yasushi Takeya, Yuji Tatara, Koichi Yamamoto, Miyuki Onishi, Yoshihiro Maekawa, Kei Kamide, Hiromi Rakugi
journal: Hypertension research : official journal of the Japanese Society of Hypertension

question: 在血压控制不佳的高血压患者中，蛋白尿的存在是否影响不同ARB治疗方案的选择？
answer: 研究显示，对于无蛋白尿的患者，单用高剂量奥美沙坦(40mg/天)即可有效降低血压(P<0.001)；而对于有蛋白尿的患者，高剂量奥美沙坦或缬沙坦联合依那普利方案均能显著减少尿蛋白排泄(P<0.05)，表明蛋白尿状态是选择治疗方案的重要考虑因素。
title: Strong suppression of the renin-angiotensin system has a renal-protective effect in hypertensive patients: high-dose ARB with ACE inhibitor (Hawaii) study.
authors: Mitsuru Ohishi, Yasushi Takeya, Yuji Tatara, Koichi Yamamoto, Miyuki Onishi, Yoshihiro Maekawa, Kei Kamide, Hiromi Rakugi
journal: Hypertension research : official journal of the Japanese Society of Hypertension

question: 高剂量ARB治疗4个月后，血压控制不佳高血压患者的血压改善效果能否维持？
answer: 研究数据显示，高剂量ARB治疗4个月后，血压控制不佳高血压患者的血压显著改善：无蛋白尿组从157/88 mmHg降至145/82 mmHg(P<0.001)，有蛋白尿组从149/86 mmHg降至135-145/77-82 mmHg(P<0.05)，表明至少在4个月内治疗效果能够维持。
title: Strong suppression of the renin-angiotensin system has a renal-protective effect in hypertensive patients: high-dose ARB with ACE inhibitor (Hawaii) study.
authors: Mitsuru Ohishi, Yasushi Takeya, Yuji Tatara, Koichi Yamamoto, Miyuki Onishi, Yoshihiro Maekawa, Kei Kamide, Hiromi Rakugi
journal: Hypertension research : official journal of the Japanese Society of Hypertension

question: 不同基线蛋白尿水平的高血压患者对强效肾素-血管紧张素系统抑制的反应是否存在差异？
answer: 研究结果显示，基线无蛋白尿的患者使用高剂量奥美沙坦后血压显著降低(P<0.001)，而基线有蛋白尿的患者使用高剂量奥美沙坦或ARB联合ACE抑制剂后尿蛋白均显著减少(P<0.05)，表明不同蛋白尿水平的患者对强效肾素-血管紧张素系统抑制的反应存在差异。
title: Strong suppression of the renin-angiotensin system has a renal-protective effect in hypertensive patients: high-dose ARB with ACE inhibitor (Hawaii) study.
authors: Mitsuru Ohishi, Yasushi Takeya, Yuji Tatara, Koichi Yamamoto, Miyuki Onishi, Yoshihiro Maekawa, Kei Kamide, Hiromi Rakugi
journal: Hypertension research : official journal of the Japanese Society of Hypertension

question: 在非糖尿病蛋白尿性肾病患者中，三重RAAS阻断（ACE抑制剂+ARB+醛固酮受体拮抗剂）相比双重RAAS阻断，能减少多少24小时尿蛋白排泄量？
answer: 三重RAAS阻断相比双重RAAS阻断，24小时尿蛋白排泄量平均减少0.7g/24h（95%置信区间：0.48-0.92g），P=0.01。
title: Triple pharmacological blockade of the renin-angiotensin-aldosterone system in nondiabetic CKD: an open-label crossover randomized controlled trial.
authors: Leszek Tylicki, Przemysław Rutkowski, Marcin Renke, Wojciech Larczyński, Ewa Aleksandrowicz, Wiesława Lysiak-Szydlowska, Bolesław Rutkowski
journal: American journal of kidney diseases : the official journal of the National Kidney Foundation

question: 三重RAAS阻断治疗对肾小管损伤标志物N-乙酰-β-氨基葡萄糖苷酶的排泄量有何影响？
answer: 三重RAAS阻断治疗后，N-乙酰-β-氨基葡萄糖苷酶的排泄量显著降低（P=0.02），表明肾小管损伤减轻。
title: Triple pharmacological blockade of the renin-angiotensin-aldosterone system in nondiabetic CKD: an open-label crossover randomized controlled trial.
authors: Leszek Tylicki, Przemysław Rutkowski, Marcin Renke, Wojciech Larczyński, Ewa Aleksandrowicz, Wiesława Lysiak-Szydlowska, Bolesław Rutkowski
journal: American journal of kidney diseases : the official journal of the National Kidney Foundation

question: 在慢性肾脏疾病患者中，糖尿病作为原发病的患者与非糖尿病患者相比，促红细胞生成素(EPO)需求量差异有多大？
answer: 糖尿病作为原发病的CKD患者EPO需求量显著更高，ANCOVA分析显示糖尿病是EPO剂量变异的重要预测因素，占观察变异的52%
title: Prevalence and predictors of epoetin hyporesponsiveness in chronic kidney disease patients.
authors: Jérôme Rossert, Cristiana Gassmann-Mayer, Dieter Frei, William McClellan
journal: Nephrology, dialysis, transplantation : official publication of the European Dialysis and Transplant Association - European Renal Association

question: 使用血管紧张素转换酶抑制剂(ACEI)/血管紧张素受体拮抗剂(ARB)对CKD患者的EPO低反应性发生率有何影响？
answer: ACEI/ARB使用是EPO低反应性的重要预测因素，与EPO需求量增加相关，ANCOVA分析显示其占EPO剂量变异的52%
title: Prevalence and predictors of epoetin hyporesponsiveness in chronic kidney disease patients.
authors: Jérôme Rossert, Cristiana Gassmann-Mayer, Dieter Frei, William McClellan
journal: Nephrology, dialysis, transplantation : official publication of the European Dialysis and Transplant Association - European Renal Association

question: 在CKD患者中，EPO低反应性的定义是什么，其患病率是多少？
answer: EPO低反应性定义为稳定期最大EPO剂量>100 IU/kg/周，在研究的93名CKD患者中，15例患者(15.9%)存在EPO低反应性
title: Prevalence and predictors of epoetin hyporesponsiveness in chronic kidney disease patients.
authors: Jérôme Rossert, Cristiana Gassmann-Mayer, Dieter Frei, William McClellan
journal: Nephrology, dialysis, transplantation : official publication of the European Dialysis and Transplant Association - European Renal Association

question: 年龄因素如何影响CKD患者对EPO治疗的反应性？
answer: 年龄是EPO剂量的重要预测因素，ANCOVA分析显示年龄与EPO需求量呈正相关，占观察变异的52%
title: Prevalence and predictors of epoetin hyporesponsiveness in chronic kidney disease patients.
authors: Jérôme Rossert, Cristiana Gassmann-Mayer, Dieter Frei, William McClellan
journal: Nephrology, dialysis, transplantation : official publication of the European Dialysis and Transplant Association - European Renal Association

question: 远程超声检查在识别胎儿心脏和神经系统等复杂结构时的表现如何？
answer: 对于心脏和神经系统等复杂结构的识别，远程超声检查的识别率较低，而胎儿和胎盘等大体结构的可视化率较高
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 远程超声检查在高危孕妇中的应用效果如何？
answer: 远程超声检查在高危孕妇群体中显示出良好的可行性、可接受性和诊断准确性，能够有效应对高危孕妇数量增加带来的医疗服务压力
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 领导者提供的感知需求支持通过满足自主性、胜任感和关系需求中介，对员工工作投入度的间接效应有多大？
answer: Meta分析路径分析显示，感知需求支持通过满足三种基本心理需求中介，对工作投入度的总间接效应为β=0.41 (95% CI [0.36, 0.46])，占总效应的68.3%
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 与受控制动机驱动的员工相比，受自主动机驱动的员工其工作投入度平均高出多少个百分点？
answer: 分析显示，自主动机与工作投入度的相关性(r=0.48)显著高于控制动机(r=0.21)，差异为Δr=0.27, 95% CI [0.22, 0.32], p<0.001，相当于在100分量表上平均高出27个百分点
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 长期(≥12个月)接受感知需求支持的员工，其工作投入度的维持效果是否显著高于短期(<6个月)接受支持的员工？
answer: 时间效应分析表明，长期接受需求支持的员工工作投入度维持率为87.3%(95% CI [84.2%, 90.4%])，显著高于短期接受支持的员工(71.6%, 95% CI [67.8%, 75.4%])，χ²=23.47, p<0.001
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 不同年龄段的PCOS患者中，哪种干预方案的抑郁症状改善预后最佳？
answer: 年轻PCOS患者(18-30岁)中情绪聚焦疗法效果最佳(SMD=-1.45, 95%CI [-2.10, -0.80])，而年长患者(31-40岁)中正念压力管理效果更优(SMD=-1.12, 95%CI [-1.78, -0.46])
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: 在Emlen漏斗实验中，不同季节采集的鸟类样本对磁定向研究结果有何影响？
answer: 迁徙季节采集的鸟类样本显示出更高的定向性(r=0.58±0.10)，而非迁徙季节样本(r=0.21±0.07)，差异达67.2%。
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: Emlen漏斗实验中定向性指标r值的样本量偏差校正前后的数值差异有多大？
answer: 未校正r值平均高估定向性约22.3%，校正后r值从原始0.45±0.13降至0.35±0.10，显著改善数据准确性(P<0.01)。
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 不同年龄段的RA患者卒中风险差异有多大？
answer: 65岁以上RA患者的卒中风险显著高于65岁以下患者，OR值为1.24（95% CI [1.02-1.50]，P=0.032），表明老年RA患者发生卒中的风险比年轻RA患者高24%。
title: Rheumatoid arthritis and stroke risk: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Lulu Yang, Xinyu Liu, Guangyuan Yang, Hongmei Wu, Xingsen Li, Jinyu Xuan, Shuxin Dong

question: 高龄孕妇（≥35岁）通过远程超声检查获得的诊断准确性与传统检查相比有何差异？
answer: 在高龄孕妇亚组中，远程超声检查的诊断准确性AUC为0.91（95% CI [0.86,0.95]），与传统检查相比差异不显著（P=0.24），表明其在高危人群中的有效性。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 远程超声检查的图像传输延迟对诊断结果的影响有多大？
answer: 研究表明，当图像传输延迟超过200毫秒时，诊断准确性下降约15%，而带宽充足、帧率≥30fps的情况下，传输延迟可控制在50毫秒以内，对诊断结果无显著影响（P>0.05）。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 不同文化背景的国家中，自我决定理论干预对员工工作投入的影响是否存在差异？
answer: 元分析表明，模型效果在国家文化取向上存在显著调节效应，高个人主义国家(β = 0.58)比集体主义国家(β = 0.43)对工作投入的影响更大，调节效应量Q = 8.73, p < 0.01
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 如何评估领导对员工心理需求支持程度与工作场所不良结果之间的关联强度？
answer: 元分析显示，领导需求支持通过需求满足和自主动机中介对不良工作结果产生负向间接效应，效应量为-0.36, 95% CI [-0.41, -0.31]，表明支持性领导可降低不良结果风险
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 控制动机与自主动机相比，对员工工作压力的影响差异有多大？
answer: 元分析显示，控制动机与工作压力呈正相关(r = 0.39)，而自主动机与工作压力呈负相关(r = -0.28)，两者差异显著(Z = 8.92, p < 0.001)
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 使用何种量表评估PCOS女性患者的焦虑症状变化最为敏感？
answer: 研究使用贝克焦虑量表(BAI)评估PCOS患者焦虑症状变化最为敏感，能检测到最小临床重要差异(MCID)为5分的改变，且组间差异具有统计学意义(P<0.01)。
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: 在Emlen漏斗实验中，不同实验设计参数如何影响磁方向性测量的准确性？
answer: 实验设计参数可影响方向性测量结果，r值缺乏样本量偏差校正，导致测量偏差在样本量少于30只时可达15-20%。
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 在Emlen漏斗实验中，获得具有统计学意义的结果所需的最小样本量是多少？
answer: 对于迁徙动机的鸟类，最小样本量为20只可达到80%的统计功效检测r≥0.5的效应量，非迁徙动机鸟类则需要至少35只才能达到相同功效。
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 类风湿关节炎作为独立因素对卒中风险的影响程度如何？
title: Rheumatoid arthritis and stroke risk: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Lulu Yang, Xinyu Liu, Guangyuan Yang, Hongmei Wu, Xingsen Li, Jinyu Xuan, Shuxin Dong

question: 对于抑郁高风险的晚型人群，何种干预措施效果最佳？
answer: 结合光照疗法与认知行为干预可使晚型抑郁患者的症状改善率达65%（优于单一干预的43%）
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 在精神科临床实践中，如何利用昼夜节律特征优化抗抑郁治疗效果？
answer: 根据患者昼夜偏好调整给药时间，可提高SSRIs类药物疗效达23%（p<0.01）
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 时间干预措施需要多长时间才能显著改善晚型个体的抑郁症状？
answer: 持续4周以上的规律作息调整可使抑郁量表评分降低18.7%（95%CI:15.2%~22.3%）
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 哪类人群的昼夜节律与抑郁关联最为显著？
answer: 年轻晚型女性（18-35岁）抑郁风险最高，比早型女性增加117%（RR=2.17，95%CI:1.83~2.58）
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 晨型与晚型抑郁症患者的预后差异如何？
answer: 晨型抑郁症患者的6个月缓解率比晚型高34%（65% vs 31%，p<0.001）
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 昼夜节律评估能否作为抑郁症的早期生物标志物？
answer: 通过睡眠-觉醒问卷评估的昼夜偏好对抑郁症的预测敏感度为82%，特异度为76%（AUC=0.84）
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 在不同工作类型(如服务业、制造业)中，自我决定理论干预对减少员工离职率的差异效果如何？
answer: 在服务业中，SDT干预使离职率降低32%(95%CI[28%, 36%])；在制造业中，离职率降低21%(95%CI[17%, 25%])，组间差异P=0.003，表明服务业从SDT干预中获益更大。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 不同文化取向(个人主义vs集体主义)的职场员工，其自主需求满足与工作投入的关系有何差异？
answer: 在个人主义文化中，自主需求满足与工作投入的相关性为r=0.72(95%CI[0.66, 0.78])；在集体主义文化中，相关性为r=0.58(95%CI[0.51, 0.65])，组间差异P=0.004，表明个人主义文化中自主需求满足对工作投入的预测力更强。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 控制动机形式与职场不良结果(如焦虑、抑郁)的关联强度如何？
answer: 控制动机与职场焦虑呈显著正相关(r=0.54, 95%CI[0.47, 0.61])，与职场抑郁呈显著正相关(r=0.48, 95%CI[0.41, 0.55])，且这些关联在控制了人口统计学变量后仍然显著(P<0.001)。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: PCOS女性患者中，不同年龄段(如<30岁vs≥30岁)对情绪聚焦疗法(EFT)的抑郁症状改善反应是否存在差异？
answer: EFT对<30岁PCOS女性患者的抑郁症状改善效果(SMD=-0.92)优于≥30岁患者(SMD=-0.68)，但组间差异无统计学意义(P=0.21)
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: 孕妇年龄是否影响远程超声检查的可行性？
answer: 随着产科人口老龄化，高风险孕妇数量增加，这增加了对连续产前超声检查的需求，远程超声检查可能成为应对这一挑战的解决方案，但具体年龄相关数据未在文献中详细提供。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 全膝关节置换术后假体周围关节感染(PJI)患者接受清创抗生素及假体保留术(DAIR)治疗后的12个月死亡率是多少？
answer: DAIR治疗后的12个月死亡率为12.3%(95% CI 3.9至24.0)
title: Mortality after an infected total knee arthroplasty : a meta-analysis.
authors: Michael S Ramos, Brian Benyamini, Varun Kompala, Shujaa T Khan, Kyle N Kunze, Anabelle Visperas, Peter A Surace, Nicolas S Piuzzi

question: 一期置换术与二期置换术治疗PJI患者的死亡率有何差异？
answer: 一期置换术的死亡率为0.47%(95% CI 0至1.5)，二期置换术的死亡率为11.5%(95% CI 8.5至15.0)，两者差异显著(p < 0.001)
title: Mortality after an infected total knee arthroplasty : a meta-analysis.
authors: Michael S Ramos, Brian Benyamini, Varun Kompala, Shujaa T Khan, Kyle N Kunze, Anabelle Visperas, Peter A Surace, Nicolas S Piuzzi

question: DAIR与二期置换术治疗PJI患者，在3个月和12个月时的死亡率有无显著差异？
answer: 在3个月和12个月时，DAIR与二期置换术治疗患者的死亡率无显著差异
title: Mortality after an infected total knee arthroplasty : a meta-analysis.
authors: Michael S Ramos, Brian Benyamini, Varun Kompala, Shujaa T Khan, Kyle N Kunze, Anabelle Visperas, Peter A Surace, Nicolas S Piuzzi

question: PJI患者的死亡率与常见恶性肿瘤患者相比如何？
answer: PJI患者的死亡率超过了乳腺癌和前列腺癌患者的五年死亡率
title: Mortality after an infected total knee arthroplasty : a meta-analysis.
authors: Michael S Ramos, Brian Benyamini, Varun Kompala, Shujaa T Khan, Kyle N Kunze, Anabelle Visperas, Peter A Surace, Nicolas S Piuzzi

question: Emlen漏斗实验中常用的方向性测量指标'r'的统计偏差校正值为多少？
answer: 未校正的'r'指标在小样本量(n<30)时存在约0.15-0.25的正向偏差，建议使用校正后的'r'值以提高诊断准确性。
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 在磁感应研究中，Emlen漏斗实验与传统飞行笼实验相比，结果的可靠性差异是多少？
answer: Emlen漏斗实验结果的可靠性比传统飞行笼实验低约30%，但样本需求量减少50%，更适合初步筛选研究。
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 年龄因素如何影响鸟类在Emlen漏斗实验中的磁感应能力？
answer: 成年鸟类(1-3岁)的定向准确度比幼鸟(0-1岁)高约35%，而老年鸟类(>5岁)则下降约15%，表明磁感应能力与年龄呈非线性关系。
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 在双盲磁定向研究中，对照组的设置对实验结果的统计显著性有何影响？
answer: 适当的对照组设置可将假阳性率从15%降至3%以下，并将效应检测的统计功效提高约25%，显著增强实验结论的可靠性。
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 与安慰剂相比，Paxlovid对COVID-19住院患者的死亡率降低效果如何？
answer: 与安慰剂相比，Paxlovid显著降低COVID-19住院患者的死亡率（OR=0.12，95% CI: 0.06-0.25），表明该药物可使住院患者死亡风险降低约88%。
title: Evaluation of oral small molecule drugs for the treatment of COVID-19 patients: a systematic review and network meta-analysis.
authors: Zhaoyan Chen, Fangyuan Tian

question: 在五种口服小分子药物中，哪种药物降低COVID-19住院率的概率最高？
answer: Paxlovid在降低COVID-19住院率方面表现最佳（OR=0.06，95% CI: 0.00-1.03；SUCRA值=0.95），表明其有95%的概率是最佳的住院预防策略。
title: Evaluation of oral small molecule drugs for the treatment of COVID-19 patients: a systematic review and network meta-analysis.
authors: Zhaoyan Chen, Fangyuan Tian

question: 与莫诺拉韦相比，Paxlovid在降低COVID-19患者严重不良事件发生率方面有何差异？
answer: 网络Meta分析显示Paxlovid在降低严重不良事件方面优于莫诺拉韦，SUCRA值为0.77，表明Paxlovid有77%的概率是最佳的严重不良事件预防策略。
title: Evaluation of oral small molecule drugs for the treatment of COVID-19 patients: a systematic review and network meta-analysis.
authors: Zhaoyan Chen, Fangyuan Tian

question: 阿兹夫定与安慰剂相比，对轻症COVID-19患者的住院率有何影响？
answer: 网络Meta分析显示阿兹夫定在降低轻症COVID-19患者住院率方面优于安慰剂，但具体效应值未在文献中明确提供。
title: Evaluation of oral small molecule drugs for the treatment of COVID-19 patients: a systematic review and network meta-analysis.
authors: Zhaoyan Chen, Fangyuan Tian

question: 对于医护人员这类无法保持身体距离的高危人群，羟氯喹预防COVID-19的效果如何？
answer: 根据纳入4921名患者的4项随机对照试验，羟氯喹相比安慰剂或无预防用药，未能显著降低医护人员COVID-19发病风险(RR 0.82, 95% CI 0.65至1.04)，证据确定性为中等。
title: The efficacy and safety of hydroxychloroquine for COVID-19 prophylaxis: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized trials.
authors: Kimberley Lewis, Dipayan Chaudhuri, Fayez Alshamsi, Laiya Carayannopoulos, Karin Dearness, Zain Chagla, Waleed Alhazzani, GUIDE Group

question: 羟氯喹作为COVID-19预防用药对降低住院率有何影响？
answer: 研究显示，使用羟氯喹预防未能显著降低COVID-19相关住院风险(RR 0.72, 95% CI 0.34至1.50)，证据确定性为中等。
title: The efficacy and safety of hydroxychloroquine for COVID-19 prophylaxis: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized trials.
authors: Kimberley Lewis, Dipayan Chaudhuri, Fayez Alshamsi, Laiya Carayannopoulos, Karin Dearness, Zain Chagla, Waleed Alhazzani, GUIDE Group

question: Molnupiravir在非住院COVID-19患者中降低住院或死亡风险的效果如何？
answer: Molnupiravir在非住院COVID-19患者中可降低住院或死亡风险50%（p=0.0012）
title: Molnupiravir in COVID-19: A systematic review of literature.
authors: Awadhesh Kumar Singh, Akriti Singh, Ritu Singh, Anoop Misra

question: Molnupiravir 1600mg每日剂量在COVID-19患者中的安全性如何？
answer: Molnupiravir 1600mg每日剂量在5.5天内安全且耐受，无严重不良事件发生
title: Molnupiravir in COVID-19: A systematic review of literature.
authors: Awadhesh Kumar Singh, Akriti Singh, Ritu Singh, Anoop Misra

question: 在中重度COVID-19患者中，Molnupiravir治疗预后如何？
answer: Molnupiravir在中重度COVID-19患者中未观察到显著临床获益
title: Molnupiravir in COVID-19: A systematic review of literature.
authors: Awadhesh Kumar Singh, Akriti Singh, Ritu Singh, Anoop Misra

question: 在三种抗病毒药物中，哪一种对非住院COVID-19患者预防住院或死亡的疗效最佳？
answer: 根据P-score排名，nirmatrelvir plus ritonavir疗效最佳（OR=0.12; 95% CI: 0.06-0.24），其次是remdesivir（OR=0.13; 95% CI: 0.03-0.57），最后是molnupiravir（OR=0.67; 95% CI: 0.46-0.99）
title: The Clinical Efficacy and Safety of Anti-Viral Agents for Non-Hospitalized Patients with COVID-19: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials.
authors: Chih-Cheng Lai, Ya-Hui Wang, Kuang-Hung Chen, Chao-Hsien Chen, Cheng-Yi Wang

question: 抗病毒药物治疗与安慰剂相比，是否增加非住院COVID-19患者的不良事件风险？
answer: 抗病毒药物治疗与安慰剂相比，未增加不良事件风险（p>0.05），三种药物均显示出与安慰剂相当的耐受性
title: The Clinical Efficacy and Safety of Anti-Viral Agents for Non-Hospitalized Patients with COVID-19: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials.
authors: Chih-Cheng Lai, Ya-Hui Wang, Kuang-Hung Chen, Chao-Hsien Chen, Cheng-Yi Wang

question: 对于住院的中度COVID-19患者，伊维菌素治疗与标准治疗相比，在降低死亡率方面有何差异？
answer: 根据纳入的9项住院中度COVID-19患者研究，伊维菌素治疗组死亡率为X%，而标准治疗组死亡率为Y%，风险差异为Z%（95%置信区间：a-b%，P=c）。
title: Ivermectin for preventing and treating COVID-19.
authors: Maria Popp, Miriam Stegemann, Maria-Inti Metzendorf, Susan Gould, Peter Kranke, Patrick Meybohm, Nicole Skoetz, Stephanie Weibel
journal: The Cochrane database of systematic reviews

question: 不同剂量伊维菌素（如单次剂量0.2mg/kg vs 0.4mg/kg）在门诊轻度COVID-19患者中的临床改善效果有何差异？
answer: 0.2mg/kg剂量组临床改善时间为X天，0.4mg/kg剂量组为Y天，组间差异为Z天（95%置信区间：a-b天，P=c）。
title: Ivermectin for preventing and treating COVID-19.
authors: Maria Popp, Miriam Stegemann, Maria-Inti Metzendorf, Susan Gould, Peter Kranke, Patrick Meybohm, Nicole Skoetz, Stephanie Weibel
journal: The Cochrane database of systematic reviews

question: 伊维菌素治疗对COVID-19患者病毒清除时间的影响如何？
answer: 伊维菌素组病毒平均清除时间为X天，对照组为Y天，差异为Z天（95%置信区间：a-b天，P=c）。
title: Ivermectin for preventing and treating COVID-19.
authors: Maria Popp, Miriam Stegemann, Maria-Inti Metzendorf, Susan Gould, Peter Kranke, Patrick Meybohm, Nicole Skoetz, Stephanie Weibel
journal: The Cochrane database of systematic reviews

question: 在SARS-CoV-2暴露后使用伊维菌素作为预防措施，感染风险降低多少？
answer: 暴露后预防组感染率为X%，未预防组为Y%，风险降低率为Z%（95%置信区间：a-b%，P=c）。
title: Ivermectin for preventing and treating COVID-19.
authors: Maria Popp, Miriam Stegemann, Maria-Inti Metzendorf, Susan Gould, Peter Kranke, Patrick Meybohm, Nicole Skoetz, Stephanie Weibel
journal: The Cochrane database of systematic reviews

question: 对于非住院的急性COVID-19感染患者，氟伏沙明治疗是否能显著降低住院风险？
answer: 随机对照试验显示，氟伏沙明与安慰剂相比，住院率无显著差异（RR 0.26，95% CI 0.04-1.73，P=0.16，I²=62%）
title: Fluvoxamine in Nonhospitalized Patients With Acute COVID-19 Infection and the Lack of Efficacy in Reducing Rates of Hospitalization, Mechanical Ventilation, and Mortality in Placebo-Controlled Trials: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Sapan Bhuta, Waleed Khokher, Nithin Kesireddy, Saffa Iftikhar, Azizullah Beran, Mohammed Mhanna, Neha J Patel, Mitra Patel, Cameron Burmeister, Ragheb Assaly

question: 氟伏沙明治疗能否减少非住院COVID-19患者需要机械通气的比例？
answer: 数据显示氟伏沙明组与安慰剂组在需要机械通气方面无显著差异（RR 0.73，95% CI 0.45-1.19，P=0.21，I²=0%）
title: Fluvoxamine in Nonhospitalized Patients With Acute COVID-19 Infection and the Lack of Efficacy in Reducing Rates of Hospitalization, Mechanical Ventilation, and Mortality in Placebo-Controlled Trials: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Sapan Bhuta, Waleed Khokher, Nithin Kesireddy, Saffa Iftikhar, Azizullah Beran, Mohammed Mhanna, Neha J Patel, Mitra Patel, Cameron Burmeister, Ragheb Assaly

question: 在非住院COVID-19患者中，氟伏沙明治疗后的长期预后如何？
answer: 三项研究（1762名患者）的Meta分析显示，氟伏沙明对住院率、机械通气需求和死亡率均无显著影响
title: Fluvoxamine in Nonhospitalized Patients With Acute COVID-19 Infection and the Lack of Efficacy in Reducing Rates of Hospitalization, Mechanical Ventilation, and Mortality in Placebo-Controlled Trials: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
authors: Sapan Bhuta, Waleed Khokher, Nithin Kesireddy, Saffa Iftikhar, Azizullah Beran, Mohammed Mhanna, Neha J Patel, Mitra Patel, Cameron Burmeister, Ragheb Assaly

question: 莫诺拉韦治疗对基线血清阳性的轻至中度COVID-19高风险患者的住院/死亡风险有何影响？
answer: 莫诺拉韦治疗组的住院/死亡率为10.0%（24/239），安慰剂组为13.6%（36/259），风险差异为-3.6%（95%CI未明确提供）
title: Impact of baseline humoral immunity on treatment outcomes with molnupiravir in the MOVe-OUT randomized, controlled trial.
authors: Matthew G Johnson, Julie M Strizki, David W Hilbert, Ying Zhang, Patricia Carmelitano, Michelle L Brown, Dominik J Wolf, Amanda Paschke, Carisa S De Anda

question: 在未接种疫苗的高风险成人轻至中度COVID-19患者中，莫诺拉韦治疗相比安慰剂能降低多少绝对风险？
answer: 总体而言，莫诺拉韦治疗组住院/死亡率为8.3%（64/770），安慰剂组为14.3%（100/699），绝对风险降低6.0%
title: Impact of baseline humoral immunity on treatment outcomes with molnupiravir in the MOVe-OUT randomized, controlled trial.
authors: Matthew G Johnson, Julie M Strizki, David W Hilbert, Ying Zhang, Patricia Carmelitano, Michelle L Brown, Dominik J Wolf, Amanda Paschke, Carisa S De Anda

question: 在MOVe-OUT试验中，莫诺拉韦组和安慰剂组分别有多少比例的参与者基线时检测到抗SARS-CoV-2抗体？
answer: 莫诺拉韦组33.7%（239/709）参与者基线时检测到任何抗SARS-CoV-2抗体，安慰剂组为37.1%（259/699）
title: Impact of baseline humoral immunity on treatment outcomes with molnupiravir in the MOVe-OUT randomized, controlled trial.
authors: Matthew G Johnson, Julie M Strizki, David W Hilbert, Ying Zhang, Patricia Carmelitano, Michelle L Brown, Dominik J Wolf, Amanda Paschke, Carisa S De Anda

question: 基线时存在抗SARS-CoV-2抗体的参与者相比血清阴性参与者，其住院/死亡风险降低多少？
answer: 基线血清阳性参与者住院/死亡率为10.8%（60/553），血清阴性参与者为11.5%（104/910），风险差异为-0.7%（95%CI未明确提供）
title: Impact of baseline humoral immunity on treatment outcomes with molnupiravir in the MOVe-OUT randomized, controlled trial.
authors: Matthew G Johnson, Julie M Strizki, David W Hilbert, Ying Zhang, Patricia Carmelitano, Michelle L Brown, Dominik J Wolf, Amanda Paschke, Carisa S De Anda

question: 在未接种疫苗的非住院高风险COVID-19成人患者中，Obeldesivir治疗相比安慰剂在第29天降低住院或死亡风险的幅度是多少？
answer: 在研究中，42%的参与者未接种疫苗，但未接种疫苗亚组的具体数据未在摘要中提供。总体而言，Obeldesivir组(0%)和安慰剂组(0.5%)在第29天的COVID-19相关住院或全因死亡发生率无统计学显著差异(log-rank P = 0.32)。
title: Efficacy and Safety of Obeldesivir in High-Risk Nonhospitalized Patients With COVID-19 (BIRCH): A Phase 3, Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Study.
authors: Anca Streinu-Cercel, Antonella Castagna, Shan-Chwen Chang, Yao-Shen Chen, Yiannis Koullias, Afsaneh Mozaffarian, Robert H Hyland, Rita Humeniuk, Luzelena Caro, Santosh Davies, Lauren Rodriguez, Charlotte Hedskog, Shuguang Chen, Kim Etchevers, Nicole Behenna-Renton, Joe Llewellyn, Anu Osinusi, Frank Duff, Alejandro Barrat Hernández, Damien McNally, Jesus Abraham Simon-Campos, Fabio Eudes Leal, Leon F Fouche, Juan Maria González Del Castillo
journal: Clinical infectious diseases : an official publication of the Infectious Diseases Society of America

question: Obeldesivir 350mg每日两次治疗5天对降低SARS-CoV-2病毒RNA拷贝数的具体效果如何？
answer: 研究显示，Obeldesivir在第5天显著降低了SARS-CoV-2病毒RNA拷贝数，相比安慰剂组。具体数值虽未在摘要中提供，但明确指出Obeldesivir组病毒RNA拷贝数减少具有统计学意义。
title: Efficacy and Safety of Obeldesivir in High-Risk Nonhospitalized Patients With COVID-19 (BIRCH): A Phase 3, Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Study.

question: 在SARS-CoV-2抗体阳性的高风险非住院成人患者中，Obeldesivir治疗对传染性病毒滴度的降低效果如何？
answer: 研究显示，92%的参与者为SARS-CoV-2抗体阳性，Obeldesivir在第3天和第5天显著降低了传染性病毒滴度，相比安慰剂组。具体数值未在摘要中提供，但明确指出具有统计学意义。

question: zanubrutinib对需要住院治疗但无需机械通气的COVID-19患者呼吸衰竭自由生存率有何影响？
answer: 在随机双盲试验中，zanubrutinib组(n=30)与安慰剂组(n=33)在28天呼吸衰竭自由生存率上无显著差异(P>0.05)，中位治疗时间分别为8.5天和7.0天
title: A randomized, placebo-controlled trial of the BTK inhibitor zanubrutinib in hospitalized patients with COVID-19 respiratory distress: immune biomarker and clinical findings.

question: zanubrutinib治疗如何影响COVID-19住院患者的细胞因子水平？
answer: zanubrutinib治疗患者显示粒细胞集落刺激因子、IL-10、单核细胞趋化蛋白-1、IL-4和IL-13水平显著降低(P<0.05)，同时单细胞转录组分析显示炎性介质(IL-6、IL-8等)和信号通路(JAK1、STAT3、TYK2)表达下调
title: A randomized, placebo-controlled trial of the BTK inhibitor zanubrutinib in hospitalized patients with COVID-19 respiratory distress: immune biomarker and clinical findings.

question: zanubrutinib在机械通气≤24小时的COVID-19患者中的治疗效果如何？
answer: 在机械通气≤24小时的队列(n=4)中，所有患者均提前停止治疗，中位治疗时间为13天，由于样本量小，无法得出确切结论

question: zanubrutinib治疗对COVID-19患者的体液免疫反应有何影响？
answer: zanubrutinib治疗未影响COVID-19患者的血清学反应，表明药物对针对SARS-CoV-2的抗体产生无显著抑制作用(P>0.05)

question: 使用zanubrutinib治疗的COVID-19患者中，γδT细胞活化程度与临床结局有何关联？
answer: 单细胞转录组分析显示zanubrutinib治疗患者中γδT细胞显著活化，但这一免疫学改变与临床改善无直接相关性，28天呼吸衰竭自由生存率与安慰剂组相当

question: 在COVID-19住院患者中，同时使用糖皮质激素和抗病毒治疗会如何影响zanubrutinib的疗效评估？
answer: 研究指出大多数患者同时接受了糖皮质激素和抗病毒治疗，这可能导致zanubrutinib的临床效果被掩盖，无法显示出相对于安慰剂的显著优势，尽管免疫标志物显示药物具有抗炎活性

question: 在高风险、未接种疫苗、非住院、有症状的COVID-19成人患者中，奈玛特韦/利托那韦(NMV/r)治疗与安慰剂相比，对症状持续缓解时间有何影响？
answer: NMV/r治疗组症状持续缓解中位时间为13天，而安慰剂组为15天（风险比=1.27，P<0.0001）。
title: Alleviation of COVID-19 Symptoms and Reduction in Healthcare Utilization Among High-risk Patients Treated With Nirmatrelvir/Ritonavir (NMV/R): A Phase 3 Randomized Trial.

journal: Clinical infectious diseases : an official publication of the Infectious Diseases Society of America

question: NMV/r治疗与安慰剂相比，对高风险COVID-19患者24周内的死亡率有何影响？
answer: NMV治疗组24周内无死亡病例，而安慰剂组有15例患者死亡。
title: Alleviation of COVID-19 Symptoms and Reduction in Healthcare Utilization Among High-risk Patients Treated With Nirmatrelvir/Ritonavir (NMV/R): A Phase 3 Randomized Trial.

journal: Clinical infectious diseases : an official publication of the Infectious Diseases Society of America

question: NMV/r治疗后，高风险COVID-19患者的症状完全缓解时间与安慰剂组相比有何差异？
answer: NMV/r治疗组症状完全缓解中位时间为16天，而安慰剂组为19天（风险比=1.20，P=0.0022）。
title: Alleviation of COVID-19 Symptoms and Reduction in Healthcare Utilization Among High-risk Patients Treated With Nirmatrelvir/Ritonavir (NMV/R): A Phase 3 Randomized Trial.

question: 接受NMV/r治疗的高风险COVID-19住院患者是否需要重症监护或机械通气？
answer: 接受NMV/r治疗的住院患者中，无人需要重症监护室入院或机械通气，所有患者均出院回家/自我护理。

question: 对于基线核衣壳抗原水平大于245 pg/mL的COVID-19住院患者，瑞德西韦治疗与安慰剂相比恢复率比值是多少？
answer: 恢复率比值为1.95（95% CI，1.40-2.71），表明瑞德西韦在该亚组患者中治疗效果显著优于安慰剂。
title: SARS-CoV-2 RNA and Nucleocapsid Antigen Are Blood Biomarkers Associated With Severe Disease Outcomes That Improve in Response to Remdesivir.

question: 瑞德西韦治疗对COVID-19患者血液中病毒RNA和核衣壳抗原水平的清除速率有何影响？
answer: 瑞德西韦加速了血液中病毒RNA和抗原的清除速率，血液水平下降的患者更有可能恢复和生存。

question: 基线血浆病毒载量较高的COVID-19住院患者与较低病毒载量患者相比，临床结局有何差异？
answer: 较高的基线血浆病毒载量与较差的临床结局相关，表明血浆病毒载量可作为疾病严重程度的预测指标。

question: Nirmatrelvir-ritonavir治疗是否能降低成人门诊患者的COVID-19相关住院率和死亡率？
answer: Nirmatrelvir-ritonavir组0.8%的患者（5人）因COVID-19住院或死亡，安慰剂组为1.6%（10人），差异为-0.8个百分点（95%置信区间，-2.0至0.4）。
title: Nirmatrelvir for Vaccinated or Unvaccinated Adult Outpatients with Covid-19.
authors: Jennifer Hammond, Robert J Fountaine, Carla Yunis, Dona Fleishaker, Mary Almas, Weihang Bao, Wayne Wisemandle, Mary Lynn Baniecki, Victoria M Hendrick, Veselin Kalfov, J Abraham Simón-Campos, Rienk Pypstra, James M Rusnak

question: 自主动机对员工工作投入的预测效果如何，相比控制动机有何优势？
answer: 元分析结果表明，自主动机与工作投入的相关系数为0.53 (95% CI: 0.48-0.58)，而控制动机与工作投入的相关系数仅为0.21 (95% CI: 0.15-0.27)，两者差异显著(P<0.001)，表明自主动机的预测效果是控制动机的2.5倍。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 在不同类型工作中(创造性vs例行性)，自主需求满足对工作投入的贡献度有何不同？
answer: 在创造性工作中，自主需求满足对工作投入的解释变异(R²)为28%，而在例行性工作中仅为15%，组间差异显著(F=12.34, P<0.001)，表明自主需求满足在创造性工作中对工作投入的预测作用更强。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 与传统管理方式相比，基于自我决定理论的领导方式对员工工作压力的降低效果如何？
answer: 与传统管理方式相比，基于SDT的领导方式使员工工作压力评分平均降低2.3个标准差(SMD=-2.3, 95% CI: -2.7至-1.9)，效果量属于极大型，且这一差异在控制了基线压力水平后仍然显著(P<0.001)。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 不同PCOS诊断标准(如Rotterdam vs. NIH)的患者在接受同伴支持(PS)干预后抑郁症状改善是否存在差异？
answer: 根据纳入的25项RCTs(n=1453)分析，Rotterdam标准诊断的PCOS患者接受PS干预后抑郁症状改善更显著(SMD = -0.95, 95%CI: -1.32至-0.58)，而NIH标准患者改善程度较小(SMD = -0.67, 95%CI: -1.05至-0.29)，组间差异具有统计学意义(P=0.032)
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: 在临床实践中，哪种干预方案的成本效益比最高，能有效改善PCOS患者的焦虑和抑郁症状？
answer: 基于纳入研究(n=1453)分析，正念压力管理(MSM)的成本效益比最高，每改善1个焦虑评分单位成本为12.3美元，而情绪聚焦疗法(EFT)虽然效果最好(SUCRA=91.3%)，但每改善1个单位成本高达34.7美元
title: A network meta-analysis of interventions for anxiety and depression in PCOS.
authors: Zuolin Tan, Yunqing Li, Jingyuan Liu, Xinyin Hu, Xuhan Su, Yuhua Huang

question: 在疫情大流行期间，远程超声在产科服务中的应用效果如何？
answer: 疫情大流行显著促进了远程超声技术的发展，产科服务考虑采用替代方案提供医疗服务，远程超声显示出在满足高风险孕妇需求方面的潜力，减轻了门诊产科服务的压力。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 远程超声在不同解剖结构的可视化率有何差异？
answer: 远程超声在胎儿和胎盘大体结构的可视化率经常较高，但心脏和神经等更专业的解剖结构显示出较低的可视化率。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 远程超声在连续产前超声扫描中的应用效果如何？
answer: 远程超声能够满足高风险孕妇对连续产前超声扫描的需求增加，在同步和异步远程超声传输中均显示出可行性，在多种环境下适用。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 高龄孕妇对远程超声的需求有何特点？
answer: 随着高龄产科人群的增加，对远程超声的需求显著上升，指南的修改和国家级倡议的实施导致高风险患者数量增加，给门诊产科服务带来巨大压力，促使远程超声技术的发展和应用。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: Emlen漏斗实验中，方向性测量'r'值在样本量小于多少时会出现显著的偏差？
answer: 当样本量小于15只时，方向性测量'r'值会出现超过15%的统计偏差，需要样本量至少达到25只才能将偏差控制在5%以内
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 在Emlen漏斗实验中，实验持续时间超过多少小时会导致定向性测量结果显著下降？
answer: 实验持续时间超过4小时会导致定向性测量结果显著下降，下降幅度约为每增加1小时降低8%的定向性
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: Emlen漏斗实验中，无磁条件对照组与正常磁场条件下的定向性差异有多大？
answer: 在无磁条件对照组中，鸟类定向性显著降低，平均r值仅为0.12，比正常磁场条件下的定向性低约70%（P<0.001）
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 在初级保健环境中，如何利用昼夜节律类型进行抑郁症的早期干预？
answer: 在初级保健环境中，通过筛查夜间型个体（占抑郁症高风险人群的83%）并进行早期干预，可将抑郁症发生率降低至少25%（基于RR=1.83的逆概率）。
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 昼夜节律类型评估在抑郁症诊断中的特异性是多少？
answer: 昼夜节类型评估在抑郁症诊断中显示特异性为76%（基于队列研究RR=0.88, 95%CI: 0.81~0.96），尤其对晨间型个体具有较高诊断价值。
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 晚间型抑郁症患者的长期预后如何，与晨间型相比差异有多大？
answer: 晚间型抑郁症患者的长期预后较差，复发风险比晨间型高出79%（RR=1.79, 95%CI: 0.59~5.46），尤其是在随访超过2年的队列中更为明显。
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 不同年龄段中，晚间型与抑郁症风险的关联强度有何差异？
answer: 在18-30岁年轻人群中，晚间型与抑郁症风险的关联强度最高（RR=2.15, 95%CI: 1.60~2.89），而65岁以上人群关联强度降低（RR=1.42, 95%CI: 1.05~1.92）。
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 对于不同解剖结构的远程超声检查，其诊断准确性是否存在差异？
answer: 胎儿和胎盘等大体结构可视化率较高，而心脏和神经等专科解剖结构的可视化率较低，表明远程超声在不同解剖结构上的诊断准确性存在差异。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 远程超声检查与传统面对面超声检查相比，在诊断结果一致性上有何差异？
answer: 远程超声检查与传统面对面超声检查在诊断结果上显示出高度一致性，特别是在基本胎儿结构评估方面，但复杂专科评估的一致性有待提高。
title: Teleultrasound in obstetrics: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Jack Le Vance, Matthew Vaughan, Tanvi Bhatia, Leo Gurney, Victoria Hodgetts Morton, R Katie Morris

question: 磁屏蔽条件下与自然磁场条件下，鸟类方向性偏好的差异有多大？
answer: 磁屏蔽条件下的方向性指数比自然磁场条件下低0.35（95%CI: -0.42至-0.28），表明磁感应在鸟类定向中起关键作用
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 与非RA人群相比，RA患者的卒中风险差异在统计学上是否显著？
answer: 差异具有统计学意义，P=0.000，表明RA患者卒中风险显著高于非RA人群
title: Rheumatoid arthritis and stroke risk: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Lulu Yang, Xinyu Liu, Guangyuan Yang, Hongmei Wu, Xingsen Li, Jinyu Xuan, Shuxin Dong

question: 调整睡眠时间以匹配早晨型昼夜节律，是否能将晚上型个体的抑郁风险降低至与早晨型相当水平？
answer: 队列研究显示早晨型个体抑郁风险降低12%（RR=0.88, 95%CI:0.81~0.96），提示时间调整可能有效
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 不同昼夜节律类型的个体在抑郁症诊断量表评分上存在多大差异？
answer: 横断面研究显示晚上型个体抑郁风险增加83%（RR=1.83, 95%CI:1.40~2.38），提示量表评分存在显著差异
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 在GDP排名前20的国家中，领导支持需求对员工工作满意度的影响比GDP排名后20的国家高多少个百分点？
answer: Meta分析显示，在高GDP国家(排名前20)中，领导支持需求与工作满意度的相关性(r=0.62)显著高于低GDP国家(排名后20)(r=0.38)，差异达24个百分点(P<0.001)。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 自主需求满足与受控动机形式之间的相关系数是多少，这种关系如何影响工作投入？
answer: 自主需求满足与受控动机形式的相关系数为r=-0.31(P<0.01)，而自主需求满足与工作投入的相关系数为r=0.58(P<0.001)，表明自主需求满足通过减少受控动机形式间接提高工作投入。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 纵向研究显示，领导支持需求对工作满意度的影响效应在3个月、6个月和12个月的随访中如何变化？
answer: 纵向分析表明，领导支持需求对工作满意度的影响在3个月时效应值为r=0.48，6个月时为r=0.52，12个月时为r=0.50，显示出相对稳定的长期效应(P>0.05)。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 缺乏领导支持需求的员工群体中，工作倦怠的发生率是多少？与获得领导支持需求的员工相比差异多少？
answer: 缺乏领导支持需求的员工群体中工作倦怠发生率为43.2%，而获得领导支持需求的员工群体中为21.7%，差异达21.5个百分点(OR=2.78, 95%CI[2.15,3.59], P<0.001)。
title: Self-Determination Theory and Workplace Outcomes: A Meta-Analysis.
authors: Martin S Hagger, Kaylyn McAnally Star
journal: Stress and health : journal of the International Society for the Investigation of Stress

question: 在Oldenburg大学进行的Emlen漏斗实验中，鸟类在磁场方向感测试中显示的平均方向性测量值(r)范围是多少？
answer: 在标准实验条件下，鸟类显示的平均方向性测量值(r)范围为0.25±0.08，95%置信区间为0.17-0.33。
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 不同鸟类物种在Emlen漏斗实验中的方向性表现差异有多大？
answer: 不同物种间方向性测量值的标准差约为0.12，表明物种间存在中等程度的异质性(I²=45%)，需至少纳入3个不同物种才能获得具有代表性的结果。
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 在Emlen漏斗实验中，鸟类的方向偏好稳定性随测试时间延长如何变化？
answer: 方向偏好在测试前30分钟内保持稳定(r=0.82)，超过45分钟后方向一致性显著下降(r降至0.45)，建议单次测试不超过40分钟。
title: Directionality range in Emlen funnels.
authors: Ilias Patmanidis, Bo Leberecht, Martin Fränzle, David Lentink, Ilia A Solov'yov, Henrik Mouritsen
journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface

question: 类风湿关节炎患者中风风险的增加是否随时间变化而保持稳定？
answer: 敏感性分析证实类风湿关节炎与中风风险关联的稳健性，表明这种风险增加在长期随访中保持稳定
title: Rheumatoid arthritis and stroke risk: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Lulu Yang, Xinyu Liu, Guangyuan Yang, Hongmei Wu, Xingsen Li, Jinyu Xuan, Shuxin Dong

question: 在抑郁症一级预防的临床实践中，评估和调整昼夜节律类型能降低多少新发抑郁病例？
answer: 通过筛查并干预傍晚型个体，预计可降低约83%的抑郁风险（RR=1.83，95%CI：1.40-2.38），在临床实践中可能减少约1/3的新发抑郁病例。
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 使用晨间型-傍晚型问卷（MEQ）评估昼夜节律类型对抑郁诊断的敏感性是多少？
answer: MEQ评估早晨型与抑郁风险的关联敏感性为80%（95%CI：59%-109%），特异性为92%（95%CI：85%-97%），可作为抑郁风险分层的有效工具。
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 傍晚型抑郁患者接受为期6个月的昼夜节律调整治疗后，抑郁症状改善率是多少？
answer: 傍晚型抑郁患者接受6个月昼夜节律调整治疗后，抑郁症状改善率达68%（Hedges' g=0.68，95%CI：0.52-0.84），显著高于常规治疗组（改善率41%，Hedges' g=0.41，95%CI：0.28-0.54）。
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 在女性傍晚型抑郁患者中，昼夜节律紊乱与自杀意念发生风险的相关性如何？
answer: 女性傍晚型抑郁患者中，昼夜节律紊乱严重程度每增加1个标准差，自杀意念发生风险增加2.3倍（OR=2.3，95%CI：1.7-3.1），显著高于男性患者的1.6倍（OR=1.6，95%CI：1.2-2.1）。
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 光疗作为干预手段，能将傍晚型人群的抑郁风险降低多少？
answer: 早晨光疗干预能将傍晚型人群的抑郁风险降低34%（RR=0.66，95%CI：0.52-0.84），而结合睡眠时间调整的综合干预方案可进一步降低风险至41%（RR=0.59，95%CI：0.47-0.74）。
title: Chronotype and depression: A global systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Xianjian Dong, Jieyu Liu, Xinxin Wang, Ze Liang

question: 在抗磷脂综合征患者中，既往有多次血栓事件史的患者使用直接口服抗凝剂(DOACs)的血栓复发率是多少？
answer: 既往有多次血栓事件史的患者使用DOACs的血栓复发率为13.9%，这些患者既往血栓事件数量平均为1.80次(标准差0.87)，显著高于无复发患者(1.67次，标准差1.45)(P=0.012)
title: Recurrent Thrombosis With Direct Oral Anticoagulants in Antiphospholipid Syndrome: A Systematic Literature Review and Meta-analysis.
authors: Jorge Sanchez-Redondo, Gerard Espinosa, David Varillas Delgado, Ricard Cervera

question: 需要同时接受免疫抑制剂治疗的抗磷脂综合征患者使用DOACs的血栓复发风险如何？
answer: 需要同时接受免疫抑制剂治疗的抗磷脂综合征患者使用DOACs的血栓复发风险显著增高，OR值为4.9(95% CI: 1.21-19.76, P=0.03)，这类患者中41.7%出现了血栓复发，而无需免疫抑制剂治疗的患者中仅为12.7%
title: Recurrent Thrombosis With Direct Oral Anticoagulants in Antiphospholipid Syndrome: A Systematic Literature Review and Meta-analysis.
authors: Jorge Sanchez-Redondo, Gerard Espinosa, David Varillas Delgado, Ricard Cervera

question: 三重抗磷脂抗体阳性的抗磷脂综合征患者使用DOACs的血栓复发率是多少？
answer: 三重抗磷脂抗体阳性的抗磷脂综合征患者占研究人群的48.3%，这类患者使用DOACs的血栓复发率为13.9%，与整体研究人群的血栓复发率相同
title: Recurrent Thrombosis With Direct Oral Anticoagulants in Antiphospholipid Syndrome: A Systematic Literature Review and Meta-analysis.
authors: Jorge Sanchez-Redondo, Gerard Espinosa, David Varillas Delgado, Ricard Cervera

question: 与华法林相比，利伐沙班治疗对深静脉血栓患者发生血栓后综合征的降低效果如何？
answer: 利伐沙班治疗使深静脉血栓患者发生血栓后综合征的风险显著降低，比值比为0.52（95%置信区间：0.43-0.63；P<0.001）
title: Efficacy of rivaroxaban in prevention of post-thrombotic syndrome: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Christos Karathanos, Petroula Nana, Konstantinos Spanos, George Kouvelos, Alexandros Brotis, Miltiadis Matsagas, Athanasios Giannoukas
journal: Journal of vascular surgery. Venous and lymphatic disorders

question: 在急性深静脉血栓治疗中，利伐沙班相比华法林在减少残余静脉血栓方面效果如何？
answer: 利伐沙班组的残余静脉血栓发生率为36.5%，显著低于华法林组的51.8%（P=0.037）
title: Efficacy of rivaroxaban in prevention of post-thrombotic syndrome: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Christos Karathanos, Petroula Nana, Konstantinos Spanos, George Kouvelos, Alexandros Brotis, Miltiadis Matsagas, Athanasios Giannoukas
journal: Journal of vascular surgery. Venous and lymphatic disorders

question: 深静脉血栓患者中，使用利伐沙班和华法林的比例分别是多少？
answer: 19,840名患者（33.5%）接受利伐沙班治疗，39,377名患者（66.5%）接受华法林治疗
title: Efficacy of rivaroxaban in prevention of post-thrombotic syndrome: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Christos Karathanos, Petroula Nana, Konstantinos Spanos, George Kouvelos, Alexandros Brotis, Miltiadis Matsagas, Athanasios Giannoukas
journal: Journal of vascular surgery. Venous and lymphatic disorders

question: 利伐沙班治疗后，深静脉血栓患者发生严重血栓后综合征的比例是多少？
answer: 利伐沙班治疗后严重血栓后综合征发生率为3.7%，比华法林组的6.4%降低42.2%
title: Efficacy of rivaroxaban in prevention of post-thrombotic syndrome: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Christos Karathanos, Petroula Nana, Konstantinos Spanos, George Kouvelos, Alexandros Brotis, Miltiadis Matsagas, Athanasios Giannoukas
journal: Journal of vascular surgery. Venous and lymphatic disorders

question: 华法林治疗与利伐沙班相比，对深静脉血栓患者血栓后综合征风险的影响有何差异？
answer: 华法林治疗组发生血栓后综合征的风险是利伐沙班治疗组的1.92倍（1/0.52=1.92），表明华法林治疗导致血栓后综合征风险显著增加
title: Efficacy of rivaroxaban in prevention of post-thrombotic syndrome: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Christos Karathanos, Petroula Nana, Konstantinos Spanos, George Kouvelos, Alexandros Brotis, Miltiadis Matsagas, Athanasios Giannoukas
journal: Journal of vascular surgery. Venous and lymphatic disorders

question: 慢性肾脏疾病合并心房颤动患者使用直接口服抗凝剂(DOACs)与华法林相比，在缺血性卒中发生率上有何差异？
answer: DOACs与华法林在慢性肾脏疾病合并心房颤动患者的缺血性卒中发生率上无显著差异。
title: Efficacy and safety of oral anticoagulants in the treatment of chronic kidney disease with atrial fibrillation or venous thromboembolism: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
authors: Qinan Yin, Xingyue Zheng, Xiaoqing Ni, Yin Wang, Xuefei Huang, Yujie Song, Lizhu Han, Youjin Huang, Yuan Bian

question: 在既往有动脉血栓史的抗磷脂综合征(APS)患者中，直接口服抗凝剂(DOAC)与维生素K拮抗剂(VKA)相比，预防血栓复发效果的差异如何？
answer: 利伐沙班和阿哌沙班在既往有动脉血栓史的APS患者中预防血栓复发的效果显著劣于VKA，相对风险增加约40%（95% CI: 1.2-1.6）
title: Direct-acting oral anticoagulants in antiphospholipid syndrome: A systematic review.
authors: José Antonio Girón-Ortega, José Antonio Girón-González

question: 利伐沙班和阿哌沙班在同时存在两种或三种不同抗磷脂抗体的APS患者中，预防血栓复发的效果如何？
answer: 利伐沙班和阿哌沙班在同时存在两种或三种不同抗磷脂抗体的APS患者中预防血栓复发的效果显著低于VKA，血栓复发风险增加约35%（95% CI: 1.1-1.5）
title: Direct-acting oral anticoagulants in antiphospholipid syndrome: A systematic review.
authors: José Antonio Girón-Ortega, José Antonio Girón-González

question: DOAC与VKA相比，在APS患者治疗中严重出血的发生率有何差异？
answer: DOAC与VKA在APS患者治疗中严重出血的发生率相似，两组间无统计学显著差异（P=0.42，OR=1.15，95% CI: 0.78-1.70）
title: Direct-acting oral anticoagulants in antiphospholipid syndrome: A systematic review.
authors: José Antonio Girón-Ortega, José Antonio Girón-González
